        "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage config\n\nimport (\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"reflect\"\n\t\"sort\"\n\t\"testing\"\n)\n\nfunc TestConfigSetResolvers(t *testing.T) {\n\ttype fields struct {\n\t\tconfig *Config\n\t}\n\ttype args struct {\n\t\tresolvers []string\n\t}\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname   string\n\t\tfields fields\n\t\targs   args\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:   \"success\",\n\t\t\tfields: fields{config: &Config{}},\n\t\t\targs: args{\n\t\t\t\tresolvers: []string{\"127.0.0.1\", \"127.0.0.2\", \"127.0.0.3\"},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\ttt.fields.config.SetResolvers(tt.args.resolvers...)\n\n\t\t\tsort.Strings(tt.fields.config.Resolvers)\n\t\t\tif !reflect.DeepEqual(tt.args.resolvers, tt.fields.config.Resolvers) {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"SetResolvers() = %v, want %v\",\n\t\t\t\t\ttt.args.resolvers, tt.fields.config.Resolvers)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestLoadResolverSettings(t *testing.T) {\n\tc := NewConfig()\n\tc.Options = make(map[string]interface{})\n\n\t// Test with no resolvers in options\n\terr := c.loadResolverSettings(c)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected no error when no resolvers are provided, got an error\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Test with incorrect type in resolvers\n\tc.Options[\"resolvers\"] = \"Not a slice\"\n\terr = c.loadResolverSettings(c)\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected an error when resolvers are not a slice, got nil\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Test with valid resolvers\n\tc.Options[\"resolvers\"] = []interface{}{\"192.0.2.1\", \"192.0.2.2\"}\n\terr = c.loadResolverSettings(c)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"Got an error when valid resolvers are provided, expected nil. Error: %v\", err)\n\t}\n\n\t// Test with valid resolvers including duplicates\n\tc.Options[\"resolvers\"] = []interface{}{\"192.0.2.1\", \"192.0.2.2\", \"192.0.2.1\"}\n\terr = c.loadResolverSettings(c)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"Got an error when valid resolvers (including duplicates) are provided, expected nil. Error: %v\", err)\n\t}\n\n\t// Test with valid file path with resolvers\n\t_ = os.WriteFile(\"testResolvers.txt\", []byte(\"192.0.2.3\\n192.0.2.4\"), 0644)\n\tc.Options[\"resolvers\"] = []interface{}{\"192.0.2.1\", \"192.0.2.2\", \"testResolvers.txt\"}\n\terr = c.loadResolverSettings(c)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"Got an error when valid resolvers and valid file path are provided, expected nil. Error: %v\", err)\n\t}\n\tdefer func() { _ = os.Remove(\"testResolvers.txt\") }()\n}\n\nfunc TestLoadResolversFromFile(t *testing.T) {\n\tc := NewConfig()\n\n\t// Test with non-existing file\n\t_, err := c.loadResolversFromFile(\"nonExistingFile.txt\")\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected an error when file does not exist, got nil\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Test with invalid IPs in file\n\t_ = os.WriteFile(\"invalidResolvers.txt\", []byte(\"192.0.2.300\\ninvalidIP\"), 0644)\n\t_, err = c.loadResolversFromFile(\"invalidResolvers.txt\")\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected an error when file contains invalid IPs, got nil\")\n\t}\n\t_ = os.Remove(\"invalidResolvers.txt\")\n\n\t// Test with valid IPs in file\n\t_ = os.WriteFile(\"validResolvers.txt\", []byte(\"192.0.2.3\\n192.0.2.4\"), 0644)\n\tresolvers, err := c.loadResolversFromFile(\"validResolvers.txt\")\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"Got an error when file contains valid IPs, expected nil. Error: %v\", err)\n\t}\n\n\tif len(resolvers) != 2 {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected 2 resolvers, got %v\", len(resolvers))\n\t}\n\n\tif resolvers[0] != \"192.0.2.3\" || resolvers[1] != \"192.0.2.4\" {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"Resolvers do not match expected values. Got: %v\", resolvers)\n\t}\n\t_ = os.Remove(\"validResolvers.txt\")\n}\n"

        "name": "scope.go",
        "path": "config/scope.go",
        "type": "file",
        "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage config\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"net\"\n\t\"regexp\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\t\"github.com/caffix/stringset\"\n\tamassnet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/internal/net\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/internal/net/dns\"\n)\n\nfunc (c *Config) loadSeedandScopeSettings() error {\n\tif c.Seed == nil || c.Seed.isScopeEmpty(false) {\n\t\tif c.Scope == nil {\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"config seed and scope are not initialized\")\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tif err := c.Scope.populate(); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tc.Seed = c.Scope\n\t\t\treturn nil\n\t\t}\n\t} else if err := c.Seed.populate(); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tif c.Scope == nil || !c.Scope.isScopeEmpty(true) {\n\t\tif err := c.Seed.populate(); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t}\n\t\tc.Scope = c.Seed\n\t\tc.Scope.Ports = []int{80, 443}\n\t\treturn nil\n\t} else if err := c.Scope.populate(); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) isScopeEmpty(scopeSwitch bool) bool {\n\tif len(s.Domains) > 0 {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\tif len(s.Addresses) > 0 {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\tif len(s.CIDRs) > 0 {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\tif len(s.ASNs) > 0 {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\tif len(s.IP) > 0 {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\tif scopeSwitch && portCheck(s.Ports) {\n\t\treturn false\n\t} else if len(s.Ports) > 0 {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\tif len(s.Blacklist) > 0 {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\treturn true\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) populate() error {\n\t// Convert string CIDRs to net.IP and net.IPNet\n\ts.CIDRs = s.toCIDRs(s.CIDRStrings)\n\n\t// Convert PortsRaw to Ports\n\tif err := s.parsePorts(); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tparseIPs := ParseIPs{} // Create a new ParseIPs, which is a []net.IP under the hood\n\t// Validate IP ranges in c.Scope.IP\n\tfor _, ipRange := range s.IP {\n\t\tif err := parseIPs.parseRange(ipRange); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\t// append parseIPs (which is a []net.IP) to c.Scope.IP\n\ts.Addresses = append(s.Addresses, parseIPs...)\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) parsePorts() error {\n\n\tif len(s.PortsRaw) != 0 {\n\t\ts.Ports = []int{}\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, port := range s.PortsRaw {\n\t\tswitch p := port.(type) {\n\t\tcase int: // If it's an integer, just append\n\t\t\ts.Ports = append(s.Ports, p)\n\t\tcase string: // If it's a string, check if it's a range or a single port\n\t\t\tif strings.Contains(p, \"-\") {\n\t\t\t\t// Handle port range\n\t\t\t\tportRange, err := convertPortRangeToSlice(p)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\ts.Ports = append(s.Ports, portRange...)\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t// Handle single port string\n\t\t\t\tportNum, err := strconv.Atoi(p)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"invalid port string: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\ts.Ports = append(s.Ports, portNum)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"unsupported port type: %T\", p)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc convertPortRangeToSlice(portRange string) ([]int, error) {\n\tvar ports []int\n\n\tparts := strings.Split(portRange, \"-\")\n\tif len(parts) != 2 {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"invalid port range format\")\n\t}\n\n\tstart, err := strconv.Atoi(parts[0])\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"invalid start port: %v\", err)\n\t}\n\n\tend, err := strconv.Atoi(parts[1])\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"invalid end port: %v\", err)\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := start; i <= end; i++ {\n\t\tports = append(ports, i)\n\t}\n\n\treturn ports, nil\n}\n\n// returns true is ports match default ports (80,443), otherwise return false\nfunc portCheck(ports []int) bool {\n\tdefaultPorts := []int{80, 443}\n\n\tportSet := make(map[int]struct{}, len(ports))\n\tfor _, v := range ports {\n\t\tportSet[v] = struct{}{}\n\t}\n\tif len(portSet) > len(defaultPorts) {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\tfor _, v := range defaultPorts {\n\t\tif _, found := portSet[v]; !found {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn true\n}\n\n// DomainRegex returns the Regexp object for the domain name identified by the parameter.\nfunc (c *Config) DomainRegex(domain string) *regexp.Regexp {\n\tc.Lock()\n\tdefer c.Unlock()\n\n\tif re, found := c.regexps[domain]; found {\n\t\treturn re\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// AddDomains appends the domain names provided in the parameter to the list in the configuration.\nfunc (c *Config) AddDomains(domains ...string) {\n\tfor _, d := range domains {\n\t\tc.AddDomain(d)\n\t}\n}\n\n// AddDomain appends the domain name provided in the parameter to the list in the configuration.\nfunc (c *Config) AddDomain(domain string) {\n\tc.Lock()\n\tdefer c.Unlock()\n\n\t// Check that the domain string is not empty\n\td := strings.TrimSpace(domain)\n\tif d == \"\" {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\t// Check that it is a domain with at least two labels\n\tlabels := strings.Split(d, \".\")\n\tif len(labels) < 2 {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Check that none of the labels are empty\n\tfor _, label := range labels {\n\t\tif label == \"\" {\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Check that the regular expression map has been initialized\n\tif c.regexps == nil {\n\t\tc.regexps = make(map[string]*regexp.Regexp)\n\t}\n\n\t// Create the regular expression for this domain\n\tc.regexps[d] = dns.SubdomainRegex(d)\n\tif c.regexps[d] != nil {\n\t\t// Add the domain string to the list\n\t\tc.Scope.Domains = append(c.Scope.Domains, d)\n\t}\n\n\tc.Scope.Domains = stringset.Deduplicate(c.Scope.Domains)\n}\n\n// Domains returns the list of domain names currently in the configuration.\nfunc (c *Config) Domains() []string {\n\tc.Lock()\n\tdefer c.Unlock()\n\n\treturn c.Scope.Domains\n}\n\n// IsDomainInScope returns true if the DNS name in the parameter ends with a domain in the config list.\nfunc (c *Config) IsDomainInScope(name string) bool {\n\tvar discovered bool\n\n\tif domain := c.WhichDomain(name); domain != \"\" {\n\t\tdiscovered = true\n\t}\n\n\treturn discovered\n}\n\n// WhichDomain returns the domain in the config list that the DNS name in the parameter ends with.\nfunc (c *Config) WhichDomain(name string) string {\n\tn := strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(name))\n\n\tfor _, d := range c.Domains() {\n\t\tif hasPathSuffix(n, d) {\n\t\t\treturn d\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn \"\"\n}\n\nfunc hasPathSuffix(path, suffix string) bool {\n\tif strings.HasSuffix(path, suffix) {\n\t\tplen := len(path)\n\t\tslen := len(suffix)\n\n\t\t// Check for exact match first to guard against out of bound index\n\t\tif plen == slen || path[plen-slen-1] == '.' {\n\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\n// IsAddressInScope returns true if the addr parameter matches provided network scope and when\n// no network scope has been set.\nfunc (c *Config) IsAddressInScope(addr string) bool {\n\tip := net.ParseIP(addr)\n\tif ip == nil {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tif len(c.Scope.Addresses) == 0 && len(c.Scope.CIDRs) == 0 {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\tfor _, cidr := range c.Scope.CIDRs {\n\t\tif cidr.Contains(ip) {\n\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tfor _, a := range c.Scope.Addresses {\n\t\tif a.Equal(ip) {\n\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\n// BlacklistSubdomain adds a subdomain name to the config blacklist.\nfunc (c *Config) BlacklistSubdomain(name string) {\n\tc.blacklistLock.Lock()\n\tdefer c.blacklistLock.Unlock()\n\n\tset := stringset.New(c.Scope.Blacklist...)\n\tdefer set.Close()\n\tset.Insert(strings.TrimSpace(name))\n\n\tc.Scope.Blacklist = set.Slice()\n}\n\n// Blacklisted returns true is the name in the parameter ends with a subdomain name in the config blacklist.\nfunc (c *Config) Blacklisted(name string) bool {\n\tc.blacklistLock.Lock()\n\tdefer c.blacklistLock.Unlock()\n\n\tn := strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(name))\n\n\tfor _, bl := range c.Scope.Blacklist {\n\t\tif hasPathSuffix(n, bl) {\n\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn false\n}\n\n// ParseIPs represents a slice of net.IP addresses.\ntype ParseIPs []net.IP\n\nfunc (p *ParseIPs) String() string {\n\tif p == nil {\n\t\treturn \"\"\n\t}\n\n\tvar ipaddrs []string\n\tfor _, ipaddr := range *p {\n\t\tipaddrs = append(ipaddrs, ipaddr.String())\n\t}\n\treturn strings.Join(ipaddrs, \",\")\n}\n\n// Set implements the flag.Value interface.\nfunc (p *ParseIPs) Set(s string) error {\n\tif s == \"\" {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"IP address parsing failed\")\n\t}\n\n\tips := strings.Split(s, \",\")\n\tfor _, ip := range ips {\n\t\t// Is this an IP range?\n\t\terr := p.parseRange(ip)\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\taddr := net.ParseIP(ip)\n\t\tif addr == nil {\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"%s is not a valid IP address or range\", ip)\n\t\t}\n\t\t*p = append(*p, addr)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (p *ParseIPs) appendIPs(addrs []net.IP) error {\n\tfor _, addr := range addrs {\n\t\t*p = append(*p, addr)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (p *ParseIPs) parseRange(s string) error {\n\ttwoIPs := strings.Split(s, \"-\")\n\n\t// If s is not a range, try parsing it as a single IP\n\tif twoIPs[0] == s {\n\t\tip := net.ParseIP(s)\n\t\tif ip == nil {\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"%s is not a valid IP\", s)\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn p.appendIPs([]net.IP{ip})\n\t}\n\tstart := net.ParseIP(twoIPs[0])\n\tend := net.ParseIP(twoIPs[1])\n\tif end == nil {\n\t\tnum, err := strconv.Atoi(twoIPs[1])\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tend = net.ParseIP(twoIPs[0])\n\t\t\tend[len(end)-1] = byte(num)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif start == nil || end == nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"%s is not a valid IP range\", s)\n\t}\n\n\tips := amassnet.RangeHosts(start, end)\n\tif len(ips) == 0 {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"%s is not a valid IP range\", s)\n\t}\n\treturn p.appendIPs(ips)\n}\n"

\"missing label\",\n\t\t\targs:      args{[]string{\"owasp\"}},\n\t\t\twantFound: false,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"empty label\",\n\t\t\targs:      args{[]string{\"owasp.\"}},\n\t\t\twantFound: false,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tc := NewConfig() // Use NewConfig() instead of {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfound = true\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tif !found && tt.wantFound {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Config.AddDomains() error = domain %v missing from config.domains\", *ParseIPs\n\t\targs    args\n\t\twantErr bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:    \"basic success - full range\",\n\t\t\tp:       new(ParseIPs),\n\t\t\targs:    args{s: nil,\n\t\t\twant: \"\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tif got := tt.p.String(); got != tt.want {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"ParseIPs.String() = %v, string\n\t\tconfig  *Config\n\t\tdomains []string\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:    \"blacklist success\",\n\t\t\tconfig:  NewConfig(), // Use NewConfig() instead of new(Config)\n\t\t\tdomains: tt.config.Scope.Blacklist) {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"BlacklistSubdomain() wanted %v, got %v\", tt.domains, tt.config.Scope.Blacklist)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestLoadScopeSettings(t *testing.T) {\n\ttype args struct {\n\t\tcfg []byte\n\t}\n\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname          string\n\t\targs          args\n\t\twantErr       bool\n\t\tassertionFunc func(*testing.T, *Config)\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"failure - invalid address range\",\n\t\t\targs: args{cfg: []byte(`\nscope:\n  ips:\n    - 1.2.3.4-1.1.1.1`)},\n\t\t\twantErr: true,\n\t\t\tassertionFunc: func(t *testing.T, c *Config) {\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"success - valid IPv4 addresses\",\n\t\t\targs: args{cfg: []byte(`\nscope:\n  ips:\n    - 1.2.3.4\n    - 0.0.0.0\n    - 255.255.255.255`)},\n\t\t\twantErr: false,\n\t\t\tassertionFunc: func(t *testing.T, c *Config) {\n\t\t\t\tif len(c.Scope.Addresses) != 3 {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"failed to load addresses\")\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"success - valid IPv6 addresses\",\n\t\t\targs: args{cfg: []byte(`\nscope:\n  ips:\n    - '::'\n    - '1111:2222:3333:4444:5555:6666:7777:8888'\n    - '1:2:0001:deca:f000:00c0:ff:ee'`)},\n\t\t\twantErr: false,\n\t\t\tassertionFunc: func(t *testing.T, c *Config) {\n\t\t\t\tif len(c.Scope.Addresses) != 3 {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"failed to load addresses %v\", c.Scope.Addresses)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"success - valid cidr\",\n\t\t\targs: args{cfg: []byte(`\nscope:\n  cidrs:\n    - 1.2.3.4/8`)},\n\t\t\twantErr: false,\n\t\t\tassertionFunc: func(t *testing.T, c *Config) {\n\t\t\t\tif len(c.Scope.CIDRStrings) != 1 {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"failed to load cidr\")\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"success - valid asn\",\n\t\t\targs: args{cfg: []byte(`\nscope:\n  asns:\n    - 26808`)},\n\t\t\twantErr: false,\n\t\t\tassertionFunc: func(t *testing.T, c *Config) {\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"success - valid domain in scope domains\",\n\t\t\targs: args{cfg: []byte(`\nscope:\n  domains:\n    - owasp.org`)},\n\t\t\twantErr: false,\n\t\t\tassertionFunc: func(t *testing.T, c *Config) {\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"success - valid subdomain in section scope.blacklisted\",\n\t\t\targs: args{cfg: []byte(`\nscope:\n  blacklist:\n    - gopher.example.com`)},\n\t\t\twantErr: false,\n\t\t\tassertionFunc: func(t *testing.T, c *Config) {\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"success - valid ports in section with range in scope.PortsRaw\",\n\t\t\targs: args{cfg: []byte(`\nscope:\n  ports: # ports to be used when actively reaching a service\n    - \"80\"\n    - 443\n    - 8080-8088`)},\n\t\t\twantErr: false,\n\t\t\tassertionFunc: func(t *testing.T, c *Config) {\n\t\t\t\tif len(c.Scope.Ports) != 11 {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"failed to load ports\")\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\texpected := map[int]struct{}{\n\t\t\t\t\t80:   {},\n\t\t\t\t\t443:  {},\n\t\t\t\t\t8080: {},\n\t\t\t\t\t8081: {},\n\t\t\t\t\t8082: {},\n\t\t\t\t\t8083: {},\n\t\t\t\t\t8084: {},\n\t\t\t\t\t8085: {},\n\t\t\t\t\t8086: {},\n\t\t\t\t\t8087: {},\n\t\t\t\t\t8088: {},\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tfor _, v := range c.Scope.Ports {\n\t\t\t\t\tif _, ok := expected[v]; !ok {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"failed to load ports\")\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tc := NewConfig()\n\n\t\t\t// Create a temporary file and write the config data to it\n\t\t\ttmpfile, err := os.CreateTemp(\"\", \"config\")\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatal(err)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Obtain the absolute path of the file\n\t\t\tabsPath, err := filepath.Abs(tmpfile.Name())\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatal(err)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tdefer func() { _ = os.Remove(absPath) }() // clean up\n\n\t\t\tif _, err := tmpfile.Write(tt.args.cfg); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatal(err)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif err := tmpfile.Close(); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatal(err)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Call LoadScopeSettings with the absolute file path\n\t\t\terr = c.LoadSettings(absPath)\n\n\t\t\tif (err != nil) != tt.wantErr {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\" %v error = %v\", tt.name, err)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\ttt.assertionFunc(t, c)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n"

        "name": "transform.go",
        "path": "config/transform.go",
        "type": "file",
        "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage config\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n)\n\n// Transformation represents an individual transofmration with optional priority & confidence.\ntype Transformation struct {\n\tFrom       string   `yaml:\"-\" json:\"-\"`\n\tTo         string   `yaml:\"-\" json:\"-\"`\n\tPriority   int      `yaml:\"priority,omitempty\" json:\"priority,omitempty\"`\n\tConfidence int      `yaml:\"confidence,omitempty\" json:\"confidence,omitempty\"`\n\tExclude    []string `yaml:\"exclude,omitempty\" json:\"exclude,omitempty\"`\n\tTTL        int      `yaml:\"ttl,omitempty\" json:\"ttl,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// Matches represents a collection of transform matches.\ntype Matches struct {\n\tlock sync.Mutex\n\tto   map[string]struct {\n\t\tttl        int\n\t\tconfidence int\n\t}\n}\n\n// loadTransformSettings processes the Transformations map from the configuration,\n// assigning structured data to each Transformation based on its key.\n// Each key is parsed into 'From' and 'To' segments, representing the origin and target\n// of the transformation, respectively, which are then stored in the corresponding Transformation struct.\nfunc (c *Config) loadTransformSettings(cfg *Config) error {\n\t// Retrieve the global options from the Options, if it's set.\n\tif err := c.loadGlobalTransformSettings(); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\t// Iterate through each transformation rule defined in the configuration.\n\tfor key, transformation := range c.Transformations {\n\t\t// Initialize transformation if nil\n\t\tif transformation == nil {\n\t\t\ttransformation = &Transformation{}      // default struct\n\t\t\tc.Transformations[key] = transformation // assign it back to the map\n\t\t}\n\t\t// Spit the key into 'From' and 'To' components.\n\t\tif err := transformation.Split(key); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"error when splitting the key: %w\", err)\n\t\t}\n\t\t// Apply the global confidence if no specific confidence is set for this transformation.\n\t\tif transformation.Confidence == 0 {\n\t\t\ttransformation.Confidence = c.DefaultTransformations.Confidence\n\t\t}\n\t\tif transformation.TTL == 0 {\n\t\t\ttransformation.TTL = c.DefaultTransformations.TTL\n\t\t}\n\n\t\terr := transformation.Validate(c)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\t// If the loop completes with no conflicts, the function returns nil, indicating success.\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (c *Config) loadGlobalTransformSettings() error {\n\t// get the default_transfom_values in the config yaml\n\tif dtv, ok := c.Options[\"default_transform_values\"]; ok {\n\t\t// Assert the type to map[interface{}]interface{}\n\t\tdtvMap, ok := dtv.(map[string]interface{})\n\t\tif !ok {\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"invalid type for default_transform_values\")\n\t\t}\n\t\t// Convert the map to the Transformation struct\n\t\tif ttl, ok := dtvMap[\"ttl\"].(int); ok {\n\t\t\tc.DefaultTransformations.TTL = ttl\n\t\t} else if !ok && dtvMap[\"ttl\"] != nil {\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"invalid type for ttl in default_transform_values\")\n\t\t}\n\t\tif confidence, ok := dtvMap[\"confidence\"].(int); ok {\n\t\t\tc.DefaultTransformations.Confidence = confidence\n\t\t} else if !ok && dtvMap[\"confidence\"] != nil {\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"invalid type for confidence in default_transform_values\")\n\t\t}\n\t\tif priority, ok := dtvMap[\"priority\"].(int); ok {\n\t\t\tc.DefaultTransformations.Priority = priority\n\t\t} else if !ok && dtvMap[\"priority\"] != nil {\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"invalid type for priority in default_transform_values\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// Split splits the key into 'From' and 'To' components, expecting a \"->\" delimiter.\n// Requires a non-nil Transformation pointer and a valid key format. Example: FQDN->IPaddress.\nfunc (t *Transformation) Split(key string) error {\n\tif t.From != \"\" && t.To != \"\" {\n\t\tt.From = strings.ToLower(t.From)\n\t\tt.To = strings.ToLower(t.To)\n\t\treturn nil // Already split\n\t}\n\t// Split the key into 'From' and 'To' components, expecting a \"->\" delimiter.\n\tparts := strings.Split(key, \"->\")\n\tif len(parts) != 2 {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"invalid key delimiter: %s\", key)\n\t}\n\t// Assign the 'From' and 'To' values to the Transformation struct.\n\tt.From = strings.ToLower(parts[0])\n\tt.To = strings.ToLower(parts[1])\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// Validate checks the validity of a given transformation with respect to OAM &\n// previously registered transformations. The function ensures OAM compliance & that there are no conflicts\n// between transformations with 'none' (indicating no action) and other valid transformations\n// for the same 'From' type.\nfunc (t *Transformation) Validate(c *Config) error {\n\tif c.fromWithNone == nil {\n\t\tc.fromWithNone = make(map[string]bool)\n\t}\n\tif c.fromWithValid == nil {\n\t\tc.fromWithValid = make(map[string]bool)\n\t}\n\ttfound := false\n\tffound := false\n\t// Check if \"From\" and \"To\" is OAM compliant\n\tfor _, a := range oam.AssetList {\n\t\ta := strings.ToLower(string(a))\n\t\tif t.From == a {\n\t\t\tffound = true\n\t\t}\n\t\tif t.To == a || t.To == \"none\" || t.To == \"all\" {\n\t\t\ttfound = true\n\t\t}\n\t\t// Used to prevent unnecessary iterations\n\t\tif tfound && ffound {\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif !ffound {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"invalid 'From' type: %s does not comply with OAM\", t.From)\n\t}\n\t// Check for a 'none' transformation, which indicates that no further processing is required for this 'From' type.\n\tif t.To == \"none\" {\n\t\t// Conflict arises if there's already a valid transformation for this 'From'.\n\t\tif c.fromWithValid[t.From] {\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"invalid config: 'none' specified after a valid transformation for 'From' type: %s. 'None' should be the only transformation\", t.From)\n\t\t}\n\t\tc.fromWithNone[t.From] = true\n\t} else { // For other valid transformations.\n\t\t// Conflict arises if a 'none' transformation is already registered for this 'From'.\n\t\tif c.fromWithNone[t.From] {\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"invalid config: valid transformation specified after 'none' for 'From' type: %s. 'None' should be the only transformation\", t.From)\n\t\t}\n\t\t// Mark this 'From' as having a valid transformation.\n\t\tc.fromWithValid[t.From] = true\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// CheckTransformations checks if the given 'From' type has a valid transformation to any of the given 'To' types.\nfunc (c *Config) CheckTransformations(from string, tos ...string) (*Matches, error) {\n\tlower := strings.ToLower(from)\n\ttomap := make(map[string]struct{})\n\tresults := &Matches{to: make(map[string]struct {\n\t\tttl        int\n\t\tconfidence int\n\t})}\n\n\tfor _, v := range tos {\n\t\tt := strings.ToLower(v)\n\t\ttomap[t] = struct{}{}\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, transform := range c.Transformations {\n\t\tif lower == transform.From {\n\t\t\tif transform.To == \"all\" {\n\t\t\t\texcludes := make(map[string]struct{})\n\t\t\t\tfor _, e := range transform.Exclude {\n\t\t\t\t\texcludes[strings.ToLower(e)] = struct{}{}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tfor k := range tomap {\n\t\t\t\t\tif _, ok := results.to[k]; !ok {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif _, found := excludes[k]; !found {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tresults.to[k] = struct {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tttl        int\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tconfidence int\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}{ttl: transform.checkTTL(k, c), confidence: transform.Confidence}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t} else if _, found := tomap[transform.To]; found {\n\t\t\t\t// this only occurs if an ALL is specified\n\t\t\t\tif old, ok := results.to[transform.To]; ok {\n\t\t\t\t\tconfidence := transform.Confidence\n\t\t\t\t\tttl := transform.checkTTL(transform.To, c)\n\n\t\t\t\t\tif confidence == 0 { // if confidence is not set, use the ALL confidence\n\t\t\t\t\t\tconfidence = old.confidence\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tif ttl == 0 { // if ttl is not set, use the ALL ttl\n\t\t\t\t\t\tttl = old.ttl\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tresults.to[transform.To] = struct {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tttl        int\n\t\t\t\t\t\tconfidence int\n\t\t\t\t\t}{ttl: ttl, confidence: confidence}\n\n\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\tresults.to[transform.To] = struct {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tttl        int\n\t\t\t\t\t\tconfidence int\n\t\t\t\t\t}{ttl: transform.checkTTL(transform.To, c), confidence: transform.Confidence}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif len(results.to) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"zero transformation matches in the session config\")\n\t}\n\treturn results, nil\n}\n\n// checkTTl checks the TTL value for the given 'To' type in the given Config.\n// if the 'To' is a data source, it will return the TTL value from the data source config.\n// otherwise, it will return the default TTL value from the transformation config.\nfunc (t *Transformation) checkTTL(to string, c *Config) int {\n\tif c != nil {\n\t\tif c.DataSrcConfigs != nil {\n\t\t\tds := c.GetDataSourceConfig(to)\n\t\t\tif ds != nil && ds.TTL > 0 {\n\t\t\t\treturn ds.TTL\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn t.TTL\n}\n\n// IsMatch checks if a valid transformation to the given 'To' type is present.\nfunc (m *Matches) IsMatch(to string) bool {\n\tm.lock.Lock()\n\tdefer m.lock.Unlock()\n\n\t_, found := m.to[strings.ToLower(to)]\n\treturn found\n}\n\n// Len returns the number of matches in the result set.\nfunc (m *Matches) Len() int {\n\tm.lock.Lock()\n\tdefer m.lock.Unlock()\n\n\treturn len(m.to)\n}\n\n// TTL returns the ttl for a given 'To' type in the Matches struct.\n// If the 'To' type is not found, the function returns -1.\nfunc (m *Matches) TTL(to string) int {\n\tif m.IsMatch(to) {\n\t\treturn m.to[strings.ToLower(to)].ttl\n\t}\n\treturn -1\n}\n\n// Confidence returns the confidence for a given 'To' type in the Matches struct.\n// If the 'To' type is not found, the function returns -1.\nfunc (m *Matches) Confidence(to string) int {\n\tif m.IsMatch(to) {\n\t\treturn m.to[strings.ToLower(to)].confidence\n\t}\n\treturn -1\n}\n"

(\n\t\"reflect\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"gopkg.in/yaml.v3\"\n)\n\n// Mock YAML inputs for various test cases\nvar validYAML = []byte(`\noptions:\n  confidence: 50 # default confidence level for all transformations unless otherwise specified\n\ntransformations:\n  FQDN->IPAddress:\n    priority: 1\n    confidence: 80\n  FQDN->DomainRecord:\n    priority: 2\n  FQDN->ALL: \n    exclude: [NetworkEndpoint,FQDN]\n  IPAddress->IPAddress:\n    priority: 1\n    confidence: 80\n  IPAddress->Netblock:\n    priority: 2\n  IPAddress->SocketAddress:\n    # leaving both priority and confidence out\n\n`)\n\nvar conflictingNoneYAML = []byte(`\noptions:\n  confidence: 50\n\ntransformations:\n  FQDN->IPAddress:\n    priority: 1\n    confidence: 80\n  FQDN->none:\n    priority: 2\n  FQDN->ALL: \n    exclude: [TLS,FQDN]\n  IPAddress->IPAddress:\n    priority: 1\n    confidence: 80\n  IPAddress->Netblock:\n    priority: 2\n  IPAddress->TLS:\n    # leaving both priority and confidence out\n`)\n\nvar conflictingNoneYAML2 = []byte(`\noptions:\n  confidence: 50\n\ntransformations:\n  FQDN->none:\n    priority: 2\n  FQDN->IPAddress:\n    priority: 1\n    confidence: 80\n  FQDN->ALL: \n    exclude: [TLS,FQDN]\n  IPAddress->IPAddress:\n    priority: 1\n    confidence: 80\n  IPAddress->Netblock:\n    priority: 2\n  IPAddress->TLS:\n    # leaving both priority and confidence out\n`)\n\nvar invalidKeyYAML = []byte(`\noptions:\n  confidence: 50\n\ntransformations:\n  FQDN-IPAddress:\n    priority: 1\n`)\n\nvar nonOAMtoYAML = []byte(`\noptions:\n  confidence: 50 # default exclude: [RIRORG,FQDN]\n`)\n\nvar nonOAMfromYAML = []byte(`\noptions:\n  confidence: 50 # default confidence level for all transformations unless otherwise specified\n\ntransformations:\n  FQDN->IPAddress:\n    priority: 1\n    confidence: 80\n  Amass->DomainRecord:\n    priority: 2\n  FQDN->ALL: \n    exclude: [RIRORG,FQDN]\n`)\n\n// this data source info is here to test accuracy of considering data source ttl in the transformation\nvar validDataSrcYAML = []byte(`\ndatasources:\n  - name: AlienVault\n    ttl: 4320\n    creds:\n      account1:\n        username: avuser\n        password: avpass\n  - name: BinaryEdge\n    creds:\n      account2:\n        username: beuser\n        password: bepass\nglobal_options:\n  minimum_ttl: 1300\n`)\n\nvar validttlYAML = []byte(`\noptions:\n  confidence: 50 # default confidence level for all transformations unless otherwise specified\n  default_transform_values:\n    ttl: 69 # default is 1440\n    confidence: 50 # default is 50\n    priority: 5 # default global priority is 5 (assuming its 1-10)\n\ntransformations:\n  FQDN->IPAddress:\n    priority: 1\n    confidence: 80\n    ttl: 770\n  FQDN->DomainRecord:\n    priority: 2\n  FQDN->ALL: \n    exclude: [TLS,FQDN]\n  IPAddress->FQDN:\n    priority: 1\n    confidence: 80\n  IPAddress->DomainRecord:\n    priority: 2\n  IPAddress->Netblock:\n    # leaving both priority and confidence out\n`)\n\n/*\nthis blob Makes sure that the default is set as 1440 and that the FQDN->IPAddress has a ttl of 770 even if\nEven if the FQDN->ALL has a ttl of 1000\n*/\nvar validttlNoDefaultYAML = []byte(`\ntransformations:\n  FQDN->IPAddress:\n    priority: 1\n    ttl: 770\n  FQDN->DomainRecord:\n    priority: 2\n  FQDN->Netblock:\n    ttl: 1440\n  FQDN->ALL:\n    ttl: 1000\n    exclude: [TLS,FQDN]\n  IPAddress->FQDN:\n    priority: 1\n  IPAddress->DomainRecord:\n    priority: 2\n    confidence: 80\n  IPAddress->Netblock:\n    # leaving both priority and confidence out\n`)\n\nvar nonvalidttlYAML = []byte(`\noptions:\n  default_transform_values:\n    ttl: hello # default is 1440\n    confidence: 50 # default is 50\n    priority: 5 # default global priority is 5 (assuming its 1-10)\n`)\n\nvar nonvalidttlYAML2 = []byte(`\noptions:\n  default_transform_values:\n    ttl: 1440 # default is 1440\n    confidence: 50 # default is 50\n    priority: hello # default global priority is 5 (assuming its 1-10)\n`)\n\nvar nonvalidttlYAML3 = []byte(`\noptions:\n  default_transform_values:\n    ttl: 1440 # default is 1440\n    confidence: hello # default is 50\n    priority: 5 # default global priority is 5 (assuming its 1-10)\n`)\n\n// Utility function to unmarshal YAML and load transformation settings\nfunc prepareConfig(yamlInput []byte) (*Config, error) {\n\tconf := NewConfig()\n\terr := yaml.Unmarshal(yamlInput, conf)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\terr = conf.loadTransformSettings(conf)\n\treturn conf, err\n}\n\nfunc TestLoadTransformSettings(t *testing.T) {\n\t// Test with valid YAML input\n\tt.Run(\"valid YAML and settings\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\tconf, err := prepareConfig(validYAML)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Unexpected error: %v\", err)\n\t\t}\n\t\tif conf.Transformations[\"FQDN->DomainRecord\"].Confidence != 50 {\n\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected confidence to be set to global value\")\n\t\t}\n\t})\n\n\t// Test with conflicting 'none' transformation\n\tt.Run(\"conflicting transformations - none after\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t_, err := prepareConfig(conflictingNoneYAML)\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Expected error due to conflicting 'none' transformation, got nil\")\n\t\t}\n\t})\n\n\t// Test with conflicting 'none' transformation\n\tt.Run(\"conflicting transformations - none before\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t_, err := prepareConfig(conflictingNoneYAML2)\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Expected error due to conflicting 'none' transformation, got nil\")\n\t\t}\n\t})\n\n\t// Test with invalid key format in YAML\n\tt.Run(\"invalid key format\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t_, err := prepareConfig(invalidKeyYAML)\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Expected error due to invalid key format, got nil\")\n\t\t}\n\t})\n\n\t// Test with non-OAM compliant 'to' transformation\n\tt.Run(\"non-OAM compliant 'to' transformation\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t_, err := prepareConfig(nonOAMtoYAML)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Unexpected error due to non-OAM compliant 'to' transformation\")\n\t\t}\n\t})\n\n\t// Test with non-OAM compliant 'from' transformation\n\tt.Run(\"non-OAM compliant 'from' transformation\", func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t_, err := prepareConfig(nonOAMfromYAML)\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Expected error due to non-OAM compliant 'from' transformation, got nil\")\n\t\t}\n\t})\n}\n\nfunc TestSplit(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\tkey       string\n\t\texpected  *Transformation\n\t\texpectErr bool\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Valid key1\",\n\t\t\tkey:       \"FQDN->IPAddress\",\n\t\t\texpected:  &Transformation{From: \"fqdn\", To: \"ipaddress\"},\n\t\t\texpectErr: false,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Valid key2\",\n\t\t\tkey: \"FQDN-IPAddress\",\n\t\t\texpected:  nil,\n\t\t\texpectErr: true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"Empty key\",\n\t\t\tkey:       \"\",\n\t\t\texpected:  nil,\n\t\t\texpectErr:         "name": "wordlist.go",
        "path": "config/wordlist.go",
        "type": "file",
        "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage config\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"strings\"\n)\n\nconst (\n\tmaskLetters = \"abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz\"\n\tmaskDigits  = \"0123456789\"\n\tmaskSpecial = \"-\"\n)\n\n// ExpandMask will return a slice of words that a \"hashcat-style\" mask matches.\nfunc ExpandMask(word string) ([]string, error) {\n\tvar expanded []string\n\tvar chars string\n\n\tif strings.Count(word, \"?\") > 3 {\n\t\treturn expanded, fmt.Errorf(\"exceeded maximum mask size (3): %s\", word)\n\t}\n\n\tparts := strings.SplitN(word, \"?\", 2)\n\tif len(parts) > 1 {\n\t\tif len(parts[1]) > 0 {\n\t\t\tswitch parts[1][0] {\n\t\t\tcase 'a':\n\t\t\t\tchars = maskLetters + maskDigits + maskSpecial\n\t\t\tcase 'd':\n\t\t\t\tchars = maskDigits\n\t\t\tcase 'u':\n\t\t\t\tfallthrough\n\t\t\tcase 'l':\n\t\t\t\tchars = maskLetters\n\t\t\tcase 's':\n\t\t\t\tchars = maskSpecial\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\treturn expanded, fmt.Errorf(\"improper mask used: %s\", word)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tfor _, ch := range chars {\n\t\t\t\tnewWord := parts[0] + string(ch) + parts[1][1:]\n\t\t\t\tnextRound, err := ExpandMask(newWord)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn expanded, err\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\texpanded = append(expanded, nextRound...)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t} else {\n\t\texpanded = append(expanded, word)\n\t}\n\treturn expanded, nil\n}\n\n// ExpandMaskWordlist performs ExpandMask on a slice of words.\nfunc ExpandMaskWordlist(wordlist []string) ([]string, error) {\n\tvar newWordlist []string\n\n\tfor _, word := range wordlist {\n\t\tif words, err := ExpandMask(word); err == nil {\n\t\t\tnewWordlist = append(newWordlist, words...)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn newWordlist, nil\n}\n"
      },
      {
        "name": "wordlist_test.go",
        "path": "config/wordlist_test.go",

                    "name": "client.go",
                    "path": "engine/api/graphql/client/client.go",
                    "type": "file",
                    "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage client\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"net/http\"\n\t\"net/url\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"os/signal\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\t\"github.com/google/uuid\"\n\t\"github.com/gorilla/websocket\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/config\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n)\n\ntype Handler func(message string)\n\ntype Client struct {\n\turl        string\n\thttpClient http.Client\n\twsClient   *websocket.Conn\n}\n\nfunc NewClient(url string) *Client {\n\treturn &Client{url: url, httpClient: http.Client{}}\n}\n\nfunc (c *Client) Query(query string) (string, error) {\n\tquoted := strings.Trim(strconv.Quote((string(query))), `\"`)\n\tb := []byte(fmt.Sprintf(`{\"query\":\"%s\"}`, quoted))\n\n\treq, err := http.NewRequest(http.MethodPost, c.url, bytes.NewBuffer(b))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn \"\", err\n\t}\n\treq.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n\n\tres, err := c.httpClient.Do(req)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn \"\", err\n\t} else if res.StatusCode != http.StatusOK {\n\t\treturn \"\", fmt.Errorf(\"response indicated status: %s\", res.Status)\n\t}\n\tdefer func() { _ = res.Body.Close() }()\n\n\tbody, err := io.ReadAll(res.Body)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn \"\", err\n\t}\n\treturn string(body), nil\n}\n\n// Create a session by sending the config elements as graphql named fields\n// TODO: Not Implemented. The transfromations use \"->\" in the config YAML,\n// but that is not a valid field name in GraphQL\nfunc (c *Client) CreateSession(config *config.Config) (uuid.UUID, error) {\n\tvar token uuid.UUID\n\tconfigJson, err := json.Marshal(config)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn token, err\n\t}\n\n\tquoted := strings.Trim(strconv.Quote((string(configJson))), `\"`)\n\tquery := fmt.Sprintf(`mutation { createSessionFromJson(input: {config: \"%s\"}) {sessionToken} }`, quoted)\n\n\tres, err := c.Query(query)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn token, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar resp struct {\n\t\tErrors []struct {\n\t\t\tMessage string `json:\"message\"`\n\t\t} `json:\"errors\"`\n\t\tData struct {\n\t\t\tCreateSessionFromJson struct {\n\t\t\t\tSessionToken string\n\t\t\t} `json:\"createSessionFromJson\"`\n\t\t} `json:\"data\"`\n\t}\n\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(res), &resp); err != nil {\n\t\treturn token, err\n\t}\n\tif len(resp.Errors) > 0 && resp.Errors[0].Message != \"\" {\n\t\treturn token, errors.New(resp.Errors[0].Message)\n\t}\n\n\treturn uuid.Parse(resp.Data.CreateSessionFromJson.SessionToken)\n}\n\nfunc (c *Client) CreateAsset(asset et.Asset, token uuid.UUID) error {\n\tasset.Session = token\n\tassetJson, err := json.Marshal(asset)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tvar data interface{}\n\tif err := json.Unmarshal(assetJson, &data); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\tq := gqlEncoder(data)\n\n\tqueryStr := fmt.Sprintf(`mutation { createAsset(input: %s) {id} }`, string(q))\n\tif _, err := c.Query(queryStr); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (c *Client) TerminateSession(token uuid.UUID) {\n\t_, _ = c.Query(fmt.Sprintf(`mutation { terminateSession(sessionToken: \"%s\") }`, token.String()))\n}\n\nfunc (c *Client) SessionStats(token uuid.UUID) (*et.SessionStats, error) {\n\tqueryStr := fmt.Sprintf(`query { sessionStats(sessionToken: \"%s\"){\n\t\tWorkItemsCompleted \n\t\tWorkItemsTotal} }`, token.String())\n\n\tres, err := c.Query(queryStr)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn &et.SessionStats{}, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar resp struct {\n\t\tErrors []struct {\n\t\t\tMessage string `json:\"message\"`\n\t\t} `json:\"errors\"`\n\t\tData struct {\n\t\t\tSessionStats et.SessionStats `json:\"sessionStats\"`\n\t\t} `json:\"data\"`\n\t}\n\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(res), &resp); err != nil {\n\t\treturn &et.SessionStats{}, err\n\t}\n\tif len(resp.Errors) > 0 && resp.Errors[0].Message != \"\" {\n\t\treturn &et.SessionStats{}, errors.New(resp.Errors[0].Message)\n\t}\n\treturn &resp.Data.SessionStats, nil\n}\n\n// Creates subscription to receove a stream of log messages from the sever\nfunc (c *Client) Subscribe(token uuid.UUID) (<-chan string, error) {\n\tparsedURL, _ := url.Parse(c.url)\n\tparsedURL.Scheme = \"ws\"\n\tid := uuid.New().String()\n\n\tconn, _, err := websocket.DefaultDialer.Dial(parsedURL.String(), nil)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\tc.wsClient = conn\n\n\tinterrupt := make(chan os.Signal, 1)\n\tsignal.Notify(interrupt, os.Interrupt)\n\n\t// Subprotocol Init\n\tmessage := fmt.Sprintf(`{\"type\": \"connection_init\",\"id\": \"%s\",\"payload\": {}}`, id)\n\terr = conn.WriteMessage(websocket.TextMessage, []byte(message))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\t// Start the subscription\n\tid = uuid.New().String()\n\tmessage = fmt.Sprintf(`{\"type\": \"start\", \"id\":\"%s\", \"payload\":{\"query\":\"subscription { logMessages(sessionToken: \\\"%s\\\")}\"} }`, id, token.String())\n\terr = conn.WriteMessage(websocket.TextMessage, []byte(message))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tch := make(chan string)\n\t// Receive go routine\n\tgo func() {\n\t\tfor {\n\t\t\tselect {\n\t\t\tcase <-interrupt:\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\t_, message, err := c.wsClient.ReadMessage()\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tch <- string(message)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\treturn ch, nil\n}\n\n// Converts unmarshalled JSON into graphql field syntax\n// This is a simple function for testing\nfunc gqlEncoder(data interface{}) string {\n\tvar q string\n\n\tswitch data := data.(type) {\n\tcase map[string]interface{}:\n\t\tq += \"{\"\n\t\tfor key, val := range data {\n\t\t\tq += fmt.Sprintf(\"%s: %v,\", key, gqlEncoder(val))\n\t\t}\n\t\tq = strings.TrimRight(q, \", \")\n\t\tq += \"}\"\n\tcase []interface{}:\n\t\tq += \"[\"\n\t\tfor _, val := range data {\n\t\t\tq += fmt.Sprintf(\"%v, \", gqlEncoder(val))\n\t\t}\n\t\tq = strings.TrimRight(q, \", \")\n\t\tq += \"]\"\n\tcase string:\n\t\tq += fmt.Sprintf(\"\\\"%s\\\"\", data)\n\tdefault:\n\t\tq += fmt.Sprintf(\"%v\", data)\n\t}\n\treturn q\n}\n"

handler.New(NewExecutableSchema(Config{\n\t\tResolvers: &Resolver{\n\t\t\tLog:        logger,\n\t\t\tManager:    mgr,\n\t\t\tDispatcher: d,\n\t\t},\n\t}))\n\t// Needed for subscription\n\t// Connecting websocket clients need to support the proper subprotocols \\\n\t// e.g. graphql-ws, graphql-transport-ws, subscriptions-transport-ws, etc\n\tsrv.AddTransport(transport.Websocket{\n\t\tKeepAlivePingInterval: 10 * time.Second,\n\t})\n\n\tsrv.AddTransport(transport.Options{})\n\tsrv.AddTransport(transport.GET{})\n\tsrv.AddTransport(transport.POST{})\n\tsrv.AddTransport(transport.MultipartForm{})\n\n\tsrv.SetQueryCache(lru.New[*ast.QueryDocument](1000))\n\n\tsrv.Use(extension.Introspection{})\n\tsrv.Use(extension.AutomaticPersistedQuery{\n\t\tCache: lru.New[string](100),\n\t})\n\n\tmux := http.NewServeMux()\n\tmux.Handle(\"/graphql\", srv)\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\n\treturn &Server{\n\t\tctx: {\n\t\t\t\tctx = context.WithValue(ctx, keyServerAddr, l.Addr().String())\n\t\t\t\treturn ctx\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) Start() error {\n\terr :=             "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage dispatcher\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"runtime\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n)\n\nconst (\n\tMinPipelineQueueSize = 100\n\tMaxPipelineQueueSize = 500\n)\n\ntype dis struct {\n\tlogger *slog.Logger\n\treg    et.Registry\n\tmgr    et.SessionManager\n\tdone   chan struct{}\n\tdchan  chan *et.Event\n\tcchan  chan *et.EventDataElement\n}\n\nfunc NewDispatcher(l *slog.Logger, r et.Registry, mgr et.SessionManager) et.Dispatcher {\n\tif l == nil {\n\t\tl = slog.New(slog.NewTextHandler(os.Stdout, nil))\n\t}\n\n\td := &dis{\n\t\tlogger: l,\n\t\treg:    r,\n\t\tmgr:    mgr,\n\t\tdone:   make(chan struct{}),\n\t\tdchan:  make(chan *et.Event, MinPipelineQueueSize),\n\t\tcchan:  make(chan *et.EventDataElement, MinPipelineQueueSize),\n\t}\n\n\tgo d.maintainPipelines()\n\treturn d\n}\n\nfunc (d *dis) Shutdown() {\n\tselect {\n\tcase <-d.done:\n\t\treturn\n\tdefault:\n\t}\n\tclose(d.done)\n}\n\nfunc (d *dis) DispatchEvent(e *et.Event) error {\n\tif e == nil {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"the event is nil\")\n\t} else if e.Session == nil {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"the event has no associated session\")\n\t} else if e.Session.Done() {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"the associated session has been terminated\")\n\t} else if e.Entity == nil || e.Entity.Asset == nil {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"the event has no associated entity or asset\")\n\t}\n\n\td.dchan <- e\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (d *dis) maintainPipelines() {\n\tctick := time.NewTimer(time.Second)\n\tdefer ctick.Stop()\n\tmtick := time.NewTimer(10 * time.Second)\n\tdefer mtick.Stop()\nloop:\n\tfor {\n\t\tselect {\n\t\tcase <-d.done:\n\t\t\tbreak loop\n\t\tcase <-mtick.C:\n\t\t\tcheckOnTheHeap()\n\t\t\tmtick.Reset(10 * time.Second)\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tselect {\n\t\tcase <-ctick.C:\n\t\t\td.fillPipelineQueues()\n\t\t\tctick.Reset(time.Second)\n\t\tcase e := <-d.dchan:\n\t\t\tif err := d.safeDispatch(e); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\td.logger.Error(fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to dispatch event: %s\", err.Error()))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase e := <-d.cchan:\n\t\t\td.completedCallback(e)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc checkOnTheHeap() {\n\tvar mstats runtime.MemStats\n\truntime.ReadMemStats(&mstats)\n\n\th := mstats.HeapAlloc\n\tn := mstats.NextGC\n\tif h <= n {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif diff := mstats.HeapAlloc - mstats.NextGC; bToMb(diff) > 500 {\n\t\truntime.GC()\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc bToMb(b uint64) uint64 {\n\treturn b / 1024 / 1024\n}\n\nfunc (d *dis) fillPipelineQueues() {\n\tsessions := d.mgr.GetSessions()\n\tif len(sessions) == 0 {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tvar ptypes []oam.AssetType\n\tfor _, atype := range oam.AssetList {\n\t\tif ap, err := d.reg.GetPipeline(atype); err == nil {\n\t\t\tif ap.Queue.Len() < MinPipelineQueueSize {\n\t\t\t\tptypes = append(ptypes, atype)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tnumRequested := MaxPipelineQueueSize / len(sessions)\n\tfor _, s := range sessions {\n\t\tif s == nil || s.Done() {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tfor _, atype := range ptypes {\n\t\t\tif entities, err := s.Queue().Next(atype, numRequested); err == nil && len(entities) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tfor _, entity := range entities {\n\t\t\t\t\te := &et.Event{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tName:    fmt.Sprintf(\"%s - %s\", string(atype), entity.Asset.Key()),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tEntity:  entity,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSession: s,\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tif err := d.appendToPipeline(e); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\t\td.logger.Error(fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to append to a data pipeline: %s\", err.Error()))\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (d *dis) completedCallback(data interface{}) {\n\tede, ok := data.(*et.EventDataElement)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif err := ede.Error; err != nil {\n\t\tede.Event.Session.Log().WithGroup(\"event\").With(\"name\", ede.Event.Name).Error(err.Error())\n\t}\n\t// increment the number of events processed in the session\n\tif stats := ede.Event.Session.Stats(); stats != nil {\n\t\tstats.Lock()\n\t\tstats.WorkItemsCompleted++\n\t\tstats.Unlock()\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (d *dis) safeDispatch(e *et.Event) error {\n\t// there is no need to dispatch the event if there's no associated asset pipeline\n\tif ap, err := d.reg.GetPipeline(e.Entity.Asset.AssetType()); err != nil || ap == nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\t// do not schedule the same asset more than once\n\tif e.Session.Queue().Has(e.Entity) {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\terr := e.Session.Queue().Append(e.Entity)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\t// increment the number of events processed in the session\n\tif stats := e.Session.Stats(); stats != nil {\n\t\tstats.Lock()\n\t\tstats.WorkItemsTotal++\n\t\tstats.Unlock()\n\t}\n\n\tif e.Meta != nil {\n\t\tif err := d.appendToPipeline(e); err != nil {\n\t\t\td.logger.Error(fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to append to a data pipeline: %s\", err.Error()))\n\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (d *dis) appendToPipeline(e *et.Event) error {\n\tif e == nil || e.Session == nil || e.Entity == nil || e.Entity.Asset == nil {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"the event is nil\")\n\t}\n\n\tap, err := d.reg.GetPipeline(e.Entity.Asset.AssetType())\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\te.Dispatcher = d\n\tif data := et.NewEventDataElement(e); data != nil {\n\t\t_ = e.Session.Queue().Processed(e.Entity)\n\t\tdata.Queue = d.cchan\n\t\tap.Queue.Append(data)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n"
          }
        ]
      },

        "name": "engine.go",
        "path": "engine/engine.go",
        "type": "file",
        "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage engine\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/api/graphql/server\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/dispatcher\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/registry\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/sessions\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n)\n\ntype Engine struct {\n\tLog        *slog.Logger\n\tDispatcher et.Dispatcher\n\tRegistry   et.Registry\n\tManager    et.SessionManager\n\tServer     *server.Server\n}\n\nfunc NewEngine(l *slog.Logger) (*Engine, error) {\n\tif l == nil {\n\t\tl = slog.New(slog.NewTextHandler(os.Stdout, nil))\n\t}\n\n\tmgr := sessions.NewManager(l)\n\tif mgr == nil {\n\t\treturn nil, errors.New(\"failed to create the session manager\")\n\t}\n\treg := registry.NewRegistry(l)\n\n\tdis := dispatcher.NewDispatcher(l, reg, mgr)\n\tif dis == nil {\n\t\tmgr.Shutdown()\n\t\treturn nil, errors.New(\"failed to create the event scheduler\")\n\t}\n\n\tif err := plugins.LoadAndStartPlugins(reg); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tif err := reg.BuildPipelines(); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tsrv := server.NewServer(l, dis, mgr)\n\tif srv == nil {\n\t\tdis.Shutdown()\n\t\tmgr.Shutdown()\n\t\treturn nil, errors.New(\"failed to create the API server\")\n\t}\n\n\tch := make(chan error, 1)\n\tgo func(errch chan error) { errch <- srv.Start() }(ch)\n\n\tt := time.NewTimer(3 * time.Second)\n\tdefer t.Stop()\n\n\tselect {\n\tcase err := <-ch:\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t_ = srv.Shutdown()\n\t\t\tdis.Shutdown()\n\t\t\tmgr.Shutdown()\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\tcase <-t.C:\n\t\t// If the server does not return an error within 3 seconds, we assume it started successfully\n\t}\n\n\treturn &Engine{\n\t\tLog:        l,\n\t\tDispatcher: dis,\n\t\tRegistry:   reg,\n\t\tManager:    mgr,\n\t\tServer:     srv,\n\t}, nil\n}\n\nfunc (e *Engine) Shutdown() {\n\t_ = e.Server.Shutdown()\n\te.Dispatcher.Shutdown()\n\te.Manager.Shutdown()\n}\n"
      },

{\n\t\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to obtain the company enrich result for %s: %s\", oamid.ID, err)\n\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", ce.plugin.name, \"handler\", orgent, enrich\n}\n\nfunc (ce *companyEnrich) store(e *et.Event, orgent *dbt.Entity, data *companyEnrichResult) {\n\to := orgent.Asset.(*org.Organization)\n\n\to.Active = false\n\tif o.LegalName,\n\t\t\tType:     general.LegalName,\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tident, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(oamid)\n\t\tif err != nil || ident == nil {\n\t\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to create the (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"net/url\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/google/uuid\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support/org\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/internal/net/http\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/account\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/financial\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n\toamorg \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/org\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/people\"\n)\n\nfunc (cr *companyRounds) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\toamid, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*general.Identifier)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the Identifier asset\")\n\t} else if oamid.Type != AviatoCompanyID {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tds := e.Session.Config().GetDataSourceConfig(cr.plugin.name)\n\tif ds == nil || len(ds.Creds) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar keys []string\n\tfor _, cr := range ds.Creds {\n\t\tif cr != nil && cr.Apikey != \"\" {\n\t\t\tkeys = append(keys, cr.Apikey)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif len(keys) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(),\n\t\tstring(oam.Identifier), string(oam.Organization), cr.plugin.name)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tvar fundents []*dbt.Entity\n\tsrc := &et.Source{\n\t\tName:       cr.name,\n\t\tConfidence: cr.plugin.source.Confidence,\n\t}\n\tif support.AssetMonitoredWithinTTL(e.Session, e.Entity, src, since) {\n\t\tfundents = cr.lookup(e, e.Entity, nil\n}\n\nfunc (cr *companyRounds) lookup(e *et.Event, ident *dbt.Entity, since time.Time) []*dbt.Entity {\n\tvar orgent *dbt.Entity\n\n\tif edges, err := e.Session.Cache().IncomingEdges(ident, since, \"id\"); err == nil {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\tif tags, err := e.Session.Cache().GetEdgeTags(edge, since, cr.plugin.source.Name); err != nil || len(tags) == 0 {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.FromEntity.ID); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tif _, ok := a.Asset.(*oamorg.Organization); ok {\n\t\t\t\t\torgent = a\n\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tvar fundents []*dbt.Entity\n\tif orgent == nil {\n\t\treturn fundents\n\t}\n\n\tvar accountents []*dbt.Entity\n\tif edges, err := e.Session.Cache().OutgoingEdges(orgent, since, \"account\"); err == nil {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\tif tags, err := e.Session.Cache().GetEdgeTags(edge, since, cr.plugin.source.Name); err != nil || len(tags) == 0 {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.ToEntity.ID); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tif acc, ok := a.Asset.(*account.Account); ok && acc.Type == account.Checking && acc.Number == \"default\" {\n\t\t\t\t\taccountents = append(accountents, a)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, ent := range accountents {\n\t\tif edges, err := e.Session.Cache().IncomingEdges(ent, since, \"recipient\"); err == nil {\n\t\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\t\tif tags, err := e.Session.Cache().GetEdgeTags(edge, since, cr.plugin.source.Name); err != nil || len(tags) == 0 {\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.FromEntity.ID); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tif _, ok := a.Asset.(*financial.FundsTransfer); ok {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfundents = append(fundents, a)\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn fundents\n}\n\nfunc (cr *companyRounds) query(e *et.Event, ident *dbt.Entity, apikey []string) []*dbt.Entity {\n\toamid := e.Entity.Asset.(*general.Identifier)\n\n\torgent := cr.getAssociatedOrg(e, ident)\n\tif orgent == nil {\n\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to find the Organization asset for %s\", oamid.UniqueID)\n\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", cr.plugin.name, \"handler\", cr.name))\n\t\treturn []*dbt.Entity{}\n\t}\n\n\tpage := 0\n\ttotal := 1\n\tperPage := 100\n\tvar fundents []*dbt.Entity\nloop:\n\tfor _, key := range apikey {\n\t\tfor ; page < total; page++ {\n\t\t\theaders := http.Header{\"Content-Type\": []string{\"application/json\"}}\n\t\t\theaders[\"Authorization\"] = []string{\"Bearer \" + key}\n\n\t\t\t_ = cr.plugin.rlimit.Wait(context.TODO())\n\t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 20*time.Second)\n\t\t\tdefer cancel()\n\n\t\t\tu := fmt.Sprintf(\"https://data.api.aviato.co/company/%s/funding-rounds?perPage=%d&page=%d\", url.QueryEscape(oamid.ID), perPage, page)\n\t\t\tresp, err := http.RequestWebPage(ctx, &http.Request{URL: u, Header: headers})\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to obtain the funding rounds for %s: %s\", oamid.ID, err)\n\t\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", cr.plugin.name, \"handler\", cr.name))\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t} else if resp.StatusCode != 200 {\n\t\t\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to obtain the funding rounds for %s: %s\", oamid.ID, resp.Status)\n\t\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", cr.plugin.name, \"handler\", cr.name))\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t} else if resp.Body == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to obtain the funding rounds for %s: empty body\", oamid.ID)\n\t\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", cr.plugin.name, \"handler\", cr.name))\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t} else if strings.Contains(resp.Body, \"error\") {\n\t\t\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to obtain the funding rounds for %s: %s\", oamid.ID, resp.Body)\n\t\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", cr.plugin.name, \"handler\", cr.name))\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tvar result companyRoundsResult\n\t\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(resp.Body), &result); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to unmarshal the funding rounds for %s: %s\", oamid.ID, err)\n\t\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", cr.plugin.name, \"handler\", cr.name))\n\t\t\t\tbreak loop\n\t\t\t} else if len(result.FundingRounds) == 0 {\n\t\t\t\tbreak loop\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif len(result.FundingRounds) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tif ents := cr.store(e, ident, orgent, &result); len(ents) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t\tfundents = append(fundents, ents...)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\ttotal = result.Pages\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif page >= total {\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn fundents\n}\n\nfunc (cr *companyRounds) getAssociatedOrg(e *et.Event, ident *dbt.Entity) *dbt.Entity {\n\tvar orgent *dbt.Entity\n\n\tif edges, err := e.Session.Cache().IncomingEdges(ident, time.Time{}, \"id\"); err == nil {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.FromEntity.ID); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tif _, ok := a.Asset.(*oamorg.Organization); ok {\n\t\t\t\t\torgent = a\n\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn orgent\n}\n\nfunc (cr *companyRounds) store(e *et.Event, ident, orgent *dbt.Entity, funds *companyRoundsResult) []*dbt.Entity {\n\tvar fundents []*dbt.Entity\n\n\tif orgent == nil {\n\t\treturn fundents\n\t}\n\to := orgent.Asset.(*oamorg.Organization)\n\n\tfor _, round := range funds.FundingRounds {\n\t\torgacc := cr.orgCheckingAccount(e, orgent)\n\t\tif orgacc == nil {\n\t\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to create the checking account for %s\", o.Name)\n\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", cr.plugin.name, \"handler\", cr.name))\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tseedacc := cr.createSeedAccount(e, &round)\n\t\tif seedacc == nil {\n\t\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to create the seed account for %s\", o.Name)\n\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", cr.plugin.name, \"handler\", cr.name))\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tf := &financial.FundsTransfer{\n\t\t\tID:           fmt.Sprintf(\"%s:%s\", round.Name, round.Stage),\n\t\t\tAmount:       float64(round.MoneyRaised),\n\t\t\tCurrency:     \"USD\",\n\t\t\tExchangeDate: round.AnnouncedOn,\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tfundent, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(f)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to create the FundsTransfer asset for %s: %s\", f.ID, err)\n\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", cr.plugin.name, \"handler\", cr.name))\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t_, err = e.Session.Cache().CreateEntityProperty(fundent, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\t\tSource:     cr.plugin.source.Name,\n\t\t\tConfidence: cr.plugin.source.Confidence,\n\t\t})\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to create the FundsTransfer asset source property for %s: %s\", f.ID, err)\n\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", cr.plugin.name, \"handler\", cr.name))\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif err := cr.plugin.createRelation(e.Session, fundent,\n\t\t\tgeneral.SimpleRelation{Name: \"recipient\"}, orgacc, cr.plugin.source.Confidence); err != nil {\n\t\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to create the recipient relation for %s: %s\", f.ID, err)\n\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", cr.plugin.name, \"handler\", cr.name))\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif err := cr.plugin.createRelation(e.Session, fundent,\n\t\t\tgeneral.SimpleRelation{Name: \"sender\"}, seedacc, cr.plugin.source.Confidence); err != nil {\n\t\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to create the sender relation for %s: %s\", f.ID, err)\n\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", cr.plugin.name, \"handler\", cr.name))\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tfundents = append(fundents, fundent)\n\t}\n\n\treturn fundents\n}\n\nfunc (cr *companyRounds) orgCheckingAccount(e *et.Event, orgent *dbt.Entity) *dbt.Entity {\n\tvar accountent *dbt.Entity\n\to := orgent.Asset.(*oamorg.Organization)\n\n\tif edges, err := e.Session.Cache().OutgoingEdges(orgent, time.Time{}, \"account\"); err == nil {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.ToEntity.ID); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tif acc, ok := a.Asset.(*account.Account); ok && acc.Type == account.Checking && acc.Number == \"default\" {\n\t\t\t\t\taccountent = a\n\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif accountent == nil {\n\t\tent, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(&account.Account{\n\t\t\tID:      uuid.New().String(),\n\t\t\tType:    account.Checking,\n\t\t\tNumber:  \"default\",\n\t\t\tBalance: 0,\n\t\t\tActive:  o.Active,\n\t\t})\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to create the Account asset for %s: %s\", o.Name, err)\n\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", cr.plugin.name, \"handler\", cr.name))\n\t\t\treturn nil\n\t\t}\n\n\t\taccountent = ent\n\t}\n\n\t_, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateEntityProperty(accountent, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\tSource:     cr.plugin.source.Name,\n\t\tConfidence: cr.plugin.source.Confidence,\n\t})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to create the Account asset source property for %s: %s\", o.Name, err)\n\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", cr.plugin.name, \"handler\", cr.name))\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tif err := cr.plugin.createRelation(e.Session, orgent,\n\t\tgeneral.SimpleRelation{Name: \"account\"}, accountent, cr.plugin.source.Confidence); err != nil {\n\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to create the account relation for %s: %s\", o.Name, err)\n\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", cr.plugin.name, \"handler\", cr.name))\n\t}\n\n\treturn accountent\n}\n\nfunc (cr *companyRounds) createSeedAccount(e *et.Event, round *companyFundingRound) *dbt.Entity {\n\tname := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s:%s\", round.Name, round.Stage)\n\taccountent, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(&account.Account{\n\t\tID:      name,\n\t\tType:    account.Checking,\n\t\tNumber:  \"default\",\n\t\tBalance: float64(round.MoneyRaised),\n\t\tActive:  false,\n\t})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to create the Account asset for %s: %s\", name, err)\n\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, cr.plugin.source.Name,\n\t\tConfidence: cr.plugin.source.Confidence,\n\t})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to create the Account asset source property for %s: %s\", name, err)\n\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", cr.plugin.name, \"handler\", cr.name))\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tinvestors := cr.createOrgInvestors(e, round)\n\tif ents := cr.createPersonInvestors(e, round); len(ents) > 0 {\n\t\tinvestors = append(investors, ents...)\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, investor := range investors {\n\t\tif err := cr.plugin.createRelation(e.Session, investor,\n\t\t\tgeneral.SimpleRelation{Name: \"account\"}, accountent, cr.plugin.source.Confidence); err != nil {\n\t\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to create the account relation for %s: %s\", investor.ID, err)\n\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", cr.plugin.name, \"handler\", cr.name))\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn accountent\n}\n\nfunc (cr *companyRounds) createOrgInvestors(e *et.Event, round *companyFundingRound) []*dbt.Entity {\n\tvar investors []*dbt.Entity\n\n\tif len(round.CompanyInvestors) == 0 {\n\t\treturn investors\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, investor := range round.CompanyInvestors {\n\t\toamid := &general.Identifier{\n\t\t\tUniqueID: fmt.Sprintf(\"%s:%s\", AviatoCompanyID, investor.CompanyID),\n\t\t\tID:       investor.CompanyID,\n\t\t\tType:     AviatoCompanyID,\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tident, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(oamid)\n\t\tif err != nil || ident == nil {\n\t\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to create the identifier asset for %s: %s\", oamid.UniqueID, err)\n\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", cr.plugin.name, \"handler\", cr.name))\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar orgent *dbt.Entity\n\t\t// check if the Person asset already exists\n\t\tif edges, err := e.Session.Cache().IncomingEdges(ident, time.Time{}, \"id\"); err == nil {\n\t\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\t\tif tags, err := e.Session.Cache().GetEdgeTags(edge, time.Time{}, cr.plugin.source.Name); err != nil || len(tags) == 0 {\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tif a, err := a\n\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tif orgent != nil {\n\t\t\tinvestors = append(investors, orgent)\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// create the Organization asset\n\t\to := &oamorg.Organization{Name: investor.Name}\n\t\torgent, err = org.CreateOrgAsset(e.Session, nil, nil, o, cr.plugin.source)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to create the Organization asset for %s: %s\", o.Name, err)\n\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", cr.plugin.name, \"handler\", cr.name))\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t_, err = orgent)\n\t}\n\n\treturn investors\n}\n\nfunc (cr *companyRounds) createPersonInvestors(e *et.Event, round *companyFundingRound) []*dbt.Entity {\n\tvar investors []*dbt.Entity\n\n\tif \"handler\", cr.name))\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar personent *dbt.Entity\n\t\t// check if the Person asset already exists\n\t\tif edges, err := e.Session.Cache().IncomingEdges(ident, {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tpersonent = a\n\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tif personent != nil {\n\t\t\tinvestors = append(investors, personent)\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// cr.plugin.source.Confidence,\n\t\t})\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to create the Person asset source property for %s: %s\", p.FullName, err)\n\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", cr.plugin.name, \"handler\", cr.name))\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif err := cr.plugin.createRelation(e.Session, personent,\n\t\t\tgeneral.SimpleRelation{Name: \"id\"}, ident, cr.plugin.source.Confidence); err != nil {\n\t\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to create the id relation for %s: %s\", oamid.UniqueID, err)\n\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", cr.plugin.name, \"handler\", cr.name))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t_ = e.Dispatcher.DispatchEvent(&et.Event{\n\t\t\tName:    oamid.UniqueID,\n\t\t\tEntity:  ident,\n\t\t\tSession: e.Session,\n\t\t})\n\t\tinvestors = append(investors, personent)\n\t}\n\n\treturn investors\n}\n\nfunc (cr *companyRounds) process(e *et.Event, fundents []*dbt.Entity) {\n\tfor _, fund := range fundents {\n\t\tf := fund.Asset.(*financial.FundsTransfer)\n\n\t\t_ = e.Dispatcher.DispatchEvent(&et.Event{\n\t\t\tName:    fmt.Sprintf(\"%f:%s\", f.Amount, f.ID),\n\t\t\tEntity:  fund,\n\t\t\tSession: e.Session,\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n"

(\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support/org\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/internal/net/http\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n\toamorg \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/org\"\n)\n\nfunc (cs *companySearch) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\t_, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamorg.Organization)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the Organization asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tds := e.Session.Config().GetDataSourceConfig(cs.plugin.name)\n\tif ds == nil || len(ds.Creds) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar keys []string\n\tfor _, cr := range ds.Creds {\n\t\tif cr != nil && cr.Apikey != \"\" {\n\t\t\tkeys = append(keys, cr.Apikey)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif len(keys) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(),\n\t\tstring(oam.Organization), string(oam.Identifier), cs.plugin.name)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tvar id *dbt.Entity\n\tsrc := &et.Source{\n\t\tName:       cs.name,\n\t\tConfidence: cs.plugin.source.Confidence,\n\t}\n\tif support.AssetMonitoredWithinTTL(e.Session, e.Entity, src, since) {\n\t\tid = cs.lookup(e, e.Entity, since)\n\t} else {\n\t\tid = cs.query(e, e.Entity, keys)\n\t\tsupport.MarkAssetMonitored(e.Session, e.Entity, src)\n\t}\n\n\tif id != nil {\n\t\tcs.process(e, e.Entity, id)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (cs *companySearch) lookup(e *et.Event, orgent *dbt.Entity, since time.Time) *dbt.Entity {\n\tif edges, err := e.Session.Cache().OutgoingEdges(orgent, since, \"id\"); err == nil {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\tif tags, err := e.Session.Cache().GetEdgeTags(edge,\n\t\t\t\tsince, cs.plugin.source.Name); err != nil || len(tags) == 0 {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.ToEntity.ID); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tif id, ok := a.Asset.(*general.Identifier); ok && id != nil && id.Type == AviatoCompanyID {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn a\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (cs *companySearch) query(e *et.Event, orgent *dbt.Entity, apikey []string) *dbt.Entity {\n\to := orgent.Asset.(*oamorg.Organization)\n\tbrand := org.ExtractBrandName(o.Name)\n\n\tvar body string\n\tsuccess := false\n\tfor _, key := range apikey {\n\t\theaders := http.Header{\"Content-Type\": []string{\"application/json\"}}\n\t\theaders[\"Authorization\"] = []string{\"Bearer \" + key}\n\n\t\t_ = cs.plugin.rlimit.Wait(context.TODO())\n\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 20*time.Second)\n\t\tdefer cancel()\n\n\t\tfilters := []map[string]*dslEvalObj{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\"name\": &dslEvalObj{\n\t\t\t\t\tOperation: \"eq\",\n\t\t\t\t\tValue:     brand,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}\n\n\t\treqDSL := &dsl{\n\t\t\tOffset:  0,\n\t\t\tLimit:   10,\n\t\t\tFilters: filters,\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tdslJSON, err := json.Marshal(reqDSL)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif resp, err := http.RequestWebPage(ctx, &http.Request{\n\t\t\tURL:    \"https://data.api.aviato.co/company/search\",\n\t\t\tMethod: \"POST\",\n\t\t\tHeader: headers,\n\t\t\tBody:   `{\"dsl\": ` + string(dslJSON) + `}`,\n\t\t}); err == nil {\n\t\t\tif resp.StatusCode == 200 {\n\t\t\t\tsuccess = true\n\t\t\t\tbody = resp.Body\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to obtain the company search result for %s: %s\", o.Name, resp.Status)\n\t\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", cs.plugin.name, \"handler\", cs.name))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to obtain the company search result for %s: %s\", o.Name, err)\n\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", cs.plugin.name, \"handler\", cs.name))\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif !success {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar result companySearchResult\n\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(body), &result); err != nil {\n\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to unmarshal the company search result for %s: %s\", o.Name, err)\n\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", cs.plugin.name, \"handler\", cs.name))\n\t\treturn nil\n\t} else if len(result.Items) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn cs.store(e, orgent, result.Items[0].ID)\n}\n\nfunc (cs *companySearch) store(e *et.Event, orgent *dbt.Entity, companyID string) *dbt.Entity {\n\toamid := &general.Identifier{\n\t\tUniqueID: fmt.Sprintf(\"%s:%s\", AviatoCompanyID, companyID),\n\t\tID:       companyID,\n\t\tType:     AviatoCompanyID,\n\t}\n\n\tident, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(oamid)\n\tif err != nil || ident == nil {\n\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to create the identifier asset for %s: %s\", companyID, err)\n\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", cs.plugin.name, \"handler\", cs.name))\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\t_, err = e.Session.Cache().CreateEntityProperty(ident, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\tSource:     cs.name,\n\t\tConfidence: cs.plugin.source.Confidence,\n\t})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to create the identifier source property for %s: %s\", companyID, err)\n\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", cs.plugin.name, \"handler\", cs.name))\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tif err := cs.plugin.createRelation(e.Session, orgent,\n\t\tgeneral.SimpleRelation{Name: \"id\"}, ident, cs.plugin.source.Confidence); err != nil {\n\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to create the identifier relation for %s: %s\", companyID, err)\n\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", cs.plugin.name, \"handler\", cs.name))\n\t\t_ = e.Session.Cache().DeleteEntity(ident.ID)\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\treturn ident\n}\n\nfunc (cs *companySearch) process(e *et.Event, orgent, ident *dbt.Entity) {\n\tid := ident.Asset.(*general.Identifier)\n\n\t_ = e.Dispatcher.DispatchEvent(&et.Event{\n\t\tName:    id.UniqueID,\n\t\tEntity:  ident,\n\t\tSession: e.Session,\n\t})\n\n\to := orgent.Asset.(*oamorg.Organization)\n\te.Session.Log().Info(\"relationship discovered\", \"from\", o.Name, \"relation\", \"id\",\n\t\t\"to\", id.UniqueID, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", cs.plugin.name, \"handler\", cs.name))\n}\n"
                  },
