                    "name": "employees.go",
                    "path": "engine/plugins/api/aviato/employees.go",
                    "type": "file",
                    "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage aviato\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"net/url\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/internal/net/http\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/org\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/people\"\n)\n\nfunc (ae *employees) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\toamid, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*general.Identifier)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the Identifier asset\")\n\t} else if oamid.Type != AviatoCompanyID {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tds := e.Session.Config().GetDataSourceConfig(ae.plugin.name)\n\tif ds == nil || len(ds.Creds) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar keys []string\n\tfor _, cr := range ds.Creds {\n\t\tif cr != nil && cr.Apikey != \"\" {\n\t\t\tkeys = append(keys, cr.Apikey)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif len(keys) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(),\n\t\tstring(oam.Identifier), string(oam.Person), ae.plugin.name)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tvar orgent *dbt.Entity\n\tvar employents []*dbt.Entity\n\tsrc := &et.Source{\n\t\tName:       ae.name,\n\t\tConfidence: ae.plugin.source.Confidence,\n\t}\n\tif support.AssetMonitoredWithinTTL(e.Session, e.Entity, src, since) {\n\t\torgent, employents = ae.lookup(e, e.Entity, since)\n\t} else {\n\t\torgent, employents = ae.query(e, e.Entity, keys)\n\t\tsupport.MarkAssetMonitored(e.Session, e.Entity, src)\n\t}\n\n\tif orgent != nil && len(employents) > 0 {\n\t\tae.process(e, orgent, employents)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (ae *employees) lookup(e *et.Event, ident *dbt.Entity, since time.Time) (*dbt.Entity, []*dbt.Entity) {\n\tvar orgent *dbt.Entity\n\n\tif edges, err := e.Session.Cache().IncomingEdges(ident, since, \"id\"); err == nil {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\tif tags, err := e.Session.Cache().GetEdgeTags(edge, since, ae.plugin.source.Name); err != nil || len(tags) == 0 {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.FromEntity.ID); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tif _, ok := a.Asset.(*org.Organization); ok {\n\t\t\t\t\torgent = a\n\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tvar employents []*dbt.Entity\n\tif orgent == nil {\n\t\treturn nil, employents\n\t}\n\n\tif edges, err := e.Session.Cache().OutgoingEdges(orgent, since, \"member\"); err == nil {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\tif tags, err := e.Session.Cache().GetEdgeTags(edge, since, ae.plugin.source.Name); err != nil || len(tags) == 0 {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.ToEntity.ID); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tif _, ok := a.Asset.(*people.Person); ok {\n\t\t\t\t\temployents = append(employents, a)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn orgent, employents\n}\n\nfunc (ae *employees) query(e *et.Event, ident *dbt.Entity, apikey []string) (*dbt.Entity, []*dbt.Entity) {\n\toamid := e.Entity.Asset.(*general.Identifier)\n\n\torgent := ae.getAssociatedOrg(e, ident)\n\tif orgent == nil {\n\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to find the Organization asset for %s\", oamid.UniqueID)\n\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", ae.plugin.name, \"handler\", ae.name))\n\t\treturn nil, []*dbt.Entity{}\n\t}\n\n\tpage := 0\n\ttotal := 1\n\tperPage := 1000\n\tvar employents []*dbt.Entity\nloop:\n\tfor _, key := range apikey {\n\t\tfor ; page < total; page++ {\n\t\t\theaders := http.Header{\"Content-Type\": []string{\"application/json\"}}\n\t\t\theaders[\"Authorization\"] = []string{\"Bearer \" + key}\n\n\t\t\t_ = ae.plugin.rlimit.Wait(context.TODO())\n\t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 20*time.Second)\n\t\t\tdefer cancel()\n\n\t\t\tu := fmt.Sprintf(\"https://data.api.aviato.co/company/%s/employees?perPage=%d&page=%d\", url.QueryEscape(oamid.ID), perPage, page)\n\t\t\tresp, err := http.RequestWebPage(ctx, &http.Request{URL: u, Header: headers})\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to obtain the employees for %s: %s\", oamid.ID, err)\n\t\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", ae.plugin.name, \"handler\", ae.name))\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t} else if resp.StatusCode != 200 {\n\t\t\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to obtain the employees for %s: %s\", oamid.ID, resp.Status)\n\t\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", ae.plugin.name, \"handler\", ae.name))\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t} else if resp.Body == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to obtain the employees for %s: empty body\", oamid.ID)\n\t\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", ae.plugin.name, \"handler\", ae.name))\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t} else if strings.Contains(resp.Body, \"error\") {\n\t\t\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to obtain the employees for %s: %s\", oamid.ID, resp.Body)\n\t\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", ae.plugin.name, \"handler\", ae.name))\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tvar result employeesResult\n\t\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(resp.Body), &result); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to unmarshal the employees for %s: %s\", oamid.ID, err)\n\t\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", ae.plugin.name, \"handler\", ae.name))\n\t\t\t\tbreak loop\n\t\t\t} else if len(result.Employees) == 0 {\n\t\t\t\tbreak loop\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif len(result.Employees) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tif ents := ae.store(e, ident, orgent, result.Employees); len(ents) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t\temployents = append(employents, ents...)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\ttotal = result.Pages\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif page >= total {\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif len(employents) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil, []*dbt.Entity{}\n\t}\n\treturn orgent, employents\n}\n\nfunc (ae *employees) getAssociatedOrg(e *et.Event, ident *dbt.Entity) *dbt.Entity {\n\tvar orgent *dbt.Entity\n\n\tif edges, err := e.Session.Cache().IncomingEdges(ident, time.Time{}, \"id\"); err == nil {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.FromEntity.ID); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tif _, ok := a.Asset.(*org.Organization); ok {\n\t\t\t\t\torgent = a\n\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn orgent\n}\n\nfunc (ae *employees) store(e *et.Event, ident, orgent *dbt.Entity, employlist []employeeResult) []*dbt.Entity {\n\tvar employents []*dbt.Entity\n\n\tfor _, emp := range employlist {\n\t\tp := support.FullNameToPerson(emp.Person.FullName)\n\t\tif p == nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tpersonent, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(p)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to create the Person asset for %s: %s\", p.FullName, err)\n\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", ae.plugin.name, \"handler\", ae.name))\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t_, err = e.Session.Cache().CreateEntityProperty(personent, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\t\tSource:     ae.name,\n\t\t\tConfidence: ae.plugin.source.Confidence,\n\t\t})\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to create the Person asset source property for %s: %s\", p.FullName, err)\n\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", ae.plugin.name, \"handler\", ae.name))\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif err := ae.plugin.createRelation(e.Session, orgent,\n\t\t\tgeneral.SimpleRelation{Name: \"member\"}, personent, ae.plugin.source.Confidence); err == nil {\n\t\t\temployents = append(employents, personent)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to create the member relation for %s: %s\", p.FullName, err)\n\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", ae.plugin.name, \"handler\", ae.name))\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn employents\n}\n\nfunc (ae *employees) process(e *et.Event, orgent *dbt.Entity, employents []*dbt.Entity) {\n\tfor _, employee := range employents {\n\t\tp := employee.Asset.(*people.Person)\n\n\t\t_ = e.Dispatcher.DispatchEvent(&et.Event{\n\t\t\tName:    fmt.Sprintf(\"%s:%s\", p.FullName, p.ID),\n\t\t\tEntity:  employee,\n\t\t\tSession: e.Session,\n\t\t})\n\n\t\to := orgent.Asset.(*org.Organization)\n\t\te.Session.Log().Info(\"relationship discovered\", \"from\", o.Name, \"relation\", \"member\",\n\t\t\t\"to\", p.FullName, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", ae.plugin.name, \"handler\", ae.name))\n\t}\n}\n"

                    "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage aviato\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n\t\"golang.org/x/time/rate\"\n)\n\nfunc NewAviato() et.Plugin {\n\tlimit := rate.Every(2 * time.Second)\n\n\treturn &aviato{\n\t\tname:   \"Aviato\",\n\t\trlimit: rate.NewLimiter(limit, 1),\n\t\tsource: &et.Source{\n\t\t\tName:       \"Aviato\",\n\t\t\tConfidence: 90,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (a *aviato) Name() string {\n\treturn a.name\n}\n\nfunc (a *aviato) Start(r et.Registry) error {\n\ta.log = r.Log().WithGroup(\"plugin\").With(\"name\", a.name)\n\n\ta.companyEnrich = &companyEnrich{\n\t\tname:   a.name + \"-Company-Enrich-Handler\",\n\t\tplugin: a,\n\t}\n\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:     a,\n\t\tName:       a.companyEnrich.name,\n\t\tPriority:   7,\n\t\tTransforms: []string{string(oam.Organization)},\n\t\tEventType:  oam.Identifier,\n\t\tCallback:   a.companyEnrich.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\ta.companyRounds = &companyRounds{\n\t\tname:   a.name + \"-Company-Rounds-Handler\",\n\t\tplugin: a,\n\t}\n\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:   a,\n\t\tName:     a.companyRounds.name,\n\t\tPriority: 7,\n\t\tTransforms: []string{\n\t\t\tstring(oam.Organization),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.Account),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.FundsTransfer),\n\t\t},\n\t\tEventType: oam.Identifier,\n\t\tCallback:  a.companyRounds.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\ta.employees = &employees{\n\t\tname:   a.name + \"-Employees-Handler\",\n\t\tplugin: a,\n\t}\n\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:     a,\n\t\tName:       a.employees.name,\n\t\tPriority:   6,\n\t\tTransforms: []string{string(oam.Person)},\n\t\tEventType:  oam.Identifier,\n\t\tCallback:   a.employees.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\ta.companySearch = &companySearch{\n\t\tname:   a.name + \"-Company-Search-Handler\",\n\t\tplugin: a,\n\t}\n\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:     a,\n\t\tName:       a.companySearch.name,\n\t\tPriority:   6,\n\t\tTransforms: []string{string(oam.Identifier)},\n\t\tEventType:  oam.Organization,\n\t\tCallback:   a.companySearch.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\ta.log.Info(\"Plugin started\")\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (a *aviato) Stop() {\n\ta.log.Info(\"Plugin stopped\")\n}\n\nfunc (a *aviato) createRelation(session et.Session, obj *dbt.Entity, rel oam.Relation, subject *dbt.Entity, conf int) error {\n\tedge, err := session.Cache().CreateEdge(&dbt.Edge{\n\t\tRelation:   rel,\n\t\tFromEntity: obj,\n\t\tToEntity:   subject,\n\t})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t} else if edge == nil {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to create the edge\")\n\t}\n\n\t_, err = session.Cache().CreateEdgeProperty(edge, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\tSource:     a.source.Name,\n\t\tConfidence: conf,\n\t})\n\treturn err\n}\n"

                `json:\"limit\"`\n\tFilters []map[string]*dslEvalObj `json:\"filters\"`\n}\n\ntype dslEvalObj struct {\n\tOperation string `json:\"operation\"`\n\tValue     string       int    `json:\"id\"`\n\tAnnouncedOn         string `json:\"announcedOn\"`\n\tMoneyRaised         int    `json:\"moneyRaised\"`\n\tName                string `json:\"name\"`\n\tStage               string `json:\"stage\"`\n\tLeadPersonInvestors []struct {\n\t\tPersonID   string    `json:\"id\"`\n\t\tFullName   string    `json:\"fullName\"`\n\t\tEntityType string `json:\"country\"`\n\t\tRegion       string    `json:\"region\"`\n\t\tLocality     string    `json:\"locality\"`\n\t\tURLs         URLResult `json:\"URLs\"`\n\t\tIndustryList []string `json:\"industryList\"`\n\t} `json:\"companyInvestorList\"`\n\tCompanyID string `json:\"companyID\"`\n}\n\ntype companySearch struct {\n\tname   string\n\tplugin *aviato\n}\n\ntype employees struct {\n\tname   string\n\tplugin *aviato\n}\n\ntype employeesResult struct {\n\tEmployees    []employeeResult `json:\"employees\"`\n\tPages        int              `json:\"pages\"`\n\tTotalResults int              `json:\"totalResults\"`\n}\n\ntype employeeResult struct {\n\tStartDate    string `json:\"startDate\"`\n\tEndDate      string `json:\"endDate\"`\n\tEntityType   string    struct {\n\t\tID         string    `json:\"id\"`\n\t\tFullName   string    `json:\"fullName\"`\n\t\tEntityType string    `json:\"entityType\"`\n\t\tLocation   string    `json:\"location\"`\n\t\tURLs       URLResult `json:\"URLs\"`\n\t} `json:\"person\"`\n}\n\ntype companyEnrichResult struct {\n\tID              string   `json:\"id\"`\n\tName            string `json:\"ownershipStatus\"`\n\tHeadcount       int      `json:\"headcount\"`\n\tDescription     string   `json:\"description\"`\n\tIsAcquired      bool     `json:\"isAcquired\"`\n\tIsExited        bool     `json:\"isExited\"`\n\tIsGovernment    bool     `json:\"isGovernment\"`\n\tIsNonProfit     bool     `json:\"isNonProfit\"`\n\tIsShutDown      bool     `json:\"isShutDown\"`\n\tLocality        string   `json:\"locality\"`\n\tRegion          string   `json:\"region\"`\n\tCountry         string   `json:\"country\"`\n\tLocationDetails struct {\n\t\tContinent     LocationDetails All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage api\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/caffix/stringset\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/internal/net/http\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\toamdns \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/dns\"\n\t\"golang.org/x/time/rate\"\n)\n\ntype binaryEdge struct {\n\tname   string\n\tlog    *slog.Logger\n\trlimit *rate.Limiter\n\tsource *et.Source\n}\n\nfunc NewBinaryEdge() et.Plugin {\n\tlimit := rate.Every(10 * time.Second)\n\n\treturn &binaryEdge{\n\t\tname:   \"BinaryEdge\",\n\t\trlimit: rate.NewLimiter(limit, 1),\n\t\tsource: &et.Source{\n\t\t\tName:       \"BinaryEdge\",\n\t\t\tConfidence: 80,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (be *binaryEdge) Name() string {\n\treturn be.name\n}\n\nfunc (be *binaryEdge) Start(r et.Registry) error {\n\tbe.log = r.Log().WithGroup(\"plugin\").With(\"name\", be.name)\n\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:     be,\n\t\tName:       be.name + \"-Handler\",\n\t\tPriority:   9,\n\t\tTransforms: []string{string(oam.FQDN)},\n\t\tEventType:  oam.FQDN,\n\t\tCallback:   be.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tbe.log.Info(\"Plugin started\")\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (be *binaryEdge) Stop() {\n\tbe.log.Info(\"Plugin stopped\")\n}\n\nfunc (be *binaryEdge) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\tfqdn, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the FQDN asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tif !support.HasSLDInScope(e) {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tds := e.Session.Config().GetDataSourceConfig(be.name)\n\tif ds == nil || len(ds.Creds) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar keys []string\n\tfor _, cr := range ds.Creds {\n\t\tif cr != nil && cr.Apikey != \"\" {\n\t\t\tkeys = append(keys, cr.Apikey)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(), string(oam.FQDN), string(oam.FQDN), be.name)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tvar names []*dbt.Entity\n\tif support.AssetMonitoredWithinTTL(e.Session, e.Entity, be.source, since) {\n\t\tnames = append(names, be.lookup(e, fqdn.Name, since)...)\n\t} else {\n\t\tnames = append(names, be.query(e, fqdn.Name, keys)...)\n\t\tsupport.MarkAssetMonitored(e.Session, e.Entity, be.source)\n\t}\n\n\tif len(names) > 0 {\n\t\tbe.process(e, names)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (be *binaryEdge) lookup(e *et.Event, name string, since time.Time) []*dbt.Entity {\n\treturn support.SourceToAssetsWithinTTL(e.Session, name, string(oam.FQDN), be.source, since)\n}\n\nfunc (be *binaryEdge) query(e *et.Event, name string, keys []string) []*dbt.Entity {\n\tsubs := stringset.New()\n\tdefer subs.Close()\n\n\tpagenum := 1\nloop:\n\tfor _, key := range keys {\n\t\tfor pagenum <= 500 {\n\t\t\t_ = be.rlimit.Wait(context.TODO())\n\t\t\tresp, err := http.RequestWebPage(context.TODO(), &http.Request{\n\t\t\t\tHeader: http.Header{\"X-KEY\": []string{key}},\n\t\t\t\tURL:    \"https://api.binaryedge.io/v2/query/domains/subdomain/\" + name + \"?page=\" + strconv.Itoa(pagenum),\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t\tif err != nil || resp.Body == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tvar j struct {\n\t\t\t\tResults struct {\n\t\t\t\t\tPage     int      `json:\"page\"`\n\t\t\t\t\tPageSize int      `json:\"pagesize\"`\n\t\t\t\t\tTotal    int      `json:\"total\"`\n\t\t\t\t\tEvents   []string `json:\"events\"`\n\t\t\t\t} `json:\"results\"`\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(\"{\\\"results\\\":\"+resp.Body+\"}\"), &j); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, n := range j.Results.Events {\n\t\t\t\tnstr := strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(n))\n\t\t\t\t// if the subdomain is not in scope, skip it\n\t\t\t\tif _, conf := e.Session.Scope().IsAssetInScope(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: nstr}, 0); conf > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t\tsubs.Insert(nstr)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif j.Results.Page > 0 && j.Results.Page <= 500 && j.Results.PageSize > 0 &&\n\t\t\t\tj.Results.Total > 0 && j.Results.Page <= (j.Results.Total/j.Results.PageSize) {\n\t\t\t\tpagenum++\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tbreak loop\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn be.store(e, subs.Slice())\n}\n\nfunc (be *binaryEdge) store(e *et.Event, names []string) []*dbt.Entity {\n\treturn support.StoreFQDNsWithSource(e.Session, names, be.source, be.name, be.name+\"-Handler\")\n}\n\nfunc (be *binaryEdge) process(e *et.Event, assets []*dbt.Entity) {\n\tsupport.ProcessFQDNsWithSource(e, assets, be.source)\n}\n"

All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage api\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/internal/net/dns\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/internal/net/http\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\toamdns \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/dns\"\n\t\"golang.org/x/time/rate\"\n)\n\ntype chaos struct {\n\tname   string\n\tlog    *slog.Logger\n\trlimit *rate.Limiter\n\tsource *et.Source\n}\n\nfunc NewChaos() et.Plugin {\n\tlimit := rate.Every(10 * time.Second)\n\n\treturn &chaos{\n\t\tname:   \"Chaos\",\n\t\trlimit: rate.NewLimiter(limit, 1),\n\t\tsource: &et.Source{\n\t\t\tName:       \"Chaos\",\n\t\t\tConfidence: 80,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (c *chaos) Name() string {\n\treturn c.name\n}\n\nfunc (c *chaos) Start(r et.Registry) error {\n\tc.log = r.Log().WithGroup(\"plugin\").With(\"name\", c.name)\n\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:     c,\n\t\tName:       c.name + \"-Handler\",\n\t\tPriority:   9,\n\t\tTransforms: []string{string(oam.FQDN)},\n\t\tEventType:  oam.FQDN,\n\t\tCallback:   c.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tc.log.Info(\"Plugin started\")\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (c *chaos) Stop() {\n\tc.log.Info(\"Plugin stopped\")\n}\n\nfunc (c *chaos) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\tfqdn, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the FQDN asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tif !support.HasSLDInScope(e) {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tds := e.Session.Config().GetDataSourceConfig(c.name)\n\tif ds == nil || len(ds.Creds) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar keys []string\n\tfor _, cr := range ds.Creds {\n\t\tif cr != nil && cr.Apikey != \"\" {\n\t\t\tkeys = append(keys, cr.Apikey)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(), string(oam.FQDN), string(oam.FQDN), c.name)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tvar names []*dbt.Entity\n\tif support.AssetMonitoredWithinTTL(e.Session, e.Entity, c.source, since) {\n\t\tnames = append(names, c.lookup(e, fqdn.Name, since)...)\n\t} else {\n\t\tnames = append(names, c.query(e, fqdn.Name, keys)...)\n\t\tsupport.MarkAssetMonitored(e.Session, e.Entity, c.source)\n\t}\n\n\tif len(names) > 0 {\n\t\tc.process(e, names)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (c *chaos) lookup(e *et.Event, name string, since time.Time) []*dbt.Entity {\n\treturn support.SourceToAssetsWithinTTL(e.Session, name, string(oam.FQDN), c.source, since)\n}\n\nfunc (c *chaos) query(e *et.Event, name string, keys []string) []*dbt.Entity {\n\tvar names []string\n\n\tfor _, key := range keys {\n\t\t_ = c.rlimit.Wait(context.TODO())\n\t\tresp, err := http.RequestWebPage(context.TODO(), &http.Request{\n\t\t\tURL:    \"https://dns.projectdiscovery.io/dns/\" + name + \"/subdomains\",\n\t\t\tHeader: http.Header{\"Authorization\": []string{key}},\n\t\t})\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar result struct {\n\t\t\tSubdomains []string `json:\"subdomains\"`\n\t\t}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(resp.Body), &result); err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tfor _, sub := range result.Subdomains {\n\t\t\tn := dns.RemoveAsteriskLabel(sub + \".\" + name)\n\t\t\t// if the subdomain is not in scope, skip it\n\t\t\tif _, conf := e.Session.Scope().IsAssetInScope(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: n}, 0); conf > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tnames = append(names, strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(n)))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tbreak\n\t}\n\n\treturn c.store(e, names)\n}\n\nfunc (c *chaos) store(e *et.Event, names []string) []*dbt.Entity {\n\treturn support.StoreFQDNsWithSource(e.Session, names, c.source, c.name, c.name+\"-Handler\")\n}\n\nfunc (c *chaos) process(e *et.Event, assets []*dbt.Entity) {\n\tsupport.ProcessFQDNsWithSource(e, assets, c.source)\n}\n"

err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tc.log.Info(\"Plugin started\")\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (c *crtsh) Stop() {\n\tc.log.Info(\"Plugin stopped\")\n}\n\nfunc (c *crtsh) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\tfqdn, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the FQDN asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tif !support.HasSLDInScope(e) {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(), string(oam.FQDN), string(oam.FQDN), c.name)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tvar names []*dbt.Entity\n\tif support.AssetMonitoredWithinTTL(e.Session, e.Entity, c.source, since) {\n\t\tnames = append(names, c.lookup(e, fqdn.Name, since)...)\n\t} else {\n\t\tnames = append(names, c.query(e, fqdn.Name)...)\n\t\tsupport.MarkAssetMonitored(e.Session, e.Entity, c.source)\n\t}\n\n\tif len(names) > 0 {\n\t\tc.process(e, names)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (c *crtsh) lookup(e *et.Event, name string, since time.Time) []*dbt.Entity {\n\treturn support.SourceToAssetsWithinTTL(e.Session, name, string(oam.FQDN), c.source, since)\n}\n\nfunc (c *crtsh) query(e *et.Event, name string) []*dbt.Entity {\n\t_ = c.rlimit.Wait(context.TODO())\n\tresp, err := http.RequestWebPage(context.TODO(), &http.Request{\n\t\tURL: \"https://crt.sh/?CN=\" + name + \"&output=json&exclude=expired\",\n\t})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar result struct {\n\t\tCerts []struct {\n\t\t\tNames string `json:\"name_value\"`\n\t\t} `json:\"certs\"`\n\t}\n\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(\"{\\\"certs\\\":\"+resp.Body+\"}\"), &result); conf > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tnames = append(names, nstr)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn c.store(e, names)\n}\n\nfunc (c *crtsh) store(e *et.Event, names []string) []*dbt.Entity {\n\treturn support.StoreFQDNsWithSource(e.Session, names, c.source, c.name, c.name+\"-Handler\")\n}\n\nfunc (c *crtsh) process(e *et.Event, assets []*dbt.Entity) {\n\tsupport.ProcessFQDNsWithSource(e, assets, c.source)\n}\n"

All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage api\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/caffix/stringset\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/internal/net/http\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\toamdns \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/dns\"\n\t\"golang.org/x/time/rate\"\n)\n\ntype dnsrepo struct {\n\tname   string\n\tlog    *slog.Logger\n\trlimit *rate.Limiter\n\tsource *et.Source\n}\n\nfunc NewDNSRepo() et.Plugin {\n\tlimit := rate.Every(10 * time.Second)\n\n\treturn &dnsrepo{\n\t\tname:   \"DNSRepo\",\n\t\trlimit: rate.NewLimiter(limit, 1),\n\t\tsource: &et.Source{\n\t\t\tName:       \"DNSRepo\",\n\t\t\tConfidence: 80,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsrepo) Name() string {\n\treturn d.name\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsrepo) Start(r et.Registry) error {\n\td.log = r.Log().WithGroup(\"plugin\").With(\"name\", d.name)\n\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:     d,\n\t\tName:       d.name + \"-Handler\",\n\t\tPriority:   9,\n\t\tTransforms: []string{string(oam.FQDN)},\n\t\tEventType:  oam.FQDN,\n\t\tCallback:   d.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\td.log.Info(\"Plugin started\")\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsrepo) Stop() {\n\td.log.Info(\"Plugin stopped\")\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsrepo) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\tfqdn, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the FQDN asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tif !support.HasSLDInScope(e) {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar keys []string\n\tds := e.Session.Config().GetDataSourceConfig(d.name)\n\tif ds != nil {\n\t\tfor _, cred := range ds.Creds {\n\t\t\tkeys = append(keys, cred.Apikey)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\t// add an empty API key\n\tkeys = append(keys, \"\")\n\n\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(), string(oam.FQDN), string(oam.FQDN), d.name)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tvar names []*dbt.Entity\n\tif support.AssetMonitoredWithinTTL(e.Session, e.Entity, d.source, since) {\n\t\tnames = append(names, d.lookup(e, fqdn.Name, since)...)\n\t} else {\n\t\tnames = append(names, d.query(e, fqdn.Name, keys)...)\n\t\tsupport.MarkAssetMonitored(e.Session, e.Entity, d.source)\n\t}\n\n\tif len(names) > 0 {\n\t\td.process(e, names)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsrepo) lookup(e *et.Event, name string, since time.Time) []*dbt.Entity {\n\treturn support.SourceToAssetsWithinTTL(e.Session, name, string(oam.FQDN), d.source, since)\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsrepo) query(e *et.Event, name string, keys []string) []*dbt.Entity {\n\tvar names []string\n\n\tfor _, key := range keys {\n\t\tvar req *http.Request\n\n\t\tif key == \"\" {\n\t\t\treq = &http.Request{URL: \"https://dnsrepo.noc.org/?domain=\" + name}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\treq = &http.Request{\n\t\t\t\tURL: \"https://dnsrepo.noc.org/api/?apikey=\" + key + \"&search=\" + name + \"&limit=5000\",\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t_ = d.rlimit.Wait(context.TODO())\n\t\tif resp, err := http.RequestWebPage(context.TODO(), req); err == nil {\n\t\t\tif key == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tnames = append(names, d.parseHTML(e, resp.Body)...)\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tnames = append(names, d.parseJSON(e, resp.Body)...)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to use the API endpoint: %v\", err),\n\t\t\t\tslog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", d.name, \"handler\", d.name+\"-Handler\"))\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn d.store(e, names)\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsrepo) parseHTML(e *et.Event, body string) []string {\n\tvar names []string\n\n\tfor _, sub := range support.ScrapeSubdomainNames(body) {\n\t\tif sub != \"\" {\n\t\t\t// if the subdomain is not in scope, skip it\n\t\t\tname := http.CleanName(sub)\n\t\t\tif _, conf := e.Session.Scope().IsAssetInScope(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: name}, 0); conf > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tnames = append(names, name)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn names\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsrepo) parseJSON(e *et.Event, body string) []string {\n\tset := stringset.New()\n\tdefer set.Close()\n\n\tvar resp struct {\n\t\tResults []struct {\n\t\t\tDomain string   `json:\"domain\"`\n\t\t\tAlias  string   `json:\"cname\"`\n\t\t\tIPv4   []string `json:\"ipv4\"`\n\t\t\tIPv6   []string `json:\"ipv6\"`\n\t\t} `json:\"results\"`\n\t}\n\n\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(\"{\\\"results\\\":\"+body+\"}\"), &resp); err != nil {\n\t\treturn set.Slice()\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, r := range resp.Results {\n\t\tfor _, sub := range []string{r.Domain, r.Alias} {\n\t\t\tif slen := len(sub); slen > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tname := sub\n\t\t\t\t// remove an ending dot from the name\n\t\t\t\tif sub[slen-1] == '.' {\n\t\t\t\t\tname = sub[:slen-1]\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t// if the subdomain is not in scope, skip it\n\t\t\t\tif _, conf := e.Session.Scope().IsAssetInScope(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: name}, 0); conf > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t\tset.Insert(name)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn set.Slice()\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsrepo) store(e *et.Event, names []string) []*dbt.Entity {\n\treturn support.StoreFQDNsWithSource(e.Session, names, d.source, d.name, d.name+\"-Handler\")\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsrepo) process(e *et.Event, assets []*dbt.Entity) {\n\tsupport.ProcessFQDNsWithSource(e, assets, d.source)\n}\n"

                    "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage gleif\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"math\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/adrg/strutil\"\n\t\"github.com/adrg/strutil/metrics\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support/org\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n\toamorg \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/org\"\n)\n\nfunc (fc *fuzzyCompletions) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\t_, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamorg.Organization)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the Organization asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(),\n\t\tstring(oam.Organization), string(oam.Identifier), fc.plugin.name)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tvar id *dbt.Entity\n\tif support.AssetMonitoredWithinTTL(e.Session, e.Entity, fc.plugin.source, since) {\n\t\tid = fc.lookup(e, e.Entity, since)\n\t} else {\n\t\tid = fc.query(e, e.Entity)\n\t\tsupport.MarkAssetMonitored(e.Session, e.Entity, fc.plugin.source)\n\t}\n\n\tif id != nil {\n\t\tfc.process(e, e.Entity, id)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (fc *fuzzyCompletions) lookup(e *et.Event, orgent *dbt.Entity, since time.Time) *dbt.Entity {\n\tif edges, err := e.Session.Cache().OutgoingEdges(orgent, since, \"id\"); err == nil {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\tif tags, err := e.Session.Cache().GetEdgeTags(edge,\n\t\t\t\tsince, fc.plugin.source.Name); err != nil || len(tags) == 0 {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.ToEntity.ID); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tif id, ok := a.Asset.(*general.Identifier); ok && id != nil && id.Type == general.LEICode {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn a\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (fc *fuzzyCompletions) query(e *et.Event, orgent *dbt.Entity) *dbt.Entity {\n\tvar conf int\n\tvar rec *org.LEIRecord\n\n\tif leient := fc.plugin.orgEntityToLEI(e, orgent); leient != nil {\n\t\tlei := leient.Asset.(*general.Identifier)\n\n\t\tif r, err := org.GLEIFGetLEIRecord(lei.ID); err == nil {\n\t\t\trec = r\n\t\t\tconf = 100\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif rec == nil {\n\t\to := orgent.Asset.(*oamorg.Organization)\n\t\tbrand := org.ExtractBrandName(o.Name)\n\n\t\tresult, err := org.GLEIFSearchFuzzyCompletions(brand)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(err.Error(), slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", fc.plugin.name, \"handler\", fc.name))\n\t\t\treturn nil\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tm := make(map[string]string)\n\t\tfor _, d := range result.Data {\n\t\t\tif d.Type == \"fuzzycompletions\" && d.Relationships.LEIRecords.Data.Type == \"lei-records\" {\n\t\t\t\tm[d.Attributes.Value] = d.Relationships.LEIRecords.Data.ID\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\trec = filterFuzzyCompletions(e, orgent, brand, m)\n\t}\n\n\tif rec == nil {\n\t\te.Session.Log().Info(\"no LEI record found for organization\",\n\t\t\t\"org\", orgent.ID, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", fc.plugin.name, \"handler\", fc.name))\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\treturn fc.store(e, orgent, rec, conf)\n}\n\nfunc filterFuzzyCompletions(e *et.Event, orgent *dbt.Entity, brand string, m map[string]string) *org.LEIRecord {\n\tvar rec *org.LEIRecord\n\to := orgent.Asset.(*oamorg.Organization)\n\n\tvar names []string\n\tfor k := range m {\n\t\tnames = append(names, k)\n\t}\n\tif len(names) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tif exact, partial, found := org.NameMatch(e.Session, orgent, names); found {\n\t\tvar conf int\n\n\t\tfor _, match := range exact {\n\t\t\tscore := 30\n\n\t\t\tif len(exact) == 1 {\n\t\t\t\tscore += 30\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tlei := m[match]\n\t\t\tif r, err := org.GLEIFGetLEIRecord(lei); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\tif org.LocMatch(e, orgent, r) {\n\t\t\t\t\tscore += 40\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tif score > conf {\n\t\t\t\t\trec = r\n\t\t\t\t\tconf = score\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswg := metrics.NewSmithWatermanGotoh()\n\t\tswg.CaseSensitive = false\n\t\tswg.GapPenalty = -0.1\n\t\tswg.Substitution = metrics.MatchMismatch{\n\t\t\tMatch:    1,\n\t\t\tMismatch: -0.5,\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tfor _, match := range partial {\n\t\t\tif !strings.Contains(strings.ToLower(match), strings.ToLower(brand)) {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tsim := strutil.Similarity(o.Name, match, swg)\n\t\t\tscore := int(math.Round(sim * 30))\n\n\t\t\tif len(partial) == 1 {\n\t\t\t\tscore += 30\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tlei := m[match]\n\t\t\tif r, err := org.GLEIFGetLEIRecord(lei); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\tif org.LocMatch(e, orgent, r) {\n\t\t\t\t\tscore += 40\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tif score > conf {\n\t\t\t\t\trec = r\n\t\t\t\t\tconf = score\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn rec\n}\n\nfunc (fc *fuzzyCompletions) store(e *et.Event, orgent *dbt.Entity, rec *org.LEIRecord, conf int) *dbt.Entity {\n\tfc.plugin.updateOrgFromLEIRecord(e, orgent, rec, conf)\n\n\tident, err := fc.plugin.createLEIFromRecord(e, orgent, rec, conf)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\te.Session.Log().Error(err.Error(), slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", fc.plugin.name, \"handler\", fc.name))\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn ident\n}\n\nfunc (fc *fuzzyCompletions) process(e *et.Event, orgent, ident *dbt.Entity) {\n\tid := ident.Asset.(*general.Identifier)\n\n\t_ = e.Dispatcher.DispatchEvent(&et.Event{\n\t\tName:    id.UniqueID,\n\t\tEntity:  ident,\n\t\tSession: e.Session,\n\t})\n\n\to := orgent.Asset.(*oamorg.Organization)\n\te.Session.Log().Info(\"relationship discovered\", \"from\", o.Name, \"relation\", \"id\",\n\t\t\"to\", id.UniqueID, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", fc.plugin.name, \"handler\", fc.name))\n}\n"

All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage gleif\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support/org\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n)\n\nfunc (g *gleif) createLEIIdentifier(session et.Session, orgent *dbt.Entity, lei *general.Identifier, conf int) (*dbt.Entity, error) {\n\tid, err := session.Cache().CreateAsset(lei)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t} else if id == nil {\n\t\treturn nil, errors.New(\"failed to create the Identifier asset\")\n\t}\n\n\t_, _ = session.Cache().CreateEntityProperty(id, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\tSource:     g.source.Name,\n\t\tConfidence: conf,\n\t})\n\n\tif orgent != nil {\n\t\tif err := g.createRelation(session, orgent, general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"id\"}, id, conf); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn id, nil\n}\n\nfunc (g *gleif) createLEIFromRecord(e *et.Event, orgent *dbt.Entity, lei *org.LEIRecord, conf int) (*dbt.Entity, error) {\n\treturn g.createLEIIdentifier(e.Session, orgent, &general.Identifier{\n\t\tUniqueID:       fmt.Sprintf(\"%s:%s\", general.LEICode, lei.ID),\n\t\tID:             lei.ID,\n\t\tType:           general.LEICode,\n\t\tStatus:         lei.Attributes.Registration.Status,\n\t\tCreationDate:   lei.Attributes.Registration.InitialRegistrationDate,\n\t\tUpdatedDate:    lei.Attributes.Registration.LastUpdateDate,\n\t\tExpirationDate: lei.Attributes.Registration.NextRenewalDate,\n\t}, conf)\n}\n\nfunc (g *gleif) buildAddrFromLEIAddress(addr *org.LEIAddress) string {\n\tstreet := strings.Join(addr.AddressLines, \" \")\n\n\tprovince := addr.Region\n\tif parts := strings.Split(province, \"-\"); len(parts) > 1 {\n\t\tprovince = parts[1]\n\t}\n\n\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%s %s %s %s %s\", street, addr.City, province, addr.PostalCode, addr.Country)\n}\n"

                    "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage gleif\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support/org\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n\toamorg \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/org\"\n)\n\nfunc (g *gleif) orgEntityToLEI(e *et.Event, orgent *dbt.Entity) *dbt.Entity {\n\tif edges, err := e.Session.Cache().OutgoingEdges(orgent, time.Time{}, \"id\"); err == nil {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.ToEntity.ID); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tif id, ok := a.Asset.(*general.Identifier); ok && id.Type == general.LEICode {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn a\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (g *gleif) leiToOrgEntity(e *et.Event, ident *dbt.Entity) *dbt.Entity {\n\tif edges, err := e.Session.Cache().IncomingEdges(ident, time.Time{}, \"id\"); err == nil {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.FromEntity.ID); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tif _, ok := a.Asset.(*oamorg.Organization); ok {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn a\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (g *gleif) updateOrgFromLEIRecord(e *et.Event, orgent *dbt.Entity, lei *org.LEIRecord, conf int) {\n\to := orgent.Asset.(*oamorg.Organization)\n\n\t// check if the org entity already has a LEI identifier\n\tif leient := g.orgEntityToLEI(e, orgent); leient != nil {\n\t\t// check if the LEI identifier is the same as the one we are processing\n\t\tif id, ok := leient.Asset.(*general.Identifier); ok && id.ID != lei.ID {\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif _, err := g.createLEIFromRecord(e, orgent, lei, conf); err != nil {\n\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to create the LEI Identifier from the record: %s\", err.Error())\n\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", g.name, \"handler\", g.name))\n\t}\n\n\to.LegalName = strings.ToLower(lei.Attributes.Entity.LegalName.Name)\n\tif o.LegalName != \"\" {\n\t\t_ = g.addIdentifiersToOrg(e, orgent, general.LegalName, []string{o.LegalName}, conf)\n\t}\n\n\tvar otherNames []string\n\tfor _, other := range lei.Attributes.Entity.OtherNames {\n\t\totherNames = append(otherNames, strings.ToLower(other.Name))\n\t}\n\tfor _, other := range lei.Attributes.Entity.TransliteratedOtherNames {\n\t\totherNames = append(otherNames, strings.ToLower(other.Name))\n\t}\n\t_ = g.addIdentifiersToOrg(e, orgent, general.OrganizationName, otherNames, conf)\n\n\to.FoundingDate = lei.Attributes.Entity.CreationDate\n\to.Jurisdiction = lei.Attributes.Entity.Jurisdiction\n\to.RegistrationID = lei.Attributes.Entity.RegisteredAs\n\tif lei.Attributes.Entity.Status == \"ACTIVE\" {\n\t\to.Active = true\n\t} else {\n\t\to.Active = false\n\t}\n\n\taddr := g.buildAddrFromLEIAddress(&lei.Attributes.Entity.LegalAddress)\n\t_ = g.addAddress(e, orgent, general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"legal_address\"}, addr, conf)\n\n\taddr = g.buildAddrFromLEIAddress(&lei.Attributes.Entity.HeadquartersAddress)\n\t_ = g.addAddress(e, orgent, general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"hq_address\"}, addr, conf)\n\n\tfor _, a := range lei.Attributes.Entity.OtherAddresses {\n\t\taddr = g.buildAddrFromLEIAddress(&a)\n\t\t_ = g.addAddress(e, orgent, general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"location\"}, addr, conf)\n\t}\n\n\t_ = g.addIdentifiersToOrg(e, orgent, general.BankIDCode, lei.Attributes.BIC, conf)\n\t_ = g.addIdentifiersToOrg(e, orgent, general.MarketIDCode, lei.Attributes.MIC, conf)\n\t_ = g.addIdentifiersToOrg(e, orgent, general.OpenCorpID, []string{lei.Attributes.OCID}, conf)\n\t_ = g.addIdentifiersToOrg(e, orgent, general.SPGlobalCompanyID, lei.Attributes.SPGlobal, conf)\n\n\t// update the Organization\n\tif _, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateEntity(orgent); err != nil {\n\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to update the Organization asset for %s: %s\", o.Name, err)\n\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", g.name, \"handler\", g.name))\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (g *gleif) addAddress(e *et.Event, orgent *dbt.Entity, rel oam.Relation, addr string, conf int) error {\n\tloc := support.StreetAddressToLocation(addr)\n\tif loc == nil {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to create location\")\n\t}\n\n\ta, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(loc)\n\tif err != nil || a == nil {\n\t\te.Session.Log().Error(err.Error(), slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", g.name, \"handler\", g.name))\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\t_, _ = e.Session.Cache().CreateEntityProperty(a, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\tSource:     g.source.Name,\n\t\tConfidence: conf,\n\t})\n\n\tif err := g.createRelation(e.Session, orgent, rel, a, conf); err != nil {\n\t\te.Session.Log().Error(err.Error(), slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", g.name, \"handler\", g.name))\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (g *gleif) addIdentifiersToOrg(e *et.Event, orgent *dbt.Entity, idtype string, ids []string, conf int) error {\n\tfor _, id := range ids {\n\t\tif id == \"\" {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\toamid := &general.Identifier{\n\t\t\tUniqueID: fmt.Sprintf(\"%s:%s\", idtype, id),\n\t\t\tID:       id,\n\t\t\tType:     idtype,\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tident, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(oamid)\n\t\tif err != nil || ident == nil {\n\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t_, _ = e.Session.Cache().CreateEntityProperty(ident, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\t\tSource:     g.source.Name,\n\t\t\tConfidence: conf,\n\t\t})\n\n\t\tif err := g.createRelation(e.Session, orgent, general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"id\"}, ident, conf); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n"
                  },

All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage gleif\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n)\n\nfunc NewGLEIF() et.Plugin {\n\treturn &gleif{\n\t\tname: \"GLEIF\",\n\t\tsource: &et.Source{\n\t\t\tName:       \"GLEIF\",\n\t\t\tConfidence: 100,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (g *gleif) Name() string {\n\treturn g.name\n}\n\nfunc (g *gleif) Start(r et.Registry) error {\n\tg.log = r.Log().WithGroup(\"plugin\").With(\"name\", g.name)\n\n\tg.fuzzy = &fuzzyCompletions{\n\t\tname:   g.name + \"-Fuzzy-Handler\",\n\t\tplugin: g,\n\t}\n\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:     g,\n\t\tName:       g.fuzzy.name,\n\t\tPriority:   6,\n\t\tTransforms: []string{string(oam.Identifier)},\n\t\tEventType:  oam.Organization,\n\t\tCallback:   g.fuzzy.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tg.related = &relatedOrgs{\n\t\tname:   g.name + \"-LEI-Handler\",\n\t\tplugin: g,\n\t}\n\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:     g,\n\t\tName:       g.related.name,\n\t\tPriority:   5,\n\t\tTransforms: []string{string(oam.Organization)},\n\t\tEventType:  oam.Identifier,\n\t\tCallback:   g.related.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tg.log.Info(\"Plugin started\")\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (g *gleif) Stop() {\n\tg.log.Info(\"Plugin stopped\")\n}\n\nfunc (g *gleif) createRelation(session et.Session, obj *dbt.Entity, rel oam.Relation, subject *dbt.Entity, conf int) error {\n\tedge, err := session.Cache().CreateEdge(&dbt.Edge{\n\t\tRelation:   rel,\n\t\tFromEntity: obj,\n\t\tToEntity:   subject,\n\t})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t} else if edge == nil {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to create the edge\")\n\t}\n\n\t_, err = session.Cache().CreateEdgeProperty(edge, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\tSource:     g.source.Name,\n\t\tConfidence: conf,\n\t})\n\treturn err\n}\n"

                    "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage gleif\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support/org\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n\toamorg \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/org\"\n)\n\nfunc (ro *relatedOrgs) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\tident, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*general.Identifier)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the Identifier asset\")\n\t} else if ident.Type != general.LEICode {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(),\n\t\tstring(oam.Identifier), string(oam.Identifier), ro.plugin.name)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tvar orgs []*dbt.Entity\n\tif support.AssetMonitoredWithinTTL(e.Session, e.Entity, ro.plugin.source, since) {\n\t\torgs = append(orgs, ro.lookup(e, e.Entity, since)...)\n\t} else {\n\t\torgs = append(orgs, ro.query(e, e.Entity)...)\n\t\tsupport.MarkAssetMonitored(e.Session, e.Entity, ro.plugin.source)\n\t}\n\n\tif len(orgs) > 0 {\n\t\tro.process(e, orgs)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (ro *relatedOrgs) lookup(e *et.Event, ident *dbt.Entity, since time.Time) []*dbt.Entity {\n\tvar o *dbt.Entity\n\n\tif edges, err := e.Session.Cache().IncomingEdges(ident, since, \"id\"); err == nil {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\tif tags, err := e.Session.Cache().GetEdgeTags(edge, since, ro.plugin.source.Name); err != nil || len(tags) == 0 {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.FromEntity.ID); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tif _, ok := a.Asset.(*oamorg.Organization); ok {\n\t\t\t\t\to = a\n\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tvar p *dbt.Entity\n\tif edges, err := e.Session.Cache().IncomingEdges(o, since, \"subsidiary\"); err == nil {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\tif tags, err := e.Session.Cache().GetEdgeTags(edge, since, ro.plugin.source.Name); err != nil || len(tags) == 0 {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.FromEntity.ID); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tif _, ok := a.Asset.(*oamorg.Organization); ok {\n\t\t\t\t\tp = a\n\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tvar children []*dbt.Entity\n\tif edges, err := e.Session.Cache().OutgoingEdges(o, since, \"subsidiary\"); err == nil {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\tif tags, err := e.Session.Cache().GetEdgeTags(edge, since, ro.plugin.source.Name); err != nil || len(tags) == 0 {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.ToEntity.ID); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tif _, ok := a.Asset.(*oamorg.Organization); ok {\n\t\t\t\t\tchildren = append(children, a)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn append([]*dbt.Entity{o, p}, children...)\n}\n\nfunc (ro *relatedOrgs) query(e *et.Event, ident *dbt.Entity) []*dbt.Entity {\n\tid := ident.Asset.(*general.Identifier)\n\n\tparent, _ := org.GLEIFGetDirectParentRecord(id.ID)\n\tchildren, _ := org.GLEIFGetDirectChildrenRecords(id.ID)\n\treturn ro.store(e, ident, parent, children)\n}\n\nfunc (ro *relatedOrgs) store(e *et.Event, ident *dbt.Entity, parent *org.LEIRecord, children []*org.LEIRecord) []*dbt.Entity {\n\tvar orgs []*dbt.Entity\n\n\torgent := ro.plugin.leiToOrgEntity(e, ident)\n\tif orgent == nil {\n\t\treturn orgs\n\t}\n\n\tif parent != nil {\n\t\tparentorg := &oamorg.Organization{Name: parent.Attributes.Entity.LegalName.Name}\n\n\t\tparentent, err := org.CreateOrgAsset(e.Session, orgent, nil, parentorg, ro.plugin.source)\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\torgs = append(orgs, parentent)\n\t\t\tro.plugin.updateOrgFromLEIRecord(e, parentent, parent, ro.plugin.source.Confidence)\n\t\t\tsupport.MarkAssetMonitored(e.Session, parentent, ro.plugin.source)\n\t\t\t_ = ro.plugin.createRelation(e.Session, parentent,\n\t\t\t\t&general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"subsidiary\"}, orgent, ro.plugin.source.Confidence)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, child := range children {\n\t\tchildorg := &oamorg.Organization{Name: child.Attributes.Entity.LegalName.Name}\n\n\t\tchildent, err := org.CreateOrgAsset(e.Session, orgent,\n\t\t\t&general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"subsidiary\"}, childorg, ro.plugin.source)\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\torgs = append(orgs, childent)\n\t\t\tro.plugin.updateOrgFromLEIRecord(e, childent, child, ro.plugin.source.Confidence)\n\t\t\tsupport.MarkAssetMonitored(e.Session, childent, ro.plugin.source)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn orgs\n}\n\nfunc (ro *relatedOrgs) process(e *et.Event, assets []*dbt.Entity) {\n\tfor _, orgent := range assets {\n\t\to := orgent.Asset.(*oamorg.Organization)\n\n\t\t_ = e.Dispatcher.DispatchEvent(&et.Event{\n\t\t\tName:    fmt.Sprintf(\"%s:%s\", o.Name, o.ID),\n\t\t\tEntity:  orgent,\n\t\t\tSession: e.Session,\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n"

                "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage api\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"net/url\"\n\t\"regexp\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/caffix/stringset\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/internal/net/http\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\toamdns \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/dns\"\n\t\"golang.org/x/time/rate\"\n)\n\ntype grepApp struct {\n\tname   string\n\tlog    *slog.Logger\n\trlimit *rate.Limiter\n\tsource *et.Source\n}\n\nfunc NewGrepApp() et.Plugin {\n\tlimit := rate.Every(2 * time.Second)\n\n\treturn &grepApp{\n\t\tname:   \"Grep.App\",\n\t\trlimit: rate.NewLimiter(limit, 1),\n\t\tsource: &et.Source{\n\t\t\tName:       \"Grep.App\",\n\t\t\tConfidence: 50,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (g *grepApp) Name() string {\n\treturn g.name\n}\n\nfunc (g *grepApp) Start(r et.Registry) error {\n\tg.log = r.Log().WithGroup(\"plugin\").With(\"name\", g.name)\n\n\tname := g.name + \"-Handler\"\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:     g,\n\t\tName:       name,\n\t\tPriority:   9,\n\t\tTransforms: []string{string(oam.Identifier)},\n\t\tEventType:  oam.FQDN,\n\t\tCallback:   g.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tg.log.Info(\"Plugin started\")\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (g *grepApp) Stop() {\n\tg.log.Info(\"Plugin stopped\")\n}\n\nfunc (g *grepApp) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\tfqdn, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the FQDN asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tif !support.HasSLDInScope(e) {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(), string(oam.FQDN), string(oam.Identifier), g.name)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tvar names []*dbt.Entity\n\tif support.AssetMonitoredWithinTTL(e.Session, e.Entity, g.source, since) {\n\t\tnames = append(names, g.lookup(e, fqdn.Name, since)...)\n\t} else {\n\t\tnames = append(names, g.query(e, fqdn.Name)...)\n\t\tsupport.MarkAssetMonitored(e.Session, e.Entity, g.source)\n\t}\n\n\tif len(names) > 0 {\n\t\tg.process(e, names)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\nfunc (g *grepApp) lookup(e *et.Event, name string, since time.Time) []*dbt.Entity {\n\treturn support.SourceToAssetsWithinTTL(e.Session, name, string(oam.Identifier), g.source, since)\n}\n\nfunc (g *grepApp) query(e *et.Event, name string) []*dbt.Entity {\n\tnewdlt := strings.ReplaceAll(name, \".\", `\\.`)\n\tescapedQuery := url.QueryEscape(\"([a-zA-Z0-9._-]+)@\" + newdlt)\n\tre := regexp.MustCompile(`([a-zA-Z0-9._-]+)@` + newdlt)\n\n\temails := stringset.New()\n\tdefer emails.Close()\n\n\tcont := true\n\tfor page := 1; cont; page++ {\n\t\t_ = g.rlimit.Wait(context.TODO())\n\t\tresp, err := http.RequestWebPage(context.TODO(), &http.Request{\n\t\t\tURL: fmt.Sprintf(\"https://grep.app/api/search?page=%s&q=%s&regexp=true\", strconv.Itoa(page), escapedQuery),\n\t\t})\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar response struct {\n\t\t\tFacets struct {\n\t\t\t\tHits []struct {\n\t\t\t\t\tContent struct {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSnippet string `json:\"snippet\"`\n\t\t\t\t\t} `json:\"content\"`\n\t\t\t\t} `json:\"hits\"`\n\t\t\t\tTotal int `json:\"total\"`\n\t\t\t} `json:\"facets\"`\n\t\t}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(resp.Body), &response); err != nil {\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tcont = false\n\t\tif len(response.Facets.Hits) > 0 {\n\t\t\tcont = true\n\t\t\t// loop through the hits and append the snippets to the results\n\t\t\tfor _, hit := range response.Facets.Hits {\n\t\t\t\temails.InsertMany(re.FindAllString(hit.Content.Snippet, -1)...)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn g.store(e, emails.Slice())\n}\n\nfunc (g *grepApp) store(e *et.Event, emails []string) []*dbt.Entity {\n\treturn support.StoreEmailsWithSource(e.Session, emails, g.source, g.name, g.name+\"-Handler\")\n}\n\nfunc (g *grepApp) process(e *et.Event, assets []*dbt.Entity) {\n\tsupport.ProcessEmailsWithSource(e, assets, g.source)\n}\n"

err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tht.log.Info(\"Plugin started\")\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (ht *hackerTarget) Stop() {\n\tht.log.Info(\"Plugin stopped\")\n}\n\nfunc (ht *hackerTarget) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\tfqdn, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the FQDN asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tif !support.HasSLDInScope(e) {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(), string(oam.FQDN), string(oam.FQDN), ht.name)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tvar names []*dbt.Entity\n\tif support.AssetMonitoredWithinTTL(e.Session, e.Entity, ht.source, since) {\n\t\tnames = append(names, ht.lookup(e, fqdn.Name, since)...)\n\t} else {\n\t\tnames = append(names, ht.query(e, fqdn.Name)...)\n\t\tsupport.MarkAssetMonitored(e.Session, e.Entity, ht.source)\n\t}\n\n\tif len(names) > 0 {\n\t\tht.process(e, names)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (ht *hackerTarget) lookup(e *et.Event, name string, since time.Time) []*dbt.Entity {\n\treturn support.SourceToAssetsWithinTTL(e.Session, name, string(oam.FQDN), ht.source, since)\n}\n\nfunc (ht *hackerTarget) query(e *et.Event, name string) []*dbt.Entity {\n\t_ = ht.rlimit.Wait(context.TODO())\n\tresp, err := http.RequestWebPage(context.TODO(), &http.Request{URL: ht.url + name})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar names []string\n\tif records, err := csv.NewReader(strings.NewReader(resp.Body)).ReadAll(); err == nil {\n\t\tfor _, record := range records {\n\t\t\tif len(record) < 2 {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t// if the subdomain is not in scope, skip it\n\t\t\tn := strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(record[0]))\n\t\t\tif _, conf := e.Session.Scope().IsAssetInScope(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: n}, 0); conf > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tnames = append(names, n)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn ht.store(e, names)\n}\n\nfunc (ht *hackerTarget) store(e *et.Event, names []string) []*dbt.Entity {\n\treturn support.StoreFQDNsWithSource(e.Session, names, ht.source, ht.name, ht.name+\"-Handler\")\n}\n\nfunc (ht *hackerTarget) process(e *et.Event, assets []*dbt.Entity) {\n\tsupport.ProcessFQDNsWithSource(e, assets, ht.source)\n}\n"

All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage api\n\n/*\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/internal/net/http\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/contact\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/domain\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/source\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/ratelimit\"\n)\n\ntype hunterIO struct {\n\tname             string\n\tcounturl         string\n\tqueryurl         string\n\temailVerifierurl string\n\taccounttype      string\n\tlog              *slog.Logger\n\trlimit           ratelimit.Limiter\n\tsource           *et.Source\n}\n\nfunc NewHunterIO() et.Plugin {\n\treturn &hunterIO{\n\t\tname:             \"Hunter.io\",\n\t\tcounturl:         \"https://api.hunter.io/v2/email-count?domain=\",\n\t\tqueryurl:         \"https://api.hunter.io/v2/domain-search?domain=\",\n\t\temailVerifierurl: \"https://api.hunter.io/v2/email-verifier?email=\",\n\t\trlimit:           ratelimit.New(15, ratelimit.WithoutSlack),\n\t\tsource: &et.Source{\n\t\t\tName:       \"Hunter.io\",\n\t\t\tConfidence: 80,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (h *hunterIO) Name() string {\n\treturn h.name\n}\n\nfunc (h *hunterIO) Start(r et.Registry) error {\n\th.log = r.Log().WithGroup(\"plugin\").With(\"name\", h.name)\n\n\tname := h.name + \"-Email-Generation-Handler\"\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:     h,\n\t\tName:       name,\n\t\tTransforms: []string{\"emailaddress\"},\n\t\tEventType:  oam.FQDN,\n\t\tCallback:   h.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tname = h.name + \"-Email-Verification-Handler\"\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:     h,\n\t\tName:       name,\n\t\tTransforms: []string{\"emailaddress\"},\n\t\tEventType:  oam.EmailAddress,\n\t\tCallback:   h.verify,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\th.log.Info(\"Plugin started\")\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (h *hunterIO) Stop() {\n\th.log.Info(\"Plugin stopped\")\n}\n\nfunc (h *hunterIO) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\tfqdn, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*domain.FQDN)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the FQDN asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tdomlt := strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(fqdn.Name))\n\tif e.Session.Config().WhichDomain(domlt) != domlt {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\n\th.rlimit.Take()\n\tif count, err := h.count(domlt); err != nil {\n\t\te.Session.Log().Error(fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to use the API count endpoint: %v\", err),\n\t\t\tslog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", h.name, \"handler\", h.name+\"-Email-Generation-Handler\"))\n\t\treturn nil\n\t} else {\n\t\tapi, err := h.account_type(e)\n\t\tif err != nil || api == \"\" {\n\t\t\treturn nil\n\t\t}\n\t\tresults, err := h.query(domlt, count, api)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to query: %v\", err),\n\t\t\t\tslog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", h.name, \"handler\", h.name+\"-Email-Generation-Handler\"))\n\t\t\treturn nil\n\t\t}\n\t\tsupport.ProcessEmailsWithSource(e, results, h.source)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (h *hunterIO) verify(e *et.Event) error {\n\temail, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*contact.EmailAddress)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the EmailAddress asset\")\n\t}\n\n\th.rlimit.Take()\n\tapi, err := support.GetAPI(h.name, e)\n\tif err != nil || api == \"\" {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\ttype responseJSON struct {\n\t\tData struct {\n\t\t\tStatus string `json:\"status\"`\n\t\t\tResult string `json:\"result\"`\n\t\t} `json:\"data\"`\n\t}\n\n\tvar result responseJSON\n\tresp, err := http.RequestWebPage(context.TODO(), &http.Request{URL: h.emailVerifierurl + email.Address + \"&api_key=\" + api})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\te.Session.Log().Error(fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to make Verify request: %v\", err),\n\t\t\tslog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", h.name, \"handler\", h.name+\"-Email-Verification-Handler\"))\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tif err := json.NewDecoder(strings.NewReader(resp.Body)).Decode(&result); err != nil {\n\t\te.Session.Log().Error(fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to decode JSON: %v\", err),\n\t\t\tslog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", h.name, \"handler\", h.name+\"-Email-Verification-Handler\"))\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\teventMeta, ok := e.Meta.(*et.EmailMeta)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\tif e.Meta != nil {\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"unexpected Meta type: %T\", e.Meta)\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\teventMeta.VerifyAttempted = true\n\n\tif result.Data.Status != \"unknown\" && result.Data.Status != \"invalid\" &&\n\t\tresult.Data.Status != \"disposable\" && result.Data.Status != \"accept_all\" {\n\t\teventMeta.Verified = true\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (h *hunterIO) account_type(e *et.Event) (string, error) {\n\tapi, err := support.GetAPI(h.name, e)\n\tif err != nil || api == \"\" {\n\t\treturn \"\", err\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := http.RequestWebPage(context.TODO(), &http.Request{URL: \"https://api.hunter.io/v2/account?api_key=\" + api})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn \"\", err\n\t}\n\n\t// make a struct to hold the response since it returns as json\n\ttype responseJSON struct {\n\t\tData struct {\n\t\t\tPlan string `json:\"plan_name\"`\n\t\t} `json:\"data\"`\n\t}\n\n\tvar response responseJSON\n\t// decode the json then return the total only\n\tif err := json.NewDecoder(strings.NewReader(resp.Body)).Decode(&response); err != nil {\n\t\treturn \"\", err\n\t}\n\th.accounttype = response.Data.Plan\n\treturn api, nil\n}\n\nfunc (h *hunterIO) count(domain string) (int, error) {\n\tresp, err := http.RequestWebPage(context.TODO(), &http.Request{URL: h.counturl + domain})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn 0, err\n\t}\n\n\t// make a struct to hold the response since it returns as json\n\ttype responseJSON struct {\n\t\tData struct {\n\t\t\tTotal int `json:\"total\"`\n\t\t} `json:\"data\"`\n\t}\n\n\tvar response responseJSON\n\t// decode the json then return the total only\n\tif err := json.NewDecoder(strings.NewReader(resp.Body)).Decode(&response); err != nil {\n\t\treturn 0, err\n\t}\n\treturn response.Data.Total, nil\n\n}\n\nfunc (h *hunterIO) query(domain string, count int, api string) ([]string, error) {\n\tvar result []string\n\t// make a struct to hold the response since it returns as json\n\ttype responseJSON struct {\n\t\tData struct {\n\t\t\tEmail []struct {\n\t\t\t\tValue string `json:\"value\"`\n\t\t\t} `json:\"emails\"`\n\t\t} `json:\"data\"`\n\t}\n\n\tvar response responseJSON\n\t// if the count is less than or equal to 10, we can get all the emails in one request\n\t// TODO: add another condition for free API keys, since they could only get the first ten anyways.\n\tif count <= 10 || h.accounttype == \"Free\" {\n\t\tresp, err := http.RequestWebPage(context.TODO(), &http.Request{URL: h.queryurl + domain + \"&api_key=\" + api})\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\t\tif err := json.NewDecoder(strings.NewReader(resp.Body)).Decode(&response); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\t\tfor _, data := range response.Data.Email {\n\t\t\tresult = append(result, data.Value)\n\t\t}\n\n\t} else {\n\t\tfor offset := 0; offset < count; offset += 100 {\n\t\t\tresp, err := http.RequestWebPage(context.TODO(), &http.Request{URL: h.queryurl + domain + \"&api_key=\" + api + \"&limit=100&offset=\" + strconv.Itoa(offset)})\n\t\t\tif err != nil && resp.StatusCode != 400 {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t} else if resp.StatusCode == 400 { // since the API returns 400 when the limit is exceeded or if any error occurs, we break the loop\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif err := json.NewDecoder(strings.NewReader(resp.Body)).Decode(&response); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tfor _, data := range response.Data.Email {\n\t\t\t\tresult = append(result, data.Value)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn result, nil\n}\n*/\n"

(\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/internal/net/dns\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/internal/net/http\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\toamdns \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/dns\"\n\t\"golang.org/x/time/rate\"\n)\n\ntype leakix struct {\n\tname   string\n\tlog    *slog.Logger\n\trlimit *rate.Limiter\n\tsource *et.Source\n}\n\nfunc NewLeakIX() et.Plugin {\n\tlimit := rate.Every(2 * time.Second)\n\n\treturn &leakix{\n\t\tname:   \"LeakIX\",\n\t\trlimit: rate.NewLimiter(limit, 1),\n\t\tsource: &et.Source{\n\t\t\tName:       \"LeakIX\",\n\t\t\tConfidence: 80,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (ix *leakix) Name() string {\n\treturn ix.name\n}\n\nfunc (ix *leakix) Start(r et.Registry) error {\n\tix.log = r.Log().WithGroup(\"plugin\").With(\"name\", ix.name)\n\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:     ix,\n\t\tName:       ix.name + \"-Handler\",\n\t\tPriority:   9,\n\t\tTransforms: []string{string(oam.FQDN)},\n\t\tEventType:  oam.FQDN,\n\t\tCallback:   ix.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tix.log.Info(\"Plugin started\")\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (ix *leakix) Stop() {\n\tix.log.Info(\"Plugin stopped\")\n}\n\nfunc (ix *leakix) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\tfqdn, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the FQDN asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tif !support.HasSLDInScope(e) {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tds := e.Session.Config().GetDataSourceConfig(ix.name)\n\tif ds == nil || len(ds.Creds) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar keys []string\n\tfor _, cr := range ds.Creds {\n\t\tif cr != nil && cr.Apikey != \"\" {\n\t\t\tkeys = append(keys, cr.Apikey)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(), string(oam.FQDN), string(oam.FQDN), ix.name)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tvar names []*dbt.Entity\n\tif support.AssetMonitoredWithinTTL(e.Session, e.Entity, ix.source, since) {\n\t\tnames = append(names, ix.lookup(e, fqdn.Name, since)...)\n\t} else {\n\t\tnames = append(names, ix.query(e, fqdn.Name, keys)...)\n\t\tsupport.MarkAssetMonitored(e.Session, e.Entity, ix.source)\n\t}\n\n\tif len(names) > 0 {\n\t\tix.process(e, names)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (ix *leakix) lookup(e *et.Event, name string, since time.Time) []*dbt.Entity {\n\treturn support.SourceToAssetsWithinTTL(e.Session, name, string(oam.FQDN), ix.source, since)\n}\n\nfunc (ix *leakix) query(e *et.Event, name string, keys []string) []*dbt.Entity {\n\tvar names []string\n\n\tfor _, key := range keys {\n\t\t_ = ix.rlimit.Wait(context.TODO())\n\t\tresp, err := http.RequestWebPage(context.TODO(), &http.Request{\n\t\t\tURL:    \"https://leakix.net/api/subdomains/\" + name,\n\t\t\tHeader: http.Header{\"Accept\": []string{\"application/json\"}, \"api-key\": []string{key}},\n\t\t})\n\t\tif err != nil || resp.Body == \"\" {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar result struct {\n\t\t\tSubdomains []struct {\n\t\t\t\tFQDN string `json:\"subdomain\"`\n\t\t\t} `json:\"subdomains\"`\n\t\t}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(\"{\\\"subdomains\\\":\"+resp.Body+\"}\"), &result); err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tfor _, s := range result.Subdomains {\n\t\t\tname := strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(dns.RemoveAsteriskLabel(s.FQDN)))\n\t\t\t// if the subdomain is not in scope, skip it\n\t\t\tif _, conf := e.Session.Scope().IsAssetInScope(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: name}, 0); conf > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tnames = append(names, name)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tbreak\n\t}\n\n\treturn ix.store(e, names)\n}\n\nfunc (ix *leakix) store(e *et.Event, names []string) []*dbt.Entity {\n\treturn support.StoreFQDNsWithSource(e.Session, names, ix.source, ix.name, ix.name+\"-Handler\")\n}\n\nfunc (ix *leakix) process(e *et.Event, assets []*dbt.Entity) {\n\tsupport.ProcessFQDNsWithSource(e, assets, ix.source)\n}\n"

\"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\toamdns \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/dns\"\n\t\"golang.org/x/time/rate\"\n)\n\ntype passiveTotal struct {\n\tname   string\n\tlog    *slog.Logger\n\trlimit *rate.Limiter\n\tsource *et.Source\n}\n\nfunc NewPassiveTotal() et.Plugin {\n\tlimit := rate.Every(10 * time.Second)\n\n\treturn &passiveTotal{\n\t\tname:   \"PassiveTotal\",\n\t\trlimit: rate.NewLimiter(limit, 1),\n\t\tsource: &et.Source{\n\t\t\tName:       \"PassiveTotal\",\n\t\t\tConfidence: 30,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (pt *passiveTotal) Name() string {\n\treturn pt.name\n}\n\nfunc (pt *passiveTotal) Start(r et.Registry) error {\n\tpt.log = r.Log().WithGroup(\"plugin\").With(\"name\", pt.name)\n\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:     pt,\n\t\tName:       pt.name + \"-Handler\",\n\t\tPriority:   9,\n\t\tTransforms: []string{string(oam.FQDN)},\n\t\tEventType:  oam.FQDN,\n\t\tCallback:   pt.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tpt.log.Info(\"Plugin started\")\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (pt *passiveTotal) Stop() {\n\tpt.log.Info(\"Plugin stopped\")\n}\n\nfunc (pt *passiveTotal) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\tfqdn, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the FQDN asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tif !support.HasSLDInScope(e) {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tds := e.Session.Config().GetDataSourceConfig(pt.name)\n\tif ds == nil || len(ds.Creds) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(), string(oam.FQDN), string(oam.FQDN), pt.name)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tvar names []*dbt.Entity\n\tif support.AssetMonitoredWithinTTL(e.Session, e.Entity, pt.source, since) {\n\t\tnames = append(names, pt.lookup(e, fqdn.Name, since)...)\n\t} else {\n\t\tnames = append(names, pt.query(e, fqdn.Name, ds)...)\n\t\tsupport.MarkAssetMonitored(e.Session, e.Entity, pt.source)\n\t}\n\n\tif len(names) > 0 {\n\t\tpt.process(e, names)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (pt *passiveTotal) lookup(e *et.Event, string, ds *config.DataSource) []*dbt.Entity {\n\tnames := support.NewFQDNFilter()\n\tdefer names.Close()\n\n\tvar lastid string\nloop:\n\tfor _, cr := range ds.Creds {\n\t\tfor lastid != \"\" {\n\t\t\tif cr == nil || cr.Username == \"\" || cr.Apikey == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\turl := \"https://api.riskiq.net/pt/v2/enrichment/subdomains?query=\" + name\n\t\t\tif lastid != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\turl += \"&lastId=\" + lastid\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t_ = pt.rlimit.Wait(context.TODO())\n\t\t\tresp, err := http.RequestWebPage(context.TODO(), &http.Request{\n\t\t\t\tURL: url,\n\t\t\t\tAuth: &http.BasicAuth{\n\t\t\t\t\tUsername: cr.Username,\n\t\t\t\t\tPassword: cr.Apikey,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t\tif err != nil || resp.Body == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tvar result struct {\n\t\t\t\tSuccess    bool     `json:\"success\"`\n\t\t\t\tSubdomains []string `json:\"subdomains\"`\n\t\t\t\tLastID     string   `json:\"lastId\"`\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(resp.Body), &result); err != nil || !result.Success {\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, sub := range result.Subdomains {\n\t\t\t\tn := dns.RemoveAsteriskLabel(http.CleanName(sub + \".\" + name))\n\t\t\t\t// if the subdomain is not in scope, skip it\n\t\t\t\tif _, conf := e.Session.Scope().IsAssetInScope(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: n}, 0); conf > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t\tnames.Insert(n)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tlastid = result.LastID\n\t\t\tif lastid == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tbreak loop\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tnames.Prune(1000)\n\treturn pt.store(e, names.Slice())\n}\n\nfunc (pt *passiveTotal) store(e *et.Event, names []string) []*dbt.Entity {\n\treturn assets, pt.source)\n}\n"
