All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage api\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/internal/net/http\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\toamdns \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/dns\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n\t\"golang.org/x/time/rate\"\n)\n\ntype Prospeo struct {\n\tname     string\n\taccturl  string\n\tcounturl string\n\tqueryurl string\n\tlog      *slog.Logger\n\trlimit   *rate.Limiter\n\tsource   *et.Source\n}\n\nfunc NewProspeo() et.Plugin {\n\tlimit := rate.Every(15 * time.Second)\n\n\treturn &Prospeo{\n\t\tname:     \"Prospeo\",\n\t\taccturl:  \"https://api.prospeo.io/account-information\",\n\t\tcounturl: \"https://api.prospeo.io/email-count\",\n\t\tqueryurl: \"https://api.prospeo.io/domain-search\",\n\t\trlimit:   rate.NewLimiter(limit, 1),\n\t\tsource: &et.Source{\n\t\t\tName:       \"Prospeo\",\n\t\t\tConfidence: 80,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (p *Prospeo) Name() string {\n\treturn p.name\n}\n\nfunc (p *Prospeo) Start(r et.Registry) error {\n\tp.log = r.Log().WithGroup(\"plugin\").With(\"name\", p.name)\n\n\tname := p.name + \"-Handler\"\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:     p,\n\t\tName:       name,\n\t\tPriority:   9,\n\t\tTransforms: []string{string(oam.Identifier)},\n\t\tEventType:  oam.FQDN,\n\t\tCallback:   p.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tp.log.Info(\"Plugin started\")\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (p *Prospeo) Stop() {\n\tp.log.Info(\"Plugin stopped\")\n}\n\nfunc (p *Prospeo) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\tfqdn, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the FQDN asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tif !support.HasSLDInScope(e) {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(), string(oam.FQDN), string(oam.Identifier), p.name)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tvar names []*dbt.Entity\n\tif support.AssetMonitoredWithinTTL(e.Session, e.Entity, p.source, since) {\n\t\tnames = append(names, p.lookup(e, fqdn.Name, since)...)\n\t} else {\n\t\tnames = append(names, p.query(e, fqdn.Name)...)\n\t\tsupport.MarkAssetMonitored(e.Session, e.Entity, p.source)\n\t}\n\n\tif len(names) > 0 {\n\t\tp.process(e, names)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (p *Prospeo) lookup(e *et.Event, name string, since time.Time) []*dbt.Entity {\n\tvar emails []*dbt.Entity\n\n\tfor _, e := range support.SourceToAssetsWithinTTL(e.Session, name, string(oam.Identifier), p.source, since) {\n\t\tif email, ok := e.Asset.(*general.Identifier); ok && email != nil && email.Type == general.EmailAddress {\n\t\t\temails = append(emails, e)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn emails\n}\n\nfunc (p *Prospeo) query(e *et.Event, name string) []*dbt.Entity {\n\tkey, err := support.GetAPI(p.name, e)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\trcreds, err := p.accountType(key)\n\tif err != nil || key == \"\" {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tcount, err := p.count(name, key)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tlimit := rcreds * 50\n\tif limit > count {\n\t\tlimit = count\n\t}\n\n\t_ = p.rlimit.Wait(context.TODO())\n\tresp, err := http.RequestWebPage(context.TODO(), &http.Request{\n\t\tMethod: \"POST\",\n\t\tBody:   `{\"company\": \"` + name + `\", \"limit\": ` + strconv.Itoa(limit) + `}`,\n\t\tURL:    p.queryurl,\n\t\tHeader: http.Header{\"Content-Type\": []string{\"application/json\"}, \"X-KEY\": []string{key}},\n\t})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar r struct {\n\t\tResponse struct {\n\t\t\tEmails []struct {\n\t\t\t\tEmail string `json:\"email\"`\n\t\t\t} `json:\"email_list\"`\n\t\t} `json:\"response\"`\n\t}\n\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(resp.Body), &r); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar emails []string\n\tfor _, e := range r.Response.Emails {\n\t\temails = append(emails, e.Email)\n\t}\n\treturn p.store(e, emails)\n}\n\nfunc (p *Prospeo) store(e *et.Event, emails []string) []*dbt.Entity {\n\treturn support.StoreEmailsWithSource(e.Session, emails, p.source, p.name, p.name+\"-Handler\")\n}\n\nfunc (p *Prospeo) process(e *et.Event, assets []*dbt.Entity) {\n\tsupport.ProcessEmailsWithSource(e, assets, p.source)\n}\n\nfunc (p *Prospeo) accountType(key string) (int, error) {\n\t_ = p.rlimit.Wait(context.TODO())\n\n\tresp, err := http.RequestWebPage(context.TODO(), &http.Request{\n\t\tMethod: \"POST\",\n\t\tURL:    p.accturl,\n\t\tHeader: http.Header{\"Content-Type\": []string{\"application/json\"}, \"X-KEY\": []string{key}},\n\t})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn 0, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar r struct {\n\t\tResponse struct {\n\t\t\tRemainingCredits int `json:\"remaining_credits\"`\n\t\t} `json:\"response\"`\n\t}\n\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(resp.Body), &r); err != nil {\n\t\treturn 0, err\n\t}\n\treturn r.Response.RemainingCredits, nil\n}\n\nfunc (p *Prospeo) count(domain string, key string) (int, error) {\n\t_ = p.rlimit.Wait(context.TODO())\n\n\tresp, err := http.RequestWebPage(context.TODO(), &http.Request{\n\t\tMethod: \"POST\",\n\t\tBody:   `{\"domain\": \"` + domain + `\"}`,\n\t\tURL:    p.counturl,\n\t\tHeader: http.Header{\"Content-Type\": []string{\"application/json\"}, \"X-KEY\": []string{key}},\n\t})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn 0, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar r struct {\n\t\tResponse struct {\n\t\t\tCount int `json:\"count\"`\n\t\t} `json:\"response\"`\n\t}\n\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(resp.Body), &r); err != nil {\n\t\treturn 0, err\n\t}\n\treturn r.Response.Count, nil\n}\n"

All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage rdap\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/openrdap/rdap\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/config\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/contact\"\n\toamdns \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/dns\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n\toamreg \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/registration\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/url\"\n)\n\ntype autnum struct {\n\tname       string\n\tplugin     *rdapPlugin\n\ttransforms []string\n}\n\nfunc (r *autnum) Name() string {\n\treturn r.name\n}\n\nfunc (r *autnum) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\t_, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamreg.AutnumRecord)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the AutnumRecord asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tmatches, err := e.Session.Config().CheckTransformations(\n\t\tstring(oam.AutnumRecord), append(r.transforms, r.plugin.name)...)\n\tif err != nil || matches.Len() == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar findings []*support.Finding\n\tif record, ok := e.Meta.(*rdap.Autnum); ok && record != nil {\n\t\tr.store(e, record, e.Entity, matches)\n\t} else {\n\t\tfindings = append(findings, r.lookup(e, e.Entity, matches)...)\n\t}\n\n\tif len(findings) > 0 {\n\t\tr.process(e, findings)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *autnum) lookup(e *et.Event, asset *dbt.Entity, m *config.Matches) []*support.Finding {\n\tvar rtypes []string\n\tvar findings []*support.Finding\n\tsinces := make(map[string]time.Time)\n\n\tfor _, atype := range r.transforms {\n\t\tif !m.IsMatch(atype) {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(), string(oam.AutnumRecord), atype, r.plugin.name)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tsinces[atype] = since\n\n\t\tswitch atype {\n\t\tcase string(oam.URL):\n\t\t\trtypes = append(rtypes, \"rdap_url\")\n\t\tcase string(oam.FQDN):\n\t\t\trtypes = append(rtypes, \"whois_server\")\n\t\tcase string(oam.ContactRecord):\n\t\t\trtypes = append(rtypes, \"registrant\", \"admin_contact\", \"abuse_contact\", \"technical_contact\")\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif edges, err := e.Session.Cache().OutgoingEdges(asset, time.Time{}, rtypes...); err == nil && len(edges) > 0 {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\ta, err := e.Session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.ToEntity.ID)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\ttotype := string(a.Asset.AssetType())\n\n\t\t\tsince, ok := sinces[totype]\n\t\t\tif !ok || (ok && a.LastSeen.Before(since)) {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif !r.oneOfSources(e, edge, r.plugin.source, since) {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tvar name string\n\t\t\tswitch v := a.Asset.(type) {\n\t\t\tcase *oamdns.FQDN:\n\t\t\t\tname = v.Name\n\t\t\tcase *contact.ContactRecord:\n\t\t\t\tname = \"ContactRecord: \" + v.DiscoveredAt\n\t\t\tcase *url.URL:\n\t\t\t\tname = v.Raw\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tautrec := asset.Asset.(*oamreg.AutnumRecord)\n\t\t\tfindings = append(findings, &support.Finding{\n\t\t\t\tFrom:     asset,\n\t\t\t\tFromName: \"AutnumRecord: \" + autrec.Handle,\n\t\t\t\tTo:       a,\n\t\t\t\tToName:   name,\n\t\t\t\tRel:      edge.Relation,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn findings\n}\n\nfunc (r *autnum) oneOfSources(e *et.Event, edge *dbt.Edge, src *et.Source, since time.Time) bool {\n\tif tags, err := e.Session.Cache().GetEdgeTags(edge, since, src.Name); err == nil && len(tags) > 0 {\n\t\tfor _, tag := range tags {\n\t\t\tif _, ok := tag.Property.(*general.SourceProperty); ok {\n\t\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc (r *autnum) store(e *et.Event, resp *rdap.Autnum, entity *dbt.Entity, m *config.Matches) {\n\tvar findings []*support.Finding\n\tautrec := entity.Asset.(*oamreg.AutnumRecord)\n\n\tif u := r.plugin.getJSONLink(resp.Links); u != nil && m.IsMatch(string(oam.URL)) {\n\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(u); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\tfindings = append(findings, &support.Finding{\n\t\t\t\tFrom:     entity,\n\t\t\t\tFromName: \"AutnumRecord: \" + autrec.Handle,\n\t\t\t\tTo:       a,\n\t\t\t\tToName:   u.Raw,\n\t\t\t\tRel:      &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"rdap_url\"},\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif name := autrec.WhoisServer; name != \"\" && m.IsMatch(string(oam.FQDN)) {\n\t\tfqdn := &oamdns.FQDN{Name: name}\n\n\t\tif _, conf := e.Session.Scope().IsAssetInScope(fqdn, 0); conf > 0 {\n\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(fqdn); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tfindings = append(findings, &support.Finding{\n\t\t\t\t\tFrom:     entity,\n\t\t\t\t\tFromName: \"AutnumRecord: \" + autrec.Handle,\n\t\t\t\t\tTo:       a,\n\t\t\t\t\tToName:   name,\n\t\t\t\t\tRel:      &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"whois_server\"},\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// process the relations built above\n\tsupport.ProcessAssetsWithSource(e, findings, r.plugin.source, r.plugin.name, r.name)\n\n\tif m.IsMatch(string(oam.ContactRecord)) {\n\t\tfor _, v := range resp.Entities {\n\t\t\tr.plugin.storeEntity(e, 1, &v, entity, r.plugin.source, m)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (r *autnum) process(e *et.Event, findings []*support.Finding) {\n\tsupport.ProcessAssetsWithSource(e, findings, r.plugin.source, r.plugin.name, r.name)\n}\n"

                    "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage rdap\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/openrdap/rdap\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/network\"\n\toamreg \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/registration\"\n)\n\ntype autsys struct {\n\tname   string\n\tplugin *rdapPlugin\n}\n\nfunc (r *autsys) Name() string {\n\treturn r.name\n}\n\nfunc (r *autsys) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\tas, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*network.AutonomousSystem)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the AutonomousSystem asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(),\n\t\tstring(oam.AutonomousSystem), string(oam.AutnumRecord), r.name)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tvar asset *dbt.Entity\n\tvar record *rdap.Autnum\n\tif support.AssetMonitoredWithinTTL(e.Session, e.Entity, r.plugin.source, since) {\n\t\tasset = r.lookup(e, strconv.Itoa(as.Number), since)\n\t} else {\n\t\tasset, record = r.query(e, e.Entity)\n\t\tsupport.MarkAssetMonitored(e.Session, e.Entity, r.plugin.source)\n\t}\n\n\tif asset != nil {\n\t\tr.process(e, record, asset)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *autsys) lookup(e *et.Event, num string, since time.Time) *dbt.Entity {\n\tif assets := support.SourceToAssetsWithinTTL(e.Session, num, string(oam.AutnumRecord), r.plugin.source, since); len(assets) > 0 {\n\t\treturn assets[0]\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *autsys) query(e *et.Event, asset *dbt.Entity) (*dbt.Entity, *rdap.Autnum) {\n\tas := asset.Asset.(*network.AutonomousSystem)\n\treq := rdap.NewAutnumRequest(uint32(as.Number))\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 10*time.Second)\n\tdefer cancel()\n\treq = req.WithContext(ctx)\n\n\t_ = r.plugin.rlimit.Wait(context.TODO())\n\tresp, err := r.plugin.client.Do(req)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, nil\n\t}\n\n\trecord, ok := resp.Object.(*rdap.Autnum)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn nil, nil\n\t}\n\treturn r.store(e, record, asset), record\n}\n\nfunc (r *autsys) store(e *et.Event, resp *rdap.Autnum, asset *dbt.Entity) *dbt.Entity {\n\tas := asset.Asset.(*network.AutonomousSystem)\n\tautrec := &oamreg.AutnumRecord{\n\t\tNumber:      as.Number,\n\t\tHandle:      resp.Handle,\n\t\tName:        resp.Name,\n\t\tWhoisServer: resp.Port43,\n\t\tStatus:      resp.Status,\n\t}\n\n\tvar reg, last bool\n\tfor _, event := range resp.Events {\n\t\tswitch event.Action {\n\t\tcase \"registration\":\n\t\t\tif t, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, event.Date); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\tautrec.CreatedDate = support.TimeToJSONString(&t)\n\t\t\t\treg = true\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase \"last changed\":\n\t\t\tif t, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, event.Date); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\tautrec.UpdatedDate = support.TimeToJSONString(&t)\n\t\t\t\tlast = true\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif !reg || !last {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tautasset, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(autrec)\n\tif err == nil && autasset != nil {\n\t\tif edge, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateEdge(&dbt.Edge{\n\t\t\tRelation:   &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"registration\"},\n\t\t\tFromEntity: asset,\n\t\t\tToEntity:   autasset,\n\t\t}); err == nil && edge != nil {\n\t\t\t_, _ = e.Session.Cache().CreateEdgeProperty(edge, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\t\t\tSource:     r.plugin.source.Name,\n\t\t\t\tConfidence: r.plugin.source.Confidence,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn autasset\n}\n\nfunc (r *autsys) process(e *et.Event, record *rdap.Autnum, asset *dbt.Entity) {\n\tautnum := asset.Asset.(*oamreg.AutnumRecord)\n\n\tname := \"AutnumRecord: \" + autnum.Name\n\t_ = e.Dispatcher.DispatchEvent((&et.Event{\n\t\tName:    name,\n\t\tMeta:    record,\n\t\tEntity:  asset,\n\t\tSession: e.Session,\n\t}))\n\n\te.Session.Log().Info(\"relationship discovered\", \"from\", autnum.Handle, \"relation\",\n\t\t\"registration\", \"to\", name, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", r.plugin.name, \"handler\", r.name))\n}\n"

                    "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage rdap\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/openrdap/rdap\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/config\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/contact\"\n\toamdns \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/dns\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n\toamreg \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/registration\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/url\"\n)\n\ntype ipnet struct {\n\tname       string\n\tplugin     *rdapPlugin\n\ttransforms []string\n}\n\nfunc (r *ipnet) Name() string {\n\treturn r.name\n}\n\nfunc (r *ipnet) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\t_, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamreg.IPNetRecord)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the IPNetRecord asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tmatches, err := e.Session.Config().CheckTransformations(\n\t\tstring(oam.IPNetRecord), append(r.transforms, r.plugin.name)...)\n\tif err != nil || matches.Len() == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar findings []*support.Finding\n\tif record, ok := e.Meta.(*rdap.IPNetwork); ok && record != nil {\n\t\tr.store(e, record, e.Entity, matches)\n\t} else {\n\t\tfindings = append(findings, r.lookup(e, e.Entity, matches)...)\n\t}\n\n\tif len(findings) > 0 {\n\t\tr.process(e, findings)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *ipnet) lookup(e *et.Event, asset *dbt.Entity, m *config.Matches) []*support.Finding {\n\tvar rtypes []string\n\tvar findings []*support.Finding\n\tsinces := make(map[string]time.Time)\n\n\tfor _, atype := range r.transforms {\n\t\tif !m.IsMatch(atype) {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(), string(oam.IPNetRecord), atype, r.plugin.name)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tsinces[atype] = since\n\n\t\tswitch atype {\n\t\tcase string(oam.URL):\n\t\t\trtypes = append(rtypes, \"rdap_url\")\n\t\tcase string(oam.FQDN):\n\t\t\trtypes = append(rtypes, \"whois_server\")\n\t\tcase string(oam.ContactRecord):\n\t\t\trtypes = append(rtypes, \"registrant\", \"admin_contact\", \"abuse_contact\", \"technical_contact\")\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif edges, err := e.Session.Cache().OutgoingEdges(asset, time.Time{}, rtypes...); err == nil && len(edges) > 0 {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\ta, err := e.Session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.ToEntity.ID)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\ttotype := string(a.Asset.AssetType())\n\n\t\t\tsince, ok := sinces[totype]\n\t\t\tif !ok || (ok && a.LastSeen.Before(since)) {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif !r.oneOfSources(e, edge, r.plugin.source, since) {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tvar name string\n\t\t\tswitch v := a.Asset.(type) {\n\t\t\tcase *oamdns.FQDN:\n\t\t\t\tname = v.Name\n\t\t\tcase *contact.ContactRecord:\n\t\t\t\tname = \"ContactRecord: \" + v.DiscoveredAt\n\t\t\tcase *url.URL:\n\t\t\t\tname = v.Raw\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tiprec := asset.Asset.(*oamreg.IPNetRecord)\n\t\t\tfindings = append(findings, &support.Finding{\n\t\t\t\tFrom:     asset,\n\t\t\t\tFromName: \"IPNetRecord: \" + iprec.Handle,\n\t\t\t\tTo:       a,\n\t\t\t\tToName:   name,\n\t\t\t\tRel:      edge.Relation,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn findings\n}\n\nfunc (r *ipnet) oneOfSources(e *et.Event, edge *dbt.Edge, src *et.Source, since time.Time) bool {\n\tif tags, err := e.Session.Cache().GetEdgeTags(edge, since, src.Name); err == nil && len(tags) > 0 {\n\t\tfor _, tag := range tags {\n\t\t\tif _, ok := tag.Property.(*general.SourceProperty); ok {\n\t\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc (r *ipnet) store(e *et.Event, resp *rdap.IPNetwork, entity *dbt.Entity, m *config.Matches) {\n\tvar findings []*support.Finding\n\tiprec := entity.Asset.(*oamreg.IPNetRecord)\n\n\tif u := r.plugin.getJSONLink(resp.Links); u != nil && m.IsMatch(string(oam.URL)) {\n\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(u); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\tfindings = append(findings, &support.Finding{\n\t\t\t\tFrom:     entity,\n\t\t\t\tFromName: \"IPNetRecord: \" + iprec.Handle,\n\t\t\t\tTo:       a,\n\t\t\t\tToName:   u.Raw,\n\t\t\t\tRel:      &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"rdap_url\"},\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif name := iprec.WhoisServer; name != \"\" && m.IsMatch(string(oam.FQDN)) {\n\t\tfqdn := &oamdns.FQDN{Name: name}\n\n\t\tif _, conf := e.Session.Scope().IsAssetInScope(fqdn, 0); conf > 0 {\n\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(fqdn); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tfindings = append(findings, &support.Finding{\n\t\t\t\t\tFrom:     entity,\n\t\t\t\t\tFromName: \"IPNetRecord: \" + iprec.Handle,\n\t\t\t\t\tTo:       a,\n\t\t\t\t\tToName:   name,\n\t\t\t\t\tRel:      &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"whois_server\"},\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// process the relations built above\n\tsupport.ProcessAssetsWithSource(e, findings, r.plugin.source, r.plugin.name, r.name)\n\n\tif m.IsMatch(string(oam.ContactRecord)) {\n\t\tfor _, v := range resp.Entities {\n\t\t\tr.plugin.storeEntity(e, 1, &v, entity, r.plugin.source, m)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (r *ipnet) process(e *et.Event, findings []*support.Finding) {\n\tsupport.ProcessAssetsWithSource(e, findings, r.plugin.source, r.plugin.name, r.name)\n}\n"
                  },

                    "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage rdap\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"net\"\n\t\"net/netip\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/openrdap/rdap\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/network\"\n\toamreg \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/registration\"\n)\n\ntype netblock struct {\n\tname   string\n\tplugin *rdapPlugin\n}\n\nfunc (nb *netblock) Name() string {\n\treturn nb.name\n}\n\nfunc (nb *netblock) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\tn, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*network.Netblock)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the Netblock asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(),\n\t\tstring(oam.Netblock), string(oam.IPNetRecord), nb.name)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tvar asset *dbt.Entity\n\tvar record *rdap.IPNetwork\n\tif support.AssetMonitoredWithinTTL(e.Session, e.Entity, nb.plugin.source, since) {\n\t\tasset = nb.lookup(e, n.CIDR.String(), since)\n\t} else {\n\t\tasset, record = nb.query(e, e.Entity)\n\t\tsupport.MarkAssetMonitored(e.Session, e.Entity, nb.plugin.source)\n\t}\n\n\tif asset != nil {\n\t\tnb.process(e, record, asset)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (nb *netblock) lookup(e *et.Event, cidr string, since time.Time) *dbt.Entity {\n\tif assets := support.SourceToAssetsWithinTTL(e.Session, cidr, string(oam.IPNetRecord), nb.plugin.source, since); len(assets) > 0 {\n\t\treturn assets[0]\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (nb *netblock) query(e *et.Event, asset *dbt.Entity) (*dbt.Entity, *rdap.IPNetwork) {\n\tn := asset.Asset.(*network.Netblock)\n\n\t_, ipnet, err := net.ParseCIDR(n.CIDR.String())\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, nil\n\t}\n\treq := rdap.NewIPNetRequest(ipnet)\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 10*time.Second)\n\tdefer cancel()\n\treq = req.WithContext(ctx)\n\n\t_ = nb.plugin.rlimit.Wait(context.TODO())\n\tresp, err := nb.plugin.client.Do(req)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, nil\n\t}\n\n\trecord, ok := resp.Object.(*rdap.IPNetwork)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn nil, nil\n\t}\n\treturn nb.store(e, record, asset), record\n}\n\nfunc (nb *netblock) store(e *et.Event, resp *rdap.IPNetwork, asset *dbt.Entity) *dbt.Entity {\n\tn := asset.Asset.(*network.Netblock)\n\tipnetrec := &oamreg.IPNetRecord{\n\t\tCIDR:         n.CIDR,\n\t\tHandle:       resp.Handle,\n\t\tStartAddress: netip.MustParseAddr(resp.StartAddress),\n\t\tEndAddress:   netip.MustParseAddr(resp.EndAddress),\n\t\tType:         n.Type,\n\t\tName:         resp.Name,\n\t\tMethod:       resp.Type,\n\t\tCountry:      resp.Country,\n\t\tParentHandle: resp.ParentHandle,\n\t\tWhoisServer:  resp.Port43,\n\t\tStatus:       resp.Status,\n\t}\n\n\tvar reg, last bool\n\tfor _, event := range resp.Events {\n\t\tswitch event.Action {\n\t\tcase \"registration\":\n\t\t\tif t, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, event.Date); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\tipnetrec.CreatedDate = support.TimeToJSONString(&t)\n\t\t\t\treg = true\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase \"last changed\":\n\t\t\tif t, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, event.Date); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\tipnetrec.UpdatedDate = support.TimeToJSONString(&t)\n\t\t\t\tlast = true\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif !reg || !last {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\trecord, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(ipnetrec)\n\tif err == nil && record != nil {\n\t\t_, _ = e.Session.Cache().CreateEntityProperty(record, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\t\tSource:     nb.plugin.source.Name,\n\t\t\tConfidence: nb.plugin.source.Confidence,\n\t\t})\n\n\t\tif edge, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateEdge(&dbt.Edge{\n\t\t\tRelation:   &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"registration\"},\n\t\t\tFromEntity: asset,\n\t\t\tToEntity:   record,\n\t\t}); err == nil && edge != nil {\n\t\t\t_, _ = e.Session.Cache().CreateEdgeProperty(edge, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\t\t\tSource:     nb.plugin.source.Name,\n\t\t\t\tConfidence: nb.plugin.source.Confidence,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn record\n}\n\nfunc (nb *netblock) process(e *et.Event, record *rdap.IPNetwork, asset *dbt.Entity) {\n\tipnet := asset.Asset.(*oamreg.IPNetRecord)\n\n\tname := \"IPNetRecord: \" + ipnet.Handle\n\t_ = e.Dispatcher.DispatchEvent((&et.Event{\n\t\tName:    name,\n\t\tMeta:    record,\n\t\tEntity:  asset,\n\t\tSession: e.Session,\n\t}))\n\n\te.Session.Log().Info(\"relationship discovered\", \"from\", ipnet.CIDR.String(), \"relation\",\n\t\t\"registration\", \"to\", name, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", nb.plugin.name, \"handler\", nb.name))\n}\n"

                    "name": "plugin.go",
                    "path": "engine/plugins/api/rdap/plugin.go",
                    "type": "file",
                    "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage rdap\n\nimport (\n\t\"crypto/tls\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"net/http\"\n\t\"path/filepath\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/caffix/stringset\"\n\t\"github.com/openrdap/rdap\"\n\t\"github.com/openrdap/rdap/bootstrap\"\n\t\"github.com/openrdap/rdap/bootstrap/cache\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/config\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support/org\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/contact\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n\toamorg \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/org\"\n\toamreg \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/registration\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/url\"\n\t\"golang.org/x/time/rate\"\n)\n\ntype rdapPlugin struct {\n\tname     string\n\tlog      *slog.Logger\n\tclient   *rdap.Client\n\trlimit   *rate.Limiter\n\tautsys   *autsys\n\tautnum   *autnum\n\tnetblock *netblock\n\tipnet    *ipnet\n\tsource   *et.Source\n}\n\nfunc NewRDAP() et.Plugin {\n\tlimit := rate.Every(2 * time.Second)\n\n\treturn &rdapPlugin{\n\t\tname:   \"RDAP\",\n\t\trlimit: rate.NewLimiter(limit, 1),\n\t\tsource: &et.Source{\n\t\t\tName:       \"RDAP\",\n\t\t\tConfidence: 100,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (rd *rdapPlugin) Name() string {\n\treturn rd.name\n}\n\nfunc (rd *rdapPlugin) Start(r et.Registry) error {\n\trd.log = r.Log().WithGroup(\"plugin\").With(\"name\", rd.name)\n\n\toutdir := config.OutputDirectory()\n\tif outdir == \"\" {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to obtain the Amass output directory\")\n\t}\n\n\tc := cache.NewDiskCache()\n\tif c == nil {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to create the RDAP disk cache\")\n\t}\n\tc.Dir = filepath.Join(outdir, \".openrdap\")\n\n\tbs := &bootstrap.Client{Cache: c}\n\ttlsConfig := &tls.Config{InsecureSkipVerify: true}\n\ttransport := &http.Transport{\n\t\tProxy:           http.ProxyFromEnvironment,\n\t\tTLSClientConfig: tlsConfig,\n\t}\n\tbs.HTTP = &http.Client{\n\t\tTransport: transport,\n\t}\n\thttpClient := &http.Client{\n\t\tTransport: transport,\n\t}\n\trd.client = &rdap.Client{\n\t\tHTTP:      httpClient,\n\t\tBootstrap: bs,\n\t}\n\n\trd.autsys = &autsys{\n\t\tname:   rd.name + \"-Autsys-Handler\",\n\t\tplugin: rd,\n\t}\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:     rd,\n\t\tName:       rd.autsys.name,\n\t\tPriority:   9,\n\t\tTransforms: []string{string(oam.AutnumRecord)},\n\t\tEventType:  oam.AutonomousSystem,\n\t\tCallback:   rd.autsys.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\trd.autnum = &autnum{\n\t\tname:   rd.name + \"-Autnum-Handler\",\n\t\tplugin: rd,\n\t\ttransforms: []string{\n\t\t\tstring(oam.FQDN),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.URL),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.ContactRecord),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.Person),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.Organization),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.Location),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.Identifier),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.Phone),\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:     rd,\n\t\tName:       rd.autnum.name,\n\t\tPriority:   1,\n\t\tTransforms: rd.autnum.transforms,\n\t\tEventType:  oam.AutnumRecord,\n\t\tCallback:   rd.autnum.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\trd.netblock = &netblock{\n\t\tname:   rd.name + \"-Netblock-Handler\",\n\t\tplugin: rd,\n\t}\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:     rd,\n\t\tName:       rd.netblock.name,\n\t\tPriority:   9,\n\t\tTransforms: []string{string(oam.IPNetRecord)},\n\t\tEventType:  oam.Netblock,\n\t\tCallback:   rd.netblock.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\trd.ipnet = &ipnet{\n\t\tname:   rd.name + \"-IPNetwork-Handler\",\n\t\tplugin: rd,\n\t\ttransforms: []string{\n\t\t\tstring(oam.FQDN),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.URL),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.ContactRecord),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.Person),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.Organization),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.Location),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.Identifier),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.Phone),\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:     rd,\n\t\tName:       rd.ipnet.name,\n\t\tPriority:   1,\n\t\tTransforms: rd.ipnet.transforms,\n\t\tEventType:  oam.IPNetRecord,\n\t\tCallback:   rd.ipnet.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\trd.log.Info(\"Plugin started\")\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (rd *rdapPlugin) Stop() {\n\trd.log.Info(\"Plugin stopped\")\n}\n\nfunc (rd *rdapPlugin) storeEntity(e *et.Event, level int, entity *rdap.Entity, asset *dbt.Entity, src *et.Source, m *config.Matches) {\n\troles := stringset.New(entity.Roles...)\n\tdefer roles.Close()\n\n\tu := rd.getJSONLink(entity.Links)\n\tif u == nil {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tvar rel string\n\tif roles.Has(\"registrant\") && level == 1 {\n\t\trel = \"registrant\"\n\t} else if roles.Has(\"administrative\") {\n\t\trel = \"admin_contact\"\n\t} else if roles.Has(\"abuse\") {\n\t\trel = \"abuse_contact\"\n\t} else if roles.Has(\"technical\") {\n\t\trel = \"technical_contact\"\n\t} else {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tcr, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(&contact.ContactRecord{DiscoveredAt: u.Raw})\n\tif err != nil || cr == nil {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tvar name string\n\tswitch v := asset.Asset.(type) {\n\tcase *oamreg.AutnumRecord:\n\t\tname = \"AutnumRecord: \" + v.Handle\n\tcase *oamreg.IPNetRecord:\n\t\tname = \"IPNetRecord: \" + v.Handle\n\t}\n\n\tif m.IsMatch(string(oam.URL)) {\n\t\ta, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(u)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t\t_ = rd.createContactEdge(e.Session, cr, a, &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"url\"}, src)\n\t}\n\n\tv := entity.VCard\n\tprop := v.GetFirst(\"kind\")\n\tif prop == nil {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif adr := v.GetFirst(\"adr\"); adr != nil && m.IsMatch(string(oam.Location)) {\n\t\tif label, ok := adr.Parameters[\"label\"]; ok {\n\t\t\ts := strings.Join(label, \" \")\n\n\t\t\taddr := strings.Join(strings.Split(s, \"\\n\"), \" \")\n\t\t\tif loc := support.StreetAddressToLocation(addr); loc != nil {\n\t\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(loc); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\t_ = rd.createContactEdge(e.Session, cr, a, &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"location\"}, src)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif email := strings.ToLower(v.Email()); m.IsMatch(string(oam.Identifier)) && email != \"\" {\n\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(&general.Identifier{\n\t\t\tUniqueID: fmt.Sprintf(\"%s:%s\", general.EmailAddress, email),\n\t\t\tID:       email,\n\t\t\tType:     general.EmailAddress,\n\t\t}); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t_ = rd.createContactEdge(e.Session, cr, a, &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"id\"}, src)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif m.IsMatch(string(oam.Phone)) {\n\t\tif phone := support.PhoneToOAMPhone(v.Tel(), \"\", v.Country()); phone != nil {\n\t\t\tphone.Type = contact.PhoneTypeRegular\n\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(phone); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\t_ = rd.createContactEdge(e.Session, cr, a, &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"phone\"}, src)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tif fax := support.PhoneToOAMPhone(v.Fax(), \"\", v.Country()); fax != nil {\n\t\t\tfax.Type = contact.PhoneTypeFax\n\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(fax); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\t_ = rd.createContactEdge(e.Session, cr, a, &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"phone\"}, src)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tvar findings []*support.Finding\n\tfindings = append(findings, &support.Finding{\n\t\tFrom:     asset,\n\t\tFromName: name,\n\t\tTo:       cr,\n\t\tToName:   \"ContactRecord: \" + u.Raw,\n\t\tRel:      &general.SimpleRelation{Name: rel},\n\t})\n\t// process the relation immediately\n\tsupport.ProcessAssetsWithSource(e, findings, rd.source, rd.name, rd.name+\"-storeEntity\")\n\n\tname = v.Name()\n\t// the organization must come last due to a potential chicken-and-egg problem\n\tif kind := strings.Join(prop.Values(), \" \"); m.IsMatch(string(oam.Person)) && name != \"\" && kind == \"individual\" {\n\t\tif p := support.FullNameToPerson(name); p != nil {\n\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(p); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\t_ = rd.createContactEdge(e.Session, cr, a, &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"person\"}, src)\n\t\t\t\t_ = e.Dispatcher.DispatchEvent(&et.Event{\n\t\t\t\t\tName:    fmt.Sprintf(\"%s:%s\", p.FullName, p.ID),\n\t\t\t\t\tEntity:  a,\n\t\t\t\t\tSession: e.Session,\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t} else if m.IsMatch(string(oam.Organization)) && kind == \"org\" {\n\t\torgent, err := org.CreateOrgAsset(e.Session, cr,\n\t\t\t&general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"organization\"}, &oamorg.Organization{Name: name}, src)\n\n\t\tif err == nil && orgent != nil {\n\t\t\to := orgent.Asset.(*oamorg.Organization)\n\n\t\t\t_ = e.Dispatcher.DispatchEvent(&et.Event{\n\t\t\t\tName:    fmt.Sprintf(\"%s:%s\", o.Name, o.ID),\n\t\t\t\tEntity:  orgent,\n\t\t\t\tSession: e.Session,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tlevel++\n\tfor _, ent := range entity.Entities {\n\t\trd.storeEntity(e, level, &ent, asset, rd.source, m)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (rd *rdapPlugin) getJSONLink(links []rdap.Link) *url.URL {\n\tvar url *url.URL\n\tfor _, link := range links {\n\t\tif link.Type == \"application/rdap+json\" {\n\t\t\turl = support.RawURLToOAM(link.Href)\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn url\n}\n\nfunc (rd *rdapPlugin) createContactEdge(sess et.Session, cr, a *dbt.Entity, rel oam.Relation, src *et.Source) error {\n\tedge, err := sess.Cache().CreateEdge(&dbt.Edge{\n\t\tRelation:   rel,\n\t\tFromEntity: cr,\n\t\tToEntity:   a,\n\t})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t} else if edge == nil {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to create the edge\")\n\t}\n\n\t_, err = sess.Cache().CreateEdgeProperty(edge, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\tSource:     src.Name,\n\t\tConfidence: src.Confidence,\n\t})\n\treturn err\n}\n"
                  }
                ]

80,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (st *securityTrails) Name() string {\n\treturn st.name\n}\n\nfunc (st *securityTrails) Start(r et.Registry) error {\n\tst.log = r.Log().WithGroup(\"plugin\").With(\"name\", st.name)\n\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:     st,\n\t\tName:       st.name + \"-Handler\",\n\t\tPriority:   9,\n\t\tTransforms: []string{string(oam.FQDN)},\n\t\tEventType:  oam.FQDN,\n\t\tCallback:   st.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tst.log.Info(\"Plugin started\")\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (st *securityTrails) Stop() {\n\tst.log.Info(\"Plugin stopped\")\n}\n\nfunc (st *securityTrails) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\tfqdn, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the FQDN asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tif !support.HasSLDInScope(e) {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tds := e.Session.Config().GetDataSourceConfig(st.name)\n\tif ds == nil || len(ds.Creds) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar keys []string\n\tfor _, cr := range ds.Creds {\n\t\tif cr != nil && cr.Apikey != \"\" {\n\t\t\tkeys = append(keys, cr.Apikey)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(), string(oam.FQDN), string(oam.FQDN), st.name)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tvar names []*dbt.Entity\n\tif support.AssetMonitoredWithinTTL(e.Session, e.Entity, st.source, since) {\n\t\tnames = append(names, st.lookup(e, fqdn.Name, since)...)\n\t} else {\n\t\tnames = append(names, st.query(e, fqdn.Name, keys)...)\n\t\tsupport.MarkAssetMonitored(e.Session, e.Entity, st.source)\n\t}\n\n\tif len(names) > 0 {\n\t\tst.process(e, names)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (st *securityTrails) lookup(e *et.Event, name string, since time.Time) []*dbt.Entity {\n\treturn support.SourceToAssetsWithinTTL(e.Session, name, string(oam.FQDN), st.source, since)\n}\n\nfunc (st *securityTrails) query(e *et.Event, name string, keys []string) []*dbt.Entity {\n\tvar names []string\n\n\tfor _, key := range keys {\n\t\t_ = st.rlimit.Wait(context.TODO())\n\t\tresp, err := http.RequestWebPage(context.TODO(), &http.Request{\n\t\t\tURL:    \"https://api.securitytrails.com/v1/domain/\" + name + \"/subdomains\",\n\t\t\tHeader: http.Header{\"APIKEY\": []string{key}},\n\t\t})\n\t\tif err != nil || resp.Body == \"\" {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar result struct {\n\t\t\tSubdomains []string `json:\"subdomains\"`\n\t\t}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(resp.Body), &result); err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tfor _, sub := range result.Subdomains {\n\t\t\tnstr := strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(dns.RemoveAsteriskLabel(sub + \".\" + name)))\n\t\t\t// if the subdomain is not in scope, skip it\n\t\t\tif _, conf := e.Session.Scope().IsAssetInScope(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: nstr}, 0); conf > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tnames = append(names, nstr)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tbreak\n\t}\n\n\treturn st.store(e, names)\n}\n\nfunc (st *securityTrails) store(e *et.Event, names []string) []*dbt.Entity {\n\treturn support.StoreFQDNsWithSource(e.Session, names, st.source, st.name, st.name+\"-Handler\")\n}\n\nfunc (st *securityTrails) process(e *et.Event, assets []*dbt.Entity) {\n\tsupport.ProcessFQDNsWithSource(e, assets, st.source)\n}\n"

&zetalytics{\n\t\tname:   \"ZETAlytics\",\n\t\trlimit: rate.NewLimiter(limit, 1),\n\t\tsource: &et.Source{\n\t\t\tName:       \"ZETAlytics\",\n\t\t\tConfidence: 100,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (z *zetalytics) Name() string {\n\treturn z.name\n}\n\nfunc (z *zetalytics) Start(r et.Registry) error {\n\tz.log = r.Log().WithGroup(\"plugin\").With(\"name\", z.name)\n\n\tif err := z.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tz.log.Info(\"Plugin started\")\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (z *zetalytics) Stop() {\n\tz.log.Info(\"Plugin stopped\")\n}\n\nfunc (z *zetalytics) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\tfqdn, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the FQDN asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tif !support.HasSLDInScope(e) {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tds := e.Session.Config().GetDataSourceConfig(z.name)\n\tif ds == nil || len(ds.Creds) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar keys []string\n\tfor _, cr := range ds.Creds {\n\t\tif cr != nil && cr.Apikey != \"\" {\n\t\t\tkeys = append(keys, cr.Apikey)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(), string(oam.FQDN), string(oam.FQDN), z.name)\n\tif err != nil since)\n}\n\nfunc (z *zetalytics) query(e *et.Event, name string, keys []string) []*dbt.Entity {\n\tnames := support.NewFQDNFilter()\n\tdefer names.Close()\n\n\tfor _, key := range keys {\n\t\tstart := time.Now().Add((time.Hour * 24) * -90).Unix() // The epoch 90 days ago\n\t\turl := \"https://zonecruncher.com/api/v1/subdomains?q=\" + name +\n\t\t\t\"&token=\" + key + \"&tsfield=last_seen&start=\" + strconv.FormatInt(start, 10)\n\n\t\t_ = z.rlimit.Wait(context.TODO())\n\t\tresp, err := http.RequestWebPage(context.TODO(), &http.Request{URL: url})\n\t\tif err != nil || resp.Body == \"\" {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar result struct {\n\t\t\tTotal      int `json:\"total\"`\n\t\t\tSubdomains []struct {\n\t\t\t\tFQDN string `json:\"qname\"`\n\t\t\t\t//FirstSeen string `json:\"first_seen\"`\n\t\t\t\t//LastSeen  string `json:\"last_seen\"`\n\t\t\t} `json:\"results\"`\n\t\t\tMsg string `json:\"msg\"`\n\t\t}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(resp.Body), &result); err != nil || result.Total == 0 {\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tfor _, s := range result.Subdomains {\n\t\t\tname := strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(dns.RemoveAsteriskLabel(http.CleanName(s.FQDN))))\n\t\t\t// if the subdomain is not in scope, skip it\n\t\t\tif _, conf := e.Session.Scope().IsAssetInScope(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: name}, 0); conf > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tnames.Insert(name)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tbreak\n\t}\n\n\tnames.Prune(1000)\n\treturn z.store(e, names.Slice())\n}\n\nfunc (z *zetalytics) store(e *et.Event, names []string) []*dbt.Entity {\n\treturn support.StoreFQDNsWithSource(e.Session, names, z.source, z.name, z.name+\"-Handler\")\n}\n\nfunc (z *zetalytics) process(e *et.Event, assets []*dbt.Entity) {\n\tsupport.ProcessFQDNsWithSource(e, assets, z.source)\n}\n"
              }

All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage archive\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/caffix/stringset\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/internal/net/dns\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/internal/net/http\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\toamdns \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/dns\"\n\t\"golang.org/x/time/rate\"\n)\n\ntype wayback struct {\n\tname   string\n\tURL    string\n\tlog    *slog.Logger\n\trlimit *rate.Limiter\n\tsource *et.Source\n}\n\nfunc NewWayback() et.Plugin {\n\tlimit := rate.Every(5 * time.Second)\n\n\treturn &wayback{\n\t\tname:   \"Wayback\",\n\t\tURL:    \"https://web.archive.org/cdx/search/cdx?matchType=domain&fl=original&output=json&collapse=urlkey&url=\",\n\t\trlimit: rate.NewLimiter(limit, 1),\n\t\tsource: &et.Source{\n\t\t\tName:       \"Wayback\",\n\t\t\tConfidence: 80,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (w *wayback) Name() string {\n\treturn w.name\n}\n\nfunc (w *wayback) Start(r et.Registry) error {\n\tw.log = r.Log().WithGroup(\"plugin\").With(\"name\", w.name)\n\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:     w,\n\t\tName:       w.name + \"-Handler\",\n\t\tPriority:   9,\n\t\tTransforms: []string{string(oam.FQDN)},\n\t\tEventType:  oam.FQDN,\n\t\tCallback:   w.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tw.log.Info(\"Plugin started\")\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (w *wayback) Stop() {\n\tw.log.Info(\"Plugin stopped\")\n}\n\nfunc (w *wayback) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\tfqdn, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the FQDN asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tif !support.HasSLDInScope(e) {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(), string(oam.FQDN), string(oam.FQDN), w.name)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tvar names []*dbt.Entity\n\tif support.AssetMonitoredWithinTTL(e.Session, e.Entity, w.source, since) {\n\t\tnames = append(names, w.lookup(e, fqdn.Name, since)...)\n\t} else {\n\t\tnames = append(names, w.query(e, fqdn.Name)...)\n\t\tsupport.MarkAssetMonitored(e.Session, e.Entity, w.source)\n\t}\n\n\tif len(names) > 0 {\n\t\tw.process(e, names)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (w *wayback) lookup(e *et.Event, name string, since time.Time) []*dbt.Entity {\n\treturn support.SourceToAssetsWithinTTL(e.Session, name, string(oam.FQDN), w.source, since)\n}\n\nfunc (w *wayback) query(e *et.Event, name string) []*dbt.Entity {\n\t_ = w.rlimit.Wait(context.TODO())\n\tresp, err := http.RequestWebPage(context.TODO(), &http.Request{URL: w.URL + name})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tsubs := stringset.New()\n\tdefer subs.Close()\n\n\tvar urls [][]string\n\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(resp.Body), &urls); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, url := range urls {\n\t\tif len(url) != 1 {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tu := url[0]\n\n\t\tif n := dns.AnySubdomainRegex().FindString(u); n != \"\" {\n\t\t\t// if the subdomain is not in scope, skip it\n\t\t\tif _, conf := e.Session.Scope().IsAssetInScope(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: n}, 0); conf > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tsubs.Insert(n)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn w.store(e, subs.Slice())\n}\n\nfunc (w *wayback) store(e *et.Event, names []string) []*dbt.Entity {\n\treturn support.StoreFQDNsWithSource(e.Session, names, w.source, w.name, w.name+\"-Handler\")\n}\n\nfunc (w *wayback) process(e *et.Event, assets []*dbt.Entity) {\n\tsupport.ProcessFQDNsWithSource(e, assets, w.source)\n}\n"

                "name": "alterations.go",
                "path": "engine/plugins/brute/alterations.go",
                "type": "file",
                "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage brute\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"unicode\"\n\n\t\"github.com/caffix/stringset\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\toamdns \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/dns\"\n)\n\ntype alts struct {\n\tname   string\n\tlog    *slog.Logger\n\tchars  string\n\tsource *et.Source\n}\n\nfunc NewFQDNAlterations() et.Plugin {\n\treturn &alts{\n\t\tname:  \"FQDN-Alterations\",\n\t\tchars: \"abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789-\",\n\t\tsource: &et.Source{\n\t\t\tName:       \"FQDN-Alterations\",\n\t\t\tConfidence: 0,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (d *alts) Name() string {\n\treturn d.name\n}\n\nfunc (d *alts) Start(r et.Registry) error {\n\td.log = r.Log().WithGroup(\"plugin\").With(\"name\", d.name)\n\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:       d,\n\t\tName:         d.name + \"-Handler\",\n\t\tPriority:     8,\n\t\tMaxInstances: support.MaxHandlerInstances,\n\t\tTransforms:   []string{\"fqdn\"},\n\t\tEventType:    oam.FQDN,\n\t\tCallback:     d.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\td.log.Info(\"Plugin started\")\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (d *alts) Stop() {\n\td.log.Info(\"Plugin stopped\")\n}\n\nfunc (d *alts) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\tfqdn, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the FQDN asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tcfg := e.Session.Config()\n\tif cfg != nil && (!cfg.BruteForcing || !cfg.Alterations) {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tif e.Meta == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar dom string\n\tname := strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(fqdn.Name))\n\tif a, conf := e.Session.Scope().IsAssetInScope(fqdn, 0); conf == 0 || a == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t} else if dfqdn, ok := a.(*oamdns.FQDN); !ok || dfqdn == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t} else {\n\t\tdom = dfqdn.Name\n\t}\n\n\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(cfg, \"FQDN\", \"FQDN\", d.name)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tif support.AssetMonitoredWithinTTL(e.Session, e.Entity, d.source, since) {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tguesses := stringset.New()\n\tdefer guesses.Close()\n\n\tif cfg.FlipWords && len(cfg.AltWordlist) > 0 {\n\t\tguesses.InsertMany(flipWords(name, cfg.AltWordlist)...)\n\t}\n\tif cfg.FlipNumbers {\n\t\tguesses.InsertMany(flipNumbers(name)...)\n\t}\n\tif cfg.AddNumbers {\n\t\tguesses.InsertMany(appendNumbers(name)...)\n\t}\n\tif cfg.AddWords && len(cfg.AltWordlist) > 0 {\n\t\tguesses.InsertMany(addPrefixWords(name, cfg.AltWordlist)...)\n\t\tguesses.InsertMany(addSuffixWords(name, cfg.AltWordlist)...)\n\t}\n\tif distance := cfg.EditDistance; distance > 0 {\n\t\tguesses.InsertMany(fuzzyLabelSearches(name, distance, d.chars)...)\n\t}\n\tguesses.Remove(dom)\n\tguesses.Remove(name)\n\n\tvar assets []*dbt.Entity\n\t//subre := dns.SubdomainRegex(dom)\n\tfor _, guess := range guesses.Slice() {\n\t\t//if match := subre.FindString(guess); guess != match {\n\t\t//\tcontinue\n\t\t//}\n\t\tif a := d.store(e, guess); a != nil {\n\t\t\tassets = append(assets, a...)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif len(assets) > 0 {\n\t\td.process(e, assets, d.source)\n\t\tsupport.MarkAssetMonitored(e.Session, e.Entity, d.source)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (d *alts) store(e *et.Event, name string) []*dbt.Entity {\n\treturn support.StoreFQDNsWithSource(e.Session, []string{name}, d.source, d.name, d.name+\"-Handler\")\n}\n\nfunc (d *alts) process(e *et.Event, fqdns []*dbt.Entity, src *et.Source) {\n\tsupport.ProcessFQDNsWithSource(e, fqdns, d.source)\n}\n\n// flipWords flips prefixes and suffixes found within the provided name.\nfunc flipWords(name string, words []string) []string {\n\tnames := strings.SplitN(name, \".\", 2)\n\tsubdomain := names[0]\n\tdomain := names[1]\n\n\tparts := strings.Split(subdomain, \"-\")\n\tif len(parts) < 2 {\n\t\treturn []string{}\n\t}\n\n\tvar guesses []string\n\tfor _, k := range words {\n\t\tguesses = append(guesses, k+\"-\"+strings.Join(parts[1:], \"-\")+\".\"+domain)\n\t}\n\tfor _, k := range words {\n\t\tguesses = append(guesses, strings.Join(parts[:len(parts)-1], \"-\")+\"-\"+k+\".\"+domain)\n\t}\n\treturn guesses\n}\n\n// flipNumbers flips numbers in a subdomain name.\nfunc flipNumbers(name string) []string {\n\tn := name\n\tparts := strings.SplitN(n, \".\", 2)\n\t// Find the first character that is a number\n\tfirst := strings.IndexFunc(parts[0], unicode.IsNumber)\n\tif first < 0 {\n\t\treturn []string{}\n\t}\n\n\tvar guesses []string\n\t// Flip the first number and attempt a second number\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\tsf := n[:first] + strconv.Itoa(i) + n[first+1:]\n\t\tguesses = append(guesses, secondNumberFlip(sf, first+1)...)\n\t}\n\t// Take the first number out\n\tguesses = append(guesses, secondNumberFlip(n[:first]+n[first+1:], -1)...)\n\treturn guesses\n}\n\nfunc secondNumberFlip(name string, minIndex int) []string {\n\tparts := strings.SplitN(name, \".\", 2)\n\t// Find the second character that is a number\n\tlast := strings.LastIndexFunc(parts[0], unicode.IsNumber)\n\tif last < 0 || last < minIndex {\n\t\treturn []string{name}\n\t}\n\n\tvar guesses []string\n\t// Flip those numbers and send out the mutations\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\tguesses = append(guesses, name[:last]+strconv.Itoa(i)+name[last+1:])\n\t}\n\t// Take the second number out\n\tguesses = append(guesses, name[:last]+name[last+1:])\n\treturn guesses\n}\n\n// appendNumbers appends a number to a subdomain name.\nfunc appendNumbers(name string) []string {\n\tparts := strings.SplitN(name, \".\", 2)\n\n\tparts[0] = strings.Trim(parts[0], \"-\")\n\tif parts[0] == \"\" {\n\t\treturn []string{}\n\t}\n\n\tvar guesses []string\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10; i++ {\n\t\tguesses = append(guesses, addSuffix(parts, strconv.Itoa(i))...)\n\t}\n\treturn guesses\n}\n\n// addSuffixWords appends a suffix to a subdomain name.\nfunc addSuffixWords(name string, words []string) []string {\n\tparts := strings.SplitN(name, \".\", 2)\n\n\tparts[0] = strings.Trim(parts[0], \"-\")\n\tif parts[0] == \"\" {\n\t\treturn []string{}\n\t}\n\n\tvar guesses []string\n\tfor _, word := range words {\n\t\tguesses = append(guesses, addSuffix(parts, word)...)\n\t}\n\treturn guesses\n}\n\n// addPrefixWords appends a subdomain name to a prefix.\nfunc addPrefixWords(name string, words []string) []string {\n\tname = strings.Trim(name, \"-\")\n\tif name == \"\" {\n\t\treturn []string{}\n\t}\n\n\tvar guesses []string\n\tfor _, word := range words {\n\t\tguesses = append(guesses, addPrefix(name, word)...)\n\t}\n\treturn guesses\n}\n\nfunc addSuffix(parts []string, suffix string) []string {\n\treturn []string{\n\t\tparts[0] + suffix + \".\" + parts[1],\n\t\tparts[0] + \"-\" + suffix + \".\" + parts[1],\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc addPrefix(name, prefix string) []string {\n\treturn []string{\n\t\tprefix + name,\n\t\tprefix + \"-\" + name,\n\t}\n}\n\n// fuzzyLabelSearches returns new names generated by making slight\n// mutations to the provided name.\nfunc fuzzyLabelSearches(name string, distance int, chars string) []string {\n\tparts := strings.SplitN(name, \".\", 2)\n\n\tvar results []string\n\tif len(parts) < 2 {\n\t\treturn results\n\t}\n\n\tresults = append(results, parts[0])\n\tfor i := 0; i < distance; i++ {\n\t\tvar conv []string\n\n\t\tconv = append(conv, additions(results, chars)...)\n\t\tconv = append(conv, deletions(results)...)\n\t\tconv = append(conv, substitutions(results, chars)...)\n\t\tresults = append(results, conv...)\n\t}\n\n\tvar guesses []string\n\tfor _, alt := range results {\n\t\tif label := strings.Trim(alt, \"-\"); label != \"\" {\n\t\t\tguesses = append(guesses, label+\".\"+parts[1])\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn guesses\n}\n\nfunc additions(set []string, chars string) []string {\n\tldh := []rune(chars)\n\tldhLen := len(ldh)\n\n\tvar guesses []string\n\tfor _, str := range set {\n\t\trstr := []rune(str)\n\t\trlen := len(rstr)\n\n\t\tfor i := 0; i <= rlen; i++ {\n\t\t\tfor j := 0; j < ldhLen; j++ {\n\t\t\t\ttemp := append(rstr, ldh[0])\n\n\t\t\t\tcopy(temp[i+1:], temp[i:])\n\t\t\t\ttemp[i] = ldh[j]\n\t\t\t\tguesses = append(guesses, string(temp))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn guesses\n}\n\nfunc deletions(set []string) []string {\n\tvar guesses []string\n\n\tfor _, str := range set {\n\t\trstr := []rune(str)\n\t\trlen := len(rstr)\n\n\t\tfor i := 0; i < rlen; i++ {\n\t\t\tif del := string(append(rstr[:i], rstr[i+1:]...)); del != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tguesses = append(guesses, del)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn guesses\n}\n\nfunc substitutions(set []string, chars string) []string {\n\tldh := []rune(chars)\n\tldhLen := len(ldh)\n\n\tvar guesses []string\n\tfor _, str := range set {\n\t\trstr := []rune(str)\n\t\trlen := len(rstr)\n\n\t\tfor i := 0; i < rlen; i++ {\n\t\t\ttemp := rstr\n\n\t\t\tfor j := 0; j < ldhLen; j++ {\n\t\t\t\ttemp[i] = ldh[j]\n\t\t\t\tguesses = append(guesses, string(temp))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn guesses\n}\n"

All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage dns\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toamdns \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/dns\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n)\n\ntype dnsApex struct {\n\tname   string\n\tplugin *dnsPlugin\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsApex) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\tfqdn, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the FQDN asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tif e.Meta == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t} else if m, ok := e.Meta.(*support.FQDNMeta); !ok || len(m.RecordTypes) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\t// determine which domain apex is the parent of this name\n\tvar name string\n\tbest := len(fqdn.Name)\n\tfor _, n := range d.plugin.getApexList() {\n\t\tif idx := strings.Index(fqdn.Name, n); idx != -1 && idx != 0 && idx < best {\n\t\t\tbest = idx\n\t\t\tname = n\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif name == \"\" {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tif apex := d.plugin.getApex(name); apex != nil && apex.Asset.Key() != fqdn.Name {\n\t\td.store(e, fqdn.Name, e.Entity, apex)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsApex) store(e *et.Event, name string, fqdn, apex *dbt.Entity) {\n\tif _, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateEdge(&dbt.Edge{\n\t\tRelation:   &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"node\"},\n\t\tFromEntity: apex,\n\t\tToEntity:   fqdn,\n\t}); err == nil {\n\t\te.Session.Log().Info(\"relationship discovered\", \"from\", apex.Asset.Key(), \"relation\",\n\t\t\t\"node\", \"to\", name, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", d.plugin.name, \"handler\", d.name))\n\t}\n}\n"
