                "type": "file",
                "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage dns\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/miekg/dns\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\toamdns \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/dns\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/resolve/utils\"\n)\n\ntype dnsCNAME struct {\n\tname   string\n\tplugin *dnsPlugin\n\tsource *et.Source\n}\n\ntype relAlias struct {\n\talias  *dbt.Entity\n\ttarget *dbt.Entity\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsCNAME) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\t_, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the FQDN asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(), \"FQDN\", \"FQDN\", d.plugin.name)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tvar alias []*relAlias\n\tif support.AssetMonitoredWithinTTL(e.Session, e.Entity, d.source, since) {\n\t\talias = append(alias, d.lookup(e, e.Entity, since)...)\n\t} else {\n\t\talias = append(alias, d.query(e, e.Entity)...)\n\t}\n\n\tif len(alias) > 0 {\n\t\td.process(e, alias)\n\t\tsupport.AddDNSRecordType(e, int(dns.TypeCNAME))\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsCNAME) lookup(e *et.Event, fqdn *dbt.Entity, since time.Time) []*relAlias {\n\tvar alias []*relAlias\n\n\tn, ok := fqdn.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\tif !ok || n == nil {\n\t\treturn alias\n\t}\n\n\tif assets := d.plugin.lookupWithinTTL(e.Session, n.Name, oam.FQDN, since, oam.BasicDNSRelation, 5); len(assets) > 0 {\n\t\tfor _, a := range assets {\n\t\t\talias = append(alias, &relAlias{alias: fqdn, target: a})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn alias\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsCNAME) query(e *et.Event, name *dbt.Entity) []*relAlias {\n\tvar alias []*relAlias\n\n\tfqdn := name.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\tif rr, err := support.PerformQuery(fqdn.Name, dns.TypeCNAME); err == nil {\n\t\tif records := d.store(e, name, rr); len(records) > 0 {\n\t\t\talias = append(alias, records...)\n\t\t\tsupport.MarkAssetMonitored(e.Session, name, d.source)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn alias\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsCNAME) store(e *et.Event, fqdn *dbt.Entity, rr []dns.RR) []*relAlias {\n\tvar alias []*relAlias\n\n\tfor _, record := range rr {\n\t\tif record.Header().Rrtype != dns.TypeCNAME {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tdata := strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace((record.(*dns.CNAME)).Target))\n\t\tname := utils.RemoveLastDot(data)\n\t\tif cname, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: name}); err == nil && cname != nil {\n\t\t\tif edge, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateEdge(&dbt.Edge{\n\t\t\t\tRelation: &oamdns.BasicDNSRelation{\n\t\t\t\t\tName: \"dns_record\",\n\t\t\t\t\tHeader: oamdns.RRHeader{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tRRType: int(record.Header().Rrtype),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tClass:  int(record.Header().Class),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tTTL:    int(record.Header().Ttl),\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tFromEntity: fqdn,\n\t\t\t\tToEntity:   cname,\n\t\t\t}); err == nil && edge != nil {\n\t\t\t\talias = append(alias, &relAlias{alias: fqdn, target: cname})\n\t\t\t\t_, _ = e.Session.Cache().CreateEdgeProperty(edge, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\t\t\t\tSource:     d.source.Name,\n\t\t\t\t\tConfidence: d.source.Confidence,\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn alias\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsCNAME) process(e *et.Event, alias []*relAlias) {\n\tfor _, a := range alias {\n\t\ttarget := a.target.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\n\t\t_ = e.Dispatcher.DispatchEvent(&et.Event{\n\t\t\tName:    target.Name,\n\t\t\tEntity:  a.target,\n\t\t\tSession: e.Session,\n\t\t})\n\n\t\te.Session.Log().Info(\"relationship discovered\", \"from\", d.plugin.source.Name, \"relation\",\n\t\t\t\"cname_record\", \"to\", target.Name, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", d.plugin.name, \"handler\", d.name))\n\t}\n}\n"
              },
              {
                "name": "ip.go",
                "path": "engine/plugins/dns/ip.go",
                "type": "file",
                "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage dns\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"net/netip\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/miekg/dns\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\toamdns \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/dns\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n\toamnet \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/network\"\n)\n\ntype dnsIP struct {\n\tname    string\n\tqueries []uint16\n\tplugin  *dnsPlugin\n\tsource  *et.Source\n}\n\ntype relIP struct {\n\trtype string\n\tip    *dbt.Entity\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsIP) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\tfqdn, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the FQDN asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tif support.HasDNSRecordType(e, int(dns.TypeCNAME)) {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(), \"FQDN\", \"IPAddress\", d.plugin.name)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tvar ips []*relIP\n\tif support.AssetMonitoredWithinTTL(e.Session, e.Entity, d.source, since) {\n\t\tips = append(ips, d.lookup(e, fqdn.Name, since)...)\n\t} else {\n\t\tips = append(ips, d.query(e, e.Entity)...)\n\t}\n\n\tif len(ips) > 0 {\n\t\td.process(e, fqdn.Name, ips)\n\n\t\tfor _, v := range ips {\n\t\t\tip, ok := v.ip.Asset.(*oamnet.IPAddress)\n\t\t\tif !ok || ip == nil {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tvar size int\n\t\t\tif _, conf := e.Session.Scope().IsAssetInScope(ip, 0); conf > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tsize = d.plugin.secondSweepSize\n\t\t\t\tif e.Session.Config().Active {\n\t\t\t\t\tsize = d.plugin.maxSweepSize\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t} else if _, conf2 := e.Session.Scope().IsAssetInScope(fqdn, 0); conf2 > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tsize = d.plugin.firstSweepSize\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif size > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tsupport.IPAddressSweep(e, ip, d.source, size, sweepCallback)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsIP) lookup(e *et.Event, fqdn string, since time.Time) []*relIP {\n\tvar ips []*relIP\n\n\tif assets := d.plugin.lookupWithinTTL(e.Session, fqdn, oam.IPAddress, since, oam.BasicDNSRelation, 1); len(assets) > 0 {\n\t\tfor _, a := range assets {\n\t\t\tips = append(ips, &relIP{rtype: \"dns_record\", ip: a})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif assets := d.plugin.lookupWithinTTL(e.Session, fqdn, oam.IPAddress, since, oam.BasicDNSRelation, 28); len(assets) > 0 {\n\t\tfor _, a := range assets {\n\t\t\tips = append(ips, &relIP{rtype: \"dns_record\", ip: a})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn ips\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsIP) query(e *et.Event, name *dbt.Entity) []*relIP {\n\tvar ips []*relIP\n\n\tfqdn := name.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\tfor _, qtype := range d.queries {\n\t\tif rr, err := support.PerformQuery(fqdn.Name, qtype); err == nil {\n\t\t\tif records := d.store(e, name, rr); len(records) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tips = append(ips, records...)\n\t\t\t\tsupport.MarkAssetMonitored(e.Session, name, d.source)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn ips\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsIP) store(e *et.Event, fqdn *dbt.Entity, rr []dns.RR) []*relIP {\n\tvar ips []*relIP\n\n\tfor _, record := range rr {\n\t\tif record.Header().Rrtype == dns.TypeA {\n\t\t\taddr := (record.(*dns.A)).A.String()\n\n\t\t\tif ip, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(&oamnet.IPAddress{Address: netip.MustParseAddr(string(addr)), Type: \"IPv4\"}); err == nil && ip != nil {\n\t\t\t\tif edge, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateEdge(&dbt.Edge{\n\t\t\t\t\tRelation: &oamdns.BasicDNSRelation{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"dns_record\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tHeader: oamdns.RRHeader{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRRType: int(record.Header().Rrtype),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tClass:  int(record.Header().Class),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tTTL:    int(record.Header().Ttl),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\tFromEntity: fqdn,\n\t\t\t\t\tToEntity:   ip,\n\t\t\t\t}); err == nil && edge != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tips = append(ips, &relIP{rtype: \"dns_record\", ip: ip})\n\t\t\t\t\t_, _ = e.Session.Cache().CreateEdgeProperty(edge, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSource:     d.source.Name,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConfidence: d.source.Confidence,\n\t\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(err.Error(), slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", d.plugin.name, \"handler\", d.name))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else if record.Header().Rrtype == dns.TypeAAAA {\n\t\t\taddr := (record.(*dns.AAAA)).AAAA.String()\n\n\t\t\tif ip, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(&oamnet.IPAddress{Address: netip.MustParseAddr(addr), Type: \"IPv6\"}); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\tif edge, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateEdge(&dbt.Edge{\n\t\t\t\t\tRelation: &oamdns.BasicDNSRelation{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"dns_record\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tHeader: oamdns.RRHeader{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRRType: int(record.Header().Rrtype),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tClass:  int(record.Header().Class),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tTTL:    int(record.Header().Ttl),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\tFromEntity: fqdn,\n\t\t\t\t\tToEntity:   ip,\n\t\t\t\t}); err == nil && edge != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tips = append(ips, &relIP{rtype: \"dns_record\", ip: ip})\n\t\t\t\t\t_, _ = e.Session.Cache().CreateEdgeProperty(edge, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSource:     d.source.Name,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConfidence: d.source.Confidence,\n\t\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(err.Error(), slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", d.plugin.name, \"handler\", d.name))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn ips\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsIP) process(e *et.Event, name string, addrs []*relIP) {\n\tfor _, a := range addrs {\n\t\tip := a.ip.Asset.(*oamnet.IPAddress)\n\n\t\tswitch ip.Type {\n\t\tcase \"IPv4\":\n\t\t\tsupport.AddDNSRecordType(e, int(dns.TypeA))\n\t\tcase \"IPv6\":\n\t\t\tsupport.AddDNSRecordType(e, int(dns.TypeAAAA))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t_ = e.Dispatcher.DispatchEvent(&et.Event{\n\t\t\tName:    ip.Address.String(),\n\t\t\tEntity:  a.ip,\n\t\t\tSession: e.Session,\n\t\t})\n\n\t\te.Session.Log().Info(\"relationship discovered\", \"from\", name, \"relation\", a.rtype,\n\t\t\t\"to\", ip.Address.String(), slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", d.plugin.name, \"handler\", d.name))\n\t}\n}\n"
              },
              {
                "name": "plugin.go",
                "path": "engine/plugins/dns/plugin.go",
                "type": "file",
                "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage dns\n\nimport (\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/miekg/dns\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\toamdns \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/dns\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n\toamnet \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/network\"\n)\n\ntype dnsPlugin struct {\n\tname            string\n\ttxt             *dnsTXT\n\tlog             *slog.Logger\n\tapex            *dnsApex\n\tcname           *dnsCNAME\n\tip              *dnsIP\n\treverse         *dnsReverse\n\tsubs            *dnsSubs\n\tfirstSweepSize  int\n\tsecondSweepSize int\n\tmaxSweepSize    int\n\tsource          *et.Source\n\tapexLock        sync.Mutex\n\tapexList        map[string]*dbt.Entity\n}\n\nfunc NewDNS() et.Plugin {\n\treturn &dnsPlugin{\n\t\tname:            \"DNS\",\n\t\tfirstSweepSize:  25,\n\t\tsecondSweepSize: 100,\n\t\tmaxSweepSize:    250,\n\t\tsource: &et.Source{\n\t\t\tName:       \"DNS\",\n\t\t\tConfidence: 100,\n\t\t},\n\t\tapexList: make(map[string]*dbt.Entity),\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsPlugin) Name() string {\n\treturn d.name\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsPlugin) Start(r et.Registry) error {\n\td.log = r.Log().WithGroup(\"plugin\").With(\"name\", d.name)\n\n\td.apex = &dnsApex{name: d.name + \"-Apex\", plugin: d}\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:       d,\n\t\tName:         d.apex.name,\n\t\tPriority:     5,\n\t\tMaxInstances: support.MaxHandlerInstances,\n\t\tTransforms:   []string{string(oam.FQDN)},\n\t\tEventType:    oam.FQDN,\n\t\tCallback:     d.apex.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tcname := d.name + \"-CNAME\"\n\td.cname = &dnsCNAME{\n\t\tname:   cname,\n\t\tplugin: d,\n\t\tsource: &et.Source{\n\t\t\tName:       cname,\n\t\t\tConfidence: 100,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:       d,\n\t\tName:         d.cname.name,\n\t\tPriority:     2,\n\t\tMaxInstances: support.MaxHandlerInstances,\n\t\tTransforms:   []string{string(oam.FQDN)},\n\t\tEventType:    oam.FQDN,\n\t\tCallback:     d.cname.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tipname := d.name + \"-IP\"\n\td.ip = &dnsIP{\n\t\tname:    ipname,\n\t\tqueries: []uint16{dns.TypeA, dns.TypeAAAA},\n\t\tplugin:  d,\n\t\tsource: &et.Source{\n\t\t\tName:       ipname,\n\t\t\tConfidence: 100,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:       d,\n\t\tName:         d.ip.name,\n\t\tPriority:     3,\n\t\tMaxInstances: support.MaxHandlerInstances,\n\t\tTransforms:   []string{string(oam.IPAddress)},\n\t\tEventType:    oam.FQDN,\n\t\tCallback:     d.ip.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\td.reverse = NewReverse(d)\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:       d,\n\t\tName:         d.reverse.name,\n\t\tPriority:     8,\n\t\tMaxInstances: support.MaxHandlerInstances,\n\t\tTransforms:   []string{string(oam.FQDN)},\n\t\tEventType:    oam.IPAddress,\n\t\tCallback:     d.reverse.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\td.subs = NewSubs(d)\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:     d,\n\t\tName:       d.subs.name,\n\t\tPriority:   4,\n\t\tTransforms: []string{string(oam.FQDN)},\n\t\tEventType:  oam.FQDN,\n\t\tCallback:   d.subs.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\tgo d.subs.releaseSessions()\n\n\ttxtname := d.name + \"-TXT\"\n\td.txt = &dnsTXT{\n\t\tname:   d.name + \"-TXT\",\n\t\tplugin: d,\n\t\tsource: &et.Source{\n\t\t\tName:       txtname,\n\t\t\tConfidence: 100,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:       d,\n\t\tName:         d.txt.name,\n\t\tPriority:     1,\n\t\tMaxInstances: support.MaxHandlerInstances,\n\t\tTransforms:   []string{string(oam.FQDN)},\n\t\tEventType:    oam.FQDN,\n\t\tCallback:     d.txt.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\td.log.Info(\"Plugin started\")\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsPlugin) Stop() {\n\tclose(d.subs.done)\n\td.log.Info(\"Plugin stopped\")\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsPlugin) lookupWithinTTL(session et.Session, name string, atype oam.AssetType, since time.Time, reltype oam.RelationType, rrtypes ...int) []*dbt.Entity {\n\tvar results []*dbt.Entity\n\n\tif len(rrtypes) == 0 || !since.IsZero() {\n\t\treturn results\n\t}\n\n\tents, err := session.Cache().FindEntitiesByContent(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: name}, time.Time{})\n\tif err != nil || len(ents) != 1 {\n\t\treturn results\n\t}\n\tentity := ents[0]\n\n\tif edges, err := session.Cache().OutgoingEdges(entity, since, \"dns_record\"); err == nil && len(edges) > 0 {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\tif tags, err := session.Cache().GetEdgeTags(edge, since, d.source.Name); err == nil && len(tags) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tvar found bool\n\n\t\t\t\tfor _, tag := range tags {\n\t\t\t\t\tif _, ok := tag.Property.(*general.SourceProperty); ok {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfound = true\n\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tif !found {\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tvar rrtype int\n\t\t\tswitch v := edge.Relation.(type) {\n\t\t\tcase *oamdns.BasicDNSRelation:\n\t\t\t\tif v.RelationType() == reltype {\n\t\t\t\t\trrtype = v.Header.RRType\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcase *oamdns.PrefDNSRelation:\n\t\t\t\tif v.RelationType() == reltype {\n\t\t\t\t\trrtype = v.Header.RRType\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcase *oamdns.SRVDNSRelation:\n\t\t\t\tif v.RelationType() == reltype {\n\t\t\t\t\trrtype = v.Header.RRType\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, t := range rrtypes {\n\t\t\t\tif rrtype == t {\n\t\t\t\t\tif to, err := session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.ToEntity.ID); err == nil && to != nil && to.Asset.AssetType() == atype {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tresults = append(results, to)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn results\n}\n\nfunc sweepCallback(e *et.Event, ip *oamnet.IPAddress, src *et.Source) {\n\tentity, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(ip)\n\tif err == nil && entity != nil {\n\t\t_, _ = e.Session.Cache().CreateEntityProperty(entity, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\t\tSource:     src.Name,\n\t\t\tConfidence: src.Confidence,\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\tif entity != nil {\n\t\t_ = e.Dispatcher.DispatchEvent(&et.Event{\n\t\t\tName:    ip.Address.String(),\n\t\t\tEntity:  entity,\n\t\t\tSession: e.Session,\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsPlugin) addApex(name string, entity *dbt.Entity) {\n\td.apexLock.Lock()\n\tdefer d.apexLock.Unlock()\n\n\tif _, found := d.apexList[name]; !found {\n\t\td.apexList[name] = entity\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsPlugin) getApex(name string) *dbt.Entity {\n\td.apexLock.Lock()\n\tdefer d.apexLock.Unlock()\n\n\tif entity, found := d.apexList[name]; found {\n\t\treturn entity\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsPlugin) getApexList() []string {\n\td.apexLock.Lock()\n\tdefer d.apexLock.Unlock()\n\n\tvar results []string\n\tfor name := range d.apexList {\n\t\tresults = append(results, name)\n\t}\n\treturn results\n}\n"
              },
              {
                "name": "reverse.go",
                "path": "engine/plugins/dns/reverse.go",
                "type": "file",
                "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage dns\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/miekg/dns\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tamassnet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/internal/net\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\toamdns \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/dns\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n\toamnet \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/network\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/resolve/utils\"\n)\n\ntype dnsReverse struct {\n\tname   string\n\tplugin *dnsPlugin\n}\n\ntype relRev struct {\n\tipFQDN *dbt.Entity\n\ttarget *dbt.Entity\n}\n\nfunc NewReverse(p *dnsPlugin) *dnsReverse {\n\treturn &dnsReverse{\n\t\tname:   p.name + \"-Reverse\",\n\t\tplugin: p,\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsReverse) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\tip, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamnet.IPAddress)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the IPAddress asset\")\n\t}\n\n\taddrstr := ip.Address.String()\n\tif reserved, _ := amassnet.IsReservedAddress(addrstr); reserved {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\treverse, err := dns.ReverseAddr(ip.Address.String())\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\treverse = utils.RemoveLastDot(reverse)\n\n\tsrc := d.plugin.source\n\tptr := d.createPTRAlias(e, reverse, e.Entity)\n\tif ptr == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(), \"IPAddress\", \"FQDN\", d.plugin.name)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tvar rev []*relRev\n\tif support.AssetMonitoredWithinTTL(e.Session, e.Entity, src, since) {\n\t\trev = append(rev, d.lookup(e, ptr, since)...)\n\t} else {\n\t\trev = append(rev, d.query(e, addrstr, ptr)...)\n\t\tsupport.MarkAssetMonitored(e.Session, ptr, src)\n\t}\n\n\tif len(rev) > 0 {\n\t\td.process(e, rev)\n\t\tsupport.AddDNSRecordType(e, int(dns.TypePTR))\n\n\t\tvar size int\n\t\tif _, conf := e.Session.Scope().IsAssetInScope(ip, 0); conf > 0 {\n\t\t\tsize = d.plugin.secondSweepSize\n\t\t\tif e.Session.Config().Active {\n\t\t\t\tsize = d.plugin.maxSweepSize\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tif size > 0 {\n\t\t\tsupport.IPAddressSweep(e, ip, src, size, sweepCallback)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsReverse) lookup(e *et.Event, fqdn *dbt.Entity, since time.Time) []*relRev {\n\tvar rev []*relRev\n\n\tn, ok := fqdn.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\tif !ok || n == nil {\n\t\treturn rev\n\t}\n\n\tif assets := d.plugin.lookupWithinTTL(e.Session, n.Name, oam.FQDN, since, oam.BasicDNSRelation, 12); len(assets) > 0 {\n\t\tfor _, a := range assets {\n\t\t\trev = append(rev, &relRev{ipFQDN: fqdn, target: a})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn rev\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsReverse) query(e *et.Event, ipstr string, ptr *dbt.Entity) []*relRev {\n\tvar rev []*relRev\n\n\tif rr, err := support.PerformQuery(ipstr, dns.TypePTR); err == nil {\n\t\tif records := d.store(e, ptr, rr); len(records) > 0 {\n\t\t\trev = append(rev, records...)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn rev\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsReverse) store(e *et.Event, ptr *dbt.Entity, rr []dns.RR) []*relRev {\n\tvar rev []*relRev\n\t// additional validation of the PTR record\n\tfor _, record := range rr {\n\t\tif record.Header().Rrtype != dns.TypePTR {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tdata := strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace((record.(*dns.PTR)).Ptr))\n\t\tname := support.ScrapeSubdomainNames(data)\n\t\tif len(name) != 1 {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif t, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: name[0]}); err == nil && t != nil {\n\t\t\tif edge, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateEdge(&dbt.Edge{\n\t\t\t\tRelation: &oamdns.BasicDNSRelation{\n\t\t\t\t\tName: \"dns_record\",\n\t\t\t\t\tHeader: oamdns.RRHeader{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tRRType: int(record.Header().Rrtype),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tClass:  int(record.Header().Class),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tTTL:    int(record.Header().Ttl),\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tFromEntity: ptr,\n\t\t\t\tToEntity:   t,\n\t\t\t}); err == nil && edge != nil {\n\t\t\t\trev = append(rev, &relRev{ipFQDN: ptr, target: t})\n\t\t\t\t_, _ = e.Session.Cache().CreateEdgeProperty(edge, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\t\t\t\tSource:     d.plugin.source.Name,\n\t\t\t\t\tConfidence: d.plugin.source.Confidence,\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(err.Error(), slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", d.plugin.name, \"handler\", d.name))\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn rev\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsReverse) createPTRAlias(e *et.Event, name string, ip *dbt.Entity) *dbt.Entity {\n\tptr, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: name})\n\tif err != nil || ptr == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\tif edge, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateEdge(&dbt.Edge{\n\t\tRelation:   &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"ptr_record\"},\n\t\tFromEntity: ip,\n\t\tToEntity:   ptr,\n\t}); err == nil && edge != nil {\n\t\t_, _ = e.Session.Cache().CreateEdgeProperty(edge, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\t\tSource:     d.plugin.source.Name,\n\t\t\tConfidence: d.plugin.source.Confidence,\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\t_ = e.Dispatcher.DispatchEvent(&et.Event{\n\t\tName:    ptr.Asset.Key(),\n\t\tEntity:  ptr,\n\t\tSession: e.Session,\n\t})\n\n\te.Session.Log().Info(\"relationship discovered\", \"from\", ip.Asset.Key(), \"relation\", \"ptr_record\",\n\t\t\"to\", ptr.Asset.Key(), slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", d.plugin.name, \"handler\", d.name))\n\n\treturn ptr\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsReverse) process(e *et.Event, rev []*relRev) {\n\tfor _, r := range rev {\n\t\tip := r.ipFQDN.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\t\ttarget := r.target.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\n\t\t_ = e.Dispatcher.DispatchEvent(&et.Event{\n\t\t\tName:    target.Name,\n\t\t\tEntity:  r.target,\n\t\t\tSession: e.Session,\n\t\t})\n\n\t\te.Session.Log().Info(\"relationship discovered\", \"from\", ip.Name, \"relation\", \"ptr_record\",\n\t\t\t\"to\", target.Name, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", d.plugin.name, \"handler\", d.name))\n\t}\n}\n"
              },

                "name": "subs.go",

                "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage dns\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/caffix/stringset\"\n\t\"github.com/miekg/dns\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\toamdns \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/dns\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/resolve/utils\"\n\t\"golang.org/x/net/publicsuffix\"\n)\n\ntype subsQtypes struct {\n\tQtype uint16\n\tRtype string\n}\n\ntype subsSession struct {\n\tsession et.Session\n\tstrset  *stringset.Set\n}\n\ntype dnsSubs struct {\n\tsync.Mutex\n\tname      string\n\ttypes     []subsQtypes\n\tdone      chan struct{}\n\tsessNames map[string]*subsSession\n\tplugin    *dnsPlugin\n}\n\ntype relSubs struct {\n\trtype  string\n\talias  *dbt.Entity\n\ttarget *dbt.Entity\n}\n\nfunc NewSubs(p *dnsPlugin) *dnsSubs {\n\treturn &dnsSubs{\n\t\tname: p.name + \"-Subdomains\",\n\t\ttypes: []subsQtypes{\n\t\t\t{Qtype: dns.TypeNS, Rtype: \"ns_record\"},\n\t\t\t{Qtype: dns.TypeMX, Rtype: \"mx_record\"},\n\t\t\t//{Qtype: dns.TypeSOA, Rtype: \"soa_record\"},\n\t\t\t//{Qtype: dns.TypeSPF, Rtype: \"spf_record\"},\n\t\t},\n\t\tdone:      make(chan struct{}),\n\t\tsessNames: make(map[string]*subsSession),\n\t\tplugin:    p,\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsSubs) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\tfqdn, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the FQDN asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tif !support.HasDNSRecordType(e, int(dns.TypeA)) && !support.HasDNSRecordType(e, int(dns.TypeAAAA)) {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tdom := d.registered(e, fqdn.Name)\n\tif dom == \"\" {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(), \"FQDN\", \"FQDN\", d.plugin.name)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tif names := d.traverse(e, dom, e.Entity, since); len(names) > 0 {\n\t\td.process(e, names)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsSubs) registered(e *et.Event, name string) string {\n\tif a, conf := e.Session.Scope().IsAssetInScope(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: name}, 0); conf > 0 && a != nil {\n\t\tif fqdn, ok := a.(*oamdns.FQDN); ok {\n\t\t\treturn fqdn.Name\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tfqdns, err := e.Session.Cache().FindEntitiesByContent(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: name}, time.Time{})\n\tif err != nil || len(fqdns) != 1 {\n\t\treturn \"\"\n\t}\n\tfqdn := fqdns[0]\n\n\tvar rels []*dbt.Edge\n\t// allow name servers and mail servers to be investigated like in-scope assets\n\tif edges, err := e.Session.Cache().IncomingEdges(fqdn, time.Time{}, \"dns_record\"); err == nil && len(edges) > 0 {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\tif r, ok := edge.Relation.(*oamdns.PrefDNSRelation); ok {\n\t\t\t\tif r.Header.RRType == int(dns.TypeNS) || r.Header.RRType == int(dns.TypeMX) {\n\t\t\t\t\trels = append(rels, edge)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tvar inscope bool\n\tfor _, r := range rels {\n\t\tfrom, err := e.Session.Cache().FindEntityById(r.FromEntity.ID)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tif f, ok := from.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN); ok && from != nil {\n\t\t\tif _, conf := e.Session.Scope().IsAssetInScope(f, 0); conf > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tinscope = true\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif inscope {\n\t\tif dom, err := publicsuffix.EffectiveTLDPlusOne(name); err == nil {\n\t\t\treturn dom\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn \"\"\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsSubs) traverse(e *et.Event, dom string, fqdn *dbt.Entity, since time.Time) []*relSubs {\n\tvar alias []*relSubs\n\n\tdlabels := strings.Split(dom, \".\")\n\tdlen := len(dlabels)\n\tif dlen < 2 {\n\t\treturn alias\n\t}\n\n\tsub := fqdn.Asset.Key()\n\tfor labels := strings.Split(sub, \".\"); dlen <= len(labels); labels = labels[1:] {\n\t\tsub = strings.TrimSpace(strings.Join(labels, \".\"))\n\n\t\t// no need to check subdomains already evaluated\n\t\tif d.fqdnAvailable(e, sub) {\n\t\t\tresults := d.lookup(e, sub, since)\n\t\t\tif len(results) == 0 {\n\t\t\t\tresults = d.query(e, sub)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\talias = append(alias, results...)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn alias\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsSubs) lookup(e *et.Event, subdomain string, since time.Time) []*relSubs {\n\tvar alias []*relSubs\n\n\tfqdns, err := e.Session.Cache().FindEntitiesByContent(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: subdomain}, time.Time{})\n\tif err != nil || len(fqdns) != 1 {\n\t\treturn alias\n\t}\n\tfqdn := fqdns[0]\n\n\tn := fqdn.Asset.Key()\n\t// Check for NS records within the since period\n\tif assets := d.plugin.lookupWithinTTL(e.Session, n, oam.FQDN, since, oam.PrefDNSRelation, 2); len(assets) > 0 {\n\t\tfor _, a := range assets {\n\t\t\talias = append(alias, &relSubs{rtype: \"dns_record\", alias: fqdn, target: a})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\t// Check for MX records within the since period\n\tif assets := d.plugin.lookupWithinTTL(e.Session, n, oam.FQDN, since, oam.PrefDNSRelation, 15); len(assets) > 0 {\n\t\tfor _, a := range assets {\n\t\t\talias = append(alias, &relSubs{rtype: \"dns_record\", alias: fqdn, target: a})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn alias\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsSubs) query(e *et.Event, subdomain string) []*relSubs {\n\tapex := true\n\tvar alias []*relSubs\n\n\tfor i, t := range d.types {\n\t\tif rr, err := support.PerformQuery(subdomain, t.Qtype); err == nil && len(rr) > 0 {\n\t\t\tif records := d.store(e, subdomain, rr); len(records) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\talias = append(alias, records...)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else if i == 0 {\n\t\t\t// do not continue if we failed to obtain the NS record\n\t\t\tapex = false\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif !apex {\n\t\treturn alias\n\t}\n\n\trch := make(chan []*relSubs, len(srvNames))\n\tdefer close(rch)\n\n\tfor _, name := range srvNames {\n\t\tgo func(label, sub string, ch chan []*relSubs) {\n\t\t\tn := name + \".\" + subdomain\n\n\t\t\tvar results []*relSubs\n\t\t\tif rr, err := support.PerformQuery(n, dns.TypeSRV); err == nil && len(rr) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tif records := d.store(e, n, rr); len(records) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t\tresults = append(results, records...)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tch <- results\n\t\t}(name, subdomain, rch)\n\t}\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < len(srvNames); i++ {\n\t\tanswers := <-rch\n\t\talias = append(alias, answers...)\n\t}\n\n\treturn alias\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsSubs) store(e *et.Event, name string, rr []dns.RR) []*relSubs {\n\tvar alias []*relSubs\n\n\tfqdn, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: name})\n\tif err != nil || fqdn == nil {\n\t\treturn alias\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, record := range rr {\n\t\tvar a *dbt.Entity\n\t\tvar edge *dbt.Edge\n\n\t\tif record.Header().Rrtype == dns.TypeNS {\n\t\t\tdata := utils.RemoveLastDot((record.(*dns.NS)).Ns)\n\n\t\t\ta, err = e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: data})\n\t\t\tif err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tedge, err = e.Session.Cache().CreateEdge(&dbt.Edge{\n\t\t\t\t\tRelation: &oamdns.BasicDNSRelation{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"dns_record\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tHeader: oamdns.RRHeader{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRRType: int(record.Header().Rrtype),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tClass:  int(record.Header().Class),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tTTL:    int(record.Header().Ttl),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\tFromEntity: fqdn,\n\t\t\t\t\tToEntity:   a,\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else if record.Header().Rrtype == dns.TypeMX {\n\t\t\tdata := utils.RemoveLastDot((record.(*dns.MX)).Mx)\n\n\t\t\ta, err = e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: data})\n\t\t\tif err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tedge, err = e.Session.Cache().CreateEdge(&dbt.Edge{\n\t\t\t\t\tRelation: &oamdns.PrefDNSRelation{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"dns_record\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tHeader: oamdns.RRHeader{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRRType: int(record.Header().Rrtype),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tClass:  int(record.Header().Class),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tTTL:    int(record.Header().Ttl),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tPreference: int((record.(*dns.MX)).Preference),\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\tFromEntity: fqdn,\n\t\t\t\t\tToEntity:   a,\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif err == nil && edge != nil {\n\t\t\talias = append(alias, &relSubs{rtype: \"dns_record\", alias: fqdn, target: a})\n\t\t\t_, _ = e.Session.Cache().CreateEdgeProperty(edge, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\t\t\tSource:     d.plugin.source.Name,\n\t\t\t\tConfidence: d.plugin.source.Confidence,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(err.Error(), slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", d.plugin.name, \"handler\", d.name))\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif len(alias) > 0 {\n\t\td.plugin.addApex(name, fqdn)\n\t}\n\treturn alias\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsSubs) process(e *et.Event, results []*relSubs) {\n\tfor _, finding := range results {\n\t\tfname, ok := finding.alias.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\t\tif !ok || fname == nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t_ = e.Dispatcher.DispatchEvent(&et.Event{\n\t\t\tName:    fname.Name,\n\t\t\tEntity:  finding.alias,\n\t\t\tSession: e.Session,\n\t\t})\n\n\t\ttname, ok := finding.target.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\t\tif !ok || tname == nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t_ = e.Dispatcher.DispatchEvent(&et.Event{\n\t\t\tName:    tname.Name,\n\t\t\tEntity:  finding.target,\n\t\t\tSession: e.Session,\n\t\t})\n\n\t\te.Session.Log().Info(\"relationship discovered\", \"from\", fname.Name, \"relation\",\n\t\t\tfinding.rtype, \"to\", tname.Name, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", d.plugin.name, \"handler\", d.name))\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsSubs) fqdnAvailable(e *et.Event, fqdn string) bool {\n\td.Lock()\n\tdefer d.Unlock()\n\n\tid := e.Session.ID().String()\n\tif _, found := d.sessNames[id]; !found {\n\t\td.sessNames[id] = &subsSession{\n\t\t\tsession: e.Session,\n\t\t\tstrset:  stringset.New(),\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tvar avail bool\n\tif !d.sessNames[id].strset.Has(fqdn) {\n\t\tavail = true\n\t\td.sessNames[id].strset.Insert(fqdn)\n\t}\n\treturn avail\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsSubs) releaseSessions() {\n\tt := time.NewTicker(time.Minute)\n\tdefer t.Stop()\nloop:\n\tfor {\n\t\tselect {\n\t\tcase <-d.done:\n\t\t\tbreak loop\n\t\tcase <-t.C:\n\t\t\td.Lock()\n\t\t\tvar ids []string\n\t\t\tfor id, s := range d.sessNames {\n\t\t\t\tif s.session.Done() {\n\t\t\t\t\tids = append(ids, id)\n\t\t\t\t\ts.strset.Close()\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tfor _, id := range ids {\n\t\t\t\tdelete(d.sessNames, id)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\td.Unlock()\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\td.Lock()\n\tfor _, sess := range d.sessNames {\n\t\tsess.strset.Close()\n\t}\n\td.Unlock()\n}\n\nvar srvNames = []string{\n\t\"_afs3-kaserver._tcp\",\n\t\"_afs3-kaserver._tcp\",\n\t\"_afs3-kaserver._udp\",\n\t\"_afs3-prserver._tcp\",\n\t\"_afs3-prserver._udp\",\n\t\"_afs3-vlserver._tcp\",\n\t\"_afs3-vlserver._udp\",\n\t\"_amt._udp\",\n\t\"_autodiscover._tcp\",\n\t\"_autotunnel._udp\",\n\t\"_avatars-sec._tcp\",\n\t\"_avatars._tcp\",\n\t\"_bittorrent-tracker._tcp\",\n\t\"_caldav._tcp\",\n\t\"_caldavs._tcp\",\n\t\"_carddav._tcp\",\n\t\"_carddavs._tcp\",\n\t\"_ceph-mon._tcp\",\n\t\"_ceph._tcp\",\n\t\"_certificates._tcp\",\n\t\"_chat._udp\",\n\t\"_citrixreceiver._tcp\",\n\t\"_collab-edge._tls\",\n\t\"_crls._tcp\",\n\t\"_daap._tcp\",\n\t\"_diameters._tcp\",\n\t\"_diameter._tcp\",\n\t\"_diameter._tls\",\n\t\"_dns-llq._tcp\",\n\t\"_dns-llq-tls._tcp\",\n\t\"_dns-llq-tls._udp\",\n\t\"_dns-llq._udp\",\n\t\"_dns-push-tls._tcp\",\n\t\"_dns-sd._udp\",\n\t\"_dns._udp\",\n\t\"_dns-update._tcp\",\n\t\"_dns-update-tls._tcp\",\n\t\"_dns-update._udp\",\n\t\"_dots-call-home._tcp\",\n\t\"_dots-call-home._udp\",\n\t\"_dots-data._tcp\",\n\t\"_dots-signal._tcp\",\n\t\"_dots-signal._udp\",\n\t\"_dvbservdsc._tcp\",\n\t\"_dvbservdsc._udp\",\n\t\"_ftp._tcp\",\n\t\"_gc._tcp\",\n\t\"_hip-nat-t._udp\",\n\t\"_http._tcp\",\n\t\"_hybrid-pop._tcp\",\n\t\"_hybrid-pop._udp\",\n\t\"_imap3._tcp\",\n\t\"_imap3._udp\",\n\t\"_imaps._tcp\",\n\t\"_imaps._udp\",\n\t\"_imap._tcp\",\n\t\"_imap._udp\",\n\t\"_imps-server._tcp\",\n\t\"_ipp._tcp\",\n\t\"_jabber._tcp\",\n\t\"_jmap._tcp\",\n\t\"_kca._udp\",\n\t\"_kerberos-adm._tcp\",\n\t\"_kerberos-adm._udp\",\n\t\"_kerberos-master._tcp\",\n\t\"_kerberos-master._udp\",\n\t\"_kerberos._tcp\",\n\t\"_kerberos-tls._tcp\",\n\t\"_kerberos._udp\",\n\t\"_kerneros-iv._udp\",\n\t\"_kftp-data._tcp\",\n\t\"_kftp-data._udp\",\n\t\"_kftp._tcp\",\n\t\"_kftp._udp\",\n\t\"_kpasswd._tcp\",\n\t\"_kpasswd._udp\",\n\t\"_ktelnet._tcp\",\n\t\"_ktelnet._udp\",\n\t\"_ldap-admin._tcp\",\n\t\"_ldap-admin._udp\",\n\t\"_ldaps._tcp\",\n\t\"_ldaps._udp\",\n\t\"_ldap._tcp\",\n\t\"_ldap._udp\",\n\t\"_matrix._tc                 "type": "file",
                "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage dns\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/miekg/dns\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toamdns \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/dns\"\n)\n\ntype dnsTXT struct {\n\tname   string\n\tplugin *dnsPlugin\n\tsource *et.Source\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsTXT) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\t_, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the FQDN asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(), \"FQDN\", \"FQDN\", d.plugin.name)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tvar txtRecords []dns.RR\n\tvar props []*oamdns.DNSRecordProperty\n\tif support.AssetMonitoredWithinTTL(e.Session, e.Entity, d.source, since) {\n\t\tprops = d.lookup(e, e.Entity, since)\n\t} else {\n\t\ttxtRecords = d.query(e, e.Entity)\n\t\td.store(e, e.Entity, txtRecords)\n\t}\n\n\tif len(txtRecords) > 0 {\n\t\td.process(e, e.Entity, txtRecords, props)\n\t\tsupport.AddDNSRecordType(e, int(dns.TypeTXT))\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsTXT) lookup(e *et.Event, fqdn *dbt.Entity, since time.Time) []*oamdns.DNSRecordProperty {\n\tvar props []*oamdns.DNSRecordProperty\n\n\tn, ok := fqdn.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\tif !ok || n == nil {\n\t\treturn props\n\t}\n\n\tif tags, err := e.Session.Cache().GetEntityTags(fqdn, since, \"dns_record\"); err == nil {\n\t\tfor _, tag := range tags {\n\t\t\tif prop, ok := tag.Property.(*oamdns.DNSRecordProperty); ok && prop.Header.RRType == int(dns.TypeTXT) {\n\t\t\t\tprops = append(props, prop)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn props\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsTXT) query(e *et.Event, name *dbt.Entity) []dns.RR {\n\tvar txtRecords []dns.RR\n\n\tfqdn, ok := name.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn txtRecords\n\t}\n\n\tif rr, err := support.PerformQuery(fqdn.Name, dns.TypeTXT); err == nil {\n\t\ttxtRecords = append(txtRecords, rr...)\n\t\tsupport.MarkAssetMonitored(e.Session, name, d.source)\n\t}\n\n\treturn txtRecords\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsTXT) store(e *et.Event, fqdn *dbt.Entity, rr []dns.RR) {\n\tfor _, record := range rr {\n\t\tif record.Header().Rrtype != dns.TypeTXT {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\ttxtValue := strings.Join((record.(*dns.TXT)).Txt, \" \")\n\t\t_, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateEntityProperty(fqdn, &oamdns.DNSRecordProperty{\n\t\t\tPropertyName: \"dns_record\",\n\t\t\tHeader: oamdns.RRHeader{\n\t\t\t\tRRType: int(dns.TypeTXT),\n\t\t\t\tClass:  int(record.Header().Class),\n\t\t\t\tTTL:    int(record.Header().Ttl),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tData: txtValue,\n\t\t})\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to create entity property for %s: %s\", txtValue, err)\n\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(msg, \"error\", err.Error(),\n\t\t\t\tslog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", d.plugin.name, \"handler\", d.name))\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (d *dnsTXT) process(e *et.Event, fqdn *dbt.Entity, txtRecords []dns.RR, props []*oamdns.DNSRecordProperty) {\n\tfor _, record := range txtRecords {\n\t\te.Session.Log().Info(\"TXT record discovered\", \"fqdn\", fqdn.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN).Name,\n\t\t\t\"txt\", strings.Join((record.(*dns.TXT)).Txt, \" \"), slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", d.plugin.name, \"handler\", d.name))\n\t}\n\tfor _, prop := range props {\n\t\te.Session.Log().Info(\"TXT record discovered\", \"fqdn\", fqdn.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN).Name,\n\t\t\t\"txt\", prop.Data, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", d.plugin.name, \"handler\", d.name))\n\t}\n}\n"
              }

                "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage enrich\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"net/netip\"\n\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\toamdns \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/dns\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n\toamnet \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/network\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/platform\"\n\toamurl \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/url\"\n)\n\ntype bannerURLs struct {\n\tname   string\n\tlog    *slog.Logger\n\tsource *et.Source\n}\n\nfunc NewBannerURLs() et.Plugin {\n\treturn &bannerURLs{\n\t\tname: \"Service-Banner-URLs\",\n\t\tsource: &et.Source{\n\t\t\tName:       \"Service-Banner-URLs\",\n\t\t\tConfidence: 80,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (bu *bannerURLs) Name() string {\n\treturn bu.name\n}\n\nfunc (bu *bannerURLs) Start(r et.Registry) error {\n\tbu.log = r.Log().WithGroup(\"plugin\").With(\"name\", bu.name)\n\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:     bu,\n\t\tName:       bu.name + \"-Handler\",\n\t\tTransforms: []string{string(oam.URL)},\n\t\tEventType:  oam.Service,\n\t\tCallback:   bu.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tbu.log.Info(\"Plugin started\")\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (bu *bannerURLs) Stop() {\n\tbu.log.Info(\"Plugin stopped\")\n}\n\nfunc (bu *bannerURLs) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\t_, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*platform.Service)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the Service asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(), string(oam.Service), string(oam.URL), bu.name)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tvar urls []*dbt.Entity\n\t//TODO: urls = append(urls, bu.lookup(e, serv.Identifier, bu.source, since)...)\n\tif !support.AssetMonitoredWithinTTL(e.Session, e.Entity, bu.source, since) {\n\t\turls = append(urls, bu.query(e, e.Entity)...)\n\t\tsupport.MarkAssetMonitored(e.Session, e.Entity, bu.source)\n\t}\n\n\tif len(urls) > 0 {\n\t\tbu.process(e, urls)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (bu *bannerURLs) query(e *et.Event, asset *dbt.Entity) []*dbt.Entity {\n\tserv := asset.Asset.(*platform.Service)\n\n\tif serv.OutputLen == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar results []*oamurl.URL\n\t// TODO: in the future, further investigation of out of scope URLs may be needed\n\tif urls := support.ExtractURLsFromString(serv.Output); len(urls) > 0 {\n\t\tfor _, u := range urls {\n\t\t\tif addr, err := netip.ParseAddr(u.Host); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\tif _, conf := e.Session.Scope().IsAssetInScope(&oamnet.IPAddress{Address: addr}, 0); conf > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t\tresults = append(results, u)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tif _, conf := e.Session.Scope().IsAssetInScope(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: u.Host}, 0); conf > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t\tresults = append(results, u)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn bu.store(e, results)\n}\n\nfunc (bu *bannerURLs) store(e *et.Event, urls []*oamurl.URL) []*dbt.Entity {\n\tvar assets []*dbt.Entity\n\n\tfor _, u := range urls {\n\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(u); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\tassets = append(assets, a)\n\t\t\t_, _ = e.Session.Cache().CreateEntityProperty(a, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\t\t\tSource:     bu.source.Name,\n\t\t\t\tConfidence: bu.source.Confidence,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn assets\n}\n\nfunc (bu *bannerURLs) process(e *et.Event, assets []*dbt.Entity) {\n\tfor _, a := range assets {\n\t\tif u, ok := a.Asset.(*oamurl.URL); ok && e.Session.Scope().IsURLInScope(e.Session.Cache(), u) {\n\t\t\tbu.processOneURL(e, u.Raw, a)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (bu *bannerURLs) processOneURL(e *et.Event, name string, asset *dbt.Entity) {\n\t_ = e.Dispatcher.DispatchEvent(&et.Event{\n\t\tName:    name,\n\t\tEntity:  asset,\n\t\tSession: e.Session,\n\t})\n}\n"

                "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage enrich\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/config\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/contact\"\n)\n\ntype contactrec struct {\n\tname       string\n\tlog        *slog.Logger\n\ttransforms []string\n\tsource     *et.Source\n}\n\nfunc NewContacts() et.Plugin {\n\treturn &contactrec{\n\t\tname: \"Contract-Record-Expansion\",\n\t\ttransforms: []string{\n\t\t\tstring(oam.URL),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.Person),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.Organization),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.Location),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.Identifier),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.Phone),\n\t\t},\n\t\tsource: &et.Source{\n\t\t\tName:       \"Contract-Record-Expansion\",\n\t\t\tConfidence: 100,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (cr *contactrec) Name() string {\n\treturn cr.name\n}\n\nfunc (cr *contactrec) Start(r et.Registry) error {\n\tcr.log = r.Log().WithGroup(\"plugin\").With(\"name\", cr.name)\n\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:     cr,\n\t\tName:       cr.name,\n\t\tPriority:   1,\n\t\tTransforms: cr.transforms,\n\t\tEventType:  oam.ContactRecord,\n\t\tCallback:   cr.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tcr.log.Info(\"Plugin started\")\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (cr *contactrec) Stop() {\n\tcr.log.Info(\"Plugin stopped\")\n}\n\nfunc (cr *contactrec) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\t_, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*contact.ContactRecord)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the ContactRecord asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tmatches, err := e.Session.Config().CheckTransformations(\n\t\tstring(oam.ContactRecord), append(cr.transforms, cr.name)...)\n\tif err != nil || matches.Len() == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tif findings := cr.lookup(e, e.Entity, matches); len(findings) > 0 {\n\t\tcr.process(e, findings)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (cr *contactrec) lookup(e *et.Event, entity *dbt.Entity, m *config.Matches) []*support.Finding {\n\tvar rtypes []string\n\tconfs := make(map[string]int)\n\tsinces := make(map[string]time.Time)\n\tconrec := entity.Asset.(*contact.ContactRecord)\n\n\tfor _, atype := range cr.transforms {\n\t\tif !m.IsMatch(atype) {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(), string(oam.ContactRecord), atype, cr.name)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tsinces[atype] = since\n\n\t\tconfs[atype] = m.Confidence(atype)\n\t\tif confs[atype] == -1 {\n\t\t\tconfs[atype] = 0\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch atype {\n\t\tcase string(oam.Person):\n\t\t\trtypes = append(rtypes, \"person\")\n\t\tcase string(oam.Organization):\n\t\t\trtypes = append(rtypes, \"organization\")\n\t\tcase string(oam.Location):\n\t\t\trtypes = append(rtypes, \"location\")\n\t\tcase string(oam.Identifier):\n\t\t\trtypes = append(rtypes, \"id\")\n\t\tcase string(oam.Phone):\n\t\t\trtypes = append(rtypes, \"phone\")\n\t\tcase string(oam.URL):\n\t\t\trtypes = append(rtypes, \"url\")\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tvar findings []*support.Finding\n\tif edges, err := e.Session.Cache().OutgoingEdges(entity, time.Time{}, rtypes...); err == nil && len(edges) > 0 {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\ta, err := e.Session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.ToEntity.ID)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\ttotype := string(a.Asset.AssetType())\n\t\t\tif since, ok := sinces[totype]; !ok || (ok && a.LastSeen.Before(since)) {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tfindings = append(findings, &support.Finding{\n\t\t\t\tFrom:     entity,\n\t\t\t\tFromName: \"ContactRecord: \" + conrec.DiscoveredAt,\n\t\t\t\tTo:       a,\n\t\t\t\tToName:   a.Asset.Key(),\n\t\t\t\tRel:      edge.Relation,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn findings\n}\n\nfunc (cr *contactrec) process(e *et.Event, findings []*support.Finding) {\n\tsupport.ProcessAssetsWithSource(e, findings, cr.source, cr.name, cr.name+\"-Handler\")\n}\n"
              },

All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage enrich\n\nimport (\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/contact\"\n\toamdns \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/dns\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n)\n\ntype emailexpand struct {\n\tname   string\n\tlog    *slog.Logger\n\tsource *et.Source\n}\n\nfunc NewEmails() et.Plugin {\n\treturn &emailexpand{\n\t\tname: \"Email-Expansion\",\n\t\tsource: &et.Source{\n\t\t\tName:       \"Email-Expansion\",\n\t\t\tConfidence: 100,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (ee *emailexpand) Name() string {\n\treturn ee.name\n}\n\nfunc (ee *emailexpand) Start(r et.Registry) error {\n\tee.log = r.Log().WithGroup(\"plugin\").With(\"name\", ee.name)\n\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:     ee,\n\t\tName:       ee.name,\n\t\tTransforms: []string{string(oam.FQDN)},\n\t\tEventType:  oam.Identifier,\n\t\tCallback:   ee.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tee.log.Info(\"Plugin started\")\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (ee *emailexpand) Stop() {\n\tee.log.Info(\"Plugin stopped\")\n}\n\nfunc (ee *emailexpand) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\tif id, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*general.Identifier); !ok ||\n\t\tid == nil || id.Type != general.EmailAddress || id.ID == \"\" {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tif findings := ee.store(e, e.Entity); len(findings) > 0 {\n\t\tee.process(e, findings)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (ee *emailexpand) store(e *et.Event, asset *dbt.Entity) []*support.Finding {\n\tvar findings []*support.Finding\n\toame := asset.Asset.(*general.Identifier)\n\n\tparts := strings.Split(oame.ID, \"@\")\n\tif len(parts) != 2 {\n\t\treturn findings\n\t}\n\tdomain := parts[1]\n\n\tif cr, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(&contact.ContactRecord{DiscoveredAt: domain}); err == nil && cr != nil {\n\t\tfindings = append(findings, &support.Finding{\n\t\t\tFrom:     asset,\n\t\t\tFromName: \"Identifier: \" + asset.Asset.Key(),\n\t\t\tTo:       cr,\n\t\t\tToName:   \"ContactRecord: \" + cr.Asset.Key(),\n\t\t\tRel:      &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"registration_agency\"},\n\t\t})\n\n\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: domain}); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\tfindings = append(findings, &support.Finding{\n\t\t\t\tFrom:     cr,\n\t\t\t\tFromName: \"ContactRecord: \" + cr.Asset.Key(),\n\t\t\t\tTo:       a,\n\t\t\t\tToName:   a.Asset.Key(),\n\t\t\t\tRel:      &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"fqdn\"},\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn findings\n}\n\nfunc (ee *emailexpand) process(e *et.Event, findings []*support.Finding) {\n\tfor _, f := range findings {\n\t\tif edge, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateEdge(&dbt.Edge{\n\t\t\tRelation:   f.Rel,\n\t\t\tFromEntity: f.From,\n\t\t\tToEntity:   f.To,\n\t\t}); err == nil && edge != nil {\n\t\t\t_, _ = e.Session.Cache().CreateEdgeProperty(edge, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\t\t\tSource:     ee.source.Name,\n\t\t\t\tConfidence: ee.source.Confidence,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n"

                "name": "tls_cert.go",

                "type": "file",
                "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage enrich\n\nimport (\n\t\"crypto/x509\"\n\t\"crypto/x509/pkix\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"net/netip\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/config\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support/org\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\toamcert \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/certificate\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/contact\"\n\toamdns \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/dns\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/network\"\n\toamorg \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/org\"\n)\n\ntype tlsexpand struct {\n\tname       string\n\tlog        *slog.Logger\n\ttransforms []string\n\tsource     *et.Source\n}\n\nfunc NewTLSCerts() et.Plugin {\n\treturn &tlsexpand{\n\t\tname: \"TLCert-Expansion\",\n\t\ttransforms: []string{\n\t\t\tstring(oam.URL),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.FQDN),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.IPAddress),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.ContactRecord),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.Organization),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.Location),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.Identifier),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.TLSCertificate),\n\t\t},\n\t\tsource: &et.Source{\n\t\t\tName:       \"TLCert-Expansion\",\n\t\t\tConfidence: 100,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (te *tlsexpand) Name() string {\n\treturn te.name\n}\n\nfunc (te *tlsexpand) Start(r et.Registry) error {\n\tte.log = r.Log().WithGroup(\"plugin\").With(\"name\", te.name)\n\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:     te,\n\t\tName:       te.name,\n\t\tTransforms: te.transforms,\n\t\tEventType:  oam.TLSCertificate,\n\t\tCallback:   te.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tte.log.Info(\"Plugin started\")\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (te *tlsexpand) Stop() {\n\tte.log.Info(\"Plugin stopped\")\n}\n\nfunc (te *tlsexpand) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\t_, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamcert.TLSCertificate)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the TLSCertificate asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tmatches, err := e.Session.Config().CheckTransformations(\n\t\tstring(oam.TLSCertificate), append(te.transforms, te.name)...)\n\tif err != nil || matches.Len() == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar findings []*support.Finding\n\tif cert, ok := e.Meta.(*x509.Certificate); ok && cert != nil {\n\t\tte.store(e, cert, e.Entity, matches)\n\t} else {\n\t\tfindings = append(findings, te.lookup(e, e.Entity, matches)...)\n\t}\n\n\tif len(findings) > 0 {\n\t\tte.process(e, findings)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (te *tlsexpand) lookup(e *et.Event, asset *dbt.Entity, m *config.Matches) []*support.Finding {\n\tvar rtypes []string\n\tvar findings []*support.Finding\n\tsinces := make(map[string]time.Time)\n\n\tfor _, atype := range te.transforms {\n\t\tif !m.IsMatch(atype) {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(), string(oam.TLSCertificate), atype, te.name)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tsinces[atype] = since\n\n\t\tswitch atype {\n\t\tcase string(oam.URL):\n\t\t\trtypes = append(rtypes, \"san_url\", \"ocsp_server\", \"issuing_certificate_url\")\n\t\tcase string(oam.FQDN):\n\t\t\trtypes = append(rtypes, \"common_name\", \"san_dns_name\")\n\t\tcase string(oam.ContactRecord):\n\t\t\trtypes = append(rtypes, \"subject_contact\", \"issuer_contact\")\n\t\tcase string(oam.IPAddress):\n\t\t\trtypes = append(rtypes, \"san_ip_address\")\n\t\tcase string(oam.Identifier):\n\t\t\trtypes = append(rtypes, \"san_email_address\")\n\t\tcase string(oam.TLSCertificate):\n\t\t\trtypes = append(rtypes, \"issuing_certificate\")\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif edges, err := e.Session.Cache().OutgoingEdges(asset, time.Time{}, rtypes...); err == nil && len(edges) > 0 {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\ta, err := e.Session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.ToEntity.ID)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\ttotype := string(a.Asset.AssetType())\n\n\t\t\tsince, ok := sinces[totype]\n\t\t\tif !ok || (ok && a.LastSeen.Before(since)) {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif !te.oneOfSources(e, edge, te.source, since) {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tt := asset.Asset.(*oamcert.TLSCertificate)\n\t\t\tfindings = append(findings, &support.Finding{\n\t\t\t\tFrom:     asset,\n\t\t\t\tFromName: \"TLSCertificate: \" + t.SerialNumber,\n\t\t\t\tTo:       a,\n\t\t\t\tToName:   a.Asset.Key(),\n\t\t\t\tRel:      edge.Relation,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn findings\n}\n\nfunc (te *tlsexpand) oneOfSources(e *et.Event, edge *dbt.Edge, src *et.Source, since time.Time) bool {\n\tif tags, err := e.Session.Cache().GetEdgeTags(edge, since, src.Name); err == nil && len(tags) > 0 {\n\t\tfor _, tag := range tags {\n\t\t\tif _, ok := tag.Property.(*general.SourceProperty); ok {\n\t\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc (te *tlsexpand) store(e *et.Event, cert *x509.Certificate, asset *dbt.Entity, m *config.Matches) {\n\tvar findings []*support.Finding\n\tt := asset.Asset.(*oamcert.TLSCertificate)\n\n\tif m.IsMatch(string(oam.FQDN)) {\n\t\tif common := t.SubjectCommonName; common != \"\" {\n\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: common}); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tfindings = append(findings, &support.Finding{\n\t\t\t\t\tFrom:     asset,\n\t\t\t\t\tFromName: \"TLSCertificate: \" + t.SerialNumber,\n\t\t\t\t\tTo:       a,\n\t\t\t\t\tToName:   common,\n\t\t\t\t\tRel:      &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"common_name\"},\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tfor _, n := range cert.DNSNames {\n\t\t\tfor _, name := range support.ScrapeSubdomainNames(strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(n))) {\n\t\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: name}); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tfindings = append(findings, &support.Finding{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tFrom:     asset,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tFromName: \"TLSCertificate: \" + t.SerialNumber,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tTo:       a,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tToName:   name,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tRel:      &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"san_dns_name\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif m.IsMatch(string(oam.Identifier)) {\n\t\tfor _, emailstr := range cert.EmailAddresses {\n\t\t\temail := strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(emailstr))\n\t\t\tif email == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(&general.Identifier{\n\t\t\t\tUniqueID: fmt.Sprintf(\"%s:%s\", general.EmailAddress, email),\n\t\t\t\tID:       email,\n\t\t\t\tType:     general.EmailAddress,\n\t\t\t}); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tfindings = append(findings, &support.Finding{\n\t\t\t\t\tFrom:     asset,\n\t\t\t\t\tFromName: \"TLSCertificate: \" + t.SerialNumber,\n\t\t\t\t\tTo:       a,\n\t\t\t\t\tToName:   email,\n\t\t\t\t\tRel:      &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"san_email_address\"},\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif m.IsMatch(string(oam.IPAddress)) {\n\t\tfor _, ip := range cert.IPAddresses {\n\t\t\toamip := &network.IPAddress{Address: netip.MustParseAddr(ip.String())}\n\n\t\t\tif oamip.Address.Is4() {\n\t\t\t\toamip.Type = \"IPv4\"\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\toamip.Type = \"IPv6\"\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(oamip); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tfindings = append(findings, &support.Finding{\n\t\t\t\t\tFrom:     asset,\n\t\t\t\t\tFromName: \"TLSCertificate: \" + t.SerialNumber,\n\t\t\t\t\tTo:       a,\n\t\t\t\t\tToName:   oamip.Address.String(),\n\t\t\t\t\tRel:      &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"san_ip_address\"},\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif m.IsMatch(string(oam.URL)) {\n\t\tfor _, u := range cert.URIs {\n\t\t\tif oamurl := support.RawURLToOAM(u.String()); oamurl != nil {\n\t\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(oamurl); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tfindings = append(findings, &support.Finding{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tFrom:     asset,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tFromName: \"TLSCertificate: \" + t.SerialNumber,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tTo:       a,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tToName:   oamurl.Raw,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tRel:      &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"san_url\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tfor _, u := range cert.IssuingCertificateURL {\n\t\t\tif oamurl := support.RawURLToOAM(u); oamurl != nil {\n\t\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(oamurl); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tfindings = append(findings, &support.Finding{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tFrom:     asset,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tFromName: \"TLSCertificate: \" + t.SerialNumber,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tTo:       a,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tToName:   oamurl.Raw,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tRel:      &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"issuing_certificate_url\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tfor _, u := range cert.OCSPServer {\n\t\t\tif oamurl := support.RawURLToOAM(u); oamurl != nil {\n\t\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(oamurl); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tfindings = append(findings, &support.Finding{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tFrom:     asset,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tFromName: \"TLSCertificate: \" + t.SerialNumber,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tTo:       a,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tToName:   oamurl.Raw,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tRel:      &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"ocsp_server\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// process the relations built so far from the certificate\n\tsupport.ProcessAssetsWithSource(e, findings, te.source, te.name, te.name+\"-Handler\")\n\n\tif m.IsMatch(string(oam.ContactRecord)) {\n\t\tbase := \"x509 Certificate: \" + cert.SerialNumber.String() + \", \"\n\t\tcontacts := []*tlsContact{\n\t\t\t{&cert.Subject, \"subject_contact\", base + \"Subject\"},\n\t\t\t{&cert.Issuer, \"issuer_contact\", base + \"Issuer\"},\n\t\t}\n\t\tfor _, c := range contacts {\n\t\t\tte.storeContact(e, c, asset, te.source, m)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\ntype tlsContact struct {\n\tcontact      *pkix.Name\n\tRelationName string\n\tDiscoveredAt string\n}\n\nfunc (te *tlsexpand) storeContact(e *et.Event, c *tlsContact, asset *dbt.Entity, src *et.Source, m *config.Matches) {\n\tct := c.contact\n\n\tvar foundaddr bool\n\tif len(ct.Province) > 0 && len(ct.Country) > 0 {\n\t\tfoundaddr = true\n\t}\n\n\tvar foundorgs bool\n\tif len(ct.Organization) > 0 {\n\t\tfoundorgs = true\n\t}\n\t// only continue with the database operations if there's a contact record to create\n\tif !foundaddr && !foundorgs {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tcr, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(&contact.ContactRecord{DiscoveredAt: c.DiscoveredAt})\n\tif err != nil || cr == nil {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif foundaddr && m.IsMatch(string(oam.Location)) {\n\t\tvar addr string\n\t\tfields := [][]string{\n\t\t\tct.Organization,\n\t\t\tct.StreetAddress,\n\t\t\tct.Locality,\n\t\t\tct.Province,\n\t\t\tct.PostalCode,\n\t\t\tct.Country,\n\t\t}\n\t\tfor _, field := range fields {\n\t\t\tif len(field) > 0 && field[0] != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\taddr += \" \" + field[0]\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tif loc := support.StreetAddressToLocation(strings.TrimSpace(addr)); loc != nil {\n\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(loc); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tif edge, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateEdge(&dbt.Edge{\n\t\t\t\t\tRelation:   &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"location\"},\n\t\t\t\t\tFromEntity: cr,\n\t\t\t\t\tToEntity:   a,\n\t\t\t\t}); err == nil && edge != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\t_, _ = e.Session.Cache().CreateEdgeProperty(edge, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSource:     src.Name,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConfidence: src.Confidence,\n\t\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t_ = e.Dispatcher.DispatchEvent(&et.Event{\n\t\t\t\t\tName:    loc.Address,\n\t\t\t\t\tEntity:  a,\n\t\t\t\t\tSession: e.Session,\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif len(ct.OrganizationalUnit) > 0 && ct.OrganizationalUnit[0] != \"\" && m.IsMatch(string(oam.URL)) {\n\t\tif u := support.ExtractURLFromString(ct.OrganizationalUnit[0]); u != nil {\n\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(u); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tif edge, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateEdge(&dbt.Edge{\n\t\t\t\t\tRelation:   &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"url\"},\n\t\t\t\t\tFromEntity: cr,\n\t\t\t\t\tToEntity:   a,\n\t\t\t\t}); err == nil && edge != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\t_, _ = e.Session.Cache().CreateEdgeProperty(edge, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSource:     src.Name,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tConfidence: src.Confidence,\n\t\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tvar findings []*support.Finding\n\tt := asset.Asset.(*oamcert.TLSCertificate)\n\tfindings = append(findings, &support.Finding{\n\t\tFrom:     asset,\n\t\tFromName: \"TLSCertificate: \" + t.SerialNumber,\n\t\tTo:       cr,\n\t\tToName:   \"ContactRecord\" + c.DiscoveredAt,\n\t\tRel:      &general.SimpleRelation{Name: c.RelationName},\n\t})\n\t// process the relation immediately\n\tsupport.ProcessAssetsWithSource(e, findings, te.source, te.name, te.name+\"-Handler\")\n\n\t// the organization must come last due to a potential chicken-and-egg problem\n\tif m.IsMatch(string(oam.Organization)) && len(ct.Organization) > 0 && ct.Organization[0] != \"\" {\n\t\torgent, err := org.CreateOrgAsset(e.Session, cr,\n\t\t\t&general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"organization\"},\n\t\t\t&oamorg.Organization{Name: ct.Organization[0]}, src)\n\n\t\tif err == nil && orgent != nil {\n\t\t\to := orgent.Asset.(*oamorg.Organization)\n\n\t\t\t_ = e.Dispatcher.DispatchEvent(&et.Event{\n\t\t\t\tName:    fmt.Sprintf(\"%s:%s\", o.Name, o.ID),\n\t\t\t\tEntity:  orgent,\n\t\t\t\tSession: e.Session,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (te *tlsexpand) process(e *et.Event, findings []*support.Finding) {\n\tsupport.ProcessAssetsWithSource(e, findings, te.source, te.name, te.name+\"-Handler\")\n}\n"

                "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage enrich\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"net/netip\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/caffix/stringset\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/config\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\toamdns \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/dns\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n\toamnet \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/network\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/url\"\n)\n\ntype urlexpand struct {\n\tname       string\n\tlog        *slog.Logger\n\ttransforms []string\n\tsource     *et.Source\n}\n\nfunc NewURLs() et.Plugin {\n\treturn &urlexpand{\n\t\tname: \"URL-Expansion\",\n\t\ttransforms: []string{\n\t\t\tstring(oam.FQDN),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.IPAddress),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.Service),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.File),\n\t\t},\n\t\tsource: &et.Source{\n\t\t\tName:       \"URL-Expansion\",\n\t\t\tConfidence: 100,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (u *urlexpand) Name() string {\n\treturn u.name\n}\n\nfunc (u *urlexpand) Start(r et.Registry) error {\n\tu.log = r.Log().WithGroup(\"plugin\").With(\"name\", u.name)\n\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:     u,\n\t\tName:       u.name,\n\t\tTransforms: u.transforms,\n\t\tEventType:  oam.URL,\n\t\tCallback:   u.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tu.log.Info(\"Plugin started\")\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (u *urlexpand) Stop() {\n\tu.log.Info(\"Plugin stopped\")\n}\n\nfunc (u *urlexpand) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\toamu, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*url.URL)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the URL asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tmatches, err := e.Session.Config().CheckTransformations(string(oam.URL), append(u.transforms, u.name)...)\n\tif err != nil || matches.Len() == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar tstr string\n\tvar inscope bool\n\tif addr, err := netip.ParseAddr(oamu.Host); err == nil {\n\t\ttstr = string(oam.IPAddress)\n\t\tif _, conf := e.Session.Scope().IsAssetInScope(&oamnet.IPAddress{Address: addr}, 0); conf > 0 {\n\t\t\tinscope = true\n\t\t}\n\t} else {\n\t\ttstr = string(oam.FQDN)\n\t\tif _, conf := e.Session.Scope().IsAssetInScope(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: oamu.Host}, 0); conf > 0 {\n\t\t\tinscope = true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(), string(oam.URL), tstr, u.name)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tvar findings []*support.Finding\n\tif support.AssetMonitoredWithinTTL(e.Session, e.Entity, u.source, since) {\n\t\tif inscope {\n\t\t\tfindings = append(findings, u.lookup(e, e.Entity, matches)...)\n\t\t}\n\t} else {\n\t\tfindings = append(findings, u.store(e, tstr, e.Entity, matches)...)\n\t\tsupport.MarkAssetMonitored(e.Session, e.Entity, u.source)\n\t}\n\n\tif inscope && len(findings) > 0 {\n\t\tu.process(e, findings)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (u *urlexpand) lookup(e *et.Event, asset *dbt.Entity, m *config.Matches) []*support.Finding {\n\trtypes := stringset.New()\n\tdefer rtypes.Close()\n\n\tvar findings []*support.Finding\n\tsinces := make(map[string]time.Time)\n\tfor _, atype := range u.transforms {\n\t\tif !m.IsMatch(atype) {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(), string(oam.URL), atype, u.name)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tsinces[atype] = since\n\n\t\tswitch atype {\n\t\tcase string(oam.FQDN):\n\t\t\trtypes.Insert(\"domain\")\n\t\tcase string(oam.IPAddress):\n\t\t\trtypes.Insert(\"ip_address\")\n\t\tcase string(oam.Service):\n\t\t\trtypes.Insert(\"port\")\n\t\tcase string(oam.File):\n\t\t\trtypes.Insert(\"file\")\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif edges, err := e.Session.Cache().OutgoingEdges(asset, time.Time{}, rtypes.Slice()...); err == nil && len(edges) > 0 {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\ta, err := e.Session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.ToEntity.ID)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\ttotype := string(a.Asset.AssetType())\n\t\t\tif since, ok := sinces[totype]; !ok || (ok && a.LastSeen.Before(since)) {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\toamu := asset.Asset.(*url.URL)\n\t\t\tfindings = append(findings, &support.Finding{\n\t\t\t\tFrom:     asset,\n\t\t\t\tFromName: \"URL: \" + oamu.Raw,\n\t\t\t\tTo:       a,\n\t\t\t\tToName:   a.Asset.Key(),\n\t\t\t\tRel:      edge.Relation,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn findings\n}\n\nfunc (u *urlexpand) store(e *et.Event, tstr string, asset *dbt.Entity, m *config.Matches) []*support.Finding {\n\toamu := asset.Asset.(*url.URL)\n\tvar findings []*support.Finding\n\n\tif tstr == string(oam.FQDN) && m.IsMatch(string(oam.FQDN)) {\n\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: oamu.Host}); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\tfindings = append(findings, &support.Finding{\n\t\t\t\tFrom:     asset,\n\t\t\t\tFromName: \"URL: \" + oamu.Raw,\n\t\t\t\tTo:       a,\n\t\t\t\tToName:   oamu.Host,\n\t\t\t\tRel:      &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"domain\"},\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t} else if ip, err := netip.ParseAddr(oamu.Host); err == nil && m.IsMatch(string(oam.IPAddress)) {\n\t\tntype := \"IPv4\"\n\t\tif ip.Is6() {\n\t\t\tntype = \"IPv6\"\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(&oamnet.IPAddress{\n\t\t\tAddress: ip,\n\t\t\tType:    ntype,\n\t\t}); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\tfindings = append(findings, &support.Finding{\n\t\t\t\tFrom:     asset,\n\t\t\t\tFromName: \"URL: \" + oamu.Raw,\n\t\t\t\tTo:       a,\n\t\t\t\tToName:   ip.String(),\n\t\t\t\tRel:      &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"ip_address\"},\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn findings\n}\n\nfunc (u *urlexpand) process(e *et.Event, findings []*support.Finding) {\n\tsupport.ProcessAssetsWithSource(e, findings, u.source, u.name, u.name+\"-Handler\")\n}\n"
              }

All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage horizontals\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/sessions/scope\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/contact\"\n)\n\ntype horContact struct {\n\tname   string\n\tplugin *horizPlugin\n}\n\nfunc (h *horContact) Name() string {\n\treturn h.name\n}\n\nfunc (h *horContact) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\t_, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*contact.ContactRecord)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the ContactRecord asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tmatches, err := e.Session.Config().CheckTransformations(\n\t\tstring(oam.ContactRecord), string(oam.ContactRecord), h.plugin.name)\n\tif err != nil || matches.Len() == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tconf := matches.Confidence(h.plugin.name)\n\tif conf == -1 {\n\t\tconf = matches.Confidence(string(oam.ContactRecord))\n\t}\n\n\tif assocs := h.lookup(e, e.Entity, conf); len(assocs) > 0 {\n\t\tvar impacted []*dbt.Entity\n\n\t\tfor _, assoc := range assocs {\n\t\t\tif assoc.ScopeChange {\n\t\t\t\th.plugin.log.Info(assoc.Rationale)\n\t\t\t\timpacted = append(impacted, assoc.ImpactedAssets...)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif len(impacted) > 0 {\n\t\t\th.plugin.process(e, impacted)\n\t\t\th.plugin.addAssociatedRelationship(e, assocs)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (h *horContact) lookup(e *et.Event, entity *dbt.Entity, conf int) []*scope.Association {\n\tlabels := []string{\"organization\", \"location\", \"id\"}\n\n\tvar results []*scope.Association\n\tif edges, err := e.Session.Cache().OutgoingEdges(entity,\n\t\te.Session.Cache().StartTime(), labels...); err == nil && len(edges) > 0 {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\tentity, err := e.Session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.ToEntity.ID)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t// check if these asset discoveries could change the scope\n\t\t\tif assocs, err := e.Session.Scope().IsAssociated(e.Session.Cache(), &scope.Association{\n\t\t\t\tSubmission:  entity,\n\t\t\t\tConfidence:  conf,\n\t\t\t\tScopeChange: true,\n\t\t\t}); err == nil && len(assocs) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tresults = append(results, assocs...)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn results\n}\n"
