All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage org\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/contact\"\n\toamorg \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/org\"\n)\n\nfunc dedupChecks(session et.Session, obj *dbt.Entity, o *oamorg.Organization) *dbt.Entity {\n\tvar names []string\n\n\tfor _, name := range []string{o.Name, o.LegalName} {\n\t\tif name != \"\" {\n\t\t\tnames = append(names, name)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif len(names) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tswitch obj.Asset.(type) {\n\tcase *contact.ContactRecord:\n\t\tif org, found := nameExistsInContactRecord(session, obj, names); found {\n\t\t\treturn org\n\t\t}\n\t\tif org, err := existsAndSharesLocEntity(session, obj, o); err == nil {\n\t\t\treturn org\n\t\t}\n\t\tif org, err := existsAndSharesAncestorEntity(session, obj, o); err == nil {\n\t\t\treturn org\n\t\t}\n\t\tif org, err := existsAndHasAncestorInSession(session, o); err == nil {\n\t\t\treturn org\n\t\t}\n\tcase *oamorg.Organization:\n\t\tif org, found := nameRelatedToOrganization(session, obj, names); found {\n\t\t\treturn org\n\t\t}\n\t\tif org, err := existsAndSharesLocEntity(session, obj, o); err == nil {\n\t\t\treturn org\n\t\t}\n\t\tif org, err := existsAndSharesAncestorEntity(session, obj, o); err == nil {\n\t\t\treturn org\n\t\t}\n\t\tif org, err := existsAndHasAncestorInSession(session, o); err == nil {\n\t\t\treturn org\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc nameExistsInContactRecord(session et.Session, cr *dbt.Entity, names []string) (*dbt.Entity, bool) {\n\tif cr == nil {\n\t\treturn nil, false\n\t}\n\n\tif edges, err := session.Cache().OutgoingEdges(cr, time.Time{}, \"organization\"); ok {\n\t\t\t\t\tif _, _, found := NameMatch(session, a, names); found {\n\t\t\t\t\t\treturn a, true\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn nil, false\n}\n\nfunc nameRelatedToOrganization(session et.Session, orgent *dbt.Entity, names []string) (*dbt.Entity, bool) {\n\tif orgent == nil {\n\t\treturn nil, false\n\t}\n\n\tif edges, err := session.Cache().IncomingEdges(orgent, time.Time{}, \"subsidiary\"); ok {\n\t\t\t\t\tif _, _, found := NameMatch(session, a, names); found {\n\t\t\t\t\t\treturn a, true\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif edges, err := session.Cache().OutgoingEdges(orgent, time.Time{}, \"subsidiary\"); err == nil && len(edges) > 0 {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\tif a, err := session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.ToEntity.ID); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tif _, ok := a.Asset.(*oamorg.Organization); ok {\n\t\t\t\t\tif _, _, found := NameMatch(session, a, names); found {\n\t\t\t\t\t\treturn a, true\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn nil, false\n}\n\nfunc existsAndSharesLocEntity(session et.Session, obj *dbt.Entity, o *oamorg.Organization) (*dbt.Entity, error) {\n\tvar locs []*dbt.Entity\n\n\tif edges, err := session.Cache().OutgoingEdges(obj, time.Time{}, \"legal_address\", \"hq_address\", \"location\"); err == nil {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\tif a, err := session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.ToEntity.ID); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tif _, ok := a.Asset.(*contact.Location); ok {\n\t\t\t\t\tlocs = append(locs, a)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tvar orgents, crecords []*dbt.Entity\n\tfor _, loc := range locs {\n\t\tif edges, err := session.Cache().IncomingEdges(loc, time.Time{}, \"legal_address\", \"hq_address\", \"location\"); err == nil {\n\t\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\t\tif a, err := session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.FromEntity.ID); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tif _, ok := a.Asset.(*contact.ContactRecord); ok && a.ID != obj.ID {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcrecords = append(crecords, a)\n\t\t\t\t\t} else if _, ok := a.Asset.(*oamorg.Organization); ok && a.ID != obj.ID {\n\t\t\t\t\t\torgents = append(orgents, a)\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, cr := range crecords {\n\t\tif edges, err := session.Cache().OutgoingEdges(cr, time.Time{}, \"organization\"); err == nil {\n\t\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\t\tif a, err := session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.ToEntity.ID); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tif _, ok := a.Asset.(*oamorg.Organization); ok {\n\t\t\t\t\t\torgents = append(orgents, a)\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, orgent := range orgents {\n\t\tif _, _, found := NameMatch(session, orgent, []string{o.Name, o.LegalName}); found {\n\t\t\treturn orgent, nil\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil, errors.New(\"no matching org found\")\n}\n\nfunc existsAndSharesAncestorEntity(session et.Session, obj *dbt.Entity, o *oamorg.Organization) (*dbt.Entity, error) {\n\torgents, err := orgsWithSameNames(session, []string{o.Name, o.LegalName})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tassets := []*dbt.Entity{obj}\n\tancestors := make(map[string]struct{})\n\tancestors[obj.ID] = struct{}{}\n\tfor i := 0; i < 10 && len(assets) > 0; i++ {\n\t\tremaining := assets\n\t\tassets = []*dbt.Entity{}\n\n\t\tfor _, r := range remaining {\n\t\t\tif edges, err := session.Cache().IncomingEdges(r, time.Time{}); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\t\t\tif a, err := session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.FromEntity.ID); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif _, found := ancestors[a.ID]; !found {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tancestors[a.ID] = struct{}{}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tassets = append(assets, a)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tvisited := make(map[string]struct{})\n\tfor _, orgent := range orgents {\n\t\tassets = []*dbt.Entity{orgent}\n\n\t\tfor i := 0; i < 10 && len(assets) > 0; i++ {\n\t\t\tremaining := assets\n\t\t\tassets = []*dbt.Entity{}\n\n\t\t\tfor _, r := range remaining {\n\t\t\t\tif edges, err := session.Cache().IncomingEdges(r, time.Time{}); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tid := edge.FromEntity.ID\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif _, found := visited[id]; found {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\tvisited[id] = struct{}{}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif a, err := session.Cache().FindEntityById(id); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif _, found := ancestors[a.ID]; !found {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tassets = append(assets, a)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\treturn orgent, nil\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil, errors.New(\"no matching org found\")\n}\n\nfunc existsAndHasAncestorInSession(session et.Session, o *oamorg.Organization) (*dbt.Entity, error) {\n\torgents, err := orgsWithSameNames(session, []string{o.Name, o.LegalName})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvisited := make(map[string]struct{})\n\tfor _, orgent := range orgents {\n\t\tassets := []*dbt.Entity{orgent}\n\n\t\tfor i := 0;                     "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage org\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"net/url\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/internal/net/http\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/contact\"\n\t\"golang.org/x/time/rate\"\n)\n\nvar gleifLimit *rate.Limiter\n\nfunc init() {\n\tlimit := rate.Every(3 * time.Second)\n\n\tgleifLimit = rate.NewLimiter(limit, 1)\n}\n\n// GLEIFSearchFuzzyCompletions performs the fuzzy completion search for the given name.\nfunc GLEIFSearchFuzzyCompletions(name string) (*FuzzyCompletionsResponse, error) {\n\tu := \"https://api.gleif.org/api/v1/fuzzycompletions?field=entity.legalName&q=\" + url.QueryEscape(name)\n\n\t_ = gleifLimit.Wait(context.TODO())\n\tresp, err := http.RequestWebPage(context.TODO(), &http.Request{URL: u})\n\tif err != nil || resp.Body == \"\" {\n\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to obtain the LEI record for %s: %s\", name, err)\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"GLEIFSearchFuzzyCompletions: %s\", msg)\n\t}\n\n\tvar result FuzzyCompletionsResponse\n\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(resp.Body), &result); err != nil {\n\t\tmsg := fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to unmarshal the LEI record for %s: %s\", name, err)\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"GLEIFSearchFuzzyCompletions: %s\", msg)\n\t} else if len(result.Data) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"GLEIFSearchFuzzyCompletions: no results found\")\n\t}\n\n\treturn &result, nil\n}\n\n// GLEIFGetLEIRecord retrieves the LEI record for the given identifier.\nfunc GLEIFGetLEIRecord(id string) (*LEIRecord, error) {\n\tu := \"https://api.gleif.org/api/v1/lei-records/\" + id\n\n\t_ = gleifLimit.Wait(context.TODO())\n\tresp, err := http.RequestWebPage(context.TODO(), &http.Request{URL: u})\n\tif err != nil || resp.StatusCode != 200 || resp.Body == \"\" {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar result SingleResponse\n\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(resp.Body), &result); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t} else if result.Data.Type != \"lei-records\" || result.Data.ID != id {\n\t\treturn nil, errors.New(\"failed to find the LEI record\")\n\t}\n\treturn &result.Data, nil\n}\n\n// GLEIFGetDirectParentRecord retrieves the direct parent LEI record for the given identifier.\nfunc GLEIFGetDirectParentRecord(id string) (*LEIRecord, error) {\n\tu := \"https://api.gleif.org/api/v1/lei-records/\" + id + \"/direct-parent\"\n\n\t_ = gleifLimit.Wait(context.TODO())\n\tresp, err := http.RequestWebPage(context.TODO(), &http.Request{URL: u})\n\tif err != nil || resp.StatusCode != 200 || resp.Body == \"\" {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar result SingleResponse\n\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(resp.Body), &result); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t} else if result.Data.Type != \"lei-records\" {\n\t\treturn nil, errors.New(\"failed to find the LEI record\")\n\t}\n\treturn &result.Data, nil\n}\n\n// GLEIFGetDirectChildrenRecords retrieves the direct children LEI records for the given identifier.\nfunc GLEIFGetDirectChildrenRecords(id string) ([]*LEIRecord, error) {\n\tvar children []*LEIRecord\n\n\tlast := 1\n\tlink := \"https://api.gleif.org/api/v1/lei-records/\" + id + \"/direct-children\"\n\tfor i := 1; i <= last && link != \"\"; i++ {\n\t\t_ = gleifLimit.Wait(context.TODO())\n\n\t\tresp, err := http.RequestWebPage(context.TODO(), &http.Request{URL: link})\n\t\tif err != nil || resp.StatusCode != 200 || resp.Body == \"\" {\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar result MultipleResponse\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(resp.Body), &result); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tfor _, rec := range result.Data {\n\t\t\tchildren = append(children, &rec)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlink = result.Links.Next\n\t\tlast = result.Meta.Pagination.LastPage\n\t}\n\n\treturn children, nil\n}\n\n// LocMatch checks if the LEI record matches the location of the organization entity.\nfunc LocMatch(e *et.Event, orgent *dbt.Entity, rec *LEIRecord) bool {\n\tif rec == nil {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tlegal_addr := rec.Attributes.Entity.LegalAddress\n\thq_addr := rec.Attributes.Entity.HeadquartersAddress\n\tif edges, err := e.Session.Cache().OutgoingEdges(orgent,\n\t\ttime.Time{}, \"legal_address\", \"hq_address\", \"location\"); err == nil {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.ToEntity.ID); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tif loc, ok := a.Asset.(*contact.Location); ok {\n\t\t\t\t\tfor _, p := range append([]LEIAddress{legal_addr, hq_addr}, rec.Attributes.Entity.OtherAddresses...) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif loc.PostalCode == p.PostalCode {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tvar crs []*dbt.Entity\n\tif edges, err := e.Session.Cache().IncomingEdges(orgent, time.Time{}, \"organization\"); err == nil {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.FromEntity.ID); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tif _, ok := a.Asset.(*contact.ContactRecord); ok {\n\t\t\t\t\tcrs = append(crs, a)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, cr := range crs {\n\t\tif edges, err := e.Session.Cache().OutgoingEdges(cr, time.Time{}, \"location\"); err == nil {\n\t\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.ToEntity.ID); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tif loc, ok := a.Asset.(*contact.Location); ok {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfor _, p := range append([]LEIAddress{legal_addr, hq_addr}, rec.Attributes.Entity.OtherAddresses...) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif loc.PostalCode == p.PostalCode {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n"

                    "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage org\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"regexp\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/adrg/strutil\"\n\t\"github.com/adrg/strutil/metrics\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/org\"\n)\n\nvar acronyms []string = []string{\n\t\"Inc\",\n\t\"inc\",\n\t\"INC\",\n\t\"incorporated\",\n\t\"Incorporated\",\n\t\"INCORPORATED\",\n\t\"Co\",\n\t\"co\",\n\t\"CO\",\n\t\"LLC\",\n\t\"Llc\",\n\t\"llc\",\n\t\"LTD\",\n\t\"Ltd\",\n\t\"ltd\",\n\t\"PLC\",\n\t\"Plc\",\n\t\"plc\",\n\t\"SA\",\n\t\"sa\",\n\t`S\\.A\\.`,\n\t`s\\.a\\.`,\n\t\"AG\",\n\t\"ag\",\n\t\"GmbH\",\n\t\"gmbh\",\n\t\"AB\",\n\t\"Ab\",\n\t\"ab\",\n\t\"Oy\",\n\t\"OY\",\n\t\"oy\",\n\t\"ECI\",\n\t\"eci\",\n\t\"SARL\",\n\t`SA\\sRL`,\n\t\"sarl\",\n\t`sa\\srl`,\n\t`S\\.A\\.R\\.L`,\n\t`S\\.A\\.\\sR\\.L`,\n\t`s\\.a\\.r\\.l`,\n\t`s\\.a\\.\\sr\\.l`,\n}\n\n// ExtractBrandName extracts the brand name from a given organization name.\nfunc ExtractBrandName(name string) string {\n\tstart := `([a-zA-Z0-9]{1}[\\sa-zA-Z0-9.\\-']+)([,\\s]{1,3})`\n\texp := start + \"(\" + strings.Join(acronyms, \"|\") + `)?([.,\\s]{0,3})$`\n\tre := regexp.MustCompile(exp)\n\n\tmatches := re.FindStringSubmatch(name)\n\tif len(matches) < 5 {\n\t\treturn name\n\t}\n\treturn strings.TrimSpace(matches[1])\n}\n\n// NameMatch checks if the provided organization entity matches any of the given names.\nfunc NameMatch(session et.Session, orgent *dbt.Entity, names []string) ([]string, []string, bool) {\n\tvar found bool\n\tvar exact, partial []string\n\n\tif orgent == nil || len(names) == 0 {\n\t\treturn exact, partial, found\n\t}\n\n\to, ok := orgent.Asset.(*org.Organization)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn exact, partial, found\n\t}\n\n\tvar orgNames []string\n\tif o.Name != \"\" {\n\t\torgNames = append(orgNames, o.Name)\n\t}\n\tif o.LegalName != \"\" {\n\t\torgNames = append(orgNames, o.LegalName)\n\t}\n\n\tif edges, err := session.Cache().OutgoingEdges(orgent, time.Time{}, \"id\"); err == nil && len(edges) > 0 {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\tif a, err := session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.ToEntity.ID); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tif id, ok := a.Asset.(*general.Identifier); ok &&\n\t\t\t\t\t(id.Type == general.OrganizationName || id.Type == general.LegalName) {\n\t\t\t\t\torgNames = append(orgNames, id.ID)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tswg := metrics.NewSmithWatermanGotoh()\n\tswg.CaseSensitive = false\n\tswg.GapPenalty = -0.1\n\tswg.Substitution = metrics.MatchMismatch{\n\t\tMatch:    1,\n\t\tMismatch: -0.5,\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, orgname := range orgNames {\n\t\tvar remaining []string\n\n\t\tfor _, name := range names {\n\t\t\tif strings.EqualFold(orgname, name) {\n\t\t\t\tfound = true\n\t\t\t\texact = append(exact, name)\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tremaining = append(remaining, name)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tfor _, name := range remaining {\n\t\t\tif score := strutil.Similarity(orgname, name, swg); score >= 0.85 {\n\t\t\t\tfound = true\n\t\t\t\tpartial = append(partial, name)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn exact, partial, found\n}\n\nfunc orgsWithSameNames(session et.Session, names []string) ([]*dbt.Entity, error) {\n\tvar idents []*dbt.Entity\n\n\tfor _, n := range names {\n\t\tif n == \"\" {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tname := strings.ToLower(n)\n\n\t\t// check for known organization name identifiers\n\t\tif assets, err := session.Cache().FindEntitiesByContent(&general.Identifier{\n\t\t\tUniqueID: fmt.Sprintf(\"%s:%s\", general.OrganizationName, name),\n\t\t\tID:       name,\n\t\t\tType:     general.OrganizationName,\n\t\t}, time.Time{}); err == nil {\n\t\t\tfor _, a := range assets {\n\t\t\t\tif _, ok := a.Asset.(*general.Identifier); ok {\n\t\t\t\t\tidents = append(idents, a)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// check for known legal name identifiers\n\t\tif assets, err := session.Cache().FindEntitiesByContent(&general.Identifier{\n\t\t\tUniqueID: fmt.Sprintf(\"%s:%s\", general.LegalName, name),\n\t\t\tID:       name,\n\t\t\tType:     general.LegalName,\n\t\t}, time.Time{}); err == nil {\n\t\t\tfor _, a := range assets {\n\t\t\t\tif _, ok := a.Asset.(*general.Identifier); ok {\n\t\t\t\t\tidents = append(idents, a)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tvar orgents []*dbt.Entity\n\tfor _, ident := range idents {\n\t\tif edges, err := session.Cache().IncomingEdges(ident, time.Time{}, \"id\"); err == nil {\n\t\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\t\tif a, err := session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.FromEntity.ID); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tif _, ok := a.Asset.(*org.Organization); ok {\n\t\t\t\t\t\torgents = append(orgents, a)\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif len(orgents) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil, errors.New(\"no matching organizations were found\")\n\t}\n\treturn orgents, nil\n}\n"

                    "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage org\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"math\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/adrg/strutil\"\n\t\"github.com/adrg/strutil/metrics\"\n\t\"github.com/google/uuid\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n\toamorg \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/org\"\n)\n\nvar createOrgLock sync.Mutex\n\nfunc createOrgUnlock(delay bool) {\n\tif !delay {\n\t\tcreateOrgLock.Unlock()\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\t// If a delay is requested, wait before unlocking\n\tgo func(d bool) {\n\t\ttime.Sleep(2 * time.Second)\n\t\tcreateOrgLock.Unlock()\n\t}(delay)\n}\n\nfunc CreateOrgAsset(session et.Session, obj *dbt.Entity, rel oam.Relation, o *oamorg.Organization, src *et.Source) (*dbt.Entity, error) {\n\tcreateOrgLock.Lock()\n\tdefer createOrgUnlock(rel == nil)\n\n\tif o == nil || o.Name == \"\" {\n\t\treturn nil, errors.New(\"missing the organization name\")\n\t} else if src == nil {\n\t\treturn nil, errors.New(\"missing the source\")\n\t}\n\n\tvar orgent *dbt.Entity\n\tif obj != nil {\n\t\torgent = dedupChecks(session, obj, o)\n\t}\n\n\tif orgent == nil {\n\t\tname := strings.ToLower(o.Name)\n\t\tid := &general.Identifier{\n\t\t\tUniqueID: fmt.Sprintf(\"%s:%s\", general.OrganizationName, name),\n\t\t\tID:       name,\n\t\t\tType:     general.OrganizationName,\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif ident, err := session.Cache().CreateAsset(id); err == nil && ident != nil {\n\t\t\t_, _ = session.Cache().CreateEntityProperty(ident, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\t\t\tSource:     src.Name,\n\t\t\t\tConfidence: src.Confidence,\n\t\t\t})\n\n\t\t\to.ID = determineOrgID(name)\n\t\t\torgent, err = session.Cache().CreateAsset(o)\n\t\t\tif err != nil || orgent == nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, errors.New(\"failed to create the OAM Organization asset\")\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t_, _ = session.Cache().CreateEntityProperty(orgent, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\t\t\tSource:     src.Name,\n\t\t\t\tConfidence: src.Confidence,\n\t\t\t})\n\n\t\t\tif err := createRelation(session, orgent, &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"id\"}, ident, src); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif obj != nil && rel != nil && orgent != nil && obj.ID != orgent.ID {\n\t\tif err := createRelation(session, obj, rel, orgent, src); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn orgent, nil\n}\n\nfunc determineOrgID(name string) string {\n\tvar rec *LEIRecord\n\n\tif records, err := GLEIFSearchFuzzyCompletions(name); err == nil && records != nil && len(records.Data) > 0 {\n\t\tswg := metrics.NewSmithWatermanGotoh()\n\t\tswg.CaseSensitive = false\n\t\tswg.GapPenalty = -0.1\n\t\tswg.Substitution = metrics.MatchMismatch{\n\t\t\tMatch:    1,\n\t\t\tMismatch: -0.5,\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar conf int\n\t\tfor _, data := range records.Data {\n\t\t\tif data.Type != \"fuzzycompletions\" || data.Relationships.LEIRecords.Data.Type != \"lei-records\" {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tmatch := data.Attributes.Value\n\t\t\tlei := data.Relationships.LEIRecords.Data.ID\n\t\t\tif !strings.Contains(strings.ToLower(match), strings.ToLower(name)) {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tsim := strutil.Similarity(name, match, swg)\n\t\t\tscore := int(math.Round(sim * 30))\n\n\t\t\tif len(records.Data) == 1 {\n\t\t\t\tscore += 30\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif score > conf {\n\t\t\t\tif r, err := GLEIFGetLEIRecord(lei); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\t\trec = r\n\t\t\t\t\tconf = score\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif rec != nil {\n\t\tresult := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s:%s:\", rec.Attributes.Entity.LegalName.Name, rec.Attributes.Entity.Jurisdiction)\n\n\t\tif val := rec.Attributes.Entity.RegisteredAs; val != \"\" {\n\t\t\tresult += val\n\t\t} else if val := rec.Attributes.Entity.RegisteredAt.Other; val != \"\" {\n\t\t\tresult += val\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tresult += rec.ID\n\t\t}\n\n\t\treturn result\n\t}\n\t// If no LEI record is found, generate a UUID as the identifier.\n\t// This ensures that the organization has a unique identifier even without an LEI record\n\treturn uuid.New().String()\n}\n\nfunc createRelation(session et.Session, obj *dbt.Entity, rel oam.Relation, subject *dbt.Entity, src *et.Source) error {\n\tedge, err := session.Cache().CreateEdge(&dbt.Edge{\n\t\tRelation:   rel,\n\t\tFromEntity: obj,\n\t\tToEntity:   subject,\n\t})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t} else if edge == nil {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to create the edge\")\n\t}\n\n\t_, err = session.Cache().CreateEdgeProperty(edge, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\tSource:     src.Name,\n\t\tConfidence: src.Confidence,\n\t})\n\treturn err\n}\n"

Primary\n\t{\"94.130.180.225\", 1},  // DNS for Family Primary\n\t{\"78.47.64.161\", 1},    // DNS for Family Secondary\n\t{\"80.80.80.80\", 1},     // Freenom World Primary\n\t{\"80.80.81.81\", 1},     // Freenom World Secondary\n\t{\"84.200.69.80\", 1},    // DNS.WATCH Primary\n\t{\"84.200.70.40\", 1},    // DNS.WATCH Secondary\n\t{\"156.154.70.5\", 1},    // Neustar Primary\n\t{\"156.157.71.5\", 1},    // Neustar Secondary\n\t{\"81.218.119.11\", 1},   // GreenTeamDNS Primary\n\t{\"209.88.198.133\", 1},  // GreenTeamDNS Secondary\n\t{\"37.235.1.177\", 1},    // FreeDNS\n\t{\"38.132.106.139\", 1},  // CyberGhost\n}\n\nvar trusted *pool.Pool\nvar detector *wildcards.Detector\n\nfunc PerformQuery(name string, qtype uint16) ([]dns.RR, error) {\n\tfor num := 0; num < 10; num++ {\n\t\tmsg := utils.QueryMsg(name, qtype)\n\t\tif qtype == dns.TypePTR {\n\t\t\tmsg = utils.ReverseMsg(name)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif resp, err := dnsQuery(msg, trusted); err == nil && resp != nil {\n\t\t\tif wildcardDetected(resp, detector) {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, errors.New(\"wildcard detected\")\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif len(resp.Answer) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tif rr := utils.AnswersByType(resp, qtype); len(rr) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn rr, nil\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn nil, errors.New(\"no valid answers\")\n}\n\nfunc wildcardDetected(resp *dns.Msg, r *wildcards.Detector) bool {\n\tname := strings.ToLower(utils.RemoveLastDot(resp.Question[0].Name))\n\n\tif dom, err := publicsuffix.EffectiveTLDPlusOne(name); err == nil && dom != \"\" {\n\t\treturn r.WildcardDetected(context.TODO(), resp, dom)\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc dnsQuery(msg *dns.Msg, r *pool.Pool) (*dns.Msg, error) {\n\tif resp, err := r.Exchange(context.TODO(), msg); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t} else if resp.Rcode == dns.RcodeNameError {\n\t\treturn nil, errors.New(\"name does not exist\")\n\t} else if resp.Rcode == dns.RcodeSuccess {\n\t\tif len(resp.Answer) == 0 {\n\t\t\treturn nil, errors.New(\"no record of this type\")\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t}\n\treturn nil, errors.New(\"unexpected response\")\n}\n\nfunc trustedResolvers() *pool.Pool {\n\ttimeout := 2 * time.Second\n\tcpus := runtime.NumCPU()\n\t// wildcard detector\n\tserv := servers.NewNameserver(\"8.8.4.4\")\n\twconns := conn.New(cpus, selectors.NewSingle(timeout, serv))\n\tdetector = wildcards.NewDetector(serv, wconns, nil)\n\t// the server pool\n\tvar servs []types.Nameserver\n\tfor _, r := range baselineResolvers {\n\t\tservs = append(servs, servers.NewNameserver(r.address))\n\t}\n\tsel := selectors.NewRandom(timeout, servs...)\n\t//sel := selectors.NewAuthoritative(timeout, servers.NewNameserver)\n\tconns := conn.New(cpus, sel)\n\treturn pool.New(0, sel, conns, nil)\n}\n"

                "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage support\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"net\"\n\t\"net/netip\"\n\t\"regexp\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/caffix/stringset\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/config\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/sessions\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tamassnet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/internal/net\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/internal/net/dns\"\n\toamdns \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/dns\"\n\toamnet \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/network\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/url\"\n\txurls \"mvdan.cc/xurls/v2\"\n)\n\ntype SweepCallback func(d *et.Event, addr *oamnet.IPAddress, src *et.Source)\n\nconst MaxHandlerInstances int = 100\n\nvar done chan struct{}\nvar subre, urlre *regexp.Regexp\n\nfunc init() {\n\tdone = make(chan struct{})\n\ttrusted = trustedResolvers()\n\n\turlre = xurls.Relaxed()\n\tsubre = regexp.MustCompile(dns.AnySubdomainRegexString())\n}\n\nfunc ScrapeSubdomainNames(s string) []string {\n\tset := stringset.New()\n\tdefer set.Close()\n\n\tfor _, sub := range subre.FindAllString(s, -1) {\n\t\tif sub != \"\" {\n\t\t\tset.Insert(sub)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn set.Slice()\n}\n\nfunc ExtractURLFromString(s string) *url.URL {\n\tif u := urlre.FindString(s); u != \"\" {\n\t\tif !strings.HasPrefix(u, \"http\") && !strings.HasPrefix(u, \"https\") {\n\t\t\tu = \"http://\" + u\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn RawURLToOAM(u)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc ExtractURLsFromString(s string) []*url.URL {\n\tvar results []*url.URL\n\n\tmatches := urlre.FindAllString(s, -1)\n\tif matches == nil {\n\t\treturn results\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, match := range matches {\n\t\tif match != \"\" {\n\t\t\tif !strings.HasPrefix(match, \"http\") && !strings.HasPrefix(match, \"https\") {\n\t\t\t\tmatch = \"http://\" + match\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif u := RawURLToOAM(match); u != nil {\n\t\t\t\tresults = append(results, u)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn results\n}\n\nfunc Shutdown() {\n\tclose(done)\n}\n\nfunc TTLStartTime(c *config.Config, from, to, plugin string) (time.Time, error) {\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\n\tif matches, err := c.CheckTransformations(from, to, plugin); err == nil && matches != nil {\n\t\tif ttl := matches.TTL(plugin); ttl >= 0 {\n\t\t\treturn now.Add(time.Duration(-ttl) * time.Minute), nil\n\t\t}\n\t\tif ttl := matches.TTL(to); ttl >= 0 {\n\t\t\treturn now.Add(time.Duration(-ttl) * time.Minute), nil\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn time.Time{}, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to obtain the TTL for transformation %s->%s\", from, to)\n}\n\nfunc GetAPI(name string, e *et.Event) (string, error) {\n\t// TODO: Add support for multiple API keys\n\tdsc := e.Session.Config().GetDataSourceConfig(name)\n\tif dsc == nil || len(dsc.Creds) == 0 {\n\t\treturn \"\", errors.New(\"no API key found\")\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, cred := range dsc.Creds {\n\t\tif cred != nil && cred.Apikey != \"\" {\n\t\t\treturn cred.Apikey, nil\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn \"\", errors.New(\"no API key found\")\n}\n\nfunc IPNetblock(session et.Session, addrstr string) *sessions.CIDRangerEntry {\n\tip := net.ParseIP(addrstr)\n\tif ip == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tentries, err := session.CIDRanger().ContainingNetworks(ip)\n\tif err != nil || len(entries) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar bits int\n\tvar arentry *sessions.CIDRangerEntry\n\tfor _, entry := range entries {\n\t\te, ok := entry.(*sessions.CIDRangerEntry)\n\t\tif !ok {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tn := e.Net\n\t\tif ones, _ := n.Mask.Size(); ones > bits {\n\t\t\tbits = ones\n\t\t\tarentry = e\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn arentry\n}\n\nfunc AddNetblock(session et.Session, cidr string, asn int, src *et.Source) error {\n\t_, ipnet, err := net.ParseCIDR(cidr)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\treturn session.CIDRanger().Insert(&sessions.CIDRangerEntry{\n\t\tNet: ipnet,\n\t\tASN: asn,\n\t\tSrc: src,\n\t})\n}\n\nfunc IPAddressSweep(e *et.Event, addr *oamnet.IPAddress, src *et.Source, size int, callback SweepCallback) {\n\t// do not work on an IP address that was processed previously\n\t_, err := e.Session.Cache().FindEntitiesByContent(addr, e.Session.Cache().StartTime())\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tvar mask net.IPMask\n\taddrstr := addr.Address.String()\n\tip := net.ParseIP(addrstr)\n\tif amassnet.IsIPv4(ip) {\n\t\tmask = net.CIDRMask(18, 32)\n\t} else if amassnet.IsIPv6(ip) {\n\t\tmask = net.CIDRMask(64, 128)\n\t}\n\n\tcidr := &net.IPNet{\n\t\tIP:   ip.Mask(mask),\n\t\tMask: mask,\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, ip := range amassnet.CIDRSubset(cidr, addrstr, size) {\n\t\ta := oamnet.IPAddress{\n\t\t\tType:    \"IPv4\",\n\t\t\tAddress: netip.MustParseAddr(ip.String()),\n\t\t}\n\t\tif a.Address.Is6() {\n\t\t\ta.Type = \"IPv6\"\n\t\t}\n\t\tcallback(e, &a, src)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc IsCNAME(session et.Session, name *oamdns.FQDN) (*oamdns.FQDN, bool) {\n\tfqdns, err := session.Cache().FindEntitiesByContent(name, session.Cache().StartTime())\n\tif err != nil || len(fqdns) != 1 {\n\t\treturn nil, false\n\t}\n\tfqdn := fqdns[0]\n\n\tif edges, err := session.Cache().OutgoingEdges(fqdn, session.Cache().StartTime(), \"dns_record\"); err == nil && len(edges) > 0 {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\tif rec, ok := edge.Relation.(*oamdns.BasicDNSRelation); ok && rec.Header.RRType == 5 {\n\t\t\t\tif to, err := session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.ToEntity.ID); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tif cname, ok := to.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN); ok {\n\t\t\t\t\t\treturn cname, true\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn nil, false\n}\n\nfunc NameIPAddresses(session et.Session, name *oamdns.FQDN) []*oamnet.IPAddress {\n\tfqdns, err := session.Cache().FindEntitiesByContent(name, session.Cache().StartTime())\n\tif err != nil || len(fqdns) != 1 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\tfqdn := fqdns[0]\n\n\tvar results []*oamnet.IPAddress\n\tif edges, err := session.Cache().OutgoingEdges(fqdn, session.Cache().StartTime(), \"dns_record\"); err == nil && len(edges) > 0 {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\tif rec, ok := edge.Relation.(*oamdns.BasicDNSRelation); ok && (rec.Header.RRType == 1 || rec.Header.RRType == 28) {\n\t\t\t\tif to, err := session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.ToEntity.ID); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tif ip, ok := to.Asset.(*oamnet.IPAddress); ok {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tresults = append(results, ip)\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif len(results) > 0 {\n\t\treturn results\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc NameResolved(session et.Session, name *oamdns.FQDN) bool {\n\tif _, found := IsCNAME(session, name); found {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\tif ips := NameIPAddresses(session, name); len(ips) > 0 {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\ntype FQDNMeta struct {\n\tSLDInScope  bool\n\tRecordTypes map[int]bool\n}\n\nfunc AddSLDInScope(e *et.Event) {\n\tif e == nil {\n\t\treturn\n\t} else if _, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN); !ok {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif e.Meta == nil {\n\t\te.Meta = &FQDNMeta{\n\t\t\tSLDInScope: true,\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif fm, ok := e.Meta.(*FQDNMeta); ok {\n\t\tfm.SLDInScope = true\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc HasSLDInScope(e *et.Event) bool {\n\tif e == nil {\n\t\treturn false\n\t} else if _, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN); !ok {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tif e.Meta == nil {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tif fm, ok := e.Meta.(*FQDNMeta); ok {\n\t\treturn fm.SLDInScope\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc AddDNSRecordType(e *et.Event, rrtype int) {\n\tif e == nil {\n\t\treturn\n\t} else if _, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN); !ok {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif e.Meta == nil {\n\t\te.Meta = &FQDNMeta{\n\t\t\tRecordTypes: make(map[int]bool),\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif fm, ok := e.Meta.(*FQDNMeta); ok {\n\t\tif fm.RecordTypes == nil {\n\t\t\tfm.RecordTypes = make(map[int]bool)\n\t\t}\n\t\tfm.RecordTypes[rrtype] = true\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc HasDNSRecordType(e *et.Event, rrtype int) bool {\n\tif e == nil {\n\t\treturn false\n\t} else if _, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN); !ok {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tif e.Meta == nil {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tif fm, ok := e.Meta.(*FQDNMeta); ok && fm.RecordTypes != nil {\n\t\tif _, found := fm.RecordTypes[rrtype]; found {\n\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n"

All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage support\n\nimport (\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"testing\"\n)\n\nfunc TestFQDNFilterInsert(t *testing.T) {\n\tff := NewFQDNFilter()\n\tdefer ff.Close()\n\n\tfqdn := \"www.cs.utica.edu\"\n\tff.Insert(fqdn)\n\n\tcur := ff\n\tlabels := strings.Split(fqdn, \".\")\n\tfor i := len(labels) - 1; i >= 0; i-- {\n\t\tif _, found := cur[labels[i]]; !found {\n\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Passive DNS Filter Insert failed for label %s at index %d\", labels[i], i)\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t\tif i > 0 {\n\t\t\tcur = cur[labels[i]].(FQDNFilter)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestFQDNFilterPrune(t *testing.T) {\n\tff := NewFQDNFilter()\n\tdefer ff.Close()\n\n\tlimit := 50\n\tfor i := 0; i < limit; i++ {\n\t\tfqdn := \"www\" + strconv.Itoa(i) + \".cs.utica.edu\"\n\t\tff.Insert(fqdn)\n\t}\n\n\tvar found bool\n\tvar name string\n\tff.Prune(limit)\n\tfor _, fqdn := range ff.Slice() {\n\t\tif fqdn == \"www1.cs.utica.edu\" {\n\t\t\tname = fqdn\n\t\t\tfound = true\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif found {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"Passive DNS Filter Prune failed to remove the labels: %s\", name)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestFQDNFilterSlice(t *testing.T) {\n\tff := NewFQDNFilter()\n\tdefer ff.Close()\n\n\tfqdn := \"www.cs.utica.edu\"\n\tff.Insert(fqdn)\n\n\tif fqdn != ff.Slice()[0] {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"Passive DNS Filter Slice failed to produce the expected FQDN: %s\", fqdn)\n\t}\n}\n"

All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage bgptools\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"net\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/sessions\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tamassnet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/internal/net\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n\toamnet \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/network\"\n)\n\ntype autsys struct {\n\tsync.Mutex\n\tname   string\n\tplugin *bgpTools\n}\n\nfunc (r *autsys) Name() string {\n\treturn r.name\n}\n\nfunc (r *autsys) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\tnb, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamnet.Netblock)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the Netblock asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tipstr := nb.CIDR.Addr().String()\n\tif reserved, _ := amassnet.IsReservedAddress(ipstr); reserved {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(), string(oam.Netblock), string(oam.AutonomousSystem), r.plugin.name)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tas := r.lookup(e, e.Entity, since)\n\tif as == nil {\n\t\tas = r.query(e, e.Entity)\n\t}\n\n\tif as != nil {\n\t\tr.process(e, e.Entity, as)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *autsys) lookup(e *et.Event, nb *dbt.Entity, since time.Time) *dbt.Entity {\n\tedges, err := e.Session.Cache().IncomingEdges(nb, since, \"announces\")\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\tif tags, err := e.Session.Cache().GetEdgeTags(edge, since, r.plugin.source.Name); err == nil && len(tags) > 0 {\n\t\t\tfor _, tag := range tags {\n\t\t\t\tif _, ok := tag.Property.(*general.SourceProperty); ok {\n\t\t\t\t\tif as, err := e.Session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.FromEntity.ID); err == nil && as != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\t\treturn as\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *autsys) query(e *et.Event, nb *dbt.Entity) *dbt.Entity {\n\tcidr := nb.Asset.Key()\n\n\t_, ipnet, _ := net.ParseCIDR(cidr)\n\tif ipnet == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tfirst, _ := amassnet.FirstLast(ipnet)\n\tif first == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar asn int\n\tsrc := r.plugin.source\n\tif entries, err := e.Session.CIDRanger().ContainingNetworks(first); err == nil && len(entries) > 0 {\n\t\tfor _, entry := range entries {\n\t\t\tif arentry, ok := entry.(*sessions.CIDRangerEntry); ok {\n\t\t\t\tif strings.EqualFold(cidr, arentry.Net.String()) {\n\t\t\t\t\tasn = arentry.ASN\n\t\t\t\t\tsrc = arentry.Src\n\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif asn == 0 {\n\t\targ := nb.Asset.Key()\n\n\t\tif record, err := r.plugin.whois(arg); err == nil {\n\t\t\tasn = record.ASN\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\te.Session.Log().Error(\"failed to obtain a response from the WHOIS server\", \"err\",\n\t\t\t\terr.Error(), \"argument\", arg, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", r.plugin.name, \"handler\", r.name))\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif asn == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\treturn r.store(e, asn, nb, src)\n}\n\nfunc (r *autsys) store(e *et.Event, asn int, nb *dbt.Entity, src *et.Source) *dbt.Entity {\n\tas, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(&oamnet.AutonomousSystem{Number: asn})\n\tif err == nil && as != nil {\n\t\t_, _ = e.Session.Cache().CreateEntityProperty(as, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\t\tSource:     src.Name,\n\t\t\tConfidence: src.Confidence,\n\t\t})\n\n\t\tif edge, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateEdge(&dbt.Edge{\n\t\t\tRelation:   &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"announces\"},\n\t\t\tFromEntity: as,\n\t\t\tToEntity:   nb,\n\t\t}); err == nil && edge != nil {\n\t\t\t_, _ = e.Session.Cache().CreateEdgeProperty(edge, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\t\t\tSource:     r.plugin.source.Name,\n\t\t\t\tConfidence: r.plugin.source.Confidence,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn as\n}\n\nfunc (r *autsys) process(e *et.Event, nb, as *dbt.Entity) {\n\tasname := \"AS\" + as.Asset.Key()\n\n\t_ = e.Dispatcher.DispatchEvent(&et.Event{\n\t\tName:    asname,\n\t\tEntity:  as,\n\t\tSession: e.Session,\n\t})\n\n\te.Session.Log().Info(\"relationship discovered\", \"from\", asname, \"relation\", \"announces\",\n\t\t\"to\", nb.Asset.Key(), slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", r.plugin.name, \"handler\", r.name))\n}\n"

                    "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage bgptools\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"net\"\n\t\"net/netip\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/sessions\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tamassnet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/internal/net\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n\toamnet \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/network\"\n)\n\ntype netblock struct {\n\tname   string\n\tplugin *bgpTools\n}\n\nfunc (r *netblock) Name() string {\n\treturn r.name\n}\n\nfunc (r *netblock) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\tip, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamnet.IPAddress)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the IPAddress asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tipstr := ip.Address.String()\n\tif reserved, _ := amassnet.IsReservedAddress(ipstr); reserved {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\t// check if there's a netblock associated with this IP address\n\tif found, err := e.Session.CIDRanger().Contains(net.ParseIP(ipstr)); err == nil && found {\n\t\t// the rest of the work will be done further down the pipeline\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(), string(oam.IPAddress), string(oam.Netblock), r.plugin.name)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tnb, as := r.lookup(e, e.Entity, since)\n\tif nb == nil || as == nil {\n\t\tnb, as = r.query(e, e.Entity)\n\t}\n\n\tif nb != nil && as != nil {\n\t\tif asnent, ok := as.Asset.(*oamnet.AutonomousSystem); ok {\n\t\t\tif _, ipnet, err := net.ParseCIDR(nb.Asset.(*oamnet.Netblock).CIDR.String()); err == nil && ipnet != nil {\n\t\t\t\t_ = e.Session.CIDRanger().Insert(&sessions.CIDRangerEntry{\n\t\t\t\t\tNet: ipnet,\n\t\t\t\t\tASN: asnent.Number,\n\t\t\t\t\tSrc: r.plugin.source,\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tr.process(e, e.Entity, nb, as)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *netblock) lookup(e *et.Event, ip *dbt.Entity, since time.Time) (*dbt.Entity, *dbt.Entity) {\n\taddr, ok := ip.Asset.(*oamnet.IPAddress)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn nil, nil\n\t}\n\n\tedges, err := e.Session.Cache().IncomingEdges(ip, since, \"contains\")\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar size int\n\tvar nb *dbt.Entity\n\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\tentity, err := e.Session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.FromEntity.ID)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tif tmp, ok := entity.Asset.(*oamnet.Netblock); ok && tmp.CIDR.Contains(addr.Address) {\n\t\t\tif s := tmp.CIDR.Masked().Bits(); s > size {\n\t\t\t\tvar found bool\n\n\t\t\t\tif tags, err := e.Session.Cache().GetEdgeTags(edge, since, r.plugin.source.Name); err == nil && len(tags) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t\tfor _, tag := range tags {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif _, ok := tag.Property.(*general.SourceProperty); ok {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tfound = true\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tif found {\n\t\t\t\t\tsize = s\n\t\t\t\t\tnb = entity\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tvar found bool\n\tvar asent *dbt.Entity\n\tif nb != nil {\n\t\tedges, err := e.Session.Cache().IncomingEdges(nb, since, \"announces\")\n\t\tif err == nil && len(edges) > 0 {\n\t\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\t\tasent, err = e.Session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.FromEntity.ID)\n\n\t\t\t\tif err == nil && asent != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tfound = true\n\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif !found {\n\t\treturn nil, nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn nb, asent\n}\n\nfunc (r *netblock) query(e *et.Event, ent *dbt.Entity) (*dbt.Entity, *dbt.Entity) {\n\tip := ent.Asset.(*oamnet.IPAddress)\n\taddrstr := ip.Address.String()\n\n\trecord, err := r.plugin.whois(addrstr)\n\tif err != nil || record == nil {\n\t\te.Session.Log().Error(\"failed to obtain a response from the WHOIS server\", \"err\",\n\t\t\terr.Error(), \"argument\", addrstr, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", r.plugin.name, \"handler\", r.name))\n\t\treturn nil, nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn r.store(e, record.Prefix, ent, record.ASN)\n}\n\nfunc (r *netblock) store(e *et.Event, cidr netip.Prefix, ip *dbt.Entity, asn int) (*dbt.Entity, *dbt.Entity) {\n\tntype := \"IPv4\"\n\tif cidr.Addr().Is6() {\n\t\tntype = \"IPv6\"\n\t}\n\n\tnb, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(&oamnet.Netblock{\n\t\tCIDR: cidr,\n\t\tType: ntype,\n\t})\n\n\tif err != nil || nb == nil {\n\t\treturn nil, nil\n\t}\n\n\t_, _ = e.Session.Cache().CreateEntityProperty(nb, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\tSource:     r.plugin.source.Name,\n\t\tConfidence: r.plugin.source.Confidence,\n\t})\n\n\tedge, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateEdge(&dbt.Edge{\n\t\tRelation:   &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"contains\"},\n\t\tFromEntity: nb,\n\t\tToEntity:   ip,\n\t})\n\tif err != nil || edge == nil {\n\t\treturn nil, nil\n\t}\n\n\t_, _ = e.Session.Cache().CreateEdgeProperty(edge, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\tSource:     r.plugin.source.Name,\n\t\tConfidence: r.plugin.source.Confidence,\n\t})\n\n\tas, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(&oamnet.AutonomousSystem{Number: asn})\n\tif err != nil || as == nil {\n\t\treturn nil, nil\n\t}\n\n\t_, _ = e.Session.Cache().CreateEntityProperty(as, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\tSource:     r.plugin.source.Name,\n\t\tConfidence: r.plugin.source.Confidence,\n\t})\n\n\tedge, err = e.Session.Cache().CreateEdge(&dbt.Edge{\n\t\tRelation:   &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"announces\"},\n\t\tFromEntity: as,\n\t\tToEntity:   nb,\n\t})\n\tif err != nil || edge == nil {\n\t\treturn nil, nil\n\t}\n\n\t_, _ = e.Session.Cache().CreateEdgeProperty(edge, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\tSource:     r.plugin.source.Name,\n\t\tConfidence: r.plugin.source.Confidence,\n\t})\n\n\treturn nb, as\n}\n\nfunc (r *netblock) process(e *et.Event, ip, nb, as *dbt.Entity) {\n\t_ = e.Dispatcher.DispatchEvent(&et.Event{\n\t\tName:    nb.Asset.Key(),\n\t\tEntity:  nb,\n\t\tSession: e.Session,\n\t})\n\n\te.Session.Log().Info(\"relationship discovered\", \"from\", nb.Asset.Key(), \"relation\",\n\t\t\"contains\", \"to\", ip.Asset.Key(), slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", r.plugin.name, \"handler\", r.name))\n\n\tasname := \"AS\" + as.Asset.Key()\n\t_ = e.Dispatcher.DispatchEvent(&et.Event{\n\t\tName:    asname,\n\t\tEntity:  as,\n\t\tSession: e.Session,\n\t})\n\n\te.Session.Log().Info(\"relationship discovered\", \"from\", asname, \"relation\", \"announces\",\n\t\t\"to\", nb.Asset.Key(), slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", r.plugin.name, \"handler\", r.name))\n}\n"

                    "name": "plugin.go",
                    "path": "engine/plugins/whois/bgptools/plugin.go",
                    "type": "file",
                    "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage bgptools\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"net\"\n\t\"net/netip\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/miekg/dns\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tamassnet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/internal/net\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\t\"golang.org/x/time/rate\"\n)\n\ntype bgpTools struct {\n\tsync.Mutex\n\tname     string\n\taddr     string\n\tport     int\n\tlog      *slog.Logger\n\tautsys   *autsys\n\tnetblock *netblock\n\trlimit   *rate.Limiter\n\tsource   *et.Source\n}\n\nfunc NewBGPTools() et.Plugin {\n\tlimit := rate.Every(time.Second)\n\n\treturn &bgpTools{\n\t\tname:   \"BGP.Tools\",\n\t\tport:   43,\n\t\trlimit: rate.NewLimiter(limit, 1),\n\t\tsource: &et.Source{\n\t\t\tName:       \"BGP.Tools\",\n\t\t\tConfidence: 100,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (bt *bgpTools) Name() string {\n\treturn bt.name\n}\n\nfunc (bt *bgpTools) Start(r et.Registry) error {\n\tbt.log = r.Log().WithGroup(\"plugin\").With(\"name\", bt.name)\n\n\trr, err := support.PerformQuery(\"bgp.tools\", dns.TypeA)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to obtain the BGPTools IP address: %v\", err)\n\t} else if len(rr) == 0 {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to obtain the BGPTools IP address\")\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, record := range rr {\n\t\tif record.Header().Rrtype == dns.TypeA {\n\t\t\tbt.addr = strings.TrimSpace((record.(*dns.A)).A.String())\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif bt.addr == \"\" {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to obtain the BGPTools IP address\")\n\t}\n\n\tbt.netblock = &netblock{\n\t\tname:   bt.name + \"-IP-Handler\",\n\t\tplugin: bt,\n\t}\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:     bt,\n\t\tName:       bt.netblock.name,\n\t\tPriority:   1,\n\t\tTransforms: []string{string(oam.Netblock)},\n\t\tEventType:  oam.IPAddress,\n\t\tCallback:   bt.netblock.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tbt.autsys = &autsys{\n\t\tname:   bt.name + \"-Netblock-Handler\",\n\t\tplugin: bt,\n\t}\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:       bt,\n\t\tName:         bt.autsys.name,\n\t\tPriority:     1,\n\t\tMaxInstances: 10,\n\t\tTransforms:   []string{string(oam.AutonomousSystem)},\n\t\tEventType:    oam.Netblock,\n\t\tCallback:     bt.autsys.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tbt.log.Info(\"Plugin started\")\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (bt *bgpTools) Stop() {\n\tbt.log.Info(\"Plugin stopped\")\n}\n\ntype bgpToolsRecord struct {\n\tASN           int\n\tIP            netip.Addr\n\tPrefix        netip.Prefix\n\tCC            string\n\tRegistry      string\n\tAllocatedDate time.Time\n\tASName        string\n}\n\nfunc (bt *bgpTools) whois(ipstr string) (*bgpToolsRecord, error) {\n\taddr := net.JoinHostPort(bt.addr, strconv.Itoa(bt.port))\n\n\t_ = bt.rlimit.Wait(context.TODO())\n\tconn, err := amassnet.DialContext(context.TODO(), \"tcp\", addr)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to establish a connection with the WHOIS server: %v\", err)\n\t}\n\tdefer func() { _ = conn.Close() }()\n\n\tn, err := io.WriteString(conn, fmt.Sprintf(\"begin\\n%s\\nend\", ipstr))\n\tif err != nil || n == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to send the request to the WHOIS server: %v\", err)\n\t}\n\n\tdata, err := io.ReadAll(conn)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"error reading the response from the WHOIS server: %v\", err)\n\t}\n\n\trecord := strings.Split(string(data), \"|\")\n\t// Ensure the record contains the necessary details (AutonomousSystem and Netblock)\n\tif len(record) < 7 {\n\t\treturn nil, errors.New(\"received insufficient data from the WHOIS server\")\n\t}\n\n\tvar r bgpToolsRecord\n\tfor i, f := range record {\n\t\tfield := strings.TrimSpace(f)\n\n\t\tswitch i {\n\t\tcase 0:\n\t\t\tnum, err := strconv.Atoi(field)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tr.ASN = num\n\t\tcase 1:\n\t\t\tip, err := netip.ParseAddr(field)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tr.IP = ip\n\t\tcase 2:\n\t\t\tprefix, err := netip.ParsePrefix(field)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tr.Prefix = prefix\n\t\tcase 3:\n\t\t\tr.CC = field\n\t\tcase 4:\n\t\t\tr.Registry = field\n\t\tcase 5:\n\t\t\tt, err := time.Parse(\"2006-01-02\", field)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tr.AllocatedDate = t\n\t\tcase 6:\n\t\t\tr.ASName = field\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn &r, nil\n}\n"
                  }
                ]

                "name": "domain_record.go",
                "path": "engine/plugins/whois/domain_record.go",
                "type": "file",
                "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage whois\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\twhoisparser \"github.com/likexian/whois-parser\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/config\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support/org\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/cache\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/contact\"\n\toamdns \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/dns\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n\toamorg \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/org\"\n\toamreg \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/registration\"\n)\n\ntype domrec struct {\n\tname       string\n\tplugin     *whois\n\ttransforms []string\n}\n\nfunc (r *domrec) Name() string {\n\treturn r.name\n}\n\nfunc (r *domrec) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\t_, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamreg.DomainRecord)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the DomainRecord asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tmatches, err := e.Session.Config().CheckTransformations(\n\t\tstring(oam.DomainRecord), append(r.transforms, r.plugin.name)...)\n\tif err != nil || matches.Len() == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tsrc := r.plugin.source\n\tvar findings []*support.Finding\n\tif record, ok := e.Meta.(*whoisparser.WhoisInfo); ok && record != nil {\n\t\tr.store(e, record, e.Entity, matches)\n\t} else {\n\t\tfindings = append(findings, r.lookup(e, e.Entity, src, matches)...)\n\t}\n\n\tif len(findings) > 0 {\n\t\tr.process(e, findings, src)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *domrec) lookup(e *et.Event, asset *dbt.Entity, src *et.Source, m *config.Matches) []*support.Finding {\n\tvar rtypes []string\n\tvar findings []*support.Finding\n\tsinces := make(map[string]time.Time)\n\n\tfor _, atype := range r.transforms {\n\t\tif !m.IsMatch(atype) {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(), string(oam.DomainRecord), atype, r.plugin.name)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tsinces[atype] = since\n\n\t\tswitch atype {\n\t\tcase string(oam.FQDN):\n\t\t\trtypes = append(rtypes, \"name_server\", \"whois_server\")\n\t\tcase string(oam.ContactRecord):\n\t\t\trtypes = append(rtypes, \"registrant_contact\", \"admin_contact\", \"technical_contact\", \"billing_contact\")\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif edges, err := e.Session.Cache().OutgoingEdges(asset, e.Session.Cache().StartTime(), rtypes...); err == nil && len(edges) > 0 {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\ta, err := e.Session.Cache().FindEntityById(edge.ToEntity.ID)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\ttotype := string(a.Asset.AssetType())\n\n\t\t\tsince, ok := sinces[totype]\n\t\t\tif !ok || (ok && a.LastSeen.Before(since)) {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif !r.oneOfSources(e, a, src, since) {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tdr := asset.Asset.(*oamreg.DomainRecord)\n\t\t\tfindings = append(findings, &support.Finding{\n\t\t\t\tFrom:     asset,\n\t\t\t\tFromName: \"DomainRecord: \" + dr.Domain,\n\t\t\t\tTo:       a,\n\t\t\t\tToName:   a.Asset.Key(),\n\t\t\t\tRel:      edge.Relation,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn findings\n}\n\nfunc (r *domrec) oneOfSources(e *et.Event, asset *dbt.Entity, src *et.Source, since time.Time) bool {\n\tif tags, err := e.Session.Cache().GetEntityTags(asset, since, src.Name); err == nil && len(tags) > 0 {\n\t\tfor _, tag := range tags {\n\t\t\tif _, ok := tag.Property.(*general.SourceProperty); ok {\n\t\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc (r *domrec) store(e *et.Event, resp *whoisparser.WhoisInfo, asset *dbt.Entity, m *config.Matches) {\n\tvar findings []*support.Finding\n\tdr := asset.Asset.(*oamreg.DomainRecord)\n\n\tif !m.IsMatch(string(oam.FQDN)) {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, ns := range resp.Domain.NameServers {\n\t\tfor _, name := range support.ScrapeSubdomainNames(strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(ns))) {\n\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: name}); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tfindings = append(findings, &support.Finding{\n\t\t\t\t\tFrom:     asset,\n\t\t\t\t\tFromName: \"DomainRecord: \" + dr.Domain,\n\t\t\t\t\tTo:       a,\n\t\t\t\t\tToName:   name,\n\t\t\t\t\tRel:      &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"name_server\"},\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif name := dr.WhoisServer; name != \"\" && len(support.ScrapeSubdomainNames(name)) > 0 {\n\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: name}); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\tfindings = append(findings, &support.Finding{\n\t\t\t\tFrom:     asset,\n\t\t\t\tFromName: \"DomainRecord: \" + dr.Domain,\n\t\t\t\tTo:       a,\n\t\t\t\tToName:   name,\n\t\t\t\tRel:      &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"whois_server\"},\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// process the relations built above immediately\n\tsupport.ProcessAssetsWithSource(e, findings, r.plugin.source, r.plugin.name, r.name)\n\n\tif !m.IsMatch(string(oam.ContactRecord)) {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tbase := dr.WhoisServer + \", \" + dr.Domain + \", \"\n\tcontacts := []*domrecContact{\n\t\t{resp.Registrar, \"registrar_contact\", base + \"Registrar Contact Info\"},\n\t\t{resp.Registrant, \"registrant_contact\", base + \"Registrant Contact Info\"},\n\t\t{resp.Administrative, \"admin_contact\", base + \"Admin Contact Info\"},\n\t\t{resp.Technical, \"technical_contact\", base + \"Technical Contact Info\"},\n\t\t{resp.Billing, \"billing_contact\", base + \"Billing Contact Info\"},\n\t}\n\tfor _, c := range contacts {\n\t\tif c.WhoisContact != nil {\n\t\t\tr.storeContact(e, c, asset, m)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\ntype domrecContact struct {\n\tWhoisContact *whoisparser.Contact\n\tRelationName string\n\tDiscoveredAt string\n}\n\nfunc (r *domrec) storeContact(e *et.Event, c *domrecContact, dr *dbt.Entity, m *config.Matches) {\n\tcr, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(&contact.ContactRecord{DiscoveredAt: c.DiscoveredAt})\n\tif err != nil || cr == nil {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tvar found bool\n\twc := c.WhoisContact\n\t// test if the address begins in the organization field\n\taddr := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s %s %s %s %s %s\",\n\t\twc.Organization, wc.Street, wc.City, wc.Province, wc.PostalCode, wc.Country)\n\tif loc := support.StreetAddressToLocation(addr); loc != nil &&\n\t\tstrings.HasPrefix(loc.Building, strings.ToLower(wc.Organization)) {\n\t\tfound = true\n\t\taddr = fmt.Sprintf(\"%s %s %s %s %s\",\n\t\t\twc.Street, wc.City, wc.Province, wc.PostalCode, wc.Country)\n\t} else {\n\t\twc.Organization = wc.Name\n\t}\n\n\tif found {\n\t\tif p := support.FullNameToPerson(wc.Name); p != nil && m.IsMatch(string(oam.Person)) {\n\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(p); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tr.createSimpleEdge(e.Session.Cache(), &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"person\"}, cr, a)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif loc := support.StreetAddressToLocation(addr); loc != nil {\n\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(loc); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\tr.createSimpleEdge(e.Session.Cache(), &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"location\"}, cr, a)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif email := strings.ToLower(wc.Email); m.IsMatch(string(oam.Identifier)) && email != \"\" {\n\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(&general.Identifier{\n\t\t\tUniqueID: fmt.Sprintf(\"%s:%s\", general.EmailAddress, email),\n\t\t\tID:       email,\n\t\t\tType:     general.EmailAddress,\n\t\t}); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\tr.createSimpleEdge(e.Session.Cache(), &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"id\"}, cr, a)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif m.IsMatch(string(oam.Phone)) {\n\t\tif phone := support.PhoneToOAMPhone(wc.Phone, wc.PhoneExt, wc.Country); phone != nil {\n\t\t\tphone.Type = contact.PhoneTypeRegular\n\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(phone); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tr.createSimpleEdge(e.Session.Cache(), &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"phone\"}, cr, a)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tif fax := support.PhoneToOAMPhone(wc.Fax, wc.FaxExt, wc.Country); fax != nil {\n\t\t\tfax.Type = contact.PhoneTypeFax\n\t\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(fax); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\t\tr.createSimpleEdge(e.Session.Cache(), &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"phone\"}, cr, a)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif u := support.RawURLToOAM(wc.ReferralURL); u != nil && m.IsMatch(string(oam.URL)) {\n\t\tif a, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(u); err == nil && a != nil {\n\t\t\tr.createSimpleEdge(e.Session.Cache(), &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"url\"}, cr, a)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tvar findings []*support.Finding\n\trecord := dr.Asset.(*oamreg.DomainRecord)\n\tfindings = append(findings, &support.Finding{\n\t\tFrom:     dr,\n\t\tFromName: \"DomainRecord: \" + record.Domain,\n\t\tTo:       cr,\n\t\tToName:   \"ContactRecord\" + c.DiscoveredAt,\n\t\tRel:      &general.SimpleRelation{Name: c.RelationName},\n\t})\n\t// process the contact record relation immediately\n\tsupport.ProcessAssetsWithSource(e, findings, r.plugin.source, r.plugin.name, r.name)\n\n\t// the organization must come last due to a potential chicken-and-egg problem\n\tif m.IsMatch(string(oam.Organization)) {\n\t\torgent, err := org.CreateOrgAsset(e.Session, cr,\n\t\t\t&general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"organization\"},\n\t\t\t&oamorg.Organization{Name: wc.Organization}, r.plugin.source)\n\n\t\tif err == nil && orgent != nil {\n\t\t\to := orgent.Asset.(*oamorg.Organization)\n\n\t\t\t_ = e.Dispatcher.DispatchEvent(&et.Event{\n\t\t\t\tName:    fmt.Sprintf(\"%s:%s\", o.Name, o.ID),\n\t\t\t\tEntity:  orgent,\n\t\t\t\tSession: e.Session,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (r *domrec) process(e *et.Event, findings []*support.Finding, src *et.Source) {\n\tsupport.ProcessAssetsWithSource(e, findings, src, r.plugin.name, r.name)\n}\n\nfunc (r *domrec) createSimpleEdge(c *cache.Cache, rel oam.Relation, from, to *dbt.Entity) {\n\tif edge, err := c.CreateEdge(&dbt.Edge{\n\t\tRelation:   rel,\n\t\tFromEntity: from,\n\t\tToEntity:   to,\n\t}); err == nil && edge != nil {\n\t\t_, _ = c.CreateEdgeProperty(edge, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\t\tSource:     r.plugin.source.Name,\n\t\t\tConfidence: r.plugin.source.Confidence,\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n"

                "name": "fqdn_lookup.go",
                "path": "engine/plugins/whois/fqdn_lookup.go",
                "type": "file",
                "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage whois\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\twhoisclient \"github.com/likexian/whois\"\n\twhoisparser \"github.com/likexian/whois-parser\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/plugins/support\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\toamdns \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/dns\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n\toamreg \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/registration\"\n\t\"golang.org/x/net/publicsuffix\"\n)\n\ntype fqdnLookup struct {\n\tname   string\n\tplugin *whois\n}\n\nfunc (r *fqdnLookup) Name() string {\n\treturn r.name\n}\n\nfunc (r *fqdnLookup) check(e *et.Event) error {\n\tfqdn, ok := e.Entity.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to extract the FQDN asset\")\n\t}\n\n\tdomlt := strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(fqdn.Name))\n\tif dom, err := publicsuffix.EffectiveTLDPlusOne(domlt); err != nil || dom != domlt {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tsince, err := support.TTLStartTime(e.Session.Config(), string(oam.FQDN), string(oam.DomainRecord), r.name)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tvar asset *dbt.Entity\n\tsrc := r.plugin.source\n\tvar record *whoisparser.WhoisInfo\n\tif support.AssetMonitoredWithinTTL(e.Session, e.Entity, src, since) {\n\t\tasset = r.lookup(e, fqdn.Name, src, since)\n\t} else {\n\t\tasset, record = r.query(e, fqdn.Name, e.Entity, src)\n\t\tsupport.MarkAssetMonitored(e.Session, e.Entity, src)\n\t}\n\n\tif asset != nil {\n\t\tr.process(e, record, e.Entity, asset)\n\t\tr.waitForDomRecContacts(e, asset)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *fqdnLookup) lookup(e *et.Event, name string, src *et.Source, since time.Time) *dbt.Entity {\n\tif assets := support.SourceToAssetsWithinTTL(e.Session, name, string(oam.DomainRecord), src, since); len(assets) > 0 {\n\t\treturn assets[0]\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *fqdnLookup) query(e *et.Event, name string, asset *dbt.Entity, src *et.Source) (*dbt.Entity, *whoisparser.WhoisInfo) {\n\t_ = r.plugin.rlimit.Wait(context.TODO())\n\n\tresp, err := whoisclient.Whois(name)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn r.store(e, resp, asset, src)\n}\n\nfunc (r *fqdnLookup) store(e *et.Event, resp string, asset *dbt.Entity, src *et.Source) (*dbt.Entity, *whoisparser.WhoisInfo) {\n\tfqdn := asset.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\n\tinfo, err := whoisparser.Parse(resp)\n\tif err != nil || info.Domain.Domain != fqdn.Name {\n\t\treturn nil, nil\n\t}\n\n\tdr := &oamreg.DomainRecord{\n\t\tRaw:            resp,\n\t\tID:             info.Domain.ID,\n\t\tDomain:         info.Domain.Domain,\n\t\tPunycode:       info.Domain.Punycode,\n\t\tName:           info.Domain.Name,\n\t\tExtension:      info.Domain.Extension,\n\t\tWhoisServer:    info.Domain.WhoisServer,\n\t\tCreatedDate:    info.Domain.CreatedDate,\n\t\tUpdatedDate:    info.Domain.UpdatedDate,\n\t\tExpirationDate: info.Domain.ExpirationDate,\n\t\tDNSSEC:         info.Domain.DNSSec,\n\t}\n\n\tdr.Status = append(dr.Status, info.Domain.Status...)\n\tif tstr := support.TimeToJSONString(info.Domain.CreatedDateInTime); tstr != \"\" {\n\t\tdr.CreatedDate = tstr\n\t}\n\tif tstr := support.TimeToJSONString(info.Domain.UpdatedDateInTime); tstr != \"\" {\n\t\tdr.UpdatedDate = tstr\n\t}\n\tif tstr := support.TimeToJSONString(info.Domain.ExpirationDateInTime); tstr != \"\" {\n\t\tdr.ExpirationDate = tstr\n\t}\n\n\tautasset, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateAsset(dr)\n\tif err == nil && autasset != nil {\n\t\tif edge, err := e.Session.Cache().CreateEdge(&dbt.Edge{\n\t\t\tRelation:   &general.SimpleRelation{Name: \"registration\"},\n\t\t\tFromEntity: asset,\n\t\t\tToEntity:   autasset,\n\t\t}); err == nil && edge != nil {\n\t\t\t_, _ = e.Session.Cache().CreateEdgeProperty(edge, &general.SourceProperty{\n\t\t\t\tSource:     src.Name,\n\t\t\t\tConfidence: src.Confidence,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn autasset, &info\n}\n\nfunc (r *fqdnLookup) process(e *et.Event, record *whoisparser.WhoisInfo, fqdn, dr *dbt.Entity) {\n\td := dr.Asset.(*oamreg.DomainRecord)\n\n\tname := d.Domain + \" WHOIS domain record\"\n\t_ = e.Dispatcher.DispatchEvent((&et.Event{\n\t\tName:    name,\n\t\tMeta:    record,\n\t\tEntity:  dr,\n\t\tSession: e.Session,\n\t}))\n\n\tfname := fqdn.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN)\n\te.Session.Log().Info(\"relationship discovered\", \"from\", fname.Name, \"relation\",\n\t\t\"registration\", \"to\", name, slog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", r.plugin.name, \"handler\", r.name))\n}\n\nfunc (r *fqdnLookup) waitForDomRecContacts(e *et.Event, dr *dbt.Entity) {\n\tt := time.NewTimer(time.Minute)\n\tdefer t.Stop()\n\ttick := time.NewTicker(10 * time.Second)\n\tdefer t.Stop()\n\n\tfor range tick.C {\n\t\tselect {\n\t\tcase <-t.C:\n\t\t\t// stop after one minute of waiting\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t}\n\n\t\trtypes := []string{\"registrant_contact\", \"admin_contact\", \"technical_contact\", \"billing_contact\"}\n\t\tif edges, err := e.Session.Cache().OutgoingEdges(dr, e.Session.Cache().StartTime(), rtypes...); err == nil && len(edges) > 0 {\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n"
              },

                "name": "plugin.go",
                "path": "engine/plugins/whois/plugin.go",
                "type": "file",
                "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage whois\n\nimport (\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\t\"golang.org/x/time/rate\"\n)\n\ntype whois struct {\n\tname   string\n\tlog    *slog.Logger\n\trlimit *rate.Limiter\n\tfqdn   *fqdnLookup\n\tdomrec *domrec\n\tsource *et.Source\n}\n\nfunc NewWHOIS() et.Plugin {\n\tlimit := rate.Every(time.Second)\n\n\treturn &whois{\n\t\tname:   \"WHOIS\",\n\t\trlimit: rate.NewLimiter(limit, 1),\n\t\tsource: &et.Source{\n\t\t\tName:       \"WHOIS\",\n\t\t\tConfidence: 100,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (w *whois) Name() string {\n\treturn w.name\n}\n\nfunc (w *whois) Start(r et.Registry) error {\n\tw.log = r.Log().WithGroup(\"plugin\").With(\"name\", w.name)\n\n\tw.fqdn = &fqdnLookup{\n\t\tname:   w.name + \"-FQDN-Handler\",\n\t\tplugin: w,\n\t}\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:     w,\n\t\tName:       w.fqdn.name,\n\t\tPriority:   9,\n\t\tTransforms: []string{string(oam.DomainRecord)},\n\t\tEventType:  oam.FQDN,\n\t\tCallback:   w.fqdn.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tw.domrec = &domrec{\n\t\tname:   w.name + \"-Domain-Record-Handler\",\n\t\tplugin: w,\n\t\ttransforms: []string{\n\t\t\tstring(oam.FQDN),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.URL),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.ContactRecord),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.Person),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.Organization),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.Location),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.Identifier),\n\t\t\tstring(oam.Phone),\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tif err := r.RegisterHandler(&et.Handler{\n\t\tPlugin:     w,\n\t\tName:       w.domrec.name,\n\t\tTransforms: w.domrec.transforms,\n\t\tEventType:  oam.DomainRecord,\n\t\tCallback:   w.domrec.check,\n\t}); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tw.log.Info(\"Plugin started\")\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (w *whois) Stop() {\n\tw.log.Info(\"Plugin stopped\")\n}\n"
              }
            ]

            "name": "logger.go",
            "path": "engine/pubsub/logger.go",
            "type": "file",
            "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage pubsub\n\n// Logger provides functionality for logging and subscribing to logs.\ntype Logger struct {\n\tch chan *string // Channel used to communicate log messages.\n}\n\n// NewLogger initializes and returns a new instance of Logger.\nfunc NewLogger() *Logger {\n\treturn &Logger{\n\t\tch: make(chan *string, 100), // Initialize a buffered channel for log messages.\n\t}\n}\n\n// Publish sends a log message to the log channel.\n// It ensures that log writes are thread-safe using a mutex.\nfunc (l *Logger) Publish(msg string) {\n\tl.ch <- &msg\n}\n\n// Write allows the Logger to be used as a Writer and in structured logging.\nfunc (l *Logger) Write(p []byte) (n int, err error) {\n\tgo func() {\n\t\tl.Publish(string(p))\n\t}()\n\treturn len(p), nil\n}\n\n// Subscribe provides a read-only channel to receive log messages.\n// This allows external components to \"listen\" for new logs.\nfunc (l *Logger) Subscribe() <-chan *string {\n\treturn l.ch // Return the channel for external components to read from.\n}\n"
          }
        ]

            "name": "pipelines.go",
            "path": "engine/registry/pipelines.go",
            "type": "file",
            "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage registry\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\t\"github.com/caffix/pipeline\"\n\tmultierror \"github.com/hashicorp/go-multierror\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/config\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n)\n\nfunc (r *registry) BuildPipelines() error {\n\tr.Lock()\n\tdefer r.Unlock()\n\n\tfor k := range r.handlers {\n\t\tp, err := r.buildAssetPipeline(string(k))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t}\n\t\tr.pipelines[k] = p\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *registry) buildAssetPipeline(atype string) (*et.AssetPipeline, error) {\n\tvar stages []pipeline.Stage\n\n\tbufsize := 1\n\tfor priority := 1; priority <= 9; priority++ {\n\t\thandlers, found := r.handlers[atype][priority]\n\t\tif !found || len(handlers) == 0 {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tid := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s - Priority: %d\", atype, priority)\n\t\tif len(handlers) == 1 {\n\t\t\th := handlers[0]\n\n\t\t\tif max := h.MaxInstances; max > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tstages = append(stages, pipeline.FixedPool(id, handlerTask(h), max))\n\t\t\t\tif max > bufsize {\n\t\t\t\t\tbufsize = max\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tstages = append(stages, pipeline.FIFO(id, handlerTask(h)))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tvar tasks []pipeline.Task\n\n\t\t\tfor _, handler := range handlers {\n\t\t\t\tif h := handlerTask(handler); h != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\ttasks = append(tasks, h)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tstages = append(stages, pipeline.Parallel(id, tasks...))\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tap := &et.AssetPipeline{\n\t\tPipeline: pipeline.NewPipeline(stages...),\n\t\tQueue:    et.NewPipelineQueue(),\n\t}\n\n\tgo func(p *et.AssetPipeline) {\n\t\tif err := p.Pipeline.ExecuteBuffered(context.TODO(), p.Queue, makeSink(), bufsize); err != nil {\n\t\t\tr.logger.Error(fmt.Sprintf(\"Pipeline terminated: %v\", err), \"OAM type\", atype)\n\t\t}\n\t}(ap)\n\treturn ap, nil\n}\n\nfunc makeSink() pipeline.SinkFunc {\n\treturn pipeline.SinkFunc(func(ctx context.Context, data pipeline.Data) error {\n\t\tede, ok := data.(*et.EventDataElement)\n\t\tif !ok {\n\t\t\treturn errors.New(\"pipeline sink failed to extract the EventDataElement\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tede.Queue <- ede\n\t\treturn nil\n\t})\n}\n\nfunc handlerTask(h *et.Handler) pipeline.TaskFunc {\n\tif h == nil || h.Callback == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tr := h\n\treturn pipeline.TaskFunc(func(ctx context.Context, data pipeline.Data, tp pipeline.TaskParams) (pipeline.Data, error) {\n\t\tif data == nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"%s pipeline task received a nil data element\", h.Name)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tede, ok := data.(*et.EventDataElement)\n\t\tif !ok || ede == nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"%s pipeline task failed to extract the EventDataElement\", h.Name)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tselect {\n\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n\t\t\tede.Queue <- ede\n\t\t\treturn nil, nil\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\tif ede.Event.Session.Done() {\n\t\t\t\tede.Queue <- ede\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tpname := h.Plugin.Name()\n\t\tfrom := string(ede.Event.Entity.Asset.AssetType())\n\t\ttransformations := transformationsByType(ede.Event.Session.Config(), from)\n\t\tif len(transformations) > 0 && !allExcludesPlugin(transformations, pname) {\n\t\t\tpmatch := tosContainPlugin(transformations, pname)\n\n\t\t\tif !pmatch {\n\t\t\t\tif _, err := ede.Event.Session.Config().CheckTransformations(from, h.Transforms...); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tpmatch = true\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif pmatch {\n\t\t\t\tif err := r.Callback(ede.Event); err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tede.Error = multierror.Append(ede.Error, err)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn data, nil\n\t})\n}\n\nfunc transformationsByType(cfg *config.Config, from string) []*config.Transformation {\n\tvar transformations []*config.Transformation\n\n\tfor _, tf := range cfg.Transformations {\n\t\tif strings.EqualFold(tf.From, from) {\n\t\t\ttransformations = append(transformations, tf)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn transformations\n}\n\nfunc tosContainPlugin(transformations []*config.Transformation, pname string) bool {\n\tfor _, tf := range transformations {\n\t\tif strings.EqualFold(tf.To, pname) {\n\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc allExcludesPlugin(transformations []*config.Transformation, pname string) bool {\n\tvar all *config.Transformation\n\n\tfor _, tf := range transformations {\n\t\tif strings.EqualFold(tf.To, \"all\") {\n\t\t\tall = tf\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif all == nil {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, ex := range all.Exclude {\n\t\tif strings.EqualFold(ex, pname) {\n\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n"
          },

            "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage registry\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n)\n\ntype registry struct {\n\tsync.RWMutex\n\tlogger    *slog.Logger\n\thandlers  map[string]map[int][]*et.Handler\n\tpipelines map[string]*et.AssetPipeline\n}\n\n// Create a new instance of Registry.\nfunc NewRegistry(l *slog.Logger) et.Registry {\n\treturn &registry{\n\t\tlogger:    l,\n\t\thandlers:  make(map[string]map[int][]*et.Handler),\n\t\tpipelines: make(map[string]*et.AssetPipeline),\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (r *registry) Log() *slog.Logger {\n\treturn r.logger\n}\n\n// Register a Plugin Handler on the registry.\nfunc (r *registry) RegisterHandler(h *et.Handler) error {\n\tr.Lock()\n\tdefer r.Unlock()\n\n\t// is the entry currently empty?\n\tif _, found := r.handlers[string(h.EventType)]; !found {\n\t\tr.handlers[string(h.EventType)] = make(map[int][]*et.Handler)\n\t}\n\t// has this registration been made already?\n\tvar found bool\nloop:\n\tfor _, handlers := range r.handlers[string(h.EventType)] {\n\t\tfor _, handler := range handlers {\n\t\t\tif handler.Name == h.Name {\n\t\t\t\tfound = true\n\t\t\t\tbreak loop\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif found {\n\t\terr := fmt.Errorf(\"handler %s already registered for EventType %s\", h.Name, h.EventType)\n\t\tr.Log().Error(fmt.Sprintf(\"Failed to register a handler: %v\", err),\n\t\t\tslog.Group(\"plugin\", \"name\", h.Plugin.Name(), \"handler\", h.Name))\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tif h.Priority == 0 {\n\t\th.Priority = 5\n\t} else if h.Priority < 0 {\n\t\th.Priority = 1\n\t} else if h.Priority > 9 {\n\t\th.Priority = 9\n\t}\n\n\tet, p := string(h.EventType), h.Priority\n\tr.handlers[et][p] = append(r.handlers[et][p], h)\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *registry) GetPipeline(eventType oam.AssetType) (*et.AssetPipeline, error) {\n\tr.RLock()\n\tdefer r.RUnlock()\n\n\tif p, found := r.pipelines[string(eventType)]; found {\n\t\treturn p, nil\n\t}\n\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"no handlers registered for the EventType: %s\", eventType)\n}\n"
