            "name": "manager.go",
            "path": "engine/sessions/manager.go",
            "type": "file",
            "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage sessions\n\n/*\n * Amass Engine allow users to create multiple sessions.\n * Each session has its own configuration.\n * The session manager is responsible for managing all sessions,\n * it's a singleton object and it's thread-safe.\n */\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/google/uuid\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/config\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n)\n\ntype manager struct {\n\tsync.RWMutex\n\tlogger   *slog.Logger\n\tsessions map[uuid.UUID]et.Session\n}\n\n// NewManager: creates a new session storage.\nfunc NewManager(l *slog.Logger) et.SessionManager {\n\treturn &manager{\n\t\tlogger:   l,\n\t\tsessions: make(map[uuid.UUID]et.Session),\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (r *manager) NewSession(cfg *config.Config) (et.Session, error) {\n\ts, err := CreateSession(cfg)\n\tif err == nil {\n\t\terr = r.AddSession(s)\n\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\treturn s, nil\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn nil, err\n}\n\n// Add: adds a session to a session storage after checking the session config.\nfunc (r *manager) AddSession(s et.Session) error {\n\tif s == nil {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"the provided session is nil\")\n\t}\n\n\tr.Lock()\n\tif sess, ok := s.(*Session); ok {\n\t\tr.sessions[sess.id] = sess\n\t}\n\tr.Unlock()\n\n\t// TODO: Need to add the session config checks here (using the Registry)\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// CancelSession: cancels a session in a session storage.\nfunc (r *manager) CancelSession(id uuid.UUID) {\n\ts := r.GetSession(id)\n\tif s == nil {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\ts.Kill()\n\n\tt := time.NewTicker(500 * time.Millisecond)\n\tdefer t.Stop()\n\n\tfor range t.C {\n\t\tss := s.Stats()\n\t\tss.Lock()\n\t\ttotal := ss.WorkItemsTotal\n\t\tcompleted := ss.WorkItemsCompleted\n\t\tss.Unlock()\n\t\tif completed >= total {\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tr.Lock()\n\tdefer r.Unlock()\n\n\tif qdb := r.sessions[id].Queue(); qdb != nil {\n\t\tif err := qdb.Close(); err != nil {\n\t\t\ts.Log().Error(fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to close the queue for session %s: %v\", id, err))\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif c := r.sessions[id].Cache(); c != nil {\n\t\t_ = c.Close()\n\t}\n\tif s, ok := r.sessions[id].(*Session); ok {\n\t\ts.ranger = nil\n\t}\n\tif dir := r.sessions[id].TmpDir(); dir != \"\" {\n\t\t_ = os.RemoveAll(dir)\n\t}\n\tif db := s.DB(); db != nil {\n\t\tif err := db.Close(); err != nil {\n\t\t\ts.Log().Error(fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to close the database for session %s: %v\", id, err))\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tdelete(r.sessions, id)\n}\n\nfunc (r *manager) GetSessions() []et.Session {\n\tr.RLock()\n\tdefer r.RUnlock()\n\n\tsessions := make([]et.Session, 0, len(r.sessions))\n\tfor _, s := range r.sessions {\n\t\tsessions = append(sessions, s)\n\t}\n\n\treturn sessions\n}\n\n// GetSession: returns a session from a session storage.\nfunc (r *manager) GetSession(id uuid.UUID) et.Session {\n\tr.RLock()\n\tdefer r.RUnlock()\n\n\tif s, found := r.sessions[id]; found {\n\t\treturn s\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\n// Shutdown: cleans all sessions from a session storage and shutdown the session storage.\nfunc (r *manager) Shutdown() {\n\tvar list []uuid.UUID\n\n\tr.Lock()\n\tfor k := range r.sessions {\n\t\tlist = append(list, k)\n\t}\n\tr.Unlock()\n\n\tvar wg sync.WaitGroup\n\tfor _, id := range list {\n\t\twg.Add(1)\n\t\tgo func(id uuid.UUID, wg *sync.WaitGroup) {\n\t\t\tdefer wg.Done()\n\n\t\t\tr.CancelSession(id)\n\t\t}(id, &wg)\n\t}\n\twg.Wait()\n}\n"
          },

            "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage sessions\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"path/filepath\"\n\n\tqdb \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/sessions/queuedb\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n)\n\ntype sessionQueue struct {\n\tsession *Session\n\tdb      *qdb.QueueDB\n}\n\nfunc newSessionQueue(s *Session) (*sessionQueue, error) {\n\tdbfile := filepath.Join(s.TmpDir(), \"queue.db\")\n\n\tdb, err := qdb.NewQueueDB(dbfile)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn &sessionQueue{\n\t\tsession: s,\n\t\tdb:      db,\n\t}, nil\n}\n\nfunc (sq *sessionQueue) Close() error {\n\treturn sq.db.Close()\n}\n\nfunc (sq *sessionQueue) Has(e *dbt.Entity) bool {\n\tif e == nil || e.ID == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\treturn sq.db.Has(e.ID)\n}\n\nfunc (sq *sessionQueue) Append(e *dbt.Entity) error {\n\tif e == nil {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"entity is nil\")\n\t}\n\tif e.ID == \"\" {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"entity ID is empty\")\n\t}\n\tif e.Asset == nil {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"asset is nil\")\n\t}\n\n\tkey := e.Asset.AssetType()\n\tif key == \"\" {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"asset type is empty\")\n\t}\n\treturn sq.db.Append(key, e.ID)\n}\n\nfunc (sq *sessionQueue) Next(atype oam.AssetType, num int) ([]*dbt.Entity, error) {\n\tids, err := sq.db.Next(atype, num)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar results []*dbt.Entity\n\tfor _, id := range ids {\n\t\tif e, err := sq.session.Cache().FindEntityById(id); err == nil {\n\t\t\tresults = append(results, e)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif len(results) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil, errors.New(\"no entities found\")\n\t}\n\treturn results, nil\n}\n\nfunc (sq *sessionQueue) Processed(e *dbt.Entity) error {\n\tif e == nil || e.ID == \"\" {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"entity is nil or ID is empty\")\n\t}\n\treturn sq.db.Processed(e.ID)\n}\n\nfunc (sq *sessionQueue) Delete(e *dbt.Entity) error {\n\tif e == nil || e.ID == \"\" {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"entity is nil or ID is empty\")\n\t}\n\treturn sq.db.Delete(e.ID)\n}\n"

                "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage queuedb\n\nimport (\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/glebarez/sqlite\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\t\"gorm.io/gorm\"\n\t\"gorm.io/gorm/logger\"\n)\n\ntype QueueDB struct {\n\tdb *gorm.DB\n}\n\ntype Element struct {\n\tID        uint64    `gorm:\"primaryKey;column:id\"`\n\tCreatedAt time.Time `gorm:\"index:idx_created_at,sort:asc;column:created_at\"`\n\tUpdatedAt time.Time\n\tType      string `gorm:\"index:idx_etype;column:etype\"`\n\tEntityID  string `gorm:\"index:idx_entity_id,unique;column:entity_id\"`\n\tProcessed bool   `gorm:\"index:idx_processed;column:processed\"`\n}\n\nfunc NewQueueDB(dbPath string) (*QueueDB, error) {\n\tdbPath += \"?_pragma=busy_timeout(30000)&_pragma=journal_mode(WAL)\"\n\n\tdb, err := gorm.Open(sqlite.Open(dbPath), &gorm.Config{\n\t\tSkipDefaultTransaction: true,\n\t\tLogger:                 logger.Default.LogMode(logger.Silent),\n\t})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tsqlDB, err := db.DB()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tsqlDB.SetMaxOpenConns(1)\n\tsqlDB.SetMaxIdleConns(1)\n\tsqlDB.SetConnMaxLifetime(time.Hour)\n\tsqlDB.SetConnMaxIdleTime(10 * time.Minute)\n\n\terr = db.AutoMigrate(&Element{})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn &QueueDB{db: db}, nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *QueueDB) Close() error {\n\tif r.db != nil {\n\t\tsqlDB, err := r.db.DB()\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn sqlDB.Close()\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *QueueDB) Has(eid string) bool {\n\tvar count int64\n\n\terr := r.db.Model(&Element{}).Where(\"entity_id = ?\", eid).Count(&count).Error\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\treturn count > 0\n}\n\nfunc (r *QueueDB) Append(atype oam.AssetType, eid string) error {\n\treturn r.db.Create(&Element{\n\t\tType:      string(atype),\n\t\tEntityID:  eid,\n\t\tProcessed: false,\n\t}).Error\n}\n\nfunc (r *QueueDB) Next(atype oam.AssetType, num int) ([]string, error) {\n\tvar elements []Element\n\tkey := string(atype)\n\n\tr.db.Model(&Element{}).Where(\"etype = ? AND processed = ?\",\n\t\tkey, false).Order(\"created_at ASC\").Limit(num).Find(&elements)\n\n\tvar results []string\n\tfor _, element := range elements {\n\t\tresults = append(results, element.EntityID)\n\t}\n\treturn results, nil\n}\n\nfunc (r *QueueDB) Processed(eid string) error {\n\treturn r.db.Model(&Element{}).Where(\"entity_id = ?\", eid).Update(\"processed\", true).Error\n}\n\nfunc (r *QueueDB) Delete(eid string) error {\n\tvar element Element\n\n\terr := r.db.Model(&Element{}).Where(\"entity_id = ?\", eid).Find(&element).Error\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\treturn r.db.Delete(&element).Error\n}\n"
              },

                "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage queuedb\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"math/rand\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"path/filepath\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert\"\n)\n\nfunc makeTempDir() (string, error) {\n\tdir, err := os.MkdirTemp(\"\", fmt.Sprintf(\"test-%d\", rand.Intn(100)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn \"\", errors.New(\"failed to create the temp dir\")\n\t}\n\treturn dir, nil\n}\n\nfunc TestNewQueueDB(t *testing.T) {\n\tdir, err := makeTempDir()\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tdefer func() { _ = os.RemoveAll(dir) }()\n\n\tdbPath := filepath.Join(dir, \"test.sqlite\")\n\tqueueDB, err := NewQueueDB(dbPath)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, queueDB, \"QueueDB should not be nil\")\n\tdefer func() { _ = queueDB.Close() }()\n\n\tfound := queueDB.db.Migrator().HasTable(&Element{})\n\tassert.True(t, found, \"Element table should exist\")\n\tfound = queueDB.db.Migrator().HasIndex(&Element{}, \"idx_created_at\")\n\tassert.True(t, found, \"Index idx_created_at should exist\")\n\tfound = queueDB.db.Migrator().HasIndex(&Element{}, \"idx_etype\")\n\tassert.True(t, found, \"Index idx_etype should exist\")\n\tfound = queueDB.db.Migrator().HasIndex(&Element{}, \"idx_entity_id\")\n\tassert.True(t, found, \"Index idx_entity_id should exist\")\n\tfound = queueDB.db.Migrator().HasIndex(&Element{}, \"idx_processed\")\n\tassert.True(t, found, \"Index idx_processed should exist\")\n}\n\nfunc TestHas(t *testing.T) {\n\tdir, err := makeTempDir()\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tdefer func() { _ = os.RemoveAll(dir) }()\n\n\tdbPath := filepath.Join(dir, \"test.sqlite\")\n\tqueueDB, err := NewQueueDB(dbPath)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tdefer func() { _ = queueDB.Close() }()\n\n\teid := \"entity1\"\n\tassert.False(t, queueDB.Has(eid), \"The element should not be in the database\")\n\n\terr = queueDB.Append(oam.FQDN, eid)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.True(t, queueDB.Has(eid), \"The element should be in the database\")\n\n\terr = queueDB.Delete(eid)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.False(t, queueDB.Has(eid), \"The element should be deleted from the database\")\n}\n\nfunc TestAppend(t *testing.T) {\n\tdir, err := makeTempDir()\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tdefer func() { _ = os.RemoveAll(dir) }()\n\n\tdbPath := filepath.Join(dir, \"test.sqlite\")\n\tqueueDB, err := NewQueueDB(dbPath)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tdefer func() { _ = queueDB.Close() }()\n\n\teid := \"entity1\"\n\terr = queueDB.Append(oam.FQDN, eid)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tvar element Element\n\terr = queueDB.db.Where(\"entity_id = ?\", eid).First(&element).Error\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.Equal(t, eid, element.EntityID, \"The entity ID should match\")\n\tassert.Equal(t, string(oam.FQDN), element.Type, \"The asset type should match\")\n\tassert.False(t, element.Processed, \"The processed flag should be false\")\n}\n\nfunc TestNext(t *testing.T) {\n\tdir, err := makeTempDir()\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tdefer func() { _ = os.RemoveAll(dir) }()\n\n\tdbPath := filepath.Join(dir, \"test.sqlite\")\n\tqueueDB, err := NewQueueDB(dbPath)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tdefer func() { _ = queueDB.Close() }()\n\n\teid1 := \"entity1\"\n\teid2 := \"entity2\"\n\terr = queueDB.Append(oam.FQDN, eid1)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\terr = queueDB.Append(oam.FQDN, eid2)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tentities, err := queueDB.Next(oam.FQDN, 2)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.Len(t, entities, 2, \"Should return two entities\")\n\tassert.Equal(t, eid1, entities[0])\n\tassert.Equal(t, eid2, entities[1])\n}\n\nfunc TestNextWithProcessed(t *testing.T) {\n\tdir, err := makeTempDir()\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tdefer func() { _ = os.RemoveAll(dir) }()\n\n\tdbPath := filepath.Join(dir, \"test.sqlite\")\n\tqueueDB, err := NewQueueDB(dbPath)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tdefer func() { _ = queueDB.Close() }()\n\n\teid1 := \"entity1\"\n\teid2 := \"entity2\"\n\terr = queueDB.Append(oam.FQDN, eid1)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\terr = queueDB.Append(oam.FQDN, eid2)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\n\terr = queueDB.Processed(eid1)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tentities, err := queueDB.Next(oam.FQDN, 2)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.Len(t, entities, 1, \"Should return one entity\")\n\tassert.Equal(t, eid2, entities[0])\n}\n\nfunc TestNextWithMultipleTypes(t *testing.T) {\n\tdir, err := makeTempDir()\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tdefer func() { _ = os.RemoveAll(dir) }()\n\n\tdbPath := filepath.Join(dir, \"test.sqlite\")\n\tqueueDB, err := NewQueueDB(dbPath)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tdefer func() { _ = queueDB.Close() }()\n\n\teid1 := \"entity1\"\n\teid2 := \"entity2\"\n\teid3 := \"entity3\"\n\terr = queueDB.Append(oam.FQDN, eid1)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\terr = queueDB.Append(oam.IPAddress, eid2)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\terr = queueDB.Append(oam.FQDN, eid3)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tentitiesFQDN, err := queueDB.Next(oam.FQDN, 1)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.Len(t, entitiesFQDN, 1, \"Should return one entity for FQDN\")\n\tassert.Equal(t, eid1, entitiesFQDN[0])\n\n\tentitiesIPv4, err := queueDB.Next(oam.IPAddress, 1)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.Len(t, entitiesIPv4, 1, \"Should return one entity for IPv4\")\n\tassert.Equal(t, eid2, entitiesIPv4[0])\n\n\tentitiesFQDN2, err := queueDB.Next(oam.FQDN, 3)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.Len(t, entitiesFQDN2, 2, \"Should return two entities for FQDN\")\n\tassert.Equal(t, eid1, entitiesFQDN2[0])\n\tassert.Equal(t, eid3, entitiesFQDN2[1])\n\n\tentitiesIPv42, err := queueDB.Next(oam.IPAddress, 3)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.Len(t, entitiesIPv42, 1, \"Should return one entity for IPv4\")\n\tassert.Equal(t, eid2, entitiesIPv42[0])\n}\n\nfunc TestProcessed(t *testing.T) {\n\tdir, err := makeTempDir()\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tdefer func() { _ = os.RemoveAll(dir) }()\n\n\tdbPath := filepath.Join(dir, \"test.sqlite\")\n\tqueueDB, err := NewQueueDB(dbPath)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tdefer func() { _ = queueDB.Close() }()\n\n\teid := \"entity1\"\n\terr = queueDB.Append(oam.FQDN, eid)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\n\terr = queueDB.Processed(eid)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tvar element Element\n\terr = queueDB.db.Where(\"entity_id = ?\", eid).First(&element).Error\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.True(t, element.Processed, \"The processed flag should be true\")\n}\n\nfunc TestDelete(t *testing.T) {\n\tdir, err := makeTempDir()\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tdefer func() { _ = os.RemoveAll(dir) }()\n\n\tdbPath := filepath.Join(dir, \"test.sqlite\")\n\tqueueDB, err := NewQueueDB(dbPath)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tdefer func() { _ = queueDB.Close() }()\n\n\teid := \"entity1\"\n\terr = queueDB.Append(oam.FQDN, eid)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.True(t, queueDB.Has(eid), \"The element should be in the database\")\n\n\terr = queueDB.Delete(eid)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.False(t, queueDB.Has(eid), \"The element should be deleted from the database\")\n}\n"
              }
            ]

All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage sessions\n\nimport (\n\t\"net\"\n\t\"sync\"\n\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\t\"github.com/yl2chen/cidranger\"\n)\n\ntype CIDRangerEntry struct {\n\tNet *net.IPNet\n\tASN int\n\tSrc *et.Source\n}\n\nfunc (r *CIDRangerEntry) Network() net.IPNet {\n\treturn *r.Net\n}\n\nfunc (r *CIDRangerEntry) AutonomousSystem() int {\n\treturn r.ASN\n}\n\nfunc (r *CIDRangerEntry) Source() *et.Source {\n\treturn r.Src\n}\n\ntype amassRanger struct {\n\tsync.Mutex\n\tranger cidranger.Ranger\n}\n\nfunc (r *amassRanger) Insert(entry cidranger.RangerEntry) error {\n\tr.Lock()\n\tdefer r.Unlock()\n\n\treturn r.ranger.Insert(entry)\n}\n\nfunc (r *amassRanger) Remove(network net.IPNet) (cidranger.RangerEntry, error) {\n\tr.Lock()\n\tdefer r.Unlock()\n\n\treturn r.ranger.Remove(network)\n}\n\nfunc (r *amassRanger) Contains(ip net.IP) (bool, error) {\n\tr.Lock()\n\tdefer r.Unlock()\n\n\treturn r.ranger.Contains(ip)\n}\n\nfunc (r *amassRanger) ContainingNetworks(ip net.IP) ([]cidranger.RangerEntry, error) {\n\tr.Lock()\n\tdefer r.Unlock()\n\n\treturn r.ranger.ContainingNetworks(ip)\n}\n\nfunc (r *amassRanger) CoveredNetworks(network net.IPNet) ([]cidranger.RangerEntry, error) {\n\tr.Lock()\n\tdefer r.Unlock()\n\n\treturn r.ranger.CoveredNetworks(network)\n}\n\nfunc (r *amassRanger) Len() int {\n\tr.Lock()\n\tdefer r.Unlock()\n\n\treturn r.ranger.Len()\n}\n\nfunc NewAmassRanger() cidranger.Ranger {\n\treturn &amassRanger{ranger: cidranger.NewPCTrieRanger()}\n}\n"

          {
            "name": "scope",
            "path": "engine/sessions/scope",
            "type": "directory",
            "children": [
              {
                "name": "assoc.go",
                "path": "engine/sessions/scope/assoc.go",
                "type": "file",
                "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage scope\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"net/netip\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\t\"github.com/adrg/strutil\"\n\t\"github.com/adrg/strutil/metrics\"\n\t\"github.com/caffix/stringset\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/cache\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\toamcert \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/certificate\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/contact\"\n\toamdns \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/dns\"\n\toamnet \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/network\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/org\"\n\toamreg \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/registration\"\n\toamurl \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/url\"\n\t\"golang.org/x/net/publicsuffix\"\n)\n\ntype Association struct {\n\tSubmission     *dbt.Entity\n\tMatch          *dbt.Entity\n\tRationale      string\n\tConfidence     int\n\tScopeChange    bool\n\tImpactedAssets []*dbt.Entity\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) IsAssociated(c *cache.Cache, req *Association) ([]*Association, error) {\n\tif req == nil || req.Submission == nil || req.Submission.Asset == nil || req.Confidence < 0 || req.Confidence > 100 {\n\t\treturn nil, errors.New(\"invalid request\")\n\t}\n\tif atype := req.Submission.Asset.AssetType(); atype != oam.FQDN &&\n\t\tatype != oam.Identifier && atype != oam.Organization && atype != oam.Location {\n\t\treturn nil, errors.New(\"the request included a submission with an unsupported asset type\")\n\t}\n\n\t// related assets that provide association matching value\n\tassocs := s.AssetsWithAssociation(c, req.Submission)\n\t// are any of these assets in the current session scope?\n\tresults := s.checkRelatedAssetsforAssoc(c, req, assocs)\n\n\tif req.ScopeChange {\n\t\t// add all assets related to the asset found to be associated\n\t\tfor _, result := range results {\n\t\t\tvar impacted []*dbt.Entity\n\n\t\t\tfor _, im := range append(result.ImpactedAssets, result.Match) {\n\t\t\t\tif s.Add(im.Asset) {\n\t\t\t\t\timpacted = append(impacted, im)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t// review all previously seen assets that provide association for scope changes\n\t\t\tfor size := len(impacted); size > 0; {\n\t\t\t\tadded := s.reviewAndUpdate(c, req)\n\n\t\t\t\tsize = len(added)\n\t\t\t\timpacted = append(impacted, added...)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresult.ImpactedAssets = impacted\n\t\t\tif len(result.ImpactedAssets) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tresult.ScopeChange = true\n\t\t\t\ts.addScopeChangesToRationale(result)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif len(results) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil, errors.New(\"the submission is not associated with assets in the session scope\")\n\t}\n\treturn results, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) addScopeChangesToRationale(result *Association) {\n\tvar changes []string\n\n\tfor _, im := range result.ImpactedAssets {\n\t\tchanges = append(changes, fmt.Sprintf(\"[%s: %s]\", im.Asset.AssetType(), im.Asset.Key()))\n\t}\n\n\tresult.Rationale += \". The following assets were added to the session scope: \" + strings.Join(changes, \", \")\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) reviewAndUpdate(c *cache.Cache, req *Association) []*dbt.Entity {\n\tvar assocs []*dbt.Entity\n\n\tif drs, err := c.FindEntitiesByType(oam.DomainRecord, c.StartTime()); err == nil && len(drs) > 0 {\n\t\tassocs = append(assocs, drs...)\n\t}\n\tif iprecs, err := c.FindEntitiesByType(oam.IPNetRecord, c.StartTime()); err == nil && len(iprecs) > 0 {\n\t\tassocs = append(assocs, iprecs...)\n\t}\n\tif autnums, err := c.FindEntitiesByType(oam.AutnumRecord, c.StartTime()); err == nil && len(autnums) > 0 {\n\t\tassocs = append(assocs, autnums...)\n\t}\n\tif certs, err := c.FindEntitiesByType(oam.TLSCertificate, c.StartTime()); err == nil && len(certs) > 0 {\n\t\tassocs = append(assocs, certs...)\n\t}\n\n\tvar impacted []*dbt.Entity\n\tfor _, assoc := range s.checkRelatedAssetsforAssoc(c, req, assocs) {\n\t\tfor _, a := range append(assoc.ImpactedAssets, assoc.Match) {\n\t\t\tif s.Add(a.Asset) {\n\t\t\t\timpacted = append(impacted, a)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn impacted\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) checkRelatedAssetsforAssoc(c *cache.Cache, req *Association, assocs []*dbt.Entity) []*Association {\n\tvar results []*Association\n\n\tfor _, assoc := range assocs {\n\t\tvar best int\n\t\tvar msg string\n\n\t\tvar impacted []*dbt.Entity\n\t\tfor _, asset := range append(s.assetsRelatedToAssetWithAssoc(c, assoc), assoc) {\n\t\t\tif req.ScopeChange {\n\t\t\t\timpacted = append(impacted, asset)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif match, conf := s.IsAssetInScope(asset.Asset, req.Confidence); conf > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tif conf > best {\n\t\t\t\t\tbest = conf\n\n\t\t\t\t\taa := assoc.Asset\n\t\t\t\t\tsa := req.Submission.Asset\n\t\t\t\t\tmsg = fmt.Sprintf(\"[%s: %s] is related to an asset with associative value [%s: %s], \", sa.AssetType(), sa.Key(), aa.AssetType(), aa.Key())\n\t\t\t\t\tmsg += fmt.Sprintf(\"which has a related asset [%s: %s] that was determined associated with [%s: %s] at a confidence of %d out of 100\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tasset.Asset.AssetType(), asset.Asset.Key(), match.AssetType(), match.Key(), conf)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif best > 0 {\n\t\t\tresults = append(results, &Association{\n\t\t\t\tSubmission:     req.Submission,\n\t\t\t\tMatch:          assoc,\n\t\t\t\tRationale:      msg,\n\t\t\t\tConfidence:     best,\n\t\t\t\tImpactedAssets: impacted,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn results\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) assetsRelatedToAssetWithAssoc(c *cache.Cache, assoc *dbt.Entity) []*dbt.Entity {\n\tset := stringset.New(assoc.ID)\n\tdefer set.Close()\n\n\tvar results []*dbt.Entity\n\tfor findings := []*dbt.Entity{assoc}; len(findings) > 0; {\n\t\tassets := findings\n\t\tfindings = []*dbt.Entity{}\n\n\t\tfor _, a := range assets {\n\t\t\tvar found bool\n\n\t\t\tswitch v := a.Asset.(type) {\n\t\t\tcase *org.Organization:\n\t\t\t\tfound = true\n\t\t\t\tif cert, ok := assoc.Asset.(*oamcert.TLSCertificate); !ok || s.orgNameSimilarToCommon(v, cert) {\n\t\t\t\t\tresults = append(results, a)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcase *contact.Location:\n\t\t\t\tfound = true\n\t\t\t\tresults = append(results, a)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif !found {\n\t\t\t\tif f, err := s.awayFromAssetsWithAssociation(c, a); err == nil && len(f) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t\tfor _, finding := range f {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif !set.Has(finding.ID) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tset.Insert(finding.ID)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tfindings = append(findings, finding)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn results\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) AssetsWithAssociation(c *cache.Cache, asset *dbt.Entity) []*dbt.Entity {\n\tset := stringset.New(asset.ID)\n\tdefer set.Close()\n\n\tvar results []*dbt.Entity\n\tfor findings := []*dbt.Entity{asset}; len(findings) > 0; {\n\t\tassets := findings\n\t\tfindings = []*dbt.Entity{}\n\n\t\tfor _, a := range assets {\n\t\t\tvar found bool\n\n\t\t\tswitch a.Asset.(type) {\n\t\t\tcase *oamreg.DomainRecord:\n\t\t\t\tfound = true\n\t\t\t\tresults = append(results, a)\n\t\t\tcase *oamreg.IPNetRecord:\n\t\t\t\tfound = true\n\t\t\t\tresults = append(results, a)\n\t\t\tcase *oamreg.AutnumRecord:\n\t\t\t\tfound = true\n\t\t\t\tresults = append(results, a)\n\t\t\tcase *oamcert.TLSCertificate:\n\t\t\t\tfound = true\n\t\t\t\t// only certificates directly used by the services are considered\n\t\t\t\tif _, err := c.IncomingEdges(a, c.StartTime(), \"certificate\"); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tresults = append(results, a)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif !found {\n\t\t\t\tif f, err := s.towardsAssetsWithAssociation(c, a); err == nil && len(f) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t\tfor _, finding := range f {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif !set.Has(finding.ID) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tset.Insert(finding.ID)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tfindings = append(findings, finding)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn results\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) awayFromAssetsWithAssociation(c *cache.Cache, assoc *dbt.Entity) ([]*dbt.Entity, error) {\n\tvar results []*dbt.Entity\n\t// Determine relationship directions to follow on the graph\n\tvar out, in bool\n\tvar outRels, inRels []string\n\tswitch assoc.Asset.AssetType() {\n\tcase oam.FQDN:\n\t\tout = true\n\t\toutRels = append(outRels, \"port\")\n\tcase oam.IPAddress:\n\t\tout = true\n\t\toutRels = append(outRels, \"port\")\n\t\tin = true\n\t\tinRels = append(inRels, \"dns_record\")\n\tcase oam.Netblock:\n\t\tout = true\n\t\toutRels = append(outRels, \"contains\")\n\tcase oam.AutonomousSystem:\n\t\tout = true\n\t\toutRels = append(outRels, \"announces\")\n\tcase oam.DomainRecord:\n\t\tout = true\n\t\toutRels = append(outRels, \"registrant_contact\")\n\tcase oam.IPNetRecord:\n\t\tout = true\n\t\toutRels = append(outRels, \"registrant\")\n\t\tin = true\n\t\tinRels = append(inRels, \"registration\")\n\tcase oam.AutnumRecord:\n\t\tout = true\n\t\toutRels = append(outRels, \"registrant\")\n\t\tin = true\n\t\tinRels = append(inRels, \"registration\")\n\tcase oam.TLSCertificate:\n\t\tout = true\n\t\toutRels = append(outRels, \"subject_contact\")\n\tcase oam.ContactRecord:\n\t\tout = true\n\t\toutRels = append(outRels, \"organization\", \"location\")\n\t}\n\tif out {\n\t\tif edges, err := c.OutgoingEdges(assoc, c.StartTime(), outRels...); err == nil && len(edges) > 0 {\n\t\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\t\tif entity, err := c.FindEntityById(edge.ToEntity.ID); err == nil && entity != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tresults = append(results, entity)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif in {\n\t\tif edges, err := c.IncomingEdges(assoc, c.StartTime(), inRels...); err == nil && len(edges) > 0 {\n\t\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\t\tif entity, err := c.FindEntityById(edge.FromEntity.ID); err == nil && entity != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tresults = append(results, entity)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif len(results) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil, errors.New(\"zero assets were found in-scope one hop forward from the provided asset\")\n\t}\n\treturn results, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) towardsAssetsWithAssociation(c *cache.Cache, asset *dbt.Entity) ([]*dbt.Entity, error) {\n\tvar results []*dbt.Entity\n\t// Determine relationship directions to follow on the graph\n\tvar out, in bool\n\tvar outRels, inRels []string\n\tswitch asset.Asset.AssetType() {\n\tcase oam.FQDN:\n\t\tout = true\n\t\toutRels = append(outRels, \"registration\")\n\t\tin = true\n\t\tinRels = append(inRels, \"node\")\n\tcase oam.IPAddress:\n\t\tin = true\n\t\tinRels = append(inRels, \"contains\")\n\tcase oam.Netblock:\n\t\tout = true\n\t\toutRels = append(outRels, \"registration\")\n\tcase oam.AutonomousSystem:\n\t\tout = true\n\t\toutRels = append(outRels, \"registration\")\n\tcase oam.Organization:\n\t\tin = true\n\t\tinRels = append(inRels, \"organization\")\n\tcase oam.Location:\n\t\tin = true\n\t\tinRels = append(inRels, \"location\")\n\tcase oam.ContactRecord:\n\t\tin = true\n\t\tinRels = append(inRels, \"registrant\", \"registrant_contact\", \"subject_contact\")\n\tcase oam.Service:\n\t\tin = true\n\t\tinRels = append(inRels, \"port\")\n\t}\n\tif out {\n\t\tif edges, err := c.OutgoingEdges(asset, c.StartTime(), outRels...); err == nil && len(edges) > 0 {\n\t\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\t\tif entity, err := c.FindEntityById(edge.ToEntity.ID); err == nil && entity != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tresults = append(results, entity)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif in {\n\t\tif edges, err := c.IncomingEdges(asset, c.StartTime(), inRels...); err == nil && len(edges) > 0 {\n\t\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\t\tif entity, err := c.FindEntityById(edge.FromEntity.ID); err == nil && entity != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tresults = append(results, entity)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif len(results) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil, errors.New(\"zero assets were found in-scope one hop forward from the provided asset\")\n\t}\n\treturn results, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) IsAddressInScope(c *cache.Cache, ip *oamnet.IPAddress) bool {\n\tif _, conf := s.IsAssetInScope(ip, 0); conf > 0 {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\n\taddrs, err := c.FindEntitiesByContent(ip, c.StartTime())\n\tif err != nil || len(addrs) != 1 {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\taddr := addrs[0]\n\n\trtype := 1\n\tif ip.Type == \"IPv6\" {\n\t\trtype = 28\n\t}\n\n\tif edges, err := c.IncomingEdges(addr, c.StartTime(), \"dns_record\"); err == nil && len(edges) > 0 {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\tif rec, ok := edge.Relation.(*oamdns.BasicDNSRelation); ok && rec.Header.RRType == rtype {\n\t\t\t\tfrom, err := c.FindEntityById(edge.FromEntity.ID)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tif _, conf := s.IsAssetInScope(from.Asset, 0); conf > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) IsURLInScope(c *cache.Cache, u *oamurl.URL) bool {\n\tif ip, err := netip.ParseAddr(u.Host); err == nil {\n\t\tntype := \"IPv4\"\n\t\tif ip.Is6() {\n\t\t\tntype = \"IPv6\"\n\t\t}\n\n\t\treturn s.IsAddressInScope(c, &oamnet.IPAddress{\n\t\t\tAddress: ip,\n\t\t\tType:    ntype,\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\t_, conf := s.IsAssetInScope(u, 0)\n\treturn conf > 0\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) orgNameSimilarToCommon(o *org.Organization, cert *oamcert.TLSCertificate) bool {\n\tswg := metrics.NewSmithWatermanGotoh()\n\tswg.CaseSensitive = false\n\tswg.GapPenalty = -0.1\n\tswg.Substitution = metrics.MatchMismatch{\n\t\tMatch:    1,\n\t\tMismatch: -0.5,\n\t}\n\n\tdom, err := publicsuffix.EffectiveTLDPlusOne(cert.SubjectCommonName)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tlabels := strings.Split(dom, \".\")\n\tif len(labels) < 2 {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tcommon := labels[0]\n\tif sim := strutil.Similarity(o.Name, common, swg); sim >= 0.5 {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n"
              },
              {

                "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage scope\n\nimport (\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/dns\"\n\t\"golang.org/x/net/publicsuffix\"\n)\n\nfunc (s *Scope) AddFQDN(fqdn *dns.FQDN) bool {\n\tif fqdn.Name == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\t// only registered domain names can be added to the session scope\n\tif dom, err := publicsuffix.EffectiveTLDPlusOne(\n\t\tfqdn.Name); err != nil || !strings.EqualFold(fqdn.Name, dom) {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\ts.domLock.Lock()\n\tdefer s.domLock.Unlock()\n\n\tkey := strings.ToLower(fqdn.Name)\n\tif _, found := s.domains[key]; !found {\n\t\ts.domains[key] = fqdn\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) AddDomain(d string) bool {\n\treturn s.AddFQDN(&dns.FQDN{Name: strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(d))})\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) FQDNs() []*dns.FQDN {\n\ts.domLock.Lock()\n\tdefer s.domLock.Unlock()\n\n\tvar results []*dns.FQDN\n\tfor _, v := range s.domains {\n\t\tif fqdn, ok := v.(*dns.FQDN); ok {\n\t\t\tresults = append(results, fqdn)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn results\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) Domains() []string {\n\ts.domLock.Lock()\n\tdefer s.domLock.Unlock()\n\n\tvar results []string\n\tfor k := range s.domains {\n\t\tresults = append(results, k)\n\t}\n\treturn results\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) matchesDomain(fqdn *dns.FQDN) (oam.Asset, int) {\n\ts.domLock.Lock()\n\tdefer s.domLock.Unlock()\n\n\tname := strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(fqdn.Name))\n\tif name == \"\" {\n\t\treturn nil, 0\n\t}\n\n\tfor k, v := range s.domains {\n\t\tif strings.HasSuffix(name, k) {\n\t\t\talen := len(name)\n\t\t\tklen := len(k)\n\n\t\t\t// check for exact match first to guard against out of bound index\n\t\t\tif alen == klen || (alen > klen && name[alen-klen-1] == '.') {\n\t\t\t\treturn v, 100\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn nil, 0\n}\n"
              },

All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage scope\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"math\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\t\"github.com/adrg/strutil\"\n\t\"github.com/adrg/strutil/metrics\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/contact\"\n)\n\nfunc (s *Scope) AddLocation(loc *contact.Location) bool {\n\tkey := strings.ToLower(loc.Address)\n\tif s.isBadField(key) {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\ts.locLock.Lock()\n\tdefer s.locLock.Unlock()\n\n\tif _, found := s.locations[key]; !found {\n\t\ts.locations[key] = loc\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) Locations() []*contact.Location {\n\ts.locLock.Lock()\n\tdefer s.locLock.Unlock()\n\n\tvar results []*contact.Location\n\tfor _, v := range s.locations {\n\t\tif loc, ok := v.(*contact.Location); ok {\n\t\t\tresults = append(results, loc)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn results\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) matchesLocation(loc *contact.Location, conf int) (oam.Asset, int) {\n\tfor _, loc2 := range s.Locations() {\n\t\tif loc.BuildingNumber == \"\" || loc2.BuildingNumber == \"\" || loc.BuildingNumber != loc2.BuildingNumber {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlstr1 := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s %s %s %s %s\", loc.BuildingNumber,\n\t\t\tloc.StreetName, loc.City, loc.Province, loc.PostalCode)\n\t\tlstr2 := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s %s %s %s %s\", loc2.BuildingNumber,\n\t\t\tloc2.StreetName, loc2.City, loc2.Province, loc2.PostalCode)\n\n\t\tif strings.EqualFold(lstr1, lstr2) {\n\t\t\treturn loc2, 100\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswg := metrics.NewSmithWatermanGotoh()\n\t\tswg.CaseSensitive = false\n\t\tswg.GapPenalty = -0.1\n\t\tswg.Substitution = metrics.MatchMismatch{\n\t\t\tMatch:    1,\n\t\t\tMismatch: -0.5,\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif sim := strutil.Similarity(lstr1, lstr2, swg); sim >= float64(conf) {\n\t\t\treturn loc2, int(math.Round(sim))\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn nil, 0\n}\n"

                "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage scope\n\nimport (\n\t\"net/netip\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\toamnet \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/network\"\n)\n\nfunc (s *Scope) AddIPAddress(ip *oamnet.IPAddress) bool {\n\tif _, conf := s.addressInScope(ip); conf > 0 {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\ts.addrLock.Lock()\n\tdefer s.addrLock.Unlock()\n\n\tkey := ip.Address.String()\n\tif _, found := s.addresses[key]; !found {\n\t\ts.addresses[key] = ip\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) AddAddress(addr string) bool {\n\tip := &oamnet.IPAddress{Address: netip.MustParseAddr(strings.TrimSpace(addr)), Type: \"IPv4\"}\n\tif ip.Address.Is6() {\n\t\tip.Type = \"IPv6\"\n\t}\n\treturn s.AddIPAddress(ip)\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) IPAddresses() []*oamnet.IPAddress {\n\ts.addrLock.Lock()\n\tdefer s.addrLock.Unlock()\n\n\tvar results []*oamnet.IPAddress\n\tfor _, v := range s.addresses {\n\t\tif ip, ok := v.(*oamnet.IPAddress); ok {\n\t\t\tresults = append(results, ip)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn results\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) Addresses() []string {\n\ts.addrLock.Lock()\n\tdefer s.addrLock.Unlock()\n\n\tvar results []string\n\tfor k := range s.addresses {\n\t\tresults = append(results, k)\n\t}\n\treturn results\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) addressInScope(ip *oamnet.IPAddress) (oam.Asset, int) {\n\tfor _, nb := range s.Netblocks() {\n\t\tif nb.CIDR.Contains(ip.Address) {\n\t\t\treturn nb, 100\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tfor _, addr := range s.IPAddresses() {\n\t\tif addr.Type == ip.Type && addr.Address.Compare(ip.Address) == 0 {\n\t\t\treturn addr, 100\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn nil, 0\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) AddNetblock(nb *oamnet.Netblock) bool {\n\ts.netLock.Lock()\n\tdefer s.netLock.Unlock()\n\n\tkey := nb.CIDR.String()\n\tif _, found := s.networks[key]; !found {\n\t\ts.networks[key] = nb\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) AddCIDR(cidr string) bool {\n\tnb := &oamnet.Netblock{CIDR: netip.MustParsePrefix(strings.TrimSpace(cidr)), Type: \"IPv4\"}\n\tif nb.CIDR.Addr().Is6() {\n\t\tnb.Type = \"IPv6\"\n\t}\n\treturn s.AddNetblock(nb)\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) Netblocks() []*oamnet.Netblock {\n\ts.netLock.Lock()\n\tdefer s.netLock.Unlock()\n\n\tvar results []*oamnet.Netblock\n\tfor _, v := range s.networks {\n\t\tif nb, ok := v.(*oamnet.Netblock); ok {\n\t\t\tresults = append(results, nb)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn results\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) CIDRs() []string {\n\ts.netLock.Lock()\n\tdefer s.netLock.Unlock()\n\n\tvar results []string\n\tfor k := range s.networks {\n\t\tresults = append(results, k)\n\t}\n\treturn results\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) matchesNetblock(nb *oamnet.Netblock) (oam.Asset, int) {\n\ts.netLock.Lock()\n\tdefer s.netLock.Unlock()\n\n\tkey := nb.CIDR.String()\n\tif a, found := s.networks[key]; found {\n\t\treturn a, 100\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil, 0\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) AddAutonomousSystem(as *oamnet.AutonomousSystem) bool {\n\ts.asLock.Lock()\n\tdefer s.asLock.Unlock()\n\n\tkey := as.Number\n\tif _, found := s.autsystems[key]; !found {\n\t\ts.autsystems[key] = as\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) AddASN(asn int) bool {\n\treturn s.AddAutonomousSystem(&oamnet.AutonomousSystem{Number: asn})\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) AutonomousSystems() []*oamnet.AutonomousSystem {\n\ts.asLock.Lock()\n\tdefer s.asLock.Unlock()\n\n\tvar results []*oamnet.AutonomousSystem\n\tfor _, v := range s.autsystems {\n\t\tif as, ok := v.(*oamnet.AutonomousSystem); ok {\n\t\t\tresults = append(results, as)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn results\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) ASNs() []int {\n\ts.asLock.Lock()\n\tdefer s.asLock.Unlock()\n\n\tvar results []int\n\tfor k := range s.autsystems {\n\t\tresults = append(results, k)\n\t}\n\treturn results\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) matchesAutonomousSystem(as *oamnet.AutonomousSystem) (oam.Asset, int) {\n\ts.asLock.Lock()\n\tdefer s.asLock.Unlock()\n\n\tkey := as.Number\n\tif a, found := s.autsystems[key]; found {\n\t\treturn a, 100\n\t}\n\n\treturn nil, 0\n}\n"

                "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage scope\n\nimport (\n\t\"math\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\t\"github.com/adrg/strutil\"\n\t\"github.com/adrg/strutil/metrics\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/org\"\n)\n\nfunc (s *Scope) AddOrganization(o *org.Organization) bool {\n\tkey := strings.ToLower(o.Name)\n\tif s.isBadField(key) {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\ts.orgLock.Lock()\n\tdefer s.orgLock.Unlock()\n\n\tif _, found := s.orgs[key]; !found {\n\t\ts.orgs[key] = o\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) AddOrg(o string) bool {\n\treturn s.AddOrganization(&org.Organization{Name: o})\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) Organizations() []*org.Organization {\n\ts.orgLock.Lock()\n\tdefer s.orgLock.Unlock()\n\n\tvar results []*org.Organization\n\tfor _, v := range s.orgs {\n\t\tif o, ok := v.(*org.Organization); ok {\n\t\t\tresults = append(results, o)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn results\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) matchesOrg(o *org.Organization, conf int) (oam.Asset, int) {\n\tfor _, v := range s.Organizations() {\n\t\tif strings.EqualFold(o.Name, v.Name) {\n\t\t\treturn v, 100\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswg := metrics.NewSmithWatermanGotoh()\n\t\tswg.CaseSensitive = false\n\t\tswg.GapPenalty = -0.1\n\t\tswg.Substitution = metrics.MatchMismatch{\n\t\t\tMatch:    1,\n\t\t\tMismatch: -0.5,\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif sim := strutil.Similarity(o.Name, v.Name, swg); sim >= float64(conf) {\n\t\t\treturn v, int(math.Round(sim))\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn nil, 0\n}\n"

              {
                "name": "scope.go",
                "path": "engine/sessions/scope/scope.go",
                "type": "file",
                "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage scope\n\nimport (\n\t\"net/netip\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\toamcert \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/certificate\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/contact\"\n\toamdns \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/dns\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/general\"\n\toamnet \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/network\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/org\"\n\toamreg \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/registration\"\n\toamurl \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/url\"\n)\n\nfunc (s *Scope) Add(a oam.Asset) bool {\n\tvar newentry bool\n\n\tswitch v := a.(type) {\n\tcase *oamdns.FQDN:\n\t\tnewentry = s.AddFQDN(v)\n\tcase *general.Identifier:\n\t\tif domain, found := getEmailDomain(v); found {\n\t\t\tnewentry = s.AddFQDN(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: domain})\n\t\t}\n\tcase *oamnet.IPAddress:\n\t\tnewentry = s.AddIPAddress(v)\n\tcase *oamnet.Netblock:\n\t\tnewentry = s.AddNetblock(v)\n\tcase *oamnet.AutonomousSystem:\n\t\tnewentry = s.AddAutonomousSystem(v)\n\tcase *oamreg.DomainRecord:\n\t\tnewentry = s.AddDomain(v.Domain)\n\tcase *oamreg.IPNetRecord:\n\t\tnewentry = s.AddCIDR(v.CIDR.String())\n\tcase *oamreg.AutnumRecord:\n\t\tn1 := s.AddOrg(v.Name)\n\t\tn2 := s.AddASN(v.Number)\n\t\tnewentry = n1 || n2\n\tcase *oamcert.TLSCertificate:\n\t\tnewentry = s.AddDomain(v.SubjectCommonName)\n\tcase *oamurl.URL:\n\t\tif ip, err := netip.ParseAddr(v.Host); err == nil {\n\t\t\tnewentry = s.AddAddress(ip.String())\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tnewentry = s.AddDomain(v.Host)\n\t\t}\n\tcase *org.Organization:\n\t\tnewentry = s.AddOrganization(v)\n\tcase *contact.Location:\n\t\tnewentry = s.AddLocation(v)\n\t}\n\n\treturn newentry\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) IsAssetInScope(a oam.Asset, conf int) (oam.Asset, int) {\n\tvar accuracy int\n\tvar match oam.Asset\n\n\tswitch v := a.(type) {\n\tcase *oamdns.FQDN:\n\t\tmatch, accuracy = s.matchesDomain(v)\n\tcase *general.Identifier:\n\t\tif domain, found := getEmailDomain(v); found {\n\t\t\tmatch, accuracy = s.matchesDomain(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: domain})\n\t\t}\n\tcase *oamnet.IPAddress:\n\t\tmatch, accuracy = s.addressInScope(v)\n\tcase *oamnet.Netblock:\n\t\tmatch, accuracy = s.matchesNetblock(v)\n\tcase *oamnet.AutonomousSystem:\n\t\tmatch, accuracy = s.matchesAutonomousSystem(v)\n\tcase *oamreg.DomainRecord:\n\t\tmatch, accuracy = s.matchesDomain(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: v.Domain})\n\t\tif match == nil || accuracy == 0 {\n\t\t\tmatch, accuracy = s.matchesOrg(&org.Organization{Name: v.Name}, conf)\n\t\t}\n\tcase *oamreg.IPNetRecord:\n\t\tmatch, accuracy = s.matchesNetblock(&oamnet.Netblock{CIDR: v.CIDR, Type: v.Type})\n\tcase *oamreg.AutnumRecord:\n\t\tmatch, accuracy = s.matchesAutonomousSystem(&oamnet.AutonomousSystem{Number: v.Number})\n\t\tif match == nil || accuracy == 0 {\n\t\t\tmatch, accuracy = s.matchesOrg(&org.Organization{Name: v.Name}, conf)\n\t\t}\n\tcase *oamcert.TLSCertificate:\n\t\tmatch, accuracy = s.matchesDomain(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: v.SubjectCommonName})\n\tcase *oamurl.URL:\n\t\tmatch, accuracy = s.matchesDomain(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: v.Host})\n\tcase *org.Organization:\n\t\tmatch, accuracy = s.matchesOrg(v, conf)\n\tcase *contact.Location:\n\t\tmatch, accuracy = s.matchesLocation(v, conf)\n\t}\n\n\treturn match, accuracy\n}\n\nfunc (s *Scope) isBadField(field string) bool {\n\tbadstrs := []string{\"registration\", \"registry\", \"redact\", \"private\", \"privacy\", \"available\", \"domain\", \"proxy\", \"liability\"}\n\n\tfor _, bad := range badstrs {\n\t\tif strings.Contains(field, bad) {\n\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc getEmailDomain(email *general.Identifier) (string, bool) {\n\tif email == nil || email.Type != general.EmailAddress {\n\t\treturn \"\", false\n\t}\n\n\tparts := strings.Split(email.ID, \"@\")\n\n\tif len(parts) != 2 {\n\t\treturn \"\", false\n\t}\n\n\treturn parts[1], true\n}\n"
              },
              {

All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage scope\n\nimport (\n\t\"sync\"\n\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/config\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n)\n\ntype Scope struct {\n\torgLock sync.Mutex\n\torgs    map[string]oam.Asset\n\n\tdomLock sync.Mutex\n\tdomains map[string]oam.Asset\n\n\taddrLock  sync.Mutex\n\taddresses map[string]oam.Asset\n\n\tnetLock  sync.Mutex\n\tnetworks map[string]oam.Asset\n\n\tasLock     sync.Mutex\n\tautsystems map[int]oam.Asset\n\n\tlocLock   sync.Mutex\n\tlocations map[string]oam.Asset\n\n\t//finLock      sync.Mutex\n\tfingerprints map[string]map[string]*Fingerprint\n}\n\nfunc New() *Scope {\n\treturn &Scope{\n\t\torgs:         make(map[string]oam.Asset),\n\t\tdomains:      make(map[string]oam.Asset),\n\t\taddresses:    make(map[string]oam.Asset),\n\t\tnetworks:     make(map[string]oam.Asset),\n\t\tautsystems:   make(map[int]oam.Asset),\n\t\tlocations:    make(map[string]oam.Asset),\n\t\tfingerprints: make(map[string]map[string]*Fingerprint),\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc CreateFromConfigScope(config *config.Config) *Scope {\n\tscope := New()\n\n\tfor _, d := range config.Domains() {\n\t\tscope.AddDomain(d)\n\t}\n\tfor _, addr := range config.Scope.Addresses {\n\t\tscope.AddAddress(addr.String())\n\t}\n\tfor _, cidr := range config.Scope.CIDRs {\n\t\tscope.AddCIDR(cidr.String())\n\t}\n\tfor _, asn := range config.Scope.ASNs {\n\t\tscope.AddASN(asn)\n\t}\n\treturn scope\n}\n"
              }

All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage sessions\n\nimport (\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"path/filepath\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/google/uuid\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/config\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/pubsub\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/sessions/scope\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\tassetdb \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/cache\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/repository\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/repository/neo4j\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/repository/sqlrepo\"\n\t\"github.com/yl2chen/cidranger\"\n)\n\ntype Session struct {\n\tid       uuid.UUID\n\tlog      *slog.Logger\n\tps       *pubsub.Logger\n\tcfg      *config.Config\n\tscope    *scope.Scope\n\tdb       repository.Repository\n\tqueue    *sessionQueue\n\tdsn      string\n\tdbtype   string\n\tcache    *cache.Cache\n\tranger   cidranger.Ranger\n\ttmpdir   string\n\tstats    *et.SessionStats\n\tdone     chan struct{}\n\tfinished bool\n}\n\n// CreateSession initializes a new Session object based on the provided configuration.\n// The session object represents the state of an active engine enumeration.\nfunc CreateSession(cfg *config.Config) (et.Session, error) {\n\t// Use default configuration if none is provided\n\tif cfg == nil {\n\t\tcfg = config.NewConfig()\n\t}\n\t// Create a new session object\n\ts := &Session{\n\t\tid:     uuid.New(),\n\t\tcfg:    cfg,\n\t\tscope:  scope.CreateFromConfigScope(cfg),\n\t\tranger: NewAmassRanger(),\n\t\tps:     pubsub.NewLogger(),\n\t\tstats:  new(et.SessionStats),\n\t\tdone:   make(chan struct{}),\n\t}\n\ts.log = slog.New(slog.NewJSONHandler(s.ps, nil)).With(\"session\", s.id)\n\n\terr := s.setupDB()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\ts.tmpdir, err = s.createTemporaryDir()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tc, err := s.createFileCacheRepo()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\ts.cache, err = cache.New(c, s.db, time.Minute)\n\tif err != nil || s.cache == nil {\n\t\treturn nil, errors.New(\"failed to create the session cache\")\n\t}\n\n\ts.queue, err = newSessionQueue(s)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\ts.log.Info(\"Session initialized\")\n\ts.log.Info(\"Temporary directory created\", slog.String(\"dir\", s.tmpdir))\n\ts.log.Info(\"Database connection established\", slog.String(\"dsn\", s.dsn))\n\treturn s, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Session) ID() uuid.UUID {\n\treturn s.id\n}\n\nfunc (s *Session) Log() *slog.Logger {\n\treturn s.log\n}\n\nfunc (s *Session) PubSub() *pubsub.Logger {\n\treturn s.ps\n}\n\nfunc (s *Session) Config() *config.Config {\n\treturn s.cfg\n}\n\nfunc (s *Session) Scope() *scope.Scope {\n\treturn s.scope\n}\n\nfunc (s *Session) DB() repository.Repository {\n\treturn s.db\n}\n\nfunc (s *Session) Cache() *cache.Cache {\n\treturn s.cache\n}\n\nfunc (s *Session) Queue() et.SessionQueue {\n\treturn s.queue\n}\n\nfunc (s *Session) CIDRanger() cidranger.Ranger {\n\treturn s.ranger\n}\n\nfunc (s *Session) TmpDir() string {\n\treturn s.tmpdir\n}\n\nfunc (s *Session) Stats() *et.SessionStats {\n\treturn s.stats\n}\n\nfunc (s *Session) Done() bool {\n\treturn s.finished\n}\n\nfunc (s *Session) Kill() {\n\tselect {\n\tcase <-s.done:\n\t\treturn\n\tdefault:\n\t}\n\tclose(s.done)\n\ts.finished = true\n}\n\nfunc (s *Session) setupDB() error {\n\tif err := s.selectDBMS(); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Session) selectDBMS() error {\n\t// If no graph databases are specified, use a default SQLite database.\n\tif s.cfg.GraphDBs == nil {\n\t\ts.cfg.GraphDBs = []*config.Database{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tPrimary: true,\n\t\t\t\tSystem:  \"sqlite\",\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\t// Iterate over the GraphDBs specified in the configuration.\n\t// The goal is to determine the primary database's connection details.\n\tfor _, db := range s.cfg.GraphDBs {\n\t\tif db.Primary {\n\t\t\t// Convert the database system name to lowercase for consistent comparison.\n\t\t\tdb.System = strings.ToLower(db.System)\n\n\t\t\tswitch db.System {\n\t\t\tcase \"postgres\":\n\t\t\t\t// Construct the connection string for a Postgres database.\n\t\t\t\ts.dsn = fmt.Sprintf(\"host=%s port=%s user=%s password=%s dbname=%s\", db.Host, db.Port, db.Username, db.Password, db.DBName)\n\t\t\t\ts.dbtype = sqlrepo.Postgres\n\t\t\tcase \"sqlite\":\n\t\t\t\tfallthrough\n\t\t\tcase \"sqlite3\":\n\t\t\t\t// Define the connection path for an SQLite database.\n\t\t\t\tpath := filepath.Join(config.OutputDirectory(s.cfg.Dir), \"assetdb.db\")\n\t\t\t\ts.dsn = path + \"?_pragma=busy_timeout(30000)&_pragma=journal_mode(WAL)\"\n\t\t\t\ts.dbtype = sqlrepo.SQLite\n\t\t\tcase \"neo4j\":\n\t\t\t\tfallthrough\n\t\t\tcase \"neo4+s\":\n\t\t\t\tfallthrough\n\t\t\tcase \"neo4j+sec\":\n\t\t\t\tfallthrough\n\t\t\tcase \"bolt\":\n\t\t\t\tfallthrough\n\t\t\tcase \"bolt+s\":\n\t\t\t\tfallthrough\n\t\t\tcase \"bolt+sec\":\n\t\t\t\ts.dsn = db.URL\n\t\t\t\ts.dbtype = neo4j.Neo4j\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t// Break the loop once the primary database is found.\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\t// Check if a valid database connection string was generated.\n\tif s.dsn == \"\" || s.dbtype == \"\" {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"no primary database specified in the configuration\")\n\t}\n\t// Initialize the database store\n\tstore, err := assetdb.New(s.dbtype, s.dsn)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn errors.New(\"failed to initialize database store: \" + err.Error())\n\t}\n\ts.db = store\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Session) createTemporaryDir() (string, error) {\n\toutdir := config.OutputDirectory()\n\tif outdir == \"\" {\n\t\treturn \"\", errors.New(\"failed to obtain the output directory\")\n\t}\n\n\tdir, err := os.MkdirTemp(outdir, \"session-\"+s.ID().String())\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn \"\", errors.New(\"failed to create the temp dir\")\n\t}\n\n\treturn dir, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Session) createFileCacheRepo() (repository.Repository, error) {\n\tpath := filepath.Join(s.TmpDir(), \"cache.db\")\n\tdsn := path + \"?_pragma=busy_timeout(30000)&_pragma=journal_mode(WAL)\"\n\n\tc, err := assetdb.New(sqlrepo.SQLite, dsn)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to create the db: %s\", err.Error())\n\t}\n\treturn c, nil\n}\n"
          }

    "name": "internal",
    "path": "internal",

    "children": [
      {
        "name": "afmt",
        "path": "internal/afmt",
        "type": "directory",
        "children": [
          {
            "name": "parse.go",
            "path": "internal/afmt/parse.go",
            "type": "file",
            "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage afmt\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"math\"\n\t\"net\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\tamassnet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/internal/net\"\n)\n\n// ParseStrings implements the flag.Value interface.\ntype ParseStrings []string\n\n// ParseInts implements the flag.Value interface.\ntype ParseInts []int\n\n// ParseIPs implements the flag.Value interface.\ntype ParseIPs []net.IP\n\n// ParseCIDRs implements the flag.Value interface.\ntype ParseCIDRs []*net.IPNet\n\n// ParseASNs implements the flag.Value interface.\ntype ParseASNs []int\n\nfunc (p *ParseStrings) String() string {\n\tif p == nil {\n\t\treturn \"\"\n\t}\n\treturn strings.Join(*p, \",\")\n}\n\n// Set implements the flag.Value interface.\nfunc (p *ParseStrings) Set(s string) error {\n\tif s == \"\" {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"String parsing failed\")\n\t}\n\n\tstr := strings.Split(s, \",\")\n\tfor _, s := range str {\n\t\t*p = append(*p, strings.TrimSpace(s))\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (p *ParseInts) String() string {\n\tif p == nil {\n\t\treturn \"\"\n\t}\n\tvar builder strings.Builder\n\tfor i, n := range *p {\n\t\tif i > 0 {\n\t\t\tbuilder.WriteRune(',')\n\t\t}\n\t\tbuilder.WriteString(strconv.Itoa(n))\n\t}\n\treturn builder.String()\n}\n\n// Set implements the flag.Value interface.\nfunc (p *ParseInts) Set(s string) error {\n\tif s == \"\" {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"integer parsing failed\")\n\t}\n\n\tnums := strings.Split(s, \",\")\n\tfor _, n := range nums {\n\t\ti, err := strconv.Atoi(strings.TrimSpace(n))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t}\n\t\t*p = append(*p, i)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (p *ParseIPs) String() string {\n\tif p == nil {\n\t\treturn \"\"\n\t}\n\tvar builder strings.Builder\n\tfor i, ipaddr := range *p {\n\t\tif i > 0 {\n\t\t\tbuilder.WriteRune(',')\n\t\t}\n\t\tbuilder.WriteString(ipaddr.String())\n\t}\n\treturn builder.String()\n}\n\n// Set implements the flag.Value interface.\nfunc (p *ParseIPs) Set(s string) error {\n\tif s == \"\" {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"IP address parsing failed\")\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, v := range strings.Split(s, \",\") {\n\t\tif start, end, ok := parseRange(v); ok {\n\t\t\tips := amassnet.RangeHosts(start, end)\n\t\t\tif len(ips) == 0 {\n\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"%s is not a valid IP address or range\", v)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tfor _, ip := range ips {\n\t\t\t\t*p = append(*p, ip)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t} else if ip := net.ParseIP(v); ip != nil {\n\t\t\t*p = append(*p, ip)\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"%s is not a valid IP address or range\", v)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc parseRange(s string) (start net.IP, end net.IP, ok bool) {\n\ttwoIPs := strings.Split(s, \"-\")\n\tif len(twoIPs) != 2 {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\tstart = net.ParseIP(twoIPs[0])\n\tif start == nil {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\tend = net.ParseIP(twoIPs[1])\n\tif end == nil {\n\t\tnum, err := strconv.Atoi(twoIPs[1])\n\t\tif err != nil || math.MaxUint8 < num {\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t\tend = make(net.IP, len(start))\n\t\tcopy(end, start)\n\t\tend[len(end)-1] = byte(num)\n\t}\n\tok = true\n\treturn\n}\n\nfunc (p *ParseCIDRs) String() string {\n\tif p == nil {\n\t\treturn \"\"\n\t}\n\n\tvar builder strings.Builder\n\tfor i, ipnet := range *p {\n\t\tif i > 0 {\n\t\t\tbuilder.WriteRune(',')\n\t\t}\n\t\tbuilder.WriteString(ipnet.String())\n\t}\n\treturn builder.String()\n}\n\n// Set implements the flag.Value interface.\nfunc (p *ParseCIDRs) Set(s string) error {\n\tif s == \"\" {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"%s is not a valid CIDR\", s)\n\t}\n\n\tcidrs := strings.Split(s, \",\")\n\tfor _, cidr := range cidrs {\n\t\t_, ipnet, err := net.ParseCIDR(cidr)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to parse %s as a CIDR\", cidr)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t*p = append(*p, ipnet)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n\nfunc (p *ParseASNs) String() string {\n\tif p == nil {\n\t\treturn \"\"\n\t}\n\tvar builder strings.Builder\n\tfor i, n := range *p {\n\t\tif i > 0 {\n\t\t\tbuilder.WriteRune(',')\n\t\t}\n\t\tbuilder.WriteString(strconv.Itoa(n))\n\t}\n\treturn builder.String()\n}\n\n// Set implements the flag.Value interface.\nfunc (p *ParseASNs) Set(s string) error {\n\tif s == \"\" {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"ASN parsing failed\")\n\t}\n\n\tasns := strings.Split(s, \",\")\n\tfor _, asn := range asns {\n\t\ti, err := strconv.Atoi(strings.TrimPrefix(strings.TrimSpace(asn), \"AS\"))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t}\n\t\t*p = append(*p, i)\n\t}\n\treturn nil\n}\n"
          },

(\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"net\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\t\"github.com/fatih/color\"\n\tamassnet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/internal/net\"\n)\n\n// Banner is the ASCII art logo used within help output.\nconst Banner = `        .+++:.            :                             .+++.\n      +W@@@@@@8        &+W@#               o8W8:      +W@@@@@@#.   oW@@@W#+\n     &@#+   .o@##.    .@@@o@W.o@@o       :@@#&W8o    .@#:  .:oW+  .@#+++&#&\n    +@&        &@&     #@8 +@W@&8@+     :@W.   +@8   +@:          .@8\n    8@          @@     8@o  8@8  WW    .@W      W@+  .@W.          o@#:\n    WW          &@o    &@:  o@+  o@+   #@.      8@o   +W@#+.        +W@8:\n    #@          :@W    &@+  &@+   @8  :@o       o@o     oW@@W+        oW@8\n    o@+          @@&   &@+  &@+   #@  &@.      .W@W       .+#@&         o@W.\n     WW         +@W@8. &@+  :&    o@+ #@      :@W&@&         &@:  ..     :@o\n     :@W:      o@# +Wo &@+        :W: +@W&o++o@W. &@&  8@#o+&@W.  #@:    o@+\n      :W@@WWWW@@8       +              :&W@@@@&    &W  .o#@@W&.   :W@WWW@@&\n        +o&&&&+.                                                    +oooo.`\n\nconst (\n\t// Version is used to display the current version of Amass.\n\tVersion = \"v5.0.0\"\n\n\t// Author is used to display the Amass Project Team.\n\tAuthor = \"OWASP Amass Project - @owaspamass\"\n\n\t// Description is the slogan for the Amass Project.\n\tDescription = \"In-depth Attack Surface Mapping and Asset Discovery\"\n\n\t// The URL to the Amass Project's Discord server.\n\tDiscordInvitation string = \"https://discord.gg/ANTyEDUXt5\"\n)\n\nvar (\n\t// Colors used to ease the reading of program output\n\tB       = color.New(color.FgHiBlue)\n\tY       = color.New(color.FgHiYellow)\n\tG       = color.New(color.FgHiGreen)\n\tR       = color.New(color.FgHiRed)\n\tFgR     = color.New(color.FgRed)\n\tFgY     = color.New(color.FgYellow)\n\tYellow  = color.New(color.FgHiYellow).SprintFunc()\n\tGreen   = color.New(color.FgHiGreen).SprintFunc()\n\tBlue    = color.New(color.FgHiBlue).SprintFunc()\n\tMagenta = color.New(color.FgHiMagenta).SprintFunc()\n\tWhite   = color.New(color.FgHiWhite).SprintFunc()\n)\n\n// PrintBanner outputs the Amass banner to stderr.\nfunc PrintBanner() {\n\tFprintBanner(color.Error)\n}\n\n// FprintBanner outputs the Amass banner the same for all tools.\nfunc FprintBanner(out io.Writer) {\n\trightmost := 76\n\n\tpad := func(num int) {\n\t\tfor i := 0; i < num; i++ {\n\t\t\t_, _ = fmt.Fprint(out, \" \")\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t_, _ = R.Fprintf(out, \"\\n%s\\n\\n\", Banner)\n\tpad(rightmost - len(Version))\n\t_, _ = Y.Fprintln(out, Version)\n\tpad(rightmost - len(Author))\n\t_, _ = Y.Fprintln(out, Author)\n\tpad(rightmost - len(Description))\n\t_, _ = Y.Fprintf(out, \"%s\\n\\n\\n\", Description)\n}\n\n// DesiredAddrTypes removes undesired address types from the AddressInfo slice.\nfunc DesiredAddrTypes(addrs []amassnet.AddressInfo, ipv4, ipv6 bool) []amassnet.AddressInfo {\n\tvar kept []amassnet.AddressInfo\n\n\tfor _, addr := range addrs {\n\t\tif ipv4 && IsIPv4(addr.Address) {\n\t\t\tkept = append(kept, addr)\n\t\t} else if ipv6 && IsIPv6(addr.Address) {\n\t\t\tkept = append(kept, addr)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn kept\n}\n\n// IsIPv4 returns true when the provided net.IP address is an IPv4 address.\nfunc IsIPv4(ip net.IP) bool {\n\treturn strings.Count(ip.String(), \":\") < 2\n}\n\n// IsIPv6 returns true when the provided net.IP address is an IPv6 address.\nfunc IsIPv6(ip net.IP) bool {\n\treturn strings.Count(ip.String(), \":\") >= 2\n}\n\n// UpdateSummaryData updates the summary maps using the provided requests.Output data.\nfunc UpdateSummaryData(output *amassnet.Output, asns map[int]*amassnet.ASNSummaryData) {\n\tfor _, addr := range output.Addresses {\n\t\tif addr.CIDRStr == \"\" {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tdata, found := asns[addr.ASN]\n\t\tif !found {\n\t\t\tasns[addr.ASN] = &amassnet.ASNSummaryData{\n\t\t\t\tName:      addr.Description,\n\t\t\t\tNetblocks: make(map[string]int),\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tdata = asns[addr.ASN]\n\t\t}\n\t\t// Increment how many IPs were in this netblock\n\t\tdata.Netblocks[addr.CIDRStr]++\n\t}\n}\n\n// PrintEnumerationSummary outputs the summary information utilized by the command-line tools.\nfunc PrintEnumerationSummary(total int, asns map[int]*amassnet.ASNSummaryData, demo bool) {\n\tFprintEnumerationSummary(color.Error, total, asns, demo)\n}\n\n// FprintEnumerationSummary outputs the summary information utilized by the command-line tools.\nfunc FprintEnumerationSummary(out io.Writer, total int, asns map[int]*amassnet.ASNSummaryData, demo bool) {\n\tpad := func(num int, chr string) {\n\t\tfor i := 0; i < num; i++ {\n\t\t\t_, _ = B.Fprint(out, chr)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t_, _ = fmt.Fprintln(out)\n\t// Print the header information\n\ttitle := \"OWASP Amass Project \"\n\tsite := \"https://github.com/owasp-amass/amass\"\n\t_, _ = B.Fprint(out, title+Version)\n\tnum := 80 - (len(title) + len(Version) + len(site))\n\tpad(num, \" \")\n\t_, _ = B.Fprintf(out, \"%s\\n\", site)\n\tpad(8, \"----------\")\n\t_, _ = fmt.Fprintf(out, \"\\n%s%s\", Yellow(strconv.Itoa(total)), Green(\" names discovered\"))\n\t_, _ = fmt.Fprintln(out)\n\n\tif len(asns) == 0 {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\t// Another line gets printed\n\tpad(8, \"----------\")\n\t_, _ = fmt.Fprintln(out)\n\t// Print the ASN and netblock information\n\tfor asn, data := range asns {\n\t\tasnstr := strconv.Itoa(asn)\n\t\tdatastr := data.Name\n\n\t\tif demo && asn > 0 {\n\t\t\tasnstr = censorString(asnstr, 0, len(asnstr))\n\t\t\tdatastr = censorString(datastr, 0, len(datastr))\n\t\t}\n\t\t_, _ = fmt.Fprintf(out, \"%s%s %s %s\\n\", Blue(\"ASN: \"), Yellow(asnstr), Green(\"-\"), Green(datastr))\n\n\t\tfor cidr, ips := range data.Netblocks {\n\t\t\tcountstr := strconv.Itoa(ips)\n\t\t\tcidrstr := cidr\n\n\t\t\tif demo {\n\t\t\t\tcidrstr = censorNetBlock(cidrstr)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tcountstr = fmt.Sprintf(\"\\t%-4s\", countstr)\n\t\t\tcidrstr = fmt.Sprintf(\"\\t%-18s\", cidrstr)\n\t\t\t_, _ = fmt.Fprintf(out, \"%s%s %s\\n\", Yellow(cidrstr), Yellow(countstr), Blue(\"Subdomain Name(s)\"))\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc censorString(input string, start, end int) string {\n\trunes := []rune(input)\n\tfor i := start; i < end; i++ {\n\t\tif runes[i] == '.' ||\n\t\t\trunes[i] == '/' ||\n\t\t\trunes[i] == '-' ||\n\t\t\trunes[i] == ' ' {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\trunes[i] = 'x'\n\t}\n\treturn string(runes)\n}\n\nfunc censorDomain(input string) string {\n\treturn censorString(input, strings.Index(input, \".\"), len(input))\n}\n\nfunc censorIP(input string) string {\n\treturn censorString(input, 0, strings.LastIndex(input, \".\"))\n}\n\nfunc censorNetBlock(input string) string {\n\treturn censorString(input, 0, strings.Index(input, \"/\"))\n}\n\n// OutputLineParts returns the parts of a line to be printed for a requests.Output.\nfunc OutputLineParts(out *amassnet.Output, addrs, demo bool) (name, ips string) {\n\tif addrs {\n\t\tfor i, a := range out.Addresses {\n\t\t\tif i != 0 {\n\t\t\t\tips += \",\"\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif demo {\n\t\t\t\tips += censorIP(a.Address.String())\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tips += a.Address.String()\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tname = out.Name\n\tif demo {\n\t\tname = censorDomain(name)\n\t}\n\treturn\n}\n"
          },
          {
            "name": "slog.go",
            "path": "internal/afmt/slog.go",
            "type": "file",
            "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage afmt\n\nimport (\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"log/slog\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"time\"\n)\n\nfunc JSONLogToRecord(logstr string) (slog.Record, error) {\n\tj := make(map[string]interface{})\n\t// unmarshal the log message sent from the engine session\n\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(logstr), &j); err != nil {\n\t\treturn slog.Record{}, errors.New(\"failed to unmarchal the JSON\")\n\t}\n\n\tvar ltime time.Time\n\t// cheating right now by replacing the time\n\tif _, found := j[slog.TimeKey]; found {\n\t\tltime = time.Now()\n\t}\n\tdelete(j, slog.TimeKey)\n\n\tvar level slog.Level\n\t// extract the log level for the new record\n\tif val, found := j[slog.LevelKey]; !found {\n\t\treturn slog.Record{}, errors.New(\"failed to find the level key\")\n\t} else if str, ok := val.(string); !ok {\n\t\treturn slog.Record{}, errors.New(\"failed to cast the level value\")\n\t} else if level.UnmarshalText([]byte(str)) != nil {\n\t\treturn slog.Record{}, errors.New(\"failed to unmarshal the level text\")\n\t}\n\tdelete(j, slog.LevelKey)\n\n\tvar msg string\n\t// extract the log message for the new record\n\tif val, found := j[slog.MessageKey]; !found {\n\t\treturn slog.Record{}, errors.New(\"failed to find the msg key\")\n\t} else if str, ok := val.(string); !ok {\n\t\treturn slog.Record{}, errors.New(\"failed to cast the msg value\")\n\t} else {\n\t\tmsg = str\n\t}\n\tdelete(j, slog.MessageKey)\n\n\tvar pc uintptr\n\trecord := slog.NewRecord(ltime, level, msg, pc)\n\trecord.AddAttrs(jsonToAttrs(j)...)\n\treturn record, nil\n}\n\nfunc jsonToAttrs(jmap map[string]interface{}) []slog.Attr {\n\tvar attrs []slog.Attr\n\n\tfor k, v := range jmap {\n\t\tswitch val := v.(type) {\n\t\tcase bool:\n\t\t\tattrs = append(attrs, slog.Bool(k, val))\n\t\tcase float64:\n\t\t\tattrs = append(attrs, jsonNumberToAttr(k, val))\n\t\tcase string:\n\t\t\tattrs = append(attrs, slog.String(k, val))\n\t\tcase map[string]interface{}:\n\t\t\tif a := jsonToAttrs(val); len(a) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tattrs = append(attrs, slog.Attr{\n\t\t\t\t\tKey:   k,\n\t\t\t\t\tValue: slog.GroupValue(a...),\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn attrs\n}\n\nfunc jsonNumberToAttr(key string, num float64) slog.Attr {\n\tif s := fmt.Sprintf(\"%f\", num); s != \"\" {\n\t\tif i, err := strconv.ParseInt(s, 10, 64); err == nil {\n\t\t\treturn slog.Int64(key, i)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn slog.Float64(key, num)\n}\n"
          }
        ]
      },

            "name": "assets.go",

            "type": "file",
            "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage enum\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"net\"\n\t\"net/netip\"\n\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/config\"\n\tet \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/engine/types\"\n\toamdns \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/dns\"\n\toamnet \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/network\"\n)\n\n// returns Asset objects by converting the contests of config.Scope\nfunc makeAssets(config *config.Config) []*et.Asset {\n\tassets := convertScopeToAssets(config.Scope)\n\n\tfor i, asset := range assets {\n\t\tasset.Name = fmt.Sprintf(\"asset#%d\", i+1)\n\t}\n\treturn assets\n}\n\n// ipnet2Prefix converts a net.IPNet to a netip.Prefix.\nfunc ipnet2Prefix(ipn net.IPNet) netip.Prefix {\n\taddr, _ := netip.AddrFromSlice(ipn.IP)\n\tcidr, _ := ipn.Mask.Size()\n\treturn netip.PrefixFrom(addr, cidr)\n}\n\n// convertScopeToAssets converts all items in a Scope to a slice of *Asset.\nfunc convertScopeToAssets(scope *config.Scope) []*et.Asset {\n\tconst ipv4 = \"IPv4\"\n\tconst ipv6 = \"IPv6\"\n\tvar assets []*et.Asset\n\n\t// Convert Domains to assets.\n\tfor _, d := range scope.Domains {\n\t\tfqdn := oamdns.FQDN{Name: d}\n\t\tdata := et.AssetData{\n\t\t\tOAMAsset: fqdn,\n\t\t\tOAMType:  fqdn.AssetType(),\n\t\t}\n\t\tasset := &et.Asset{\n\t\t\tData: data,\n\t\t}\n\t\tassets = append(assets, asset)\n\t}\n\n\tvar ipType string\n\t// Convert Addresses to assets.\n\tfor _, ip := range scope.Addresses {\n\t\t// Convert net.IP to net.IPAddr.\n\t\tif addr, ok := netip.AddrFromSlice(ip); ok {\n\t\t\t// Determine the IP type based on the address characteristics.\n\t\t\tif addr.Is4In6() {\n\t\t\t\taddr = netip.AddrFrom4(addr.As4())\n\t\t\t\tipType = ipv4\n\t\t\t} else if addr.Is6() {\n\t\t\t\tipType = ipv6\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tipType = ipv4\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t// Create an asset from the IP address and append it to the assets slice.\n\t\t\tasset := oamnet.IPAddress{Address: addr, Type: ipType}\n\t\t\tdata := et.AssetData{\n\t\t\t\tOAMAsset: asset,\n\t\t\t\tOAMType:  asset.AssetType(),\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tassets = append(assets, &et.Asset{Data: data})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Convert CIDRs to assets.\n\tfor _, cidr := range scope.CIDRs {\n\t\tprefix := ipnet2Prefix(*cidr) // Convert net.IPNet to netip.Prefix.\n\n\t\t// Determine the IP type based on the address characteristics.\n\t\taddr := prefix.Addr()\n\t\tif addr.Is4In6() {\n\t\t\tipType = ipv4\n\t\t} else if addr.Is6() {\n\t\t\tipType = ipv6\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tipType = ipv4\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Create an asset from the CIDR and append it to the assets slice.\n\t\tasset := oamnet.Netblock{CIDR: prefix, Type: ipType}\n\t\tdata := et.AssetData{\n\t\t\tOAMAsset: asset,\n\t\t\tOAMType:  asset.AssetType(),\n\t\t}\n\t\tassets = append(assets, &et.Asset{Data: data})\n\t}\n\n\t// Convert ASNs to assets.\n\tfor _, asn := range scope.ASNs {\n\t\tasset := oamnet.AutonomousSystem{Number: asn}\n\t\tdata := et.AssetData{\n\t\t\tOAMAsset: asset,\n\t\t\tOAMType:  asset.AssetType(),\n\t\t}\n\t\tassets = append(assets, &et.Asset{Data: data})\n\t}\n\treturn assets\n}\n"
          },
