            "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage track\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"flag\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/caffix/stringset\"\n\t\"github.com/fatih/color\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/config\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/internal/afmt\"\n\tamassdb \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/internal/db\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/internal/tools\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/repository\"\n\tdbt \"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toamdns \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/dns\"\n)\n\nconst (\n\tTimeFormat  = \"01/02 15:04:05 2006 MST\"\n\tUsageMsg    = \"[options] [-since '\" + TimeFormat + \"'] \" + \"-d domain\"\n\tDescription = \"Analyze OAM data to identify newly discovered assets\"\n)\n\ntype Args struct {\n\tHelp    bool\n\tDomains *stringset.Set\n\tSince   string\n\tOptions struct {\n\t\tNoColor bool\n\t\tSilent  bool\n\t}\n\tFilepaths struct {\n\t\tConfigFile string\n\t\tDirectory  string\n\t\tDomains    string\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc NewFlagset(args *Args, errorHandling flag.ErrorHandling) *flag.FlagSet {\n\tfs := flag.NewFlagSet(\"track\", flag.ContinueOnError)\n\n\tfs.BoolVar(&args.Help, \"h\", false, \"Show the program usage message\")\n\tfs.BoolVar(&args.Help, \"help\", false, \"Show the program usage message\")\n\tfs.Var(args.Domains, \"d\", \"Domain names separated by commas (can be used multiple times)\")\n\tfs.StringVar(&args.Since, \"since\", \"\", \"Exclude all assets discovered before (format: \"+TimeFormat+\")\")\n\tfs.BoolVar(&args.Options.NoColor, \"nocolor\", false, \"Disable colorized output\")\n\tfs.BoolVar(&args.Options.Silent, \"silent\", false, \"Disable all output during execution\")\n\tfs.StringVar(&args.Filepaths.ConfigFile, \"config\", \"\", \"Path to the YAML configuration file\")\n\tfs.StringVar(&args.Filepaths.Directory, \"dir\", \"\", \"Path to the directory containing the graph database\")\n\tfs.StringVar(&args.Filepaths.Domains, \"df\", \"\", \"Path to a file providing registered domain names\")\n\treturn fs\n}\n\nfunc CLIWorkflow(cmdName string, clArgs []string) {\n\tvar args Args\n\targs.Domains = stringset.New()\n\tdefer args.Domains.Close()\n\n\tfs := NewFlagset(&args, flag.ContinueOnError)\n\ttrackBuf := new(bytes.Buffer)\n\tfs.SetOutput(trackBuf)\n\n\tvar usage = func() {\n\t\tafmt.PrintBanner()\n\t\t_, _ = afmt.G.Fprintf(color.Error, \"Usage: %s %s\\n\\n\", cmdName, UsageMsg)\n\n\t\tif args.Help {\n\t\t\tfs.PrintDefaults()\n\t\t\t_, _ = afmt.G.Fprintln(color.Error, trackBuf.String())\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t_, _ = afmt.G.Fprintln(color.Error, \"Use the -h or --help flag to see the flags and default values\")\n\t\t_, _ = afmt.G.Fprintf(color.Error, \"\\nThe Amass Discord server can be found here: %s\\n\\n\", afmt.DiscordInvitation)\n\t}\n\n\tif len(os.Args) < 2 {\n\t\tusage()\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\tif err := fs.Parse(clArgs); err != nil {\n\t\t_, _ = afmt.R.Fprintf(color.Error, \"%v\\n\", err)\n\t\tos.Exit(1)\n\t}\n\tif args.Help {\n\t\tusage()\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\tif args.Options.NoColor {\n\t\tcolor.NoColor = true\n\t}\n\tif args.Options.Silent {\n\t\tcolor.Output = io.Discard\n\t\tcolor.Error = io.Discard\n\t}\n\tif args.Filepaths.Domains != \"\" {\n\t\tlist, err := config.GetListFromFile(args.Filepaths.Domains)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t_, _ = afmt.R.Fprintf(color.Error, \"Failed to parse the domain names file: %v\\n\", err)\n\t\t\tos.Exit(1)\n\t\t}\n\t\targs.Domains.InsertMany(list...)\n\t}\n\tif args.Domains.Len() == 0 {\n\t\t_, _ = afmt.R.Fprintln(color.Error, \"No root domain names were provided\")\n\t\tos.Exit(1)\n\t}\n\n\tvar err error\n\tvar start time.Time\n\tif args.Since != \"\" {\n\t\tstart, err = time.Parse(TimeFormat, args.Since)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t_, _ = afmt.R.Fprintf(color.Error, \"%s is not in the correct format: %s\\n\", args.Since, TimeFormat)\n\t\t\tos.Exit(1)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tcfg := config.NewConfig()\n\t// Check if a configuration file was provided, and if so, load the settings\n\tif err := config.AcquireConfig(args.Filepaths.Directory, args.Filepaths.ConfigFile, cfg); err == nil {\n\t\tif args.Filepaths.Directory == \"\" {\n\t\t\targs.Filepaths.Directory = cfg.Dir\n\t\t}\n\t\tif args.Domains.Len() == 0 {\n\t\t\targs.Domains.InsertMany(cfg.Domains()...)\n\t\t}\n\t} else if args.Filepaths.ConfigFile != \"\" {\n\t\t_, _ = afmt.R.Fprintf(color.Error, \"Failed to load the configuration file: %v\\n\", err)\n\t\tos.Exit(1)\n\t}\n\t// Connect with the graph database containing the enumeration data\n\tdb := tools.OpenGraphDatabase(cfg)\n\tif db == nil {\n\t\t_, _ = afmt.R.Fprintln(color.Error, \"Failed to connect with the database\")\n\t\tos.Exit(1)\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, name := range getNewNames(args.Domains.Slice(), start, db) {\n\t\t_, _ = afmt.G.Fprintln(color.Output, name)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc getNewNames(domains []string, since time.Time, db repository.Repository) []string {\n\tif len(domains) == 0 {\n\t\treturn []string{}\n\t}\n\n\tvar assets []*dbt.Entity\n\tfor _, d := range domains {\n\t\tif ents, err := db.FindEntitiesByContent(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: d}, since); err == nil && len(ents) == 1 {\n\t\t\tif n, err := amassdb.FindByFQDNScope(db, ents[0], since); err == nil && len(n) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tassets = append(assets, n...)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tif len(assets) == 0 {\n\t\treturn []string{}\n\t}\n\n\tif since.IsZero() {\n\t\tvar latest time.Time\n\n\t\tfor _, a := range assets {\n\t\t\tif _, ok := a.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN); ok && a.LastSeen.After(latest) {\n\t\t\t\tlatest = a.LastSeen\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tsince = latest.Truncate(24 * time.Hour)\n\t}\n\n\tres := stringset.New()\n\tdefer res.Close()\n\n\tfor _, a := range assets {\n\t\tif n, ok := a.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN); ok && !res.Has(n.Name) &&\n\t\t\t(a.CreatedAt.Equal(since) || a.CreatedAt.After(since)) &&\n\t\t\t(a.LastSeen.Equal(since) || a.LastSeen.After(since)) {\n\t\t\tres.Insert(n.Name)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn res.Slice()\n}\n"
          }
        ]

All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage viz\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"flag\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"path/filepath\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/caffix/stringset\"\n\t\"github.com/fatih/color\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/config\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/internal/afmt\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/internal/tools\"\n)\n\nconst (\n\tTimeFormat  string = \"01/02 15:04:05 2006 MST\"\n\tUsageMsg    string = \"-d3|-dot|-gexf [options] -d domain\"\n\tDescription string = \"Analyze OAM data to generate graph visualizations\"\n)\n\ntype Args struct {\n\tHelp    bool\n\tDomains *stringset.Set\n\tSince   string\n\tOptions struct {\n\t\tD3      bool\n\t\tDOT     bool\n\t\tGEXF    bool\n\t\tNoColor bool\n\t\tSilent  bool\n\t}\n\tFilepaths struct {\n\t\tConfigFile    string\n\t\tDirectory     string\n\t\tDomains       string\n\t\tOutput        string\n\t\tAllFilePrefix string\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc NewFlagset(args *Args, errorHandling flag.ErrorHandling) *flag.FlagSet {\n\tfs := flag.NewFlagSet(\"viz\", errorHandling)\n\n\tfs.BoolVar(&args.Help, \"h\", false, \"Show the program usage message\")\n\tfs.BoolVar(&args.Help, \"help\", false, \"Show the program usage message\")\n\tfs.Var(args.Domains, \"d\", \"Domain names separated by commas (can be used multiple times)\")\n\tfs.StringVar(&args.Since, \"since\", \"\", \"Include only assets validated after (format: \"+TimeFormat+\")\")\n\tfs.StringVar(&args.Filepaths.ConfigFile, \"config\", \"\", \"Path to the YAML configuration file\")\n\tfs.StringVar(&args.Filepaths.Directory, \"dir\", \"\", \"Path to the directory containing the graph database\")\n\tfs.StringVar(&args.Filepaths.Domains, \"df\", \"\", \"Path to a file providing registered domain names\")\n\tfs.StringVar(&args.Filepaths.Output, \"o\", \"\", \"Path to the directory for output files being generated\")\n\tfs.StringVar(&args.Filepaths.AllFilePrefix, \"oA\", \"\", \"Path prefix used for naming all output files\")\n\tfs.BoolVar(&args.Options.D3, \"d3\", false, \"Generate the D3 v4 force simulation HTML file\")\n\tfs.BoolVar(&args.Options.DOT, \"dot\", false, \"Generate the DOT output file\")\n\tfs.BoolVar(&args.Options.GEXF, \"gexf\", false, \"Generate the Gephi Graph Exchange XML Format (GEXF) file\")\n\tfs.BoolVar(&args.Options.NoColor, \"nocolor\", false, \"Disable colorized output\")\n\tfs.BoolVar(&args.Options.Silent, \"silent\", false, \"Disable all output during execution\")\n\treturn fs\n}\n\nfunc CLIWorkflow(cmdName string, clArgs []string) {\n\tvar args Args\n\targs.Domains = stringset.New()\n\tdefer args.Domains.Close()\n\n\tfs := NewFlagset(&args, flag.ContinueOnError)\n\tvizBuf := new(bytes.Buffer)\n\tfs.SetOutput(vizBuf)\n\n\tvar usage = func() {\n\t\tafmt.PrintBanner()\n\t\t_, _ = afmt.G.Fprintf(color.Error, \"Usage: %s %s\\n\\n\", cmdName, UsageMsg)\n\n\t\tif args.Help {\n\t\t\tfs.PrintDefaults()\n\t\t\t_, _ = afmt.G.Fprintln(color.Error, vizBuf.String())\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t_, _ = afmt.G.Fprintln(color.Error, \"Use the -h or --help flag to see the flags and default values\")\n\t\t_, _ = afmt.G.Fprintf(color.Error, \"\\nThe Amass Discord server can be found here: %s\\n\\n\", afmt.DiscordInvitation)\n\t}\n\n\tif len(os.Args) < 2 {\n\t\tusage()\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\tif err := fs.Parse(clArgs); err != nil {\n\t\t_, _ = afmt.R.Fprintf(color.Error, \"%v\\n\", err)\n\t\tos.Exit(1)\n\t}\n\tif args.Help {\n\t\tusage()\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\tif args.Options.NoColor {\n\t\tcolor.NoColor = true\n\t}\n\tif args.Options.Silent {\n\t\tcolor.Output = io.Discard\n\t\tcolor.Error = io.Discard\n\t}\n\tif args.Filepaths.Domains != \"\" {\n\t\tlist, err := config.GetListFromFile(args.Filepaths.Domains)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t_, _ = afmt.R.Fprintf(color.Error, \"Failed to parse the domain names file: %v\\n\", err)\n\t\t\tos.Exit(1)\n\t\t}\n\t\targs.Domains.InsertMany(list...)\n\t}\n\tif args.Domains.Len() == 0 {\n\t\t_, _ = afmt.R.Fprintln(color.Error, \"No root domain names were provided\")\n\t\tos.Exit(1)\n\t}\n\t// Make sure at least one graph file format has been identified on the command-line\n\tif !args.Options.D3 && !args.Options.DOT && !args.Options.GEXF {\n\t\t_, _ = afmt.R.Fprintln(color.Error, \"At least one file format must be selected\")\n\t\tos.Exit(1)\n\t}\n\n\tvar err error\n\tvar start time.Time\n\tif args.Since != \"\" {\n\t\tstart, err = time.Parse(TimeFormat, args.Since)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t_, _ = afmt.R.Fprintf(color.Error, \"%s is not in the correct format: %s\\n\", args.Since, TimeFormat)\n\t\t\tos.Exit(1)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tcfg := config.NewConfig()\n\t// Check if a configuration file was provided, and if so, load the settings\n\tif err := config.AcquireConfig(args.Filepaths.Directory, args.Filepaths.ConfigFile, cfg); err == nil {\n\t\tif args.Filepaths.Directory == \"\" {\n\t\t\targs.Filepaths.Directory = cfg.Dir\n\t\t}\n\t\tif args.Domains.Len() == 0 {\n\t\t\targs.Domains.InsertMany(cfg.Domains()...)\n\t\t}\n\t} else if args.Filepaths.ConfigFile != \"\" {\n\t\t_, _ = afmt.R.Fprintf(color.Error, \"Failed to load the configuration file: %v\\n\", err)\n\t\tos.Exit(1)\n\t}\n\t// Connect with the graph database containing the enumeration data\n\tdb := tools.OpenGraphDatabase(cfg)\n\tif db == nil {\n\t\t_, _ = afmt.R.Fprintln(color.Error, \"Failed to connect with the database\")\n\t\tos.Exit(1)\n\t}\n\t// Obtain the visualization nodes & edges from the graph\n\tnodes, edges := VizData(args.Domains.Slice(), start, db)\n\t// Get the directory to save the files into\n\tdir := args.Filepaths.Directory\n\tif pwd, err := os.Getwd(); err == nil {\n\t\tdir = pwd\n\t}\n\n\t// Set output file prefix, use 'amass' if '-oA' flag is not specified\n\tprefix := args.Filepaths.AllFilePrefix\n\tif prefix == \"\" {\n\t\tprefix = \"amass\"\n\t}\n\n\tif args.Filepaths.Output != \"\" {\n\t\tif finfo, err := os.Stat(args.Filepaths.Output); os.IsNotExist(err) || !finfo.IsDir() {\n\t\t\t_, _ = afmt.R.Fprintln(color.Error, \"The output location does not exist or is not a directory\")\n\t\t\tos.Exit(1)\n\t\t}\n\t\tdir = args.Filepaths.Output\n\t}\n\tif args.Options.D3 {\n\t\tpath := filepath.Join(dir, prefix+\".html\")\n\t\terr = writeGraphOutputFile(\"d3\", path, nodes, edges)\n\t}\n\tif args.Options.DOT {\n\t\tpath := filepath.Join(dir, prefix+\".dot\")\n\t\terr = writeGraphOutputFile(\"dot\", path, nodes, edges)\n\t}\n\tif args.Options.GEXF {\n\t\tpath := filepath.Join(dir, prefix+\".gexf\")\n\t\terr = writeGraphOutputFile(\"gexf\", path, nodes, edges)\n\t}\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\t_, _ = afmt.R.Fprintf(color.Error, \"Failed to write the output file: %v\\n\", err)\n\t\tos.Exit(1)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc writeGraphOutputFile(t string, path string, nodes []Node, edges []Edge) error {\n\tf, err := os.OpenFile(path, os.O_WRONLY|os.O_CREATE, 0644)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\t_ = f.Sync()\n\t\t_ = f.Close()\n\t}()\n\n\t_ = f.Truncate(0)\n\t_, _ = f.Seek(0, 0)\n\n\tswitch t {\n\tcase \"d3\":\n\t\terr = WriteD3Data(f, nodes, edges)\n\tcase \"dot\":\n\t\terr = WriteDOTData(f, nodes, edges)\n\tcase \"gexf\":\n\t\terr = WriteGEXFData(f, nodes, edges)\n\t}\n\treturn err\n}\n"

            "name": "d3.go",
            "path": "internal/viz/d3.go",
            "type": "file",
            "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage viz\n\nimport (\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"text/template\"\n\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n)\n\nconst d3Template = `\n<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"en\">\n<head>\n    <meta charset=\"utf-8\">\n    <title>OWASP Amass Network Mapping</title>\n    <script src=\"https://d3js.org/d3.v4.min.js\"></script>\n    <style>\n        div#tooltip {\n            position: absolute;        \n            display: inline-block;\n            padding: 10px;\n            font-family: 'Open Sans' sans-serif;\n            color: #000;\n            background-color: #fff;\n            border: 1px solid #999;\n            border-radius: 2px;\n            pointer-events: none;\n            opacity: 0;\n            z-index: 1;\n        }\n    </style>\n</head>\n<body>\n    <div id=\"graphDiv\"></div>\n    <div id=\"tooltip\"></div>\n\n<script>\n/* global d3 */\n\nvar graph = {\n    nodes: [\n    {{ range .Nodes }}\n        {id: {{.ID }}, num: {{ .Num }}, label: \"{{ .Label }}\", color: \"{{ .Color }}\" },\n    {{ end }}\n    ],\n    edges: [\n    {{ range .Edges }}\n        {source: {{ .Source }}, target: {{ .Destination }}, label: \"{{ .Label }}\" },\n    {{ end }}\n    ]\n};\n\nvar graphWidth = window.innerWidth,\n    graphHeight = window.innerHeight;\n\nvar graphCanvas = d3.select('#graphDiv')\n    .append('canvas')\n    .classed('mainCanvas', true)\n    .attr('width', graphWidth + 'px')\n    .attr('height', graphHeight + 'px')\n    .node();\n\nvar ctx = graphCanvas.getContext('2d');\n\nvar div = d3.select(\"body\").append(\"div\")\n    .attr(\"class\", \"tooltip\")\n    .style(\"opacity\", 0);\n\nvar r = 9,\n    max = {{ .MaxNum }},\n    simulation = d3.forceSimulation()\n        .nodes(graph.nodes)\n        .force(\"link\", d3.forceLink()\n            .links(graph.edges)\n            .distance(nodeLinkDistance)\n            .strength(nodeLinkStrength)\n            .id(function(d) { return d.id; }))\n        .force(\"charge\", d3.forceManyBody()\n            .strength(nodeChargeStrength)\n            .distanceMax(graphWidth))\n        .force(\"collide\", d3.forceCollide()\n            .radius(nodeCollideRadius))\n        .force(\"center\", d3.forceCenter(graphWidth / 2, graphHeight / 2))\n        .on(\"tick\", update),\n    transform = d3.zoomIdentity;\n\nd3.select(graphCanvas)\n    .call(d3.drag()\n        .container(graphCanvas)\n        .subject(dragsubject)\n        .on(\"start\", dragstarted)\n        .on(\"drag\", dragged)\n        .on(\"end\", dragended))\n    .call(d3.zoom().scaleExtent([1 / 10, 8]).on(\"zoom\", zoomed));\n\nfunction nodePercent(n) {\n    return n.num / max;\n}\n\nfunction nodeRadius(n) {\n    var p = nodePercent(n);\n\n    if (p > 0.1 && p < 0.5) {\n        p = p * 2;\n    }\n    if (p < 0.1) {\n        p = 0.1;\n    }\n    return (1 * r) + ((3 * r) * p);\n}\n\nfunction nodeCollideRadius(n) {\n    return nodeRadius(n) * 2.5;\n}\n\nfunction nodeLinkDistance(e) {\n    var n1 = graph.nodes[e.source.id],\n        n2 = graph.nodes[e.target.id];\n\n    var avg = (nodePercent(n1) + nodePercent(n2)) / 2;\n\n    if (avg > 0.7) {\n        avg = 0.7;\n    }\n    if (avg < 0.5) {\n        avg = 0.5;\n    }\n    return 100 * avg;\n}\n\nfunction nodeLinkStrength(e) {\n    var n1 = graph.nodes[e.source.id],\n        n2 = graph.nodes[e.target.id];\n\n    var fp,\n        p1 = nodePercent(n1),\n        p2 = nodePercent(n2);\n\n    if (p1 > p2) {\n        fp = p1;\n    } else {\n        fp = p2;\n    }\n\n    if (fp > 0.7) {\n        fp = 0.7;\n    }\n    if (fp < 0.5) {\n        fp = 0.5;\n    }\n    return 1 - (1 * fp);\n}\n\nfunction nodeChargeStrength(n) {\n    return -300 + (-50 * nodePercent(n));\n}\n\nfunction zoomed() {\n    transform = d3.event.transform;\n    update()\n}\n\nfunction update() {\n    ctx.save();\n    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, graphWidth, graphHeight);\n    ctx.translate(transform.x, transform.y);\n    ctx.scale(transform.k, transform.k);\n\n    graph.edges.forEach(drawEdge);\n    graph.nodes.forEach(drawNode);\n\n    if (closeNode) {\n        d3.select('#tooltip')\n            .style('opacity', 0.8)\n            .style('top', transform.applyY(closeNode.y) + 5 + 'px')\n            .style('left', transform.applyX(closeNode.x) + 5 + 'px')\n            .html(closeNode.label);\n    }  else {\n        d3.select('#tooltip')\n            .style('opacity', 0);\n    }\n\n    ctx.restore();\n}\n\nfunction drawNode(d) {\n    var size = nodeRadius(d);\n\n    ctx.beginPath();\n    ctx.fillStyle = d.color;\n    ctx.moveTo(d.x, d.y);\n    ctx.arc(d.x, d.y, size, 0, 2 * Math.PI);\n    ctx.strokeStyle = \"#333333\";\n    ctx.stroke();\n    ctx.fill();\n}\n\nfunction drawEdge(e) {\n    var dx = e.target.x - e.source.x,\n        dy = e.target.y - e.source.y,\n        align = 'center';\n\n    ctx.beginPath()\n    ctx.moveTo(e.source.x, e.source.y);\n    ctx.lineTo(e.target.x, e.target.y);\n    ctx.strokeStyle = \"#aaa\";\n    ctx.stroke();\n\n    var pad = 1/2;\n\n    ctx.save();\n    ctx.textAlign = align\n    ctx.translate(e.source.x + dx * pad, e.source.y + dy * pad);\n\n    if (dx < 0) {\n        ctx.rotate(Math.atan2(dy, dx) - Math.PI);\n    } else {\n        ctx.rotate(Math.atan2(dy, dx));\n    }\n\n    ctx.fillStyle = \"#aaa\";\n    ctx.fillText(e.label, 0, 0);\n    ctx.restore();\n}\n\nvar closeNode;\nd3.select(\"canvas\").on(\"mousemove\", function(d) {\n    var p = d3.mouse(this);\n\n    closeNode = findNode(p[0], p[1]);\n    update();\n})\n\nfunction findNode(x, y) {\n    var i,\n        newx = transform.invertX(x),\n        newy = transform.invertY(y),\n        dx,\n        dy,\n        radius;\n\n    for (i = graph.nodes.length - 1; i >= 0; --i) {\n        node = graph.nodes[i];\n        dx = newx - node.x;\n        dy = newy - node.y;\n        radius = nodeRadius(node);\n\n        if (dx * dx + dy * dy < radius * radius) {\n            return node;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nfunction dragsubject() {\n    var node = findNode(d3.event.x, d3.event.y);\n\n    node.x = transform.applyX(node.x);\n    node.y = transform.applyY(node.y);\n    return node\n}\n\nfunction dragstarted() {\n    if (!d3.event.active) simulation.alphaTarget(0.3).restart();\n    d3.event.subject.fx = transform.invertX(d3.event.subject.x);\n    d3.event.subject.fy = transform.invertY(d3.event.subject.y);\n}\n\nfunction dragged() {\n    d3.event.subject.fx = transform.invertX(d3.event.x);\n    d3.event.subject.fy = transform.invertY(d3.event.y);\n}\n\nfunction dragended() {\n    if (!d3.event.active) simulation.alphaTarget(0);\n    d3.event.subject.fx = null;\n    d3.event.subject.fy = null;\n}\n\nupdate();\n\n</script>\n</body>\n</html>\n`\n\ntype d3Edge struct {\n\tSource      int\n\tDestination int\n\tLabel       string\n}\n\ntype d3Node struct {\n\tID    int\n\tNum   int\n\tLabel string\n\tColor string\n}\n\ntype d3Graph struct {\n\tName   string\n\tMaxNum int\n\tNodes  []d3Node\n\tEdges  []d3Edge\n}\n\n// WriteD3Data generates a HTML file that displays the Amass graph using D3.\nfunc WriteD3Data(output io.Writer, nodes []Node, edges []Edge) error {\n\tcolors := map[string]string{\n\t\tstring(oam.Account):          \"chocolate\",\n\t\tstring(oam.AutnumRecord):     \"yellow\",\n\t\tstring(oam.AutonomousSystem): \"blue\",\n\t\tstring(oam.ContactRecord):    \"cornsilk\",\n\t\tstring(oam.DomainRecord):     \"yellow\",\n\t\tstring(oam.File):             \"azure\",\n\t\tstring(oam.FQDN):             \"green\",\n\t\tstring(oam.FundsTransfer):    \"red\",\n\t\tstring(oam.Identifier):       \"chocolate\",\n\t\tstring(oam.IPAddress):        \"orange\",\n\t\tstring(oam.IPNetRecord):      \"yellow\",\n\t\tstring(oam.Location):         \"darkgray\",\n\t\tstring(oam.Netblock):         \"pink\",\n\t\tstring(oam.Organization):     \"aqua\",\n\t\tstring(oam.Person):           \"bisque\",\n\t\tstring(oam.Phone):            \"coral\",\n\t\tstring(oam.Product):          \"darkslategrey\",\n\t\tstring(oam.ProductRelease):   \"darkslategrey\",\n\t\tstring(oam.Service):          \"darkslategrey\",\n\t\tstring(oam.TLSCertificate):   \"deeppink\",\n\t\tstring(oam.URL):              \"azure\",\n\t}\n\n\tgraph := &d3Graph{Name: \"OWASP Amass - Attack Surface Mapping\"}\n\n\tfor idx, node := range nodes {\n\t\tif label, err := json.Marshal(node.Title); err == nil {\n\t\t\tgraph.Nodes = append(graph.Nodes, d3Node{\n\t\t\t\tID:    idx,\n\t\t\t\tLabel: strings.Trim(string(label), \"\\\"\"),\n\t\t\t\tColor: colors[node.Type],\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\tgraph.Edges = append(graph.Edges, d3Edge{\n\t\t\tSource:      edge.From,\n\t\t\tDestination: edge.To,\n\t\t\tLabel:       edge.Title,\n\t\t})\n\t\tgraph.Nodes[edge.From].Num++\n\t\tgraph.Nodes[edge.To].Num++\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, node := range graph.Nodes {\n\t\tif node.Num > graph.MaxNum {\n\t\t\tgraph.MaxNum = node.Num\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tt := template.Must(template.New(\"graph\").Parse(d3Template))\n\treturn t.Execute(output, graph)\n}\n"
          },
          {
            "name": "dot.go",
            "path": "internal/viz/dot.go",
            "type": "file",
            "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage viz\n\nimport (\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"text/template\"\n)\n\nconst dotTemplate = `\ndigraph \"{{ .Name }}\" {\n\tsize = \"7.5,10\"; ranksep=\"2.5 equally\"; ratio=auto;\n\n{{ range .Nodes }}\n        node [label=\"{{ .Label }}\",color=\"{{ .Color }}\",type=\"{{ .Type }}\"]; n{{ .ID }};\n{{ end }}\n\n{{ range .Edges }}\n        n{{ .Source }} -> n{{ .Destination }} [label=\"{{ .Label }}\"];\n{{ end }}\n}\n`\n\ntype dotEdge struct {\n\tSource      string\n\tDestination string\n\tLabel       string\n}\n\ntype dotNode struct {\n\tID    string\n\tLabel string\n\tColor string\n\tType  string\n}\n\ntype dotGraph struct {\n\tName  string\n\tNodes []dotNode\n\tEdges []dotEdge\n}\n\n// WriteDOTData generates a DOT file to display the Amass graph.\nfunc WriteDOTData(output io.Writer, nodes []Node, edges []Edge) error {\n\t// TODO: Add more OAM types and colors\n\tcolors := map[string]string{\n\t\t\"FQDN\":      \"green\",\n\t\t\"domain\":    \"red\",\n\t\t\"IPAddress\": \"orange\",\n\t\t\"RIROrg\":    \"cyan\",\n\t\t\"Netblock\":  \"pink\",\n\t\t\"ASN\":       \"blue\",\n\t}\n\n\tgraph := &dotGraph{Name: \"OWASP Amass Network Mapping\"}\n\n\tfor idx, node := range nodes {\n\t\tgraph.Nodes = append(graph.Nodes, dotNode{\n\t\t\tID:    strconv.Itoa(idx + 1),\n\t\t\tLabel: node.Label,\n\t\t\tColor: colors[node.Type],\n\t\t\tType:  node.Type,\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\tgraph.Edges = append(graph.Edges, dotEdge{\n\t\t\tSource:      strconv.Itoa(edge.From + 1),\n\t\t\tDestination: strconv.Itoa(edge.To + 1),\n\t\t\tLabel:       edge.Title,\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\tt := template.Must(template.New(\"graph\").Parse(dotTemplate))\n\treturn t.Execute(output, graph)\n}\n"
          },

            "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage viz\n\nimport (\n\t\"bufio\"\n\t\"encoding/xml\"\n\t\"io\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"time\"\n)\n\nconst (\n\txmlNS    string = \"http://www.gephi.org/gexf\"\n\txmlNSVIZ string = \"http://www.gephi.org/gexf/viz\"\n\n\tclassNode string = \"node\"\n\n\tmodeStatic string = \"static\"\n\n\tedgeTypeDirected string = \"directed\"\n)\n\ntype gexfAttrValue struct {\n\tFor   string `xml:\"for,attr\"`\n\tValue string `xml:\"value,attr\"`\n}\n\ntype gexfAttribute struct {\n\tID      string `xml:\"id,attr\"`\n\tTitle   string `xml:\"title,attr\"`\n\tType    string `xml:\"type,attr\"`\n\tDefault string `xml:\"default,omitempty\"`\n}\n\ntype gexfAttributes struct {\n\tClass string          `xml:\"class,attr\"`\n\tAttrs []gexfAttribute `xml:\"attribute\"`\n}\n\ntype gexfParent struct {\n\tFor string `xml:\"for,attr\"`\n}\n\ntype gexfColor struct {\n\tR uint8 `xml:\"r,attr\"`\n\tG uint8 `xml:\"g,attr\"`\n\tB uint8 `xml:\"b,attr\"`\n}\n\ntype gexfNode struct {\n\tID      string          `xml:\"id,attr\"`\n\tLabel   string          `xml:\"label,attr,omitempty\"`\n\tAttrs   []gexfAttrValue `xml:\"attvalues>attvalue,omitempty\"`\n\tParents []gexfParent    `xml:\"parents>parent\"`\n\tColor   *gexfColor      `xml:\"viz:color,omitempty\"`\n}\n\ntype gexfEdge struct {\n\tID     string          `xml:\"id,attr\"`\n\tLabel  string          `xml:\"label,attr,omitempty\"`\n\tType   string          `xml:\"type,attr,omitempty\"`\n\tSource string          `xml:\"source,attr\"`\n\tTarget string          `xml:\"target,attr\"`\n\tWeight float64         `xml:\"weight,attr,omitempty\"`\n\tAttrs  []gexfAttrValue `xml:\"attvalues>attvalue,omitempty\"`\n}\n\ntype gexfMeta struct {\n\tLastModified string `xml:\"lastmodifieddate,attr\"`\n\tCreator      string `xml:\"creator\"`\n\tKeywords     string `xml:\"keywords,omitempty\"`\n\tDesc         string `xml:\"description\"`\n}\n\ntype gexfGraph struct {\n\tMode     string         `xml:\"mode,attr,omitempty\"`\n\tEdgeType string         `xml:\"defaultedgetype,attr,omitempty\"`\n\tAttrs    gexfAttributes `xml:\"attributes,omitempty\"`\n\tNodes    []gexfNode     `xml:\"nodes>node,omitempty\"`\n\tEdges    []gexfEdge     `xml:\"edges>edge,omitempty\"`\n}\n\ntype gexf struct {\n\tXMLName xml.Name\n\tVersion string    `xml:\"version,attr\"`\n\tViz     string    `xml:\"xmlns:viz,attr\"`\n\tMeta    gexfMeta  `xml:\"meta\"`\n\tGraph   gexfGraph `xml:\"graph\"`\n}\n\nvar (\n\tgexfGreen  = &gexfColor{R: 34, G: 153, B: 84}\n\tgexfRed    = &gexfColor{R: 242, G: 44, B: 13}\n\tgexfOrange = &gexfColor{R: 243, G: 156, B: 18}\n\tgexfCyan   = &gexfColor{R: 26, G: 243, B: 240}\n\tgexfPink   = &gexfColor{R: 243, G: 26, B: 188}\n\tgexfBlue   = &gexfColor{R: 26, G: 69, B: 243}\n)\n\n// WriteGEXFData generates a GEXF file to display the Amass graph using Gephi.\nfunc WriteGEXFData(output io.Writer, nodes []Node, edges []Edge) error {\n\tbufwr := bufio.NewWriter(output)\n\n\tif _, err := bufwr.WriteString(\"<?xml version=\\\"1.0\\\" encoding=\\\"UTF-8\\\"?>\\n\"); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\t_ = bufwr.Flush()\n\n\tdoc := &gexf{\n\t\tXMLName: xml.Name{\n\t\t\tSpace: xmlNS,\n\t\t\tLocal: \"gexf\",\n\t\t},\n\t\tVersion: \"1.3\",\n\t\tViz:     xmlNSVIZ,\n\t\tMeta: gexfMeta{\n\t\t\tLastModified: time.Now().UTC().Format(\"2006-01-02\"),\n\t\t\tCreator:      \"OWASP Amass - https://github.com/owasp-amass\",\n\t\t\tDesc:         \"OWASP Amass Network Mapping\",\n\t\t},\n\t\tGraph: gexfGraph{\n\t\t\tMode:     modeStatic,\n\t\t\tEdgeType: edgeTypeDirected,\n\t\t\tAttrs: gexfAttributes{\n\t\t\t\tClass: classNode,\n\t\t\t\tAttrs: []gexfAttribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t{ID: \"0\", Title: \"Title\", Type: \"string\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t{ID: \"1\", Title: \"Type\", Type: \"string\"},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor idx, n := range nodes {\n\t\tvar color *gexfColor\n\n\t\tswitch n.Type {\n\t\tcase \"FQDN\":\n\t\t\tcolor = gexfGreen\n\t\tcase \"domain\":\n\t\t\tcolor = gexfRed\n\t\tcase \"IPAddress\":\n\t\t\tcolor = gexfOrange\n\t\tcase \"RIROrg\":\n\t\t\tcolor = gexfCyan\n\t\tcase \"Netblock\":\n\t\t\tcolor = gexfPink\n\t\tcase \"ASN\":\n\t\t\tcolor = gexfBlue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tdoc.Graph.Nodes = append(doc.Graph.Nodes, gexfNode{\n\t\t\tID:    strconv.Itoa(idx),\n\t\t\tLabel: n.Label,\n\t\t\tAttrs: []gexfAttrValue{\n\t\t\t\t{For: \"0\", Value: n.Title},\n\t\t\t\t{For: \"1\", Value: n.Type},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tColor: color,\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\tfor idx, e := range edges {\n\t\tdoc.Graph.Edges = append(doc.Graph.Edges, gexfEdge{\n\t\t\tID:     strconv.Itoa(idx),\n\t\t\tLabel:  e.Label,\n\t\t\tSource: strconv.Itoa(e.From),\n\t\t\tTarget: strconv.Itoa(e.To),\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\tenc := xml.NewEncoder(bufwr)\n\tenc.Indent(\"  \", \"    \")\n\tdefer func() { _ = bufwr.Flush() }()\n\n\treturn enc.Encode(doc)\n}\n"
          },

All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage viz\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert\"\n)\n\nfunc TestWriteGEXFDataHappyPath(t *testing.T) {\n\tbuf := bytes.NewBufferString(\"\")\n\terr := WriteGEXFData(buf, testNodes(), testEdges())\n\tassert.Nil(t, err)\n\n\toutput := buf.String()\n\tassert.Contains(t, output, expectedGexfOutput, \"Gexf output should contain\")\n}\n\nconst expectedGexfOutput = `<creator>OWASP Amass - https://github.com/owasp-amass</creator>\n          <description>OWASP Amass Network Mapping</description>\n      </meta>\n      <graph mode=\"static\" defaultedgetype=\"directed\">\n          <attributes class=\"node\">\n              <attribute id=\"0\" title=\"Title\" type=\"string\"></attribute>\n              <attribute id=\"1\" title=\"Type\" type=\"string\"></attribute>\n          </attributes>\n          <nodes>\n              <node id=\"0\" label=\"owasp.org\">\n                  <attvalues>\n                      <attvalue for=\"0\" value=\"FQDN: owasp.org\"></attvalue>\n                      <attvalue for=\"1\" value=\"FQDN\"></attvalue>\n                  </attvalues>\n                  <parents></parents>\n                  <viz:color r=\"34\" g=\"153\" b=\"84\"></viz:color>\n              </node>\n              <node id=\"1\" label=\"205.251.199.98\">\n                  <attvalues>\n                      <attvalue for=\"0\" value=\"IPAddress: 205.251.199.98\"></attvalue>\n                      <attvalue for=\"1\" value=\"IPAddress\"></attvalue>\n                  </attvalues>\n                  <parents></parents>\n                  <viz:color r=\"243\" g=\"156\" b=\"18\"></viz:color>\n              </node>\n          </nodes>\n          <edges>\n              <edge id=\"0\" label=\"a_record\" source=\"0\" target=\"1\">\n                  <attvalues></attvalues>\n              </edge>\n          </edges>\n      </graph>\n  </gexf>`\n"

            "name": "viz.go",
            "path": "internal/viz/viz.go",
            "type": "file",
            "content": "// Copyright © by Jeff Foley 2017-2025. All rights reserved.\n// Use of this source code is governed by Apache 2 LICENSE that can be found in the LICENSE file.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n\npackage viz\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\tamassdb \"github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v5/internal/db\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/repository\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/asset-db/types\"\n\toam \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model\"\n\toamcert \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/certificate\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/contact\"\n\toamdns \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/dns\"\n\t\"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/org\"\n\toamreg \"github.com/owasp-amass/open-asset-model/registration\"\n)\n\n// Edge represents an Amass graph edge in the viz package.\ntype Edge struct {\n\tFrom, To int\n\tLabel    string\n\tTitle    string\n}\n\n// Node represents an Amass graph node in the viz package.\ntype Node struct {\n\tID    int\n\tType  string\n\tLabel string\n\tTitle string\n}\n\n// VizData returns the current state of the Graph as viz package Nodes and Edges.\nfunc VizData(domains []string, since time.Time, db repository.Repository) ([]Node, []Edge) {\n\tif len(domains) == 0 {\n\t\treturn []Node{}, []Edge{}\n\t}\n\n\tvar next []*types.Entity\n\tfor _, d := range domains {\n\t\tif ents, err := db.FindEntitiesByContent(&oamdns.FQDN{Name: d}, since); err == nil && len(ents) == 1 {\n\t\t\tif n, err := amassdb.FindByFQDNScope(db, ents[0], since); err == nil && len(n) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tnext = append(next, n...)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tvar idx int\n\tvar viznodes []Node\n\tvar vizedges []Edge\n\tnodeToIdx := make(map[string]int)\n\tfor len(next) > 0 {\n\t\tvar assets []*types.Entity\n\t\tassets = append(assets, next...)\n\t\tnext = []*types.Entity{}\n\n\t\tfor _, a := range assets {\n\t\t\tn := newNode(db, idx, a, since)\n\t\t\tif n == nil {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t// Keep track of which indices nodes were assigned to\n\t\t\tid := idx\n\t\t\tif nid, found := nodeToIdx[n.Label]; !found {\n\t\t\t\tidx++\n\t\t\t\tnodeToIdx[n.Label] = id\n\t\t\t\tviznodes = append(viznodes, *n)\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tid = nid\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t// Determine relationship directions to follow on the graph\n\t\t\tvar in, out bool\n\t\t\tvar inRels, outRels []string\n\t\t\tswitch a.Asset.AssetType() {\n\t\t\tcase oam.Account:\n\t\t\t\tout = true\n\t\t\t\tin = true\n\t\t\t\tinRels = append(inRels, \"sender\", \"recipient\")\n\t\t\tcase oam.AutnumRecord:\n\t\t\t\tout = true\n\t\t\tcase oam.AutonomousSystem:\n\t\t\t\tout = true\n\t\t\t\toutRels = append(outRels, \"registration\")\n\t\t\tcase oam.ContactRecord:\n\t\t\t\tout = true\n\t\t\tcase oam.DomainRecord:\n\t\t\t\tout = true\n\t\t\tcase oam.FQDN:\n\t\t\t\tif domainNameInScope(n.Label, domains) {\n\t\t\t\t\tin = true\n\t\t\t\t\tout = true\n\t\t\t\t} else if associatedWithScope(db, a, domains, since) {\n\t\t\t\t\tout = true\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcase oam.FundsTransfer:\n\t\t\t\tout = true\n\t\t\tcase oam.Identifier:\n\t\t\t\tout = true\n\t\t\tcase oam.IPAddress:\n\t\t\t\tin = true\n\t\t\t\tinRels = append(inRels, \"contains\")\n\t\t\t\tout = true\n\t\t\tcase oam.IPNetRecord:\n\t\t\t\tout = true\n\t\t\tcase oam.Location:\n\t\t\t\tout = true\n\t\t\tcase oam.Netblock:\n\t\t\t\tin = true\n\t\t\t\tinRels = append(inRels, \"announces\")\n\t\t\t\tout = true\n\t\t\t\toutRels = append(outRels, \"registration\")\n\t\t\tcase oam.Organization:\n\t\t\t\tout = true\n\t\t\t\tin = true\n\t\t\t\tinRels = append(inRels, \"subsidiary\")\n\t\t\tcase oam.Person:\n\t\t\t\tout = true\n\t\t\tcase oam.Phone:\n\t\t\t\tout = true\n\t\t\tcase oam.Service:\n\t\t\t\tout = true\n\t\t\tcase oam.TLSCertificate:\n\t\t\t\tout = true\n\t\t\tcase oam.URL:\n\t\t\t\tout = true\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t// Obtain relations to additional assets in the graph\n\t\t\tif out {\n\t\t\t\tif edges, err := db.OutgoingEdges(a, since, outRels...); err == nil && len(edges) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t\tfromID := id\n\t\t\t\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif to, err := db.FindEntityById(edge.ToEntity.ID); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttoID := idx\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tn2 := newNode(db, toID, to, since)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif n2 == nil {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif id, found := nodeToIdx[n2.Label]; !found {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tidx++\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tnodeToIdx[n2.Label] = toID\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tviznodes = append(viznodes, *n2)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tnext = append(next, to)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttoID = id\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tvizedges = append(vizedges, Edge{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tFrom:  fromID,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tTo:    toID,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tLabel: edge.Relation.Label(),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tTitle: edge.Relation.Label(),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif in {\n\t\t\t\tif edges, err := db.IncomingEdges(a, since, inRels...); err == nil && len(edges) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t\ttoID := id\n\t\t\t\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif from, err := db.FindEntityById(edge.FromEntity.ID); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tfromID := idx\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tn2 := newNode(db, fromID, from, since)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif n2 == nil {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif id, found := nodeToIdx[n2.Label]; !found {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tidx++\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tnodeToIdx[n2.Label] = fromID\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tviznodes = append(viznodes, *n2)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif edge.Relation.Label() != \"ptr_record\" {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tnext = append(next, from)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tfromID = id\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tvizedges = append(vizedges, Edge{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tFrom:  fromID,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tTo:    toID,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tLabel: edge.Relation.Label(),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tTitle: edge.Relation.Label(),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn viznodes, vizedges\n}\n\nfunc newNode(db repository.Repository, idx int, a *types.Entity, since time.Time) *Node {\n\tif a == nil || a.Asset == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\tasset := a.Asset\n\n\tkey := asset.Key()\n\tif key == \"\" {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tatype := string(asset.AssetType())\n\tswitch v := asset.(type) {\n\tcase *contact.ContactRecord:\n\t\tkey = \"Found->\" + key\n\tcase *oamreg.DomainRecord:\n\t\tkey = \"WHOIS: \" + key\n\tcase *contact.Location:\n\t\tparts := []string{v.BuildingNumber, v.StreetName, v.City, v.Province, v.PostalCode}\n\t\tkey = strings.Join(parts, \" \")\n\tcase *org.Organization:\n\t\tkey = fmt.Sprintf(\"%s (%s)\", v.Name, v.ID)\n\tcase *oamcert.TLSCertificate:\n\t\tkey = fmt.Sprintf(\"%s (%s)\", v.SubjectCommonName, v.SerialNumber)\n\t}\n\ttitle := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s: %s\", atype, key)\n\n\treturn &Node{\n\t\tID:    idx,\n\t\tType:  atype,\n\t\tLabel: strings.ReplaceAll(key, \"\\\"\", \"\"),\n\t\tTitle: title,\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc domainNameInScope(name string, scope []string) bool {\n\tvar discovered bool\n\n\tn := strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(name))\n\tfor _, d := range scope {\n\t\td = strings.ToLower(d)\n\n\t\tif n == d || strings.HasSuffix(n, \".\"+d) {\n\t\t\tdiscovered = true\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn discovered\n}\n\nfunc associatedWithScope(db repository.Repository, asset *types.Entity, scope []string, since time.Time) bool {\n\tif edges, err := db.OutgoingEdges(asset, since, \"dns_record\", \"node\"); err == nil && len(edges) > 0 {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\tif to, err := db.FindEntityById(edge.ToEntity.ID); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\tif n, ok := to.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN); ok && n != nil && domainNameInScope(n.Name, scope) {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\treturn followBackForScope(db, asset, scope, since)\n}\n\nfunc followBackForScope(db repository.Repository, asset *types.Entity, scope []string, since time.Time) bool {\n\tif edges, err := db.IncomingEdges(asset, since, \"dns_record\", \"node\"); err == nil && len(edges) > 0 {\n\t\tfor _, edge := range edges {\n\t\t\tif rel, ok := edge.Relation.(*oamdns.BasicDNSRelation); ok && rel.Header.RRType != 5 {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t} else if rel, ok := edge.Relation.(*oamdns.PrefDNSRelation); ok && rel.Header.RRType != 15 {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t} else if rel, ok := edge.Relation.(*oamdns.SRVDNSRelation); ok && rel.Header.RRType != 33 {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif from, err := db.FindEntityById(edge.FromEntity.ID); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\tif n, ok := from.Asset.(*oamdns.FQDN); ok && n != nil && domainNameInScope(n.Name, scope) {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t\t\t} else if followBackForScope(db, from, scope, since) {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn true\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n"
          },
